title: A Binary and System Integrated Analysis Approach for Securing the QUIC Protocol
summary: The Quick UDP Internet Connections (QUIC) protocol is increasingly used to provide secure transport for Internet of Things (IoT) firmware and applications. Existing security analyses of QUIC focus on the captured network traffic, while binary-level analyses of QUIC implementations remain unexplored, leaving open the question of whether a defence specified by the QUIC standard is both present in the compiled binary and active when the server is under attack. This paper evaluates the Binary and System Integrated Security Analysis (BSISA) approach, in which a binary-level analysis of the compiled QUIC server is combined with a system-level analysis of the captured network traffic, on four production QUIC server implementations under six attack scenarios. Across 24 cells, the combined classifier configuration is the only configuration that correctly classifies at least one cell on every attack scenario, achieving 45.8% overall accuracy compared with 37.5% for the binary-level configuration and 25.0% for the system-level configuration. BSISA also identifies the specific defence function in the compiled binary that absorbed each attack, and flags declared-but-silent defences, routines that are present in the compiled binary (Retry-token validation in three of four stacks, anti-amplification in quiche) but never execute during attack, a class of finding that network capture alone cannot produce. In terms of efficiency, picoquic loses legitimate-client availability under slowloris and connection- ID exhaustion with failure rates of 72.4% and 73.3% respectively, while the other three implementations hold the failure rate at or below 0.5%. We hope these insights will be informative for QUIC security evaluations in IoT firmware deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了"二进制与系统集成安全分析"(BSISA)方法，将QUIC服务器的二进制级分析与网络流量系统级分析相结合，在四种QUIC服务器实现和六种攻击场景下进行测试。结果表明，组合分析在准确率(45.8%)上优于纯二进制(37.5%)或纯系统级(25.0%)分析，并能识别已声明但静默的防御函数——这些函数虽存在于编译二进制中但在攻击时从未执行。此外，picoquic在慢速攻击和连接ID耗尽攻击下合法客户端可用性下降严重(失败率超72%)，而其他三种实现保持在0.5%以下。
AI.motivation: 现有QUIC安全分析主要聚焦于捕获的网络流量，而二进制级别的QUIC实现分析尚未得到充分探索，无法确定QUIC标准规定的防御机制是否既存在于编译后的二进制文件中，又能在服务器遭受攻击时实际生效。这在物联网固件部署场景下尤其关键。
AI.method: 提出BSISA方法，结合二进制级分析(检查编译后QUIC服务器的防御函数存在性与执行情况)和系统级分析(捕获网络流量进行攻击检测)，在四种生产级QUIC服务器实现(如quiche、picoquic等)上，针对六种攻击场景进行实验，共构建24个测试单元(4实现×6攻击)，并设置三种分类器配置(纯二进制、纯系统级、组合)进行对比。
AI.result: 组合分类器在全部24个测试单元中唯一能在每种攻击场景下至少正确分类一个单元，整体准确率45.8%，高于二进制级(37.5%)和系统级(25.0%)。BSISA还能定位吸收攻击的具体防御函数，发现"已声明但静默"的防御(如三个栈中的Retry-token验证、quiche中的anti-amplification在攻击时从未执行)。性能方面，picoquic在slowloris和连接ID耗尽攻击下合法客户端失败率分别达72.4%和73.3%。
AI.conclusion: BSISA方法能有效发现二进制级与系统级安全分析的盲区，特别是网络捕获无法检测的"已声明但静默"防御问题。不同QUIC实现在攻击下的可用性差异显著，这些发现对物联网固件部署中的QUIC安全评估具有重要参考价值。

title: Agentic-SecPBFT: Agentic AI-Driven Proactive Security Framework for Wireless PBFT Consensus in Mobile Ad-Hoc Networks
summary: The standard Practical Byzantine Fault Tolerance (PBFT) protocol, designed for stable, wired environments, exhibits critical vulnerabilities when deployed in settings like mobile ad-hoc networks, thus making it susceptible to sophisticated threats such as Sybil attacks, Byzantine collusion, and message manipulation. Existing static defense mechanisms are ill-equipped to handle the intelligent and coordinated nature of these attacks. To address this challenge, this paper leverages the Agentic AI paradigm to build a distributed multi-agent system in which each consensus node is equipped with an intelligent agent. These agents employ a hierarchical Multi-Agent Deep Q-Network (MADQN) algorithm to learn and execute proactive security policies in real-time. By observing local network behavior, message consistency, and dynamically maintained reputation scores, the agents collaboratively identify suspicious behavior and recommend defensive actions under standard PBFT quorum and membership rules, thereby improving the integrity of the consensus process. We refer to the resulting framework as Agentic-SecPBFT. Then, we formally model key attack vectors and conduct extensive simulations. The results demonstrate that Agentic-SecPBFT reaches a 95.0% attack detection rate with a 1.8% false positive rate. Compared with mainstream PBFT variants, it achieves 3.1* higher throughput with 56% lower latency on average under 33% malicious nodes, offering a robust and adaptive security solution for decentralized wireless systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic-SecPBFT框架，通过层次化多智能体深度Q网络（MADQN）为每个共识节点配备智能代理，在移动自组织网络等动态环境中实现主动安全防御，达到95%的攻击检测率与1.8%的误报率，相比主流PBFT变种吞吐量提升3.1倍、延迟降低56%。
AI.motivation: 标准PBFT协议在移动自组织网络等动态环境中存在严重安全漏洞，易遭受Sybil攻击、拜占庭合谋和消息操纵等复杂威胁，而现有静态防御机制无法应对这些智能化和协同化的攻击。
AI.method: 采用Agentic AI范式构建分布式多智能体系统，每个共识节点配备智能代理，使用层次化多智能体深度Q网络（MADQN）算法实时学习并执行主动安全策略，通过观察本地网络行为、消息一致性和动态声誉分数协同识别可疑行为并推荐防御动作。
AI.result: Agentic-SecPBFT达到95.0%的攻击检测率与1.8%的误报率，在33%恶意节点条件下相比主流PBFT变种吞吐量提升3.1倍、延迟降低56%。
AI.conclusion: Agentic-SecPBFT为去中心化无线系统提供了一种鲁棒且自适应的安全解决方案，有效提升了共识过程的完整性。

title: Beam Hopping Low Earth Orbit Satellite Resource Allocation for Differentiated Services and Robustness Analysis under Model Attacks
summary: Beam hopping (BH)-enabled Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellites play a pivotal role in next-generation communication networks by providing global coverage, improving spectrum efficiency, and supporting flexible adaptation to heterogeneous service demands. To fully exploit these capabilities, artificial intelligence (AI) techniques are increasingly employed for dynamic resource allocation and power management. However, limited onboard resources and potential adversarial perturbations pose challenges to both efficiency and robustness. To address these issues, we leverage digital twin technology to accurately capture the spatio-temporal dynamics of user-satellite visibility, thereby providing precise state information for decision-making. Building on this, we formulate a joint optimization framework for BH scheduling and power allocation as a Markov Decision Process and propose BRIDGE, i.e., BH with Reinforcement learning incorporating Integrated Dirichlet and Gumbel-TopK Exploration, which integrates a quality of service (QoS)-driven subchannel scheduling mechanism to ensure efficient and differentiated resource allocation. The robustness of the model is systematically evaluated under three classical adversarial attacks. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves superior energy efficiency, service throughput, and fairness, while the robustness analysis shows stable performance under the considered bounded adversarial perturbations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BRIDGE框架，利用数字孪生和强化学习（集成Dirichlet与Gumbel-TopK探索）优化低轨卫星的跳波束调度与功率分配，在节能、吞吐量、公平性方面表现优异，且对有限对抗扰动具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 跳波束低轨卫星面临星上资源有限和对抗性扰动威胁，现有AI方法在效率和鲁棒性上存在不足，亟需更优的联合优化方案。
AI.method: 利用数字孪生精确捕捉用户-卫星时空动态，将跳波束调度与功率分配联合建模为马尔可夫决策过程，提出BRIDGE框架，集成QoS驱动的子信道调度机制以及Dirichlet和Gumbel-TopK探索策略的强化学习。
AI.result: 仿真表明该方法在能量效率、服务吞吐量和公平性上均优于对比方案，且在三种经典对抗攻击下保持稳定性能。
AI.conclusion: BRIDGE有效解决了资源约束和对抗鲁棒性问题，为下一代通信网络中的智能星上资源管理提供了可行方案。

title: Evaluating 5G-connected IoT for Power Line Temperature Prediction: Real-World Latency and Cost Trade-offs Between MEC and Cloud
summary: One of the key promises of Mobile Edge Computing (MEC) is its low latency. Current large-scale IoT deployments rely on cloud for their reliability, low cost, and ease of use. For outdoor IoT deployments, 5G cellular networks offer significantly enhanced bandwidth and dramatically reduced latency compared to previous generations, enabling real-time data processing and control. Therefore, leveraging 5G connectivity is crucial for outdoor IoT applications requiring responsiveness and complex data handling. Combining MEC with 5G has the potential to provide the ease of cloud computing alongside low latency. We investigate the latency performance on a 5G cellular network with an experimental MEC setup. In our proof-of-concept, we demonstrate the benefits of using an edge-based compute server for real-time power transmission line analytics. We compare our solution with state-of-the-art multi-region cloud deployments and discuss the advantages of mobile edge computing (MEC). Our real-world evaluation demonstrates a low latency of 44.62 ms for MEC compared to cloud regions; however, the gap is narrowing. While such low latencies can benefit real-world deployments, they remain insufficient to meet the stringent requirements of smart power grid operations (~8 ms).

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了将移动边缘计算（MEC）与5G网络结合以降低物联网应用延迟的潜力，并通过在5G网络上搭建MEC实验平台，对实时电力传输线分析场景进行了实际评估。实验结果表明，MEC的延迟为44.62毫秒，优于多区域云部署，但仍无法满足智能电网约8毫秒的严苛要求。
AI.motivation: MEC承诺低延迟，而现有大规模物联网依赖云的可靠性，但延迟较高。5G网络提供高带宽和低延迟，将MEC与5G结合有望兼具云的易用性和低延迟，因此研究其在实际场景中的延迟表现是有意义的。
AI.method: 在5G蜂窝网络上搭建实验性MEC平台，通过实际部署边缘计算服务器进行实时电力传输线分析，并与当前主流的多区域云部署方案进行延迟对比评估。
AI.result: MEC方案实现了44.62毫秒的低延迟，优于多区域云部署，但二者差距正在缩小。该延迟仍远高于智能电网所需的约8毫秒的严苛要求。
AI.conclusion: MEC与5G结合能有效降低延迟，适用于许多实时物联网应用，但尚不足以满足如智能电网等对延迟要求极高的场景，未来仍需进一步优化。

title: Beyond Satisfaction: Learning Associations Between Content, Reviews, and Well-Being
summary: Digital platforms commonly optimize for satisfaction using signals such as ratings, likes, and sentiment, implicitly treating satisfaction as a proxy for user well-being. Psychological theory, however, characterizes well-being as a multidimensional construct that extends beyond satisfaction or short-term positivity. In this paper, we examine whether commonly used satisfaction signals capture expressions of well-being, and what types of content are associated with different well-being outcomes. Our study focuses on book consumption, a convenient domain wherein users engage substantially with fixed pieces of content and sometimes provide nuanced long-form feedback. Our results show that (a) rating scales and sentiment only loosely correlate with most facets of psychological well-being and (b) ratings and sentiment are more closely aligned with immediate and hedonic as opposed to enduring and eudaimonic expressions of well-being. Further, by linking reviews to book content, we find that themes related to values, and institutions like religion (Pearson r = 0.35) or human drives (r=.26) are associated with higher meaning and accomplishment respectively, while incivility (avg r = -.15) and past-focused language (avg r = -.12) are associated with lower well-being. These findings motivate richer outcome targets for content recommendation systems beyond satisfaction alone.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了数字平台常用的满意度信号（评分、点赞等）能否真正反映用户的心理健康，发现这些信号与心理健康只有弱相关，更偏向即时享乐而非长期幸福。通过分析书籍评论和内容，发现价值观、宗教等主题与更高幸福感相关，而不文明用语、过去导向语言则与较低幸福感相关。
AI.motivation: 数字平台常以满意度信号（评分、点赞）作为用户福祉的代理指标，但心理学理论表明幸福感是多维度的，远超满意度或短期积极情绪。作者质疑这种简化做法，希望探究满意度信号是否能真正反映用户的心理健康。
AI.method: 以书籍消费为研究领域，分析用户的评分、情感倾向与多维心理健康指标之间的关系，并通过主题建模分析书籍内容与不同幸福感维度（如意义感、成就感）的关联。
AI.result: (a) 评分和情感倾向与大多数心理健康维度只有弱相关；(b) 评分和情感更贴近即时享乐型幸福感，而非持久意义型幸福感；(c) 价值观、宗教等主题与更高意义感和成就感相关（r=0.35, r=0.26），而不文明用语（r=-0.15）和过去导向语言（r=-0.12）与较低幸福感相关。
AI.conclusion: 当前推荐系统仅以满意度为优化目标是不够的，应当纳入更丰富的心理健康指标作为目标。

title: Benchmarking the Benchmarks: A Validity Audit of Tool-Calling Evaluation
summary: Tool-calling benchmarks are increasingly used to rank language-model agents, yet their scores are often treated as ground truth without validating the evaluators themselves. We present a systematic validity and reproducibility audit of four major tool-calling benchmark families: BFCL v4, τ2-Bench, LiveMCPBench, and MCP-Atlas. Across 496 expert-reviewed benchmark tasks, we find 92 evaluator-human disagreements, corresponding to an 18.5% misalignment rate. The failures are not isolated annotation mistakes: deterministic benchmarks exhibit brittle state matching, trajectory lock-in, incorrect ground truths, substring-based communication failures, and reward-basis misalignment, while LLM-judge benchmarks exhibit rubric drift, hallucinated completion, answer-only scoring, and substantial run-to-run variance. In LiveMCPBench, 23 repeated evaluations of the same setup produce scores ranging from 57.9% to 76.8%, a spread of 18.9 percentage points, large enough to change leaderboard conclusions. These results show that current tool-calling scores can reflect evaluator artifacts rather than agent capability. We introduce a unified taxonomy of tool-calling evaluation failures, release trace-level audit artifacts and corrected evaluation components, and argue for decomposed metrics that separately measure tool invocation, task completion, and outcome verification. Our findings suggest that progress in tool-using agents requires benchmarks whose evaluators are themselves reproducible, auditable, and aligned with human judgments of task success. We further introduce Tool-Veritas, a configurable benchmark that combines deterministic state verification with optional qualitative judging, and Harness Lab, an open-source system for benchmark execution, trace inspection, repeated-run comparison, and evaluator debugging.

AI.tldr: 本文对四个主流工具调用基准（BFCL v4、τ2-Bench、LiveMCPBench、MCP-Atlas）进行了系统性的有效性和可复现性审计，发现评估器与人类判断之间的不一致率达18.5%，并揭示了确定性基准和LLM评判基准中的多种评估失败模式，表明当前工具调用分数可能反映的是评估器伪像而非智能体真实能力。论文进一步提出统一的评估失败分类体系，并发布了Tool-Veritas和Harness Lab两套工具。
AI.motivation: 当前工具调用基准的分数常被当作"ground truth"直接使用，但评估器本身的有效性从未被系统验证。研究者希望揭示这些基准评估结果中存在的系统性缺陷，避免误导整个领域对语言模型智能体真实能力的判断。
AI.method: 对BFCL v4、τ2-Bench、LiveMCPBench和MCP-Atlas四个主流工具调用基准家族进行系统性审计，通过496个专家审核的基准任务，比较评估器输出与人类判断的一致性，并对评估失败模式进行分类归纳。
AI.result: 发现92例评估器与人类判断不一致情况，不一致率18.5%。确定性基准存在状态匹配脆弱、轨迹锁定、ground truth错误、子串通信失败、奖励基础不对齐等问题；LLM评判基准存在rubric漂移、幻觉完成、仅答案评分、运行间方差大等问题。LiveMCPBench中相同设置重复评估23次，得分范围从57.9%到76.8%，跨度达18.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 当前工具调用基准的分数可能反映评估器伪像而非智能体真实能力，需要可复现、可审计且与人类判断对齐的评估器。研究提出分解式评估指标，并发布Tool-Veritas和Harness Lab以支持更可靠的基准构建和调试。

title: Improving LLMs via Validator-to-Generator Alignment
summary: Large language models are inconsistent: varying prompts or including unrelated information can lead to unexpected changes in model outputs. The generator-validator (G-V) gap is one manifestation of this phenomenon, where LLMs generate responses that they then deem as invalid if re-queried to validate them. In this work, we introduce a new formulation of G-V consistency that involves a principled correction for utterance frequency. Specifically, generators often assign low likelihood to valid strings simply because those strings are a priori unlikely, which makes naive notions of G-V consistency unworkable. We show that under a natural model of rational agents answering questions with multiple answers, consistency of the validator with a frequency-corrected generator score emerges naturally. Our method, \emph{\FCPAname} (\FCPA), is a training objective implementing frequency-corrected G-V consistency for real-world LLMs. Our experimental results show that training with \FCPA{} substantially improves both G-V consistency and generator performance over prior methods, with gains of up to $+27$pp in Pearson correlation on IFEval and HumanEval, while preserving validator quality across all evaluated tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出频率校正的生成器-验证器一致性方法（FCPA），通过修正朴素G-V一致性中因先验概率低导致的问题，显著提升LLM的一致性和生成性能。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型存在不一致性问题（如提示变化导致输出突变），其中G-V差距表现为模型生成的响应被自身验证为无效。而朴素G-V一致性因未考虑先验概率（生成器对有效字符串分配低似然）而不可行。
AI.method: 提出频率校正的生成器-验证器一致性（FCPA）训练目标，基于理性代理回答多答案问题的自然模型，对生成器得分进行频率校正后与验证器保持一致性。
AI.result: 在IFEval和HumanEval上，Pearson相关性提升高达27个百分点，同时保持验证器质量不变。
AI.conclusion: FCPA训练目标能有效改善G-V一致性和生成器性能，优于先前方法，且不影响验证器质量。

title: iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni Technical Report
summary: General-purpose embodied agents must understand multimodal instructions, anticipate how their environment will evolve, and produce precise control actions over extended horizons. Existing approaches typically specialize in visual-language reasoning, video-based world modeling, or action generation, while cascaded pipelines that first synthesize future observations and then infer actions can introduce interface bottlenecks and compound prediction errors. We present iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni, a unified multimodal foundation model that jointly models vision(videos and images), language, and action within a single Omni framework. Its modality-specific visual-language, video-generation, and action-generation components communicate through shared multimodal self-attention. This design establishes brain-cerebellum collaboration: the vision-language modeland video generation model form a high-level brain for instruction understanding, task planning, progress tracking, and future visual-state prediction, whereas the action generation modelserves as a low-level cerebellum that directly converts planned subgoals and shared multimodal context into executable action chunks. To develop these capabilities, we combine action-annotated and action-free embodied videos from human demonstrations and robot interactions with embodied reasoning, embodied perception, and general-purpose image-text data to construct a comprehensive dataset. We further adopt a four-stage strategy that progressively trains the VLM, VGM, and AGM before jointly fine-tuning the complete model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni，一个统一的多模态基础模型，将视觉、语言和动作结合在单一Omni框架中，采用"大脑-小脑"协作架构（VLM+VGM作为大脑，AGM作为小脑），并通过四阶段训练策略和综合数据集实现长期具身控制。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体在处理多模态指令、环境预测和长程控制时，通常采用视觉-语言推理、视频世界建模和动作生成的级联管道，但这种方式存在接口瓶颈和预测误差累积问题，需要统一的多模态模型来联合建模视觉、语言和动作。
AI.method: 提出iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni统一框架，包含视觉-语言模型(VLM)、视频生成模型(VGM)和动作生成模型(AGM)三个组件，通过共享多模态自注意力机制通信。采用"大脑-小脑"架构：VLM+VGM作为高级大脑进行理解和规划，AGM作为低级小脑生成动作。构建包含人类示范和机器人交互数据的综合数据集，采用四阶段渐进训练策略。
AI.result: 论文报告了统一的视觉-语言-动作联合建模框架，但未提供具体实验数据或基准测试结果。
AI.conclusion: 统一的多模态基础模型通过端到端的"大脑-小脑"协作架构，能够有效克服传统级联管道中的接口瓶颈和误差累积问题，为长期具身控制提供了新的范式。

title: Learning 3D Affordances for Blade Insertion in Cluttered Stowing
summary: Many manipulation tasks require reasoning about free-space affordances: discovering volumes where an extended rigid tool can safely navigate, complementary to surface contact affordances for grasping. Robotic stowing is a canonical instance, where a blade must sweep items aside inside cluttered fabric bins to create insertion space. Production stow systems generate millions of such episodes, but standard approaches with unimodal data infer affordances as SE(3) pose distributions, a geometric question asked in the wrong domain. VulcanVoxel keeps inference spatial: a masked autoencoder over 3D occupancy fields reconstructs blade occupancy conditioned on scene geometry, computing feasibility locally at each voxel and recovering multi-modal predictions from unimodal data. Blade affordances are spatial objects, subsets of 3D space defined by geometric feasibility. Pose parameters carry no structure for reasoning whether unobserved placements are feasible, and standard generative objectives including flow matching faithfully learn the unimodal distribution produced by execution policies and cannot recover geometric alternatives. Trained on 10,000 real warehouse stow episodes without human annotation, VulcanVoxel achieves top-5 coverage of 0.89 versus 0.71 for the best pose-based baseline, with a distilled student providing RGB-to-voxel inference in 30 ms. vs. 1.4 s. for voxel-to-voxel. We have released a dataset of real blade insertion cycles with RGB-D observations and pose trajectories at https://www.armbench.com/blade_insertion. html.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VulcanVoxel，一种基于3D体素占用场的掩码自编码器，用于推理机械臂刀片在杂乱料箱中扫动物品时的自由空间可行性。与传统的SE(3)位姿分布方法不同，该方法直接在空间域推理，从10,000个真实仓储场景中学习，Top-5覆盖率达0.89，优于基于位姿的基线方法（0.71）。
AI.motivation: 许多操作任务需要推理自由空间的可供性（affordance），即发现扩展刚性工具可以安全导航的体积空间。传统方法将可供性建模为SE(3)位姿分布，但位姿参数缺乏结构来推理未观察到的放置是否可行，且生成式目标（如流匹配）只能忠实学习执行策略产生的单峰分布，无法恢复几何替代方案。
AI.method: VulcanVoxel使用3D占用场上的掩码自编码器，以场景几何为条件重建刀片占用，在每个体素局部计算可行性。采用体素到体素（voxel-to-voxel）的推理方式，保持空间域推理。还训练了一个蒸馏学生模型，实现RGB到体素的快速推理（30ms vs 1.4s）。
AI.result: 在10,000个真实仓库收纳场景中，VulcanVoxel的Top-5覆盖率达0.89，最佳基于位姿的基线方法为0.71。蒸馏模型实现RGB-to-voxel推理仅需30ms，而voxel-to-voxel需1.4s。
AI.conclusion: 将可供性推理从位姿空间转移到空间域（3D体素）在多模态几何推理中更有效，能从单峰数据中恢复多模态预测。

title: Agentic-V2X: Small Language Model Agents for Deadline-Aware V2X Scheduling in 5G/6G Networks
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are proposed as control interfaces for next-generation networks, but their latency, hallucinations, and lack of control guarantees make them unsuitable for near-real-time packet schedulers, especially in dynamic V2X environments. This paper introduces Agentic-V2X, an architecture where a small, locally deployed language model acts as a periodic non-real-time rApp-inspired policy creator, while a lightweight xApp-like controller executes validated policies at intervals suitable for scheduling. The framework targets deadline-aware 5G NR V2X scheduling with heterogeneous services (teleoperated driving, cooperative awareness, HD map sharing, and sensor sharing). Given a scenario summary, service objective, and telemetry, the LLM generates a structured policy containing service priorities, weight bounds, and safety constraints. A validator checks and repairs the policy before the controller enforces it via scheduler-weight adaptation in ns-3/ns3-ai. The evaluation compares proportional fair scheduling, static expert policies, a heuristic xApp, static LLM policies, and adaptive LLM-rApp policies over 126 completed runs. Metrics include deadline-constrained packet reception ratio, tail latency, deadline violations, throughput, fairness, policy validity, and safety interventions. Results show that the adaptive LLM-rApp/xApp design generates valid and executable policies and remains competitive at several operating points, including improved mean critical reliability over PF at the highest density. However, paired statistical analysis shows that the adaptive method is not the best aggregate method and remains below the strongest static policies overall. These results support Agentic-V2X as a safe, executable small-LLM policy-generation architecture rather than a universally dominant scheduler.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic-V2X架构，利用小型本地语言模型作为非实时策略生成器，结合轻量级xApp控制器，为5G NR V2X提供可执行的、安全的调度策略，在动态车联网场景中表现竞争力但并非全局最优。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型作为网络控制接口存在延迟高、幻觉问题和缺乏控制保障，不适合近实时数据包调度，尤其在动态V2X环境中，需要一种更安全、可执行的策略生成架构。
AI.method: 提出Agentic-V2X架构：小型本地LLM作为rApp风格的非实时策略生成器，轻量级xApp控制器在调度间隔内执行验证后的策略。LLM根据场景摘要、服务目标和遥测数据生成结构化策略（含优先级、权重边界、安全约束），验证器检查并修复策略，控制器通过ns-3/ns3-ai调整调度器权重来执行。
AI.result: 在126次运行中，自适应LLM-rApp/xApp设计能生成有效可执行策略，在高密度场景下关键可靠性均值优于比例公平调度，但配对统计分析表明自适应方法并非全局最优，整体上仍弱于最强的静态策略。
AI.conclusion: Agentic-V2X可作为安全、可执行的小型LLM策略生成架构，适合作为调度辅助而非通用最优调度器。

title: Gendered Pixels: Exploring Gender Differences in Computer-Mediated Self-Presentation among Douyu Live Streamers
summary: Live streaming platforms, as computer-mediated communication (CMC) systems, provide streamers with a range of tools, such as webcams, beauty filters, and stream titles, to shape their online personas in ways that either conform to or deviate from viewers' expectations. Drawing on gender role and CMC theories, this study examines how streamers leverage CMC self-presentation tools to fulfill gender role expectations and their associated live streaming outcomes. Analyzing data collected from 867 streamers and 94,227 streams on Douyu, a popular Chinese live streaming platform, we find that although both female and male streamers make extensive use of CMC tools, female streamers are more likely to employ visual strategies, such as webcams and beauty filters, than male streamers. We further find that although different tools have varying associations on streamers' earnings and audience engagement, the benefits of webcam use are weaker for female than for male streamers. These findings underscore the complex interplay between gender roles and technology use in the live streaming domain.

AI.tldr: 本研究基于性别角色理论和计算机中介传播理论，分析中国直播平台斗鱼上867名主播和94,227场直播数据，发现女主播比男主播更倾向于使用摄像头和美颜滤镜等视觉策略，但摄像头使用对女主播收入和观众参与度的提升效果弱于男主播，揭示了性别角色与技术使用在直播领域的复杂交互作用。
AI.motivation: 探究直播平台中主播如何利用CMC自我呈现工具（如摄像头、美颜滤镜、直播标题等）来迎合或偏离观众对性别角色的期待，以及这些策略对直播效果（收入、观众参与度）的影响。
AI.method: 基于性别角色理论和CMC理论，收集斗鱼平台867名主播的94,227场直播数据，采用定量分析方法检验不同性别主播在CMC工具使用上的差异及其对直播效果的影响。
AI.result: （1）女主播比男主播更倾向于使用摄像头和美颜滤镜等视觉策略；（2）不同CMC工具对主播收入和观众参与度的影响存在差异；（3）摄像头使用对女主播的收入和观众参与度提升效果弱于男主播。
AI.conclusion: 直播平台上性别角色与技术使用之间存在复杂交互作用，女性主播更依赖视觉自我呈现策略，但这类策略带来的边际收益反而低于男性主播，揭示了性别化技术使用的悖论。

title: When Not to Write Memory: Governing False Promotion from Correlated Agent Traces
summary: Long-lived language agents increasingly write reusable memories from their own execution traces. The key safety question is not only what agents should remember, but when they should refuse to write memory at all. Repeated observations across agents are not necessarily independent evidence: the same claim may be copied from a shared source, induced by a shared prompt, stale under a new environment, or valid only in a narrower scope. We study this failure mode as a memory writepath governance problem. We introduce GovMem as a conservative diagnostic reference policy that estimates dependency-aware support, retrieves counterevidence, assigns scope, and outputs one of three decisions: promote, reject, or needs-review. In controlled synthetic stress tests, GovMem reduces false promotion from 0.597 to 0.040 in the default setting while preserving 0.960 recall, at an explicit review burden. In a project-internal 120candidate human-labeled real-trace subset spanning 79 recorded traces and project reports, dependency-aware promotion reduces false promotion from 0.371 for source+scope to 0.032 overall, but held-out false promotion remains 0.111 and the method is highly conservative, with 0.692 review burden and 0.448 direct recall. A final human adjudication of 133 high-impact external codingagent candidates is more severe: none are safe for automatic promotion, and all 11 verification-gate positives are rejected as boilerplate, shared-tool artifacts, file dumps, or non-reusable debugging traces. These results support GovMem primarily as a diagnostic governance design point, not as a generally validated or efficient automatic memory writer: agent memory write paths should be evaluated as risk-controlled evidence-governance systems, while broader external coverage and downstream harm evidence are still needed before stronger claims.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GovMem，一种保守的诊断性记忆写入治理策略，用于解决长寿命语言智能体在从执行轨迹中写入可复用记忆时面临的依赖感知支持问题。实验表明GovMem能大幅降低虚假提升（从0.597降至0.040），但存在高审查负担（0.692）和低召回率（0.448），作者主张将智能体记忆写入路径视为风险控制的证据治理系统。
AI.motivation: 长寿命语言智能体从执行轨迹中写入可复用记忆时，重复观察并非独立证据——同一声明可能来自共享源、被共享提示诱导、在新环境下过时或仅适用于狭窄范围。现有的记忆写入机制缺乏对这类依赖关系的感知和治理，导致虚假信息被提升为记忆。
AI.method: 提出GovMem，一种保守的诊断性参考策略，包含以下步骤：1）估计依赖感知的支持度；2）检索反证证据；3）分配作用范围；4）输出三种决策之一：提升（promote）、拒绝（reject）或需要审查（needs-review）。
AI.result: 在合成压力测试中，虚假提升从0.597降至0.040，召回率保持0.960。在120个候选的内部真实轨迹子集中，虚假提升从0.371降至0.032，但总体虚假提升率为0.111，审查负担0.692，直接召回率0.448。在133个外部编码智能体候选的人类裁决中，无一适合自动提升。
AI.conclusion: GovMem主要应被视为诊断性治理设计点，而非经过验证的高效自动记忆写入器。智能体记忆写入路径应作为风险控制的证据治理系统进行评估，仍需更广泛的外部覆盖和下游危害证据才能得出更强的主张。

title: Echoes of Unrest: A Multimodal NLP Framework for Early Warning of Fake News and Violence-Driven Mob Activity
comment: Accepted for publication as a book chapter (Taylor & Francis, 2026)
summary: Rapid growth in social media has transformed global communication by enabling fast information exchange, but it has also accelerated the spread of misinformation. Fake news, manipulated content, and provocative narratives are increasingly linked to social unrest, political instability, and mob violence. Incidents in South Asia and elsewhere demonstrate how false information disseminated via platforms such as Facebook and WhatsApp can trigger real-world harm, often spreading faster than fact-checking efforts can respond. To address this challenge, this chapter presents a multilingual, multimodal Natural Language Processing (NLP) framework for early detection of misinformation and violence-prone dynamics. A fused dataset of 138,256 Bangla and English samples was created by combining multiple benchmark datasets. The framework integrates XLM-RoBERTa for multilingual text representation, CLIP for visual embedding, and a multi-head attention mechanism for multimodal fusion, enhanced with auxiliary features such as sarcasm and geospatial metadata. Experiments on a stratified 30% subset achieved 98% test accuracy with strong precision and recall. The outcomes show the efficacy of multimodal approaches in early misinformation detection and highlight the added value of geospatial signals for anticipating real-world escalation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个多语言、多模态的NLP框架，整合XLM-RoBERTa、CLIP和多头注意力机制，在138,256条孟加拉语和英语的融合数据集上实现了98%的测试准确率，用于早期检测 misinformation 和暴力倾向动态。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上虚假信息传播速度超过事实核查能力，已导致南亚等地的社会动荡、政治不稳定和群体暴力事件，亟需早期检测框架。
AI.method: 构建138,256条孟加拉语和英语的融合数据集；框架整合XLM-RoBERTa（多语言文本表示）、CLIP（视觉嵌入）和多头注意力机制（多模态融合），并引入讽刺检测和地理空间元数据作为辅助特征。
AI.result: 在30%分层子集上测试准确率达98%，精确率和召回率均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 多模态方法在早期 misinformation 检测中效果显著，地理空间信号对预测现实世界事件升级具有额外价值。

title: Internal Pluralism and the Limits of Pairwise Comparisons
summary: Local pairwise comparisons are a standard tool for learning how people want decision rules to work, e.g., in participatory design or alignment. However, their use builds in two strong assumptions: that local comparisons are sufficient evidence about how a person wants an automated decision rule to behave, and that people can always answer those comparisons decisively. We investigate how these assumptions may be compromised under internal pluralism: the idea that an individual evaluates decision rules according to multiple authoritative priorities about how the rule should behave. We provide a formal model of such pluralistic preferences over decision rules, which then lets us identify two distinct failures of forced local pairwise comparison data. First, priorities such as proportionality, egalitarianism, and equal treatment are inherently global: what they imply in one case can depend on what happens elsewhere, so local comparisons may fail to capture them. Second, even when priorities are representable locally, tension between strongly-held priorities can generate internal conflict, producing potentially costly behavioral distortions when comparisons are forced. We then use our model to investigate the alternative -- allowing people to report indecision -- and our findings suggest that doing so can considerably reduce the number of queries needed to learn preferences accurately. We conclude by describing how our model points toward preference-learning methods that elicit these priorities directly, yielding more faithful and interpretable accounts of what people value.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了内部多元主义（个体存在多重视角优先级）如何破坏局部成对比较的假设，指出局部比较无法捕捉全局性优先级（如比例性、平等主义），且强制比较会因内部冲突导致行为扭曲。作者提出允许报告“犹豫”可减少查询次数，并建议直接 eliciting 优先级的方法来更忠实地学习人类偏好。
AI.motivation: 局部成对比较是参与式设计和对齐中学习人类偏好的标准工具，但其依赖两个强假设：局部比较足以反映个体对决策规则的偏好，以及个体总能给出决定性回答。作者质疑这些假设在内部多元主义（个体同时持有多个权威优先级）下可能失效。
AI.method: 形式化建模了多元偏好（多个优先级关于决策规则如何运行），并基于此模型分析两种失败模式：1）全局性优先级（如比例性、平等主义）无法被局部比较捕捉；2）即使优先级可局部表示，强制比较会引发内部冲突导致行为扭曲。进一步模拟了允许报告“犹豫”的效果。
AI.result: 1）局部比较无法充分捕捉全局性优先级；2）强制比较在内部冲突下会产生代价高昂的行为扭曲；3）允许报告犹豫可显著减少准确学习偏好所需的查询次数。
AI.conclusion: 建议采纳更直接的优先级 elicitation 方法，以获取更忠实、可解释的人类价值偏好模型。

title: DELTAVID: Enhancing Fine-Grained Spatiotemporal Perception with Cross-Video Differences
summary: Video multimodal large language models have made strong progress on open-ended video understanding, but they still lack precise local spatiotemporal perception. When two videos share almost the same global semantics and differ only in a short time span or a small region, current models often fail to find the change and provide reliable evidence. We propose DELTAVID, a verifiable proxy-task framework that enhances fine-grained spatiotemporal perception with cross-video differences. The key idea is to turn cross-video spot-the-difference into a trainable perception signal, where a model identifies local changes, judges temporal boundaries, and organizes spatial evidence by comparing similar videos. To make this signal scalable to train and reliable to evaluate, we further introduce DELTAVID-10K and DELTAVID-Bench, which convert controllable local differences in real videos into evidence-labeled training and test samples. Experiments show that DELTAVID substantially improves performance on cross-video difference understanding and transfers the learned local evidence ability to general video understanding benchmarks, including MMVU, MLVU, Video-MME, VideoHolmes, VideoMMMU, LVBench, TempCompass, and LongVideoBench. These results show that cross-video differences are not only an effective way to diagnose fine-grained perception failures, but also a scalable proxy supervision that moves Video MLLMs from coarse semantic understanding toward fine-grained spatiotemporal evidence reasoning.

AI.tldr: DELTAVID通过跨视频找差异的代理任务框架，增强视频多模态大模型的细粒度时空感知能力，并构建了带证据标注的数据集和评测基准，显著提升了模型在多种视频理解任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前视频多模态大模型在开放域视频理解上表现不错，但缺乏精确的局部时空感知能力。当两个视频全局语义几乎相同、仅局部时空存在差异时，现有模型往往无法发现变化并提供可靠证据。
AI.method: 提出DELTAVID框架，核心是将"跨视频找不同"转化为可训练的感知信号，让模型识别局部变化、判断时间边界、组织空间证据。同时构建DELTAVID-10K训练集和DELTAVID-Bench评测基准，将真实视频中的可控局部差异转化为带证据标注的训练和测试样本。
AI.result: DELTAVID在跨视频差异理解任务上显著提升，并将学到的局部证据能力迁移到8个通用视频理解基准（MMVU、MLVU、Video-MME、VideoHolmes等）上。
AI.conclusion: 跨视频差异不仅是诊断细粒度感知失败的有效方式，也是一种可扩展的代理监督信号，推动视频MLLM从粗粒度语义理解走向细粒度时空证据推理。

title: On the Physical Plausibility and Distribution Alignment for Sim-to-Real RF Positioning
comment: This work was supported by funding under the bilateral agreement between CNR (Italy) and HESC MESCS RA (Armenia) as part of the DeepRF project for the 2025-2026 biennium, and by the HESC MESCS RA grant No. 22rl-052 (DISTAL)
summary: Reliable radio frequency (RF) positioning from cellular measurements is limited by the high cost and limited coverage of real drive-test data, especially when models must work on streets not seen during training. Previous work showed that ray tracing simulations can provide useful synthetic data for pretraining deep positioning models. In this paper, we focus on the simulation side and study how base-station calibration, physical realism, synthetic-data scale, and RSSI distribution alignment affect transfer to real data. Using a Sionna reconstruction of a Rome deployment, we calibrate each base station by adjusting its location, height, azimuth, and transmit power. We compare physically plausible calibrations with unconstrained ones that allow unrealistic base-station placements. We also compare deployment-specific synthetic data with much larger city-scale datasets. Although unconstrained calibration matches measured RSSI better, it does not always improve positioning accuracy. All synthetic pretraining approaches improve performance on known streets, with the best result obtained using city-scale unconstrained data. However, larger synthetic datasets alone do not improve performance on unseen streets. The best results on held-out streets are achieved only after normalizing simulated RSSI values to better match the real distribution. Overall, the results suggest that distribution alignment is more important than physical realism or dataset size for sim-to-real RF positioning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了蜂窝网络RF定位中，仿真数据（尤其是基站校准、物理真实感、数据规模和RSSI分布对齐）对模型迁移到真实数据的影响。发现分布对齐比物理真实感或数据规模更重要，特别是在未见过街道上的定位性能提升中起关键作用。
AI.motivation: 真实路测数据成本高、覆盖有限，尤其模型需泛化到未训练的街道。先前工作表明光线追踪仿真可提供预训练数据，但如何优化仿真侧以提升迁移效果尚待系统研究。
AI.method: 基于Sionna重建罗马蜂窝部署，校准每个基站的参数（位置、高度、方位角、发射功率），对比物理合理校准与无约束校准，以及部署特定数据与城市级大数据集，并通过归一化调整RSSI分布对齐。
AI.result: 无约束校准虽更好匹配实测RSSI，但未必提升定位精度。城市级无约束数据在已知街道表现最佳；但更大数据集未提升未知街道性能。仅在RSSI分布对齐后，未知街道性能才达最优。
AI.conclusion: 从仿真到真实的RF定位中，分布对齐比物理真实感或数据集规模更关键。

title: Angry but Accurate: Detecting and Profiling the Counter-Misinformation Ecosystem on Twitter
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to ACM Hypertext 2026
summary: On social media, many users actively push back against false claims. Understanding who pushes back and how they do so matters, as this corrective activity is central to how misinformation is contested. We study this counter-misinformation ecosystem at scale: applying a domain-specific NLI model from our prior work to a large corpus of COVID-19 tweets, we classify 264,737 posts as supporting or opposing false claims and compare 23 user- and text-level features across the two groups. Contrary to the dominant assumption that negative emotion is a signature of falsehood, we find that anti-misinformation posts are more emotionally negative than pro-misinformation posts, with higher levels of anger, disgust, and sadness. These differences are modest in magnitude but consistent in direction across the negative emotions. We also find that posts opposing misinformation tend to come from more established users, i.e., older accounts, more followers, and higher listed counts.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过NLI模型对26.4万条COVID-19推文进行分类，发现反对虚假信息的帖子比支持虚假信息的帖子包含更多负面情绪（愤怒、厌恶、悲伤），且发布者多为更成熟的用户（账号更老、粉丝更多、被列入列表次数更多）。这一发现挑战了“负面情绪是虚假信息标志”的传统假设。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上许多用户主动反击虚假信息，理解谁在反击以及如何反击对于揭示错误信息如何被质疑至关重要。现有研究通常假设负面情绪是虚假信息的标志，但这一假设可能不准确，需要大规模实证检验。
AI.method: 使用领域特定的NLI模型对COVID-19相关推文进行分类，识别出264,737条支持或反对虚假信息的帖子，然后比较两组在23个用户层面和文本层面特征上的差异。
AI.result: 反对虚假信息的帖子比支持虚假信息的帖子表现出更多负面情绪（愤怒、厌恶、悲伤），差异虽小但方向一致。此外，反对虚假信息的帖子通常来自更成熟的用户（账号年龄更老、粉丝更多、被列入列表次数更多）。
AI.conclusion: 传统认为“负面情绪是虚假信息标志”的假设过于简化；事实上，反对虚假信息的行为本身也带有强烈负面情绪。这提示我们在研究错误信息传播时，需要更细致地理解情绪与信息真实性之间的复杂关系。

title: Better Together, in the Right Order: Classical-then-LLM Optimization for SE
summary:
A growing body of work combines large language models (LLMs) with classical optimizers for software engineering (SE) configuration tasks. Often, the classical optimizer is in charge: it owns the search loop and calls the LLM only to assist in subroutines (e.g. to warm-start the first generation, propose a mutation, or stand in as a surrogate). We report that there is much value in the reverse approach: seeding an LLM with the results from a cheap classical learner.
  We call this method SNAP2. Applied to over 100 SE tasks, it is the single best of all methods studied, reaching the top tier on 85% of tasks, ahead of the same LLM run alone (75%) and ahead of every method in which the classical optimizer retains control. It is also less expensive: relative to the LLM-alone method, it uses roughly 30% fewer tokens and runs 1.4x faster, since the classical setup performs the inexpensive work, and the LLM is invoked only to finish.
  We conclude that it is unwise to study classical learners or LLMs in isolation: there is much value in combining the two, and in the order that combination is applied.

AI.tldr: SNAP2方法将廉价经典学习器的结果作为种子输入给大语言模型，在100多个软件工程配置任务中表现最佳（85%任务达到顶级），比单独使用LLM（75%）更好，且节省30% token和1.4倍速度提升。
AI.motivation: 现有工作多让经典优化器主导搜索循环，LLM仅辅助子程序；本文探索反向思路——用廉价经典学习器的结果来初始化LLM，探究这种组合顺序的价值。
AI.method: 提出SNAP2方法：先用廉价经典学习器进行初步搜索，将其结果作为种子输入给LLM，由LLM完成后续优化。在100多个SE配置任务上进行实验评估。
AI.result: SNAP2在85%任务中达到顶级表现，优于单独LLM（75%）及所有经典优化器主导的方法；相比单独LLM，节省约30% token，运行速度快1.4倍。
AI.conclusion: 不应孤立研究经典学习器或LLM，二者结合且结合顺序至关重要——先用经典学习器做廉价工作，再用LLM精调，效果和效率均更优。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Data-Efficient Code-Switched ASR
summary: Audio-language models can be prompted for code-switched speech, but their decoding is not optimized for code-switching and often fails at language boundaries. We propose a practical reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards recipe for data-efficient adaptation of audio-language models to code-switched ASR using group relative policy optimization, combining an error rate reward with a script fidelity reward that penalizes wrong writing systems and a two-pass draft-and-refinement procedure. Using Qwen2-Audio as a reproducible testbed across 10 language pairs, training on only TTS code-switched speech, we show that RLVR with 10% of the data matches LoRA supervised fine-tuning trained on the full dataset, with the largest gains on typologically distant pairs. The error rate reward eliminates translation errors while the script fidelity reward separately reduces script contamination without degradation. These gains transfer zero-shot to a human-recorded code-switching corpus.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）方法，结合GRPO优化、错误率奖励和脚本保真度奖励，以及两遍草稿-精炼流程，高效地将音频-语言模型适配到语码转换语音识别任务上。仅用10%的TTS数据即可匹配全量数据的LoRA监督微调效果，在10个语言对上均有效，尤其对类型学距离远的语言对提升最大。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-语言模型在解码语码转换（code-switched）语音时未针对该场景优化，在语言边界处经常出错，需要一种数据高效的适配方法。
AI.method: 使用基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）框架，采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）；组合两种奖励：错误率奖励（ER reward）和脚本保真度奖励（SF reward，惩罚错误书写系统）；采用两遍草稿-精炼流程（draft-and-refinement）；仅用TTS生成的语码转换语音数据训练。
AI.result: 在Qwen2-Audio上跨10个语言对验证，仅用10%数据训练的RLVR即可匹配全量数据的LoRA监督微调性能；在类型学距离远的语言对上增益最大；错误率奖励消除翻译错误，脚本保真度奖励减少脚本污染；零样本泛化到人工录制的语码转换语料库。
AI.conclusion: 所提RLVR方法是一种数据高效、可泛化的语码转换ASR适配方案，两个奖励组件各自解决特定问题且互不干扰。

title: ASK in the Dark: Uncertainty-Gated LLM Assistance under Partial Observability
comment: Accepted at the IJCAI-ECAI Joint Workshop on Planning for Complex Real-World Applications and Bridging the Gap Between AI Planning and (Reinforcement) Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning agents operating under partial observability must act on incomplete information, making them natural candidates for guidance from small language models (SLMs) that carry broad reasoning priors. Yet integrating SLM guidance into this setting has proven difficult: across all test environments, vanilla uncertainty-gated approaches achieve an overwrite rate at or near zero, meaning the SLM almost never contributes an independent action. We trace this failure to the bare egocentric prompt, which provides insufficient context for genuine reasoning, and identify it as a context problem rather than a capacity problem. We propose ASK+, which supplies the SLM with trajectory-aware context (a partially revealed map, visited positions, and action history) and structured chain-of-thought reasoning, converting it from a passive redundancy check into a more informative consultant that occasionally corrects the policy. We further establish that the predictive entropy signal used for selective querying measures action uncertainty rather than state uncertainty and remains informative in POMDPs, making uncertainty-gated assistance viable beyond fully observable settings. The stateful prompt drives substantial gains: on DoorKey, where vanilla ASK matches PPO (both 89%), ASK+ reaches 93% success; on FourRooms, success climbs from 53% to 70%; on HigherLower, accuracy reaches 73.7%, matching the SLM-only upper bound. Across all environments, Qwen3.5-2B matches or exceeds Qwen3.5-4B, confirming that prompt design and selective gating dominate the impact of model scale, enabling guidance without large models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASK+方法，通过为小语言模型提供轨迹感知的上下文和结构化思维链推理，解决了部分可观测环境下强化学习智能体难以有效利用SLM指导的问题，显著提升了任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测环境中，RL智能体必须在信息不完整下行动，自然适合借助携带广泛推理先验的小语言模型指导。然而已有的不确定性门控方法几乎无法让SLM贡献独立动作（重写率接近零），这种失败源于裸自我中心提示缺乏足够上下文，是一个上下文问题而非容量问题。
AI.method: 提出ASK+方法，为SLM提供轨迹感知的上下文（部分揭示的地图、已访问位置、动作历史）和结构化思维链推理，将SLM从被动的冗余检查转化为信息性顾问，选择性纠正策略。同时证明了预测熵信号衡量的是动作不确定性而非状态不确定性，在POMDP中仍然有效。
AI.result: DoorKey上从89%（PPO和ASK）提升至93%；FourRooms从53%提升至70%；HigherLower达到73.7%，匹配SLM上限。Qwen3.5-2B表现达到或超过Qwen3.5-4B，证明提示设计和选择性门控对模型规模影响更大。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计的提示和不确定性门控机制，无需大模型即可有效利用小语言模型指导部分可观测环境下的强化学习智能体。

title: Interpretable machine learning predicts Parkinson's disease severity using motion-corrected QSM MRI and multiband multiecho fMRI features
comment: 16 pages from main manuscript and 17 pages from supplementary information
summary:
Introduction: Objective neuroimaging biomarkers may improve Parkinson's disease motor assessment by capturing brain variation not directly observable from clinical examination. We used interpretable machine learning to predict current motor severity, measured by MDS-UPDRS Part III, from QSM and multiband multi-echo resting-state fMRI-derived ReHo features.
  Methods: Regional QSM and ReHo features were extracted from 28 participants, including 24 individuals with Parkinson's disease and 4 controls. Thirteen feature-set experiments evaluated imaging-only, clinical-only, imaging-plus-clinical, full, reduced, and multimodal inputs. Support vector regression, Elastic Net, Random Forest, and XGBoost models were trained using nested cross-validation. Performance was assessed using pooled held-out R^2, RMSE, MAE, Pearson correlation, permutation testing, and the proportion of participants predicted within +/-5 MDS-UPDRS Part III points.
  Results: Imaging-only models carried meaningful predictive signal, whereas the clinical-only model performed weakly. Full fMRI, full QSM, and clinical variables provided the strongest global fit, explaining 45.4% of variance in motor severity. Selected QSM plus clinical variables produced the most clinically close predictions, with 75.0% of participants predicted within +/-5 points and the lowest MAE among top-performing models. SHAP highlighted cerebellar, thalamic, striatal, insular, and motor cortical features.
  Conclusion: QSM and multiband multi-echo fMRI-derived ReHo capture distinct, interpretable dimensions of Parkinson's disease motor severity. These findings show that structural and functional imaging contribute differently depending on the clinical prediction goal.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用可解释机器学习，从QSM和多频多回波静息态fMRI（ReHo特征）预测帕金森病运动严重程度（MDS-UPDRS Part III）。在28名参与者（24名PD患者、4名对照）中，全量fMRI+QSM+临床变量解释了45.4%的方差，而精选QSM+临床变量在临床预测准确度上最优（75%的参与者预测误差在±5分以内）。SHAP分析揭示了小脑、丘脑、纹状体、岛叶和运动皮层等关键脑区特征。
AI.motivation: 传统的帕金森病运动评估依赖临床检查，无法捕捉到大脑中不可直接观察的变异信息。研究者希望利用客观的神经影像生物标志物，通过可解释机器学习来更准确地预测运动严重程度。
AI.method: 从28名受试者中提取区域QSM和ReHo特征，设计了13个特征集实验（影像、临床、影像+临床、全量、精简、多模态等）。使用SVR、Elastic Net、Random Forest、XGBoost四种模型，采用嵌套交叉验证训练。评估指标包括R²、RMSE、MAE、Pearson相关、置换检验以及±5分内的预测准确率。
AI.result: 仅用影像特征即可携带有意义的预测信号，而仅用临床特征表现较弱。全量fMRI+全量QSM+临床变量解释了45.4%的运动严重度方差。精选QSM+临床变量组合在临床应用上最优：75%的参与者预测误差在±5分以内，且MAE最低。SHAP分析显示小脑、丘脑、纹状体、岛叶和运动皮层是关键预测特征。
AI.conclusion: QSM和多频多回波fMRI-derived ReHo能够捕捉帕金森病运动严重程度中不同且可解释的维度。结构和功能影像在不同临床预测目标下贡献不同，这为开发客观的PD运动评估工具提供了依据。

title: Wireless Gas Leak Detection and Localization
summary: Thousands of industrial gas leaks occur every year, with many leading to injuries, deaths, equipment damage, and a disastrous environmental effect. There have been many attempts at solving this problem, but with limited success. This paper proposes a wireless gas leak detection and localization solution. With a monitoring network of 20 wireless devices covering 200m^2, 60 propane releases are performed. The detection and localization algorithms proposed here are applied to the collected concentration data, and the methodology is evaluated. A detection rate of 91% is achieved, with seven false alarms recorded over three days, and an average detection delay of 108 seconds. The localization results show an accuracy of 5 meters. Recommendations for future explosive gas sensor design are then presented.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无线气体泄漏检测与定位解决方案，通过20个无线设备覆盖200m²的监测网络，进行了60次丙烷释放实验，实现了91%的检测率、平均108秒检测延迟和5米定位精度。
AI.motivation: 工业气体泄漏每年造成大量伤亡、设备损坏和环境灾难，现有解决方案成效有限，亟需更有效的检测与定位方法。
AI.method: 部署20个无线传感器组成的监测网络覆盖200m²区域，进行60次丙烷释放实验，采集浓度数据后应用检测与定位算法进行分析评估。
AI.result: 检测率达91%，三天内记录7次误报，平均检测延迟108秒，定位精度达5米。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无线检测与定位方案效果良好，并给出了未来爆炸性气体传感器设计的建议。

title: An Exploratory Study of Malicious Link Posting on Social Media Applications
summary: Social network platforms are now widely used as a mode of communication globally due to their popularity and their ease of use. Among the various content-sharing capabilities made available via these applications, link-sharing is a common activity among social media users. While this feature provides a desired functionality for the platform users, link sharing enables attackers to exploit vulnerabilities and compromise users' devices. Attackers can exploit this content-sharing feature by posting malicious/harmful URLs or deceptive posts and messages which are intended to hide a dangerous link. However, it is not clear how the most common social media applications monitor and/or filter when their users share malicious URLs or links through their platforms. To investigate this security vulnerability, we designed an exploratory study to examine the top five android social media applications' performance when it comes to malicious link sharing. The aim was to determine if the selected applications had any filtering or defenses against malicious URL sharing. Our results show that most of the selected social media applications did not have an effective defense against the posting and spreading of malicious URLs. While our results are exploratory, we believe our study demonstrates the presence of a vital security vulnerability that malicious attackers or unaware users can use to spread harmful links. In addition, our findings can be used to improve our understanding of link-based attacks as well as the design of security measures that usability into account.

AI.tldr: 研究了五大安卓社交媒体应用对恶意链接分享的防御能力，发现大多数应用缺乏有效防御机制，存在严重安全漏洞。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体平台的链接分享功能被广泛使用，但攻击者可利用此功能发布恶意URL，而目前尚不清楚主流社交媒体应用如何监控或过滤恶意链接分享。
AI.method: 设计了一项探索性研究，选取五款最受欢迎的安卓社交媒体应用，测试它们对恶意URL分享的过滤或防御能力。
AI.result: 大多数被测试的社交媒体应用缺乏对恶意URL发布和传播的有效防御措施。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明社交媒体平台存在严重的安全漏洞，可能被攻击者或不知情用户利用来传播恶意链接；研究结果有助于理解基于链接的攻击，并为设计兼顾可用性的安全措施提供参考。

title: The Moving Target: A Longitudinal Audit of Trustworthiness Drift Across Twelve Checkpoints of Open-Source Chat LLMs
comment: 22 pages, 2 figures; accepted as a poster at the ICML 2026 TAIGA Workshop
summary: Model cards quote trust-benchmark scores without recording when they were measured, and the same number is routinely carried across successive checkpoints of one release line as if the model behind it had not shifted. We test whether it has shifted by auditing four open-source release lines, Yi, Qwen, Mistral, and Gemma, at three successive generations each, on a fixed basket of trust benchmarks under multiple prompt templates. Mean absolute adjacent-generation drift lands well above an independence-based no-drift reference null, and the gap persists when we drop a benchmark, drop a release line, or switch to strict scoring. We therefore conclude that a trust score attached to a release line should not be carried forward to the next checkpoint without remeasurement; it should instead be reported as a checkpoint-bound, dated artefact, which we package as a longitudinal model card. Closed APIs, larger models, canonical benchmark protocols, and fixed month-cadence rules lie outside the audited scope and require their own evaluation.

AI.tldr: 该研究审计了四个开源模型系列（Yi、Qwen、Mistral、Gemma）在连续检查点上的信任基准分数漂移情况，发现相邻检查点间的分数变化显著高于无漂移参考值，表明信任分数不应跨检查点沿用，而应作为绑定检查点并标注日期的制品来报告，并提出了纵向模型卡的概念。
AI.motivation: 当前模型卡引用的信任基准分数未记录测量时间，且同一分数被不加区分地沿用到同一个发布系列的后续检查点上，忽略了模型权重更新可能带来的性能变化，这可能导致对模型可信度的错误评估。
AI.method: 对Yi、Qwen、Mistral、Gemma四个开源模型系列，各取连续三个生成代际的检查点，在固定信任基准测试集上使用多种提示模板进行评测，计算相邻检查点间的分数变化（漂移），并与基于独立性的无漂移参考零假设进行比较。
AI.result: 平均相邻代际漂移显著高于无漂移参考值，且该结果在剔除单个基准、剔除单个模型系列或采用严格评分标准后依然稳健成立。
AI.conclusion: 信任分数不应被跨检查点沿用，而应作为绑定具体检查点并标注测量日期的制品来报告；为此提出了纵向模型卡这一方案。封闭API、更大模型、规范基准协议和固定月度节奏规则不在本次审计范围内，需要单独评估。

title: LuxSQA: Ask Me in Luxembourgish with TTS-Augmented Spoken Question Answering
summary: Spoken Question Answering (SQA) remains largely focused on high-resource languages and carefully recorded speech, limiting the reach of speech-LLM methods in low-resource settings. This paper investigates whether text-to-speech (TTS) can provide task-specific training data for Luxembourgish SQA without requiring a large human-recorded QA corpus. Starting from existing text-based QA resources, we translate questions into Luxembourgish, synthesize spoken questions with multiple TTS systems, and pair them with textual answers. We train a parameter-efficient SLAM-style architecture that connects a frozen Whisper encoder to frozen multilingual LLM backends through a learned projector and LoRA adapters. We compare MMS-TTS, Qwen3-TTS, and OmniVoice variants, including single-source corpora of about 48k questions and a 4TTS multi-source mix of approximately 230k questions. Evaluation on LLAMA-LB-Test with two real Luxembourgish speaker conditions shows that multi-source and voice-design-based synthetic training configurations yield the strongest SQA performance. The results also show that no-reference TTS quality scores do not monotonically predict downstream QA performance, indicating that synthetic speech must be evaluated as task-specific training data rather than only as natural-sounding audio.

AI.tldr: 本文探索利用文本转语音（TTS）为低资源语言卢森堡语生成口语问答（SQA）训练数据，通过多源TTS合成和参数高效SLAM架构训练，发现多源合成数据效果最佳，且TTS质量与下游任务性能并非单调正相关。
AI.motivation: 现有口语问答研究集中于高资源语言和精心录制的语音，低资源语言缺乏大规模人工标注的问答语音数据，限制了语音-大语言模型方法的推广。
AI.method: 将现有文本QA数据翻译为卢森堡语，使用多种TTS系统（MMS-TTS、Qwen3-TTS、OmniVoice等）合成语音，构建单源（~48k）和多源混合（~230k）数据集；训练参数高效的SLAM架构，通过可学习投影器和LoRA适配器连接冻结的Whisper编码器和多语言LLM。
AI.result: 多源混合合成数据训练效果最优；无参考TTS质量评分不能单调预测下游QA性能，合成语音需作为任务特定训练数据评估。
AI.conclusion: TTS可有效为低资源语言提供SQA训练数据，但合成语音的质量需要从任务适用性而非自然度角度评估，多源合成策略能提升模型鲁棒性。

title: Automated Data Readiness for Scientific AI
summary: Leadership computing facilities steward large-scale scientific datasets that routinely require substantial transformation before serving as AI training data. However, no existing framework fully unifies automated transformation, readiness assessment, provenance tracking, and agent-native deployment. We present REDI, an open-source framework that addresses this gap through a unified five-stage pipeline (ingest, preprocess, transform, structure, and output) with per-stage instrumentation for reproducibility and deployment as an agent-callable skill; companion tool SetGo automates FAIR compliance and catalog publication. Evaluated across climate, proteomics, materials science, and nuclear fusion, REDI transforms all datasets from raw to AI-ready, with outputs validated against domain-expert references, and preliminary results show near-ideal parallel scaling to 100 nodes on Frontier for the climate case. Provenance-instrumented profiling reveals file I/O as the dominant pipeline cost, with format selection a first-order optimization lever. These results establish REDI as a cross-domain platform providing automated data readiness for scientific AI, transforming data preparation bottlenecks into reproducible, reusable community assets.

AI.tldr: REDI是一个开源框架，通过统一的五阶段流水线（摄取、预处理、转换、结构化、输出）和配套工具SetGo，实现科学数据集到AI训练数据的自动化转换、就绪评估、来源追踪和部署，并在气候、蛋白质组学、材料科学和核聚变四个领域验证了其跨领域有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有框架无法统一自动化转换、就绪评估、来源追踪和智能体原生部署，导致大规模科学数据集在成为AI训练数据前需要大量人工转换工作。
AI.method: 提出REDI框架，包含五阶段流水线（摄取、预处理、转换、结构化、输出），每个阶段配备可复现性工具；配套SetGo工具实现FAIR合规和目录发布；支持作为智能体可调用的技能进行部署。
AI.result: 在气候、蛋白质组学、材料科学和核聚变四个领域验证成功，所有数据集从原始状态转换为AI就绪状态；在Frontier超级计算机上对气候案例达到近理想的100节点并行扩展；来源追踪分析显示文件I/O是主要成本，格式选择是关键优化点。
AI.conclusion: REDI成为跨领域平台，为科学AI提供自动化数据就绪能力，将数据准备瓶颈转化为可复现、可重用的社区资产。

title: Reliability-Aware Monocular Depth Supervision for Sparse-View Neural Reconstruction
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. All authors contributed equally
summary: Sparse-view neural reconstruction is challenging in outdoor driving scenes, where cameras usually move along a narrow forward-facing trajectory and provide limited multi-view overlap. Although monocular depth estimators can provide dense geometric priors, their predictions are noisy, and not uniformly reliable across image regions. In this work, we study monocular depth supervision for sparse-view neural reconstruction. We use Depth Anything V2 as a dense monocular depth prior, align its predictions to metric depth using scale-shift fitting, and apply depth supervision selectively through photometric masks generated from an RGB-only baseline model. We evaluate this strategy on two representative scene representations: Mip-NeRF-360 and Splatfacto. On KITTISeq02 under an every2 sparse-view setting, masked monocular depth supervision gives only marginal rendering gains for Mip-NeRF-360 and does not improve metric geometry. In contrast, Splatfacto benefits more clearly, improving PSNR from 14.903 to 15.932 and reducing RMSE from 0.542 to 0.100. Additional KITTISeq05 experiments and matched-ratio mask ablations further show that the gains for Splatfacto come from selecting reliable low-error regions rather than simply reducing the number of depth-supervised pixels. Additional experiments on the Bicycle scene show that depth supervision can improve geometry while hurting RGB rendering quality when multi-view coverage is already strong. Overall, our results suggest that monocular depth priors are useful for under-constrained sparse-view reconstruction, but should be applied selectively and with moderate weighting.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在稀疏视角的户外驾驶场景中，如何利用单目深度估计（Depth Anything V2）作为先验，通过光度掩码选择性监督神经重建。实验表明，该方法对Splatfacto有显著提升（PSNR从14.903到15.932，RMSE从0.542降到0.100），但对Mip-NeRF-360效果有限，且在多视角覆盖充足时反而可能损害RGB质量。
AI.motivation: 户外驾驶场景中相机沿狭窄前向轨迹移动，多视角重叠有限，稀疏视角下的神经重建极具挑战。虽然单目深度估计能提供密集几何先验，但其预测存在噪声且不同区域可靠性不均，因此需要研究如何有效选择性地利用这些深度先验。
AI.method: 使用Depth Anything V2作为稠密单目深度先验，通过尺度-平移拟合将其对齐到度量深度；然后利用RGB-only基线模型生成光度掩码，仅在可靠区域施加深度监督。在Mip-NeRF-360和Splatfacto两种场景表示上评估该策略。
AI.result: 在KITTISeq02每2帧稀疏设置下：Mip-NeRF-360仅获得边际渲染提升且几何指标无改善；Splatfacto显著提升，PSNR从14.903到15.932，RMSE从0.542降到0.100。消融实验表明增益来自选择低误差可靠区域而非减少监督像素数量。在自行车场景中，深度监督在提升几何的同时会损害RGB渲染质量。
AI.conclusion: 单目深度先验对约束不足的稀疏视角重建有用，但需选择性应用并设置适中的权重，不能无差别地全图监督。

title: Version-Aware Communication in Multi-Hop IoT Networks with Feedback
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Timely communication of information in Internet of Things (IoT) networks is critical to enhancing system performance and energy efficiency by minimizing the transmission of outdated or redundant data. Although timeliness metrics such as the Age of Information (AoI) effectively quantify information freshness, they do not account for content evolution. The Version Age of Information (VAoI) addresses this gap by tracking version lag at the receiver, thereby providing a practical content-aware metric. However, prior research has primarily focused on first-moment analyses in single-hop settings, leaving the distributional properties of VAoI in multi-hop networks, as well as the impact of feedback mechanisms, unexplored. In this study, we provide a comprehensive characterization of VAoI in multi-hop networks with transmission constraints and acknowledgment-based feedback. A bi-level optimization framework is formulated to jointly optimize the update policy of a rate-constrained source and the feedback-aware forwarding policies of the intermediate nodes, aiming to minimize communication overhead while maintaining VAoI performance at the destination. We show that the optimal source policy follows a threshold-based update strategy and derive the optimal threshold in closed form. For both the optimal threshold policy and a randomized baseline, we obtain closed-form expressions for the stationary distribution and average VAoI, along with the corresponding update rates across network nodes under feedback-aware forwarding. Numerical results corroborate the analytical findings and illustrate the advantages of utilizing VAoI and feedback to reduce redundant transmissions while preserving data freshness and informativeness in multi-hop systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多跳IoT网络中版本信息年龄（VAoI）的分布特性，提出了一种双层优化框架，联合优化速率受限源的更新策略和中继节点的反馈感知转发策略，在保证VAoI性能的同时最小化通信开销，并推导了最优阈值策略的闭式解。
AI.motivation: 现有研究中，信息时效性指标（如AoI）未考虑内容演化；而VAoI虽弥补了这一缺陷，但以往工作仅关注单跳网络的一阶矩分析，未探索多跳网络中VAoI的分布特性及反馈机制的影响。
AI.method: 建立双层优化框架：（1）源节点采用阈值触发更新策略；（2）中间节点采用基于反馈感知的转发策略。推导最优阈值的闭式解，并给出稳态分布、平均VAoI及更新速率的闭式表达式。
AI.result: 最优源更新策略为阈值策略，闭式解可得；在最优阈值策略和随机基线策略下，均获得了稳态分布和平均VAoI的闭式表达式；数值结果验证了理论分析，并展示了利用VAoI和反馈减少冗余传输的优势。
AI.conclusion: 在多跳网络中，结合VAoI和反馈机制能有效降低通信开销，同时保持信息的时效性和信息量，为IoT网络的资源高效通信提供了理论依据。

title: Dynamic Interest Rate Discovery in Decentralized Finance: A Reverse Kelly Automated Market Maker for Risk-Adjusted Lending
summary: Decentralized Finance (DeFi) lending protocols currently rely on heuristic, utilization-based bonding curves that mandate severe over-collateralization, systematically excluding under-collateralized assets like corporate invoices. This paper introduces a mathematically optimal pricing mechanism for decentralized credit: the Reverse Kelly Automated Market Maker (rkAMM), the core engine of our proposed lending framework. By inverting the Kelly Criterion, traditionally used for optimal bet sizing, we construct a dynamic interest rate discovery protocol that explicitly prices individual loan risk. The rkAMM ingests real-time Probability of Default (PD) streams from an off-chain Explainable AI oracle and dynamically calculates the exact interest rate required to sustain target liquidity provider (LP) yields. We mathematically derive the Reverse Kelly pricing function ($r = \frac{y + PD}{1 - PD}$), proving its strictly convex superiority over Aave and Compound's static utilization curves in managing capital efficiency. Furthermore, we deploy the rkAMM architecture via Solidity smart contracts, optimizing for gas-efficient 1e18 (WAD) floating-point arithmetic. To ensure decentralized transparency, our simulation infrastructure leverages MLflow for tracking yield hyperparameters, Data Version Control (DVC) linked to DagsHub for versioning Real-World Asset (RWA) data arrays, and localized edge-inference via Ollama (Llama-3) and Hugging Face (FinBERT) for zero-cost predictive modeling. Monte Carlo simulations across 10,000 macroeconomic stress scenarios confirm that the rkAMM maintains protocol solvency and stabilizes LP yields at 12-15\% net of expected credit losses. This work provides the foundational financial engineering required to bridge the \$2 trillion global supply chain finance gap using permissionless blockchain infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了逆向凯利自动做市商(rkAMM)，通过反转凯利准则构建动态利率发现协议，实现去中心化信贷定价。rkAMM利用实时违约概率数据动态计算利率，在10,000次宏观压力测试中保持协议偿付能力并稳定LP收益率在12-15%，旨在利用无许可区块链弥合2万亿美元全球供应链金融缺口。
AI.motivation: 现有DeFi借贷协议依赖基于利用率的启发式债券曲线，强制要求严重超额抵押，系统性排除了企业发票等低抵押资产，导致全球供应链金融的巨大缺口无法通过去中心化方式填补。
AI.method: 反转凯利准则构建逆向凯利定价函数(r = (y + PD)/(1 - PD))；接入离链可解释AI预言机的实时违约概率流；Solidity智能合约实现，优化WAD浮点运算；利用MLflow追踪收益超参数，DVC+DagsHub管理RWA数据，Ollama和Hugging Face进行边缘推理。
AI.result: 数学证明逆向凯利定价函数具有严格凸性优于Aave和Compound的静态利用率曲线；10,000次蒙特卡洛宏观压力测试表明rkAMM维持协议偿付能力，LP收益率稳定在12-15%净预期信用损失。
AI.conclusion: 本文为使用无许可区块链基础设施弥合2万亿美元全球供应链金融缺口提供了基础金融工程方案，使得低抵押资产进入DeFi借贷成为可能。

title: OmniPresent: Generating Coherent Presentation Suites from Scientific Papers
summary: Transforming static research papers into dynamic media such as posters, slides, and videos is essential for effective dissemination but remains a labor-intensive challenge. Existing automated approaches often treat these formats in isolation and consequently fail to maintain semantic consistency across the entire presentation suite. We address this fragmentation by formalizing the task of unified presentation suite generation and proposing $\textbf{OmniPresent}$ to orchestrate the creation of coherent deliverables. Our framework adopts a renderable HTML representation to enable centralized content planning and a self-correcting verify-and-repair loop that actively resolves conflicts across modalities. We further facilitate scalable research in this domain by releasing $\textbf{OmniPreBench}$, a comprehensive dataset comprising over one thousand papers with paired artifacts, and establishing a rigorous VLM-based evaluation protocol. Empirical results confirm that our method generates high-quality and faithful presentation suites that significantly surpass strong baselines in both accuracy and visual appeal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniPresent框架，将静态论文自动转化为海报、幻灯片、视频等统一演示套件，通过可渲染HTML表示和自纠正验证修复循环保证语义一致性，并发布OmniPreBench数据集（千余篇论文及配套成品）和VLM评估协议，实验证明效果显著优于基线。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将不同演示格式（海报、幻灯片、视频）割裂处理，导致生成的成品间语义不一致，且自动化转化仍是一项劳动密集型难题。
AI.method: 1）形式化定义统一演示套件生成任务；2）采用可渲染HTML表示实现集中式内容规划；3）设计自纠正的验证-修复循环（verify-and-repair loop）主动解决模态间冲突；4）发布OmniPreBench数据集和VLM评估协议。
AI.result: OmniPresent生成的演示套件在准确性和视觉吸引力上均显著超越强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 统一的内容规划与跨模态冲突解决机制能有效生成高质量、语义一致的论文演示套件，该数据集和评估协议有助于推动该领域的可扩展研究。

title: Gemma 4 Technical Report
summary: We introduce Gemma 4, a new generation of open-weight, natively multimodal language models in the Gemma model family. Designed to advance compute efficiency and reasoning, the Gemma 4 model suite features dense and Mixture-of-Experts architectures, ranging from 2.3B to 31B parameters. Alongside improved vision and audio encoders for all model sizes, we propose a unified, encoder-free architecture for our 12B model, which ingests raw audio and image patches. Furthermore, we integrate a thinking mode, enabling Gemma models to generate reasoning traces prior to responding. We improve inference speed, memory, and compute efficiency, as well as long-context abilities through critical design choices. Gemma 4 establishes a leap in performance across STEM, multimodal, and long-context benchmarks, and rivals larger, frontier open models in human-rated tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Gemma 4，新一代开源多模态语言模型系列，涵盖2.3B到31B参数的密集和MoE架构，集成了改进的视觉/音频编码器、无编码器架构、思维推理模式，在STEM、多模态和长上下文基准上表现卓越。
AI.motivation: 推动计算效率和推理能力的进步，构建开源、原生多模态的语言模型系列。
AI.method: 采用密集和MoE架构（2.3B-31B参数）；改进视觉和音频编码器；为12B模型提出统一的无编码器架构直接处理原始音频和图像块；集成"思考模式"（生成推理轨迹后响应）；优化推理速度、内存、计算效率和长上下文能力。
AI.result: 在STEM、多模态和长上下文基准测试中取得性能飞跃，在人工评任务中与更大规模的前沿开源模型相匹敌。
AI.conclusion: Gemma 4通过架构创新和效率优化，证明了小参数模型也能在关键任务上竞争甚至超越更大规模模型。

title: SwarmResearch: Orchestrating Coding Agents for Open-Ended Discovery
summary: Long-running coding agents such as autoresearch can persistently discover optimizations for open-ended problems. However, they tend to converge onto a single high-level approach, then proceed with low-level edits while missing other superior approaches to the problem. We hypothesize two harness-level design choices contribute to this behavior: accumulating context in a single long-running agent and only exposing a single program state to edit. We introduce SwarmResearch, an orchestrator-subagent harness in which a Shepherd Agent uses global context to steer a population of Search Agents, each operating with local context in their respective git branch. On open-ended optimization tasks, SwarmResearch discovers better or comparable solutions to state-of-the-art LLM-guided evolution and multi-agent techniques on 13/15 tasks, driven by higher-level exploration. Compared with fixed scaling of serial and parallel agents, SwarmResearch's orchestrator-guided scaling discovers better-performing solutions by adapting parallelism at different search depths.

AI.tldr: SwarmResearch通过"编排者-搜索代理"架构（Shepherd Agent+多分支Search Agents）解决了长时运行编码智能体倾向于收敛到单一方法的问题，在13/15个开放优化任务上达到或超越SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有长时运行编码智能体（如autoresearch）容易收敛到单一高级方法，只进行低层级编辑而错过更优方案。作者假设两个设计缺陷：单个长时代理中积累上下文、只暴露单一程序状态进行编辑。
AI.method: 提出SwarmResearch框架：一个Shepherd Agent利用全局上下文引导一组Search Agents（每个在独立git分支中操作局部上下文），形成编排者-子代理架构，实现高层次探索与低层次编辑的解耦。
AI.result: 在13/15个开放优化任务上超越或持平SOTA的LLM引导进化方法与多智能体技术，通过编排者引导的缩放策略（自适应并行度）比固定串行/并行代理缩放发现更优方案。
AI.conclusion: 编排者-子代理架构（全局上下文引导+局部上下文分支搜索）能有效克服长时运行智能体的收敛问题，提升高层次探索能力，并且编排者引导的缩放策略优于固定缩放策略。

title: Do Diabetic Foot Ulcer Segmentation Models Generalize? A Cross-Dataset Benchmark of CNN and Transformer Architectures
summary: Deep learning models for diabetic foot ulcer (DFU) segmentation routinely report high accuracy, but they are almost always trained and tested on the same dataset, leaving their behaviour on data from a different clinical source largely unmeasured. We benchmark three representative segmentation architectures -- U-Net and DeepLabV3+ (convolutional) and SegFormer-B2 (Transformer) -- under an identical, leakage-screened protocol: training on the combined FUSeg/AZH wound data and evaluating, without fine-tuning, on two independent external datasets (DFUC2022 and Medetec). All models achieve strong in-domain performance (Dice 0.80--0.83) but degrade substantially across datasets. The degradation is, however, architecture-dependent: SegFormer-B2 generalizes best on both external sets (DFUC2022 Dice 0.557, Medetec Dice 0.786), outperforming both convolutional models, while the more complex DeepLabV3+ generalizes worse than the simpler U-Net. Per-image failure analysis on 2,160 images across both external test sets confirms that SegFormer-B2 produces the fewest catastrophic failures on DFUC2022 (31.1%), compared with U-Net (38.5%) and DeepLabV3+ (43.0%). The consistent ranking across two independent external sources, confirmed by Wilcoxon signed-rank tests (p < 0.001 on both datasets), indicates that architecture family, not model complexity, drives cross-hospital generalization.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了三种深度学习架构（U-Net、DeepLabV3+、SegFormer-B2）在糖尿病足溃疡分割任务中的跨数据集泛化能力，发现所有模型在领域内表现良好（Dice 0.80-0.83），但在外部数据集上性能显著下降。SegFormer-B2（Transformer架构）在跨医院泛化上表现最佳，且架构类型比模型复杂度更关键。
AI.motivation: 现有DFU分割模型多在同一数据集上训练和测试，跨临床来源的泛化能力未被充分测量。
AI.method: 在FUSeg/AZH组合数据上训练U-Net、DeepLabV3+（卷积）和SegFormer-B2（Transformer），在DFUC2022和Medetec两个外部数据集上零微调评估，并进行每图像失败分析及Wilcoxon符号秩检验。
AI.result: SegFormer-B2在外部数据集上Dice分别达0.557和0.786，优于U-Net和DeepLabV3+；其灾难性失败率最低（31.1%），且排名在两个数据集上均一致（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 架构家族（而非模型复杂度）是驱动跨医院泛化的关键因素，Transformer架构泛化能力更强。

title: RANPilot: Making AI Functionalities Robust to Dynamic O-RAN Reconfigurations
summary: The Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) promises unprecedented flexibility through its reconfigurable architecture and AI-driven control. However, this agility exposes a critical fragility: AI models trained on one network configuration suffer significant performance degradation after an upgrade due to dramatic data drift. The standard solution, reactive retraining, is unacceptably slow, leaving the network in a suboptimal state for tens of minutes and undermining the core benefits of O-RAN's dynamism. This paper introduces RANPilot, the first framework to address this challenge through proactive AI adaptation. RANPilot constructs a lightweight "virtual O-RAN" (a trace-driven emulator) to synthesize high-fidelity training data representing the post-reconfiguration state before the physical change occurs, allowing AI models to be adapted in advance. Extensive experiments on a real-world 5G testbed demonstrate that RANPilot achieves near interruption-free AI services upon reconfiguration, reducing AI downtime by 85% to 94% against reactive baselines. By shifting the AI evolution paradigm from reactive redevelopment to proactive preparation, RANPilot explores a digital-leadoff approach to enable robust AI in reconfigurable O-RAN deployments.

AI.tldr: RANPilot通过构建轻量级虚拟O-RAN仿真器，在网络升级前主动生成训练数据，实现AI模型的事先适配，将AI停机时间减少85%-94%。
AI.motivation: O-RAN的AI模型在网元升级后遭遇数据漂移导致性能骤降，而传统的反应式重训练恢复缓慢（数十分钟），严重制约了O-RAN动态重构的灵活性优势。
AI.method: 构建一个基于trace驱动的轻量级虚拟O-RAN仿真器，在物理网络变更前合成高保真的后重构状态训练数据，从而提前完成AI模型的适配。
AI.result: 在真实5G测试平台上，相比反应式基线方法，将AI停机时间减少了85%至94%，实现了近乎无中断的AI服务。
AI.conclusion: RANPilot开创了从"反应式重开发"到"主动式预备"的AI演进范式，通过数字先行（digital-leadoff）的思路为可重构O-RAN部署中的鲁棒AI提供了新路径。

title: The Politics Attention Makes: Platform Media Logic and the Mediatization of Politics
summary: Empirical research on social media and politics has primarily treated platforms as distributive systems that expose users to particular messages. The mediatization literature, however, suggests shifting attention upstream: from circulation to production. Under intense competition for platform attention, political actors who depend on visibility face pressure to learn from recurrent differences in reach and engagement - shaping politics around platform media logic. This paper examines that production-side dimension of platforms political impact by introducing attention price analysis: an exploratory method for estimating the differentiated attention returns associated with forms of expression. Using RoBERTa reward models trained on residualized engagement across X/Twitter, Bluesky, and Mastodon, the analysis compares how platform environments reward rhetorical, emotional, epistemic, and relational features of public communication. The attention signal differs sharply across platforms and engagement actions. X/Twitter sharing rewards antagonism while penalizing respect and nuance; Bluesky reposting favors neutral, lower-emotion language; and Mastodon boosts reward reasoning, nuance, compassion, and collective expression. Toxicity is rewarded across platforms, but in bounded and nonlinear ways. The findings suggest that moving from X/Twitter to less engagement-optimized alternatives such as Bluesky and Mastodon does not eliminate attention pressures, but it may reward less antagonistic and more deliberative forms of politics. The paper contributes a production-side approach to social media and politics by making one dimension of platform media logic empirically visible.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“注意力价格分析”方法，利用RoBERTa奖励模型研究X/Twitter、Bluesky和Mastodon三个平台上不同表达形式的注意力回报差异。发现各平台对修辞、情感、认知和关系特征有不同的奖励机制：X鼓励对抗、惩罚尊重；Bluesky偏好中立低情绪语言；Mastodon奖励推理、细微差别和集体表达。毒性内容在所有平台都有回报，但呈非线性关系。从X转向替代平台虽不能消除注意力压力，但可能奖励更具协商性的政治表达。
AI.motivation: 现有社交媒体与政治研究主要将平台视为分发系统，关注信息传播效果，而忽略了生产端——即政治行为者为了争取平台注意力，如何根据平台反馈调整其表达方式。本文试图从生产端理解平台的政治影响。
AI.method: 提出“注意力价格分析”方法：使用RoBERTa奖励模型，对X/Twitter、Bluesky和Mastodon三个平台上残差化的参与度数据进行训练，分析不同平台如何奖励修辞性、情感性、认知性和关系性表达特征。
AI.result: X/Twitter的分享奖励对抗、惩罚尊重和细微差别；Bluesky的转发偏好中立、低情绪语言；Mastodon的点赞奖励推理、细微差别、同情和集体表达。毒性内容在所有平台均被奖励，但呈有界非线性。
AI.conclusion: 从X转向Bluesky或Mastodon并不能消除注意力压力，但可能奖励更少对抗性、更具协商性的政治表达。本文为社交媒体与政治研究提供了生产端的分析视角，使平台媒体逻辑的一个维度变得可经验观察。

title: Attributing Structured-Output Gains in Function Calling: Interface Alignment versus Procedural Transfer
summary: Structured-output benchmarks reward both task decisions and interface compliance, so prompt-induced function-calling gains require attribution before they can be interpreted as transferable skill. We introduce a four-layer gain-attribution protocol for prompt-prepended skill injection, combining canonicalized rescoring, format-only controls, repaired/balanced induction, and portability checks. Applied to the Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard (BFCL) and scoped with API-Bank, MATH-500, and MultiHop-RAG, the protocol shows that several apparent gains are better attributed to interface alignment than to procedural transfer: format-only prompts match or exceed full skills in key BFCL cells, repaired/balanced induction removes the largest sub-frontier gains, and API-Bank target-native gains are matched within 0.5 percentage points (pp) by length-matched generic procedural prompts. These findings treat format compliance as a useful engineering capability while clarifying what a structured-output score certifies. We release BFCL-CANONICAL and recommend canonicalized metrics, balanced induction, and format-only baselines for function-calling skill-gain attribution. Code and data are available at https://github.com/couragec/skill-injection-attribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套四层增益归因协议，用于区分提示注入中的技能提升到底是真正的可迁移能力，还是仅仅因为格式对齐造成的虚假增益。实验表明，许多表面上的技能提升实际上来自接口对齐而非程序性迁移。
AI.motivation: 结构化输出基准测试同时衡量任务决策和接口合规性，因此提示注入带来的功能调用增益需要归因分析，才能判断其是否代表可迁移的技能，而非仅仅是格式上的对齐。
AI.method: 提出四层增益归因协议：1) 规范化重新评分，2) 纯格式控制，3) 修复/平衡归纳，4) 可移植性检查。在BFCL、API-Bank、MATH-500、MultiHop-RAG等基准上进行验证。
AI.result: 纯格式提示在BFCL关键单元格中与完整技能提示表现相当或更好；修复/平衡归纳消除了最大的子前沿增益；API-Bank上，长度匹配的通用程序性提示与目标原生增益差距在0.5个百分点以内。
AI.conclusion: 格式合规是一种有用的工程能力，但需要明确结构化输出分数真正认证的是什么。建议采用规范化指标、平衡归纳和纯格式基线来归因功能调用技能增益。

title: Seduced by the Narrative: Assessing Rule Adherence in Semi-Open Textual Sandboxes
summary: As LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous adjudicators in semi-open textual game environments, robust rule adherence becomes critical when user intent conflicts with system rules. However, these models are trained to be helpful and compliant, leaving them vulnerable to a class of attacks we term \textit{Rhetorical Injection}, where adversarial users exploit narrative framing techniques such as pseudo-logical reasoning and authoritative coercion to bypass adjudication logic. We present CoC-Seduce, a multi-agent adversarial benchmark built on Tabletop Role-Playing Game (TRPG) mechanics, an ideal instantiation of semi-open environments where rules are explicit for adjudication, yet interaction remains entirely in natural language. Three frontier models, i.e., GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.5 Flash, serve as adversarial generators producing 5,376 samples across 4 world settings and 16 skill categories. We then benchmark 20 target adjudicators against this corpus. Evaluation across 20 models reveals that neither model scale nor explicit reasoning mechanisms reliably confer adjudication robustness, with \textsc{Pseudo-Logic} emerging as the dominant attack vector and cross-cultural settings exposing systematic knowledge gaps across all evaluated families. Project page: https://github.com/answerrtx/CoC-Seduce

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoC-Seduce基准，利用TRPG机制生成5376个对抗样本，评估20个LLM裁判在规则执行中的脆弱性，发现修辞注入（如伪逻辑推理）能有效绕过裁判逻辑，且模型规模和推理机制均无法保证鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: LLM作为自主裁判部署在半开放文本游戏环境中时，用户意图与系统规则冲突成为关键问题。然而模型被训练为乐于助人且顺从，容易受到"修辞注入"攻击——用户利用伪逻辑推理、权威胁迫等叙事框架技术绕过裁判逻辑。
AI.method: 基于TRPG机制构建多智能体对抗基准CoC-Seduce，使用三个前沿模型（GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.5 Flash）作为对抗样本生成器，在4个世界设定和16个技能类别下生成5376个样本，并用20个目标裁判模型进行评估。
AI.result: 1）模型规模和显式推理机制都不能可靠地带来裁判鲁棒性；2）伪逻辑是最主要的攻击向量；3）跨文化设定暴露出所有评估模型家族的系统性知识缺口。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM裁判在面对修辞注入攻击时普遍脆弱，需要针对规则违背的鲁棒性进行专门改进，尤其在跨文化场景下。

title: Object-Centric Environment Modeling for Agentic Tasks
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents can improve through accumulated experience, but free-form textual memories become difficult to maintain, validate, and reuse as interactions grow. Recent symbolic approaches learn executable skills or programmatic world models, yet often store local procedures or assume simplified dynamics. We propose Object-Centric Environment Modeling (OCM), which organizes experience into an executable object-centric environment model. OCM maintains two connected code bases: object knowledge, which defines environment entities and mechanisms as Python classes, and procedure knowledge, which records reusable interaction patterns that must import and use the object model. OCM works in an online setting: after each episode, OCM reflects on the trajectory, updates both knowledge bases, and verifies that all procedures execute against the updated object model. During future interaction, the agent uses progressive knowledge disclosure to inspect compact code signatures first and read source code only when needed. Experiments show that OCM achieves the best average rank across benchmarks and reduces invalid actions, demonstrating that agents can benefit from building object-centric environment models.

AI.tldr: 提出OCM框架，让LLM代理通过构建可执行的对象中心环境模型（包含对象知识和过程知识）来积累经验，从而减少无效动作并在多个基准测试中取得最佳平均排名。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理通过自由文本记忆积累经验难以维护和复用，而符号化方法又存储局部过程或假设简化动态，缺乏结构化的环境建模能力。
AI.method: OCM维护两个连接的代码库：对象知识（Python类定义环境实体与机制）和过程知识（记录可复用的交互模式）。在线设置下，每轮后反思轨迹并更新两个知识库，验证所有过程可执行。未来交互中采用渐进式知识披露，先检查代码签名再读源码。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中取得最佳平均排名，并显著减少无效动作。
AI.conclusion: 代理可以通过构建对象中心的环境模型来获得能力提升，验证了结构化符号化记忆相对于自由文本记忆的优势。

title: How many labels do you need? A decision framework for cross-habitat marine species recognition
comment: 29 pages, 12 figures, 4 tables. Includes supplementary appendix
summary:
Automated image recognition is increasingly used to scale ecological monitoring beyond manual annotation, yet ecologists lack evidence-based guidance on how much labelling effort reliable deployment at new sites requires. We present a decision framework quantifying the trade-off between labelling effort and recognition accuracy when transferring vision systems across marine habitats. The benchmark spans five datasets, three oceans, and three taxonomic groups (fish, corals, invertebrates), from tropical reefs in the Great Barrier Reef and French Polynesia to a temperate Danish fjord. We evaluated four recognition models (DINOv2, CLIP, ResNet-50, EfficientNet-B4) under four adaptation strategies (linear probing, LoRA, Visual Prompt Tuning, full fine-tuning) across three protocols: within-habitat transfer across 20 reef sites (240 runs), cross-dataset geographic transfer along a difficulty gradient (40 runs), and few-shot adaptation curves with 0-100 labelled samples per class (648 runs). Frozen self-supervised foundation features (DINOv2 + linear classifier, 1,538 trainable parameters) generalised to unseen reef sites at least as well as fully fine-tuned convolutional baselines four orders of magnitude larger; they learned species-diagnostic, habitat-invariant representations, whereas baselines encoded habitat-specific shortcuts that fail at new sites. As few as 10-20 labelled images per species sufficed to deploy reliable recognition at a new site, cutting annotation effort by roughly an order of magnitude.
  Solution.
