WRN achieves AUROC scores of 0.839 (T), 0.8502 (N), and 0.803 (M) with F1-scores of 0.622, 0.702, and 0.9337, respectively, for the training phase. LightGBM with TF-IDF performs best with AUROC scores of 0.9368 (T), 0.9524 (N), and 0.8311 (M) and F1-scores of 0.7559 (T), 0.7384 (N), and 0.7017 (M) during the training phase. Furthermore, the result of the Codabench for the test sets indicates a Macro-F1 score of 0.978, 0.957, and 0.879 for the T, N, and M categories respectively for test set 1; while test set 2 records a Macro-F1 score for T, N, and M is 0.807, 0.767, 1.0 respectively. However, performance declined during the evaluation phase of the test sets, a drop from 0.938 to 0.858 of test set 1 to 2, for the Macro-F1 score across all stages; suggesting limitations in model generalizability, sensitivity to class imbalance, and challenges in processing lengthy clinical documents. Although this study provides an efficient baseline model and a reproducible pipeline, further optimization and validation are required before it can be considered suitable for use in a real-world clinical setting.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对TCGA病理报告，采用TF-IDF和多种BERT嵌入，结合LR、LightGBM、FFNN、WRN等模型，独立预测TNM分期标签。组合嵌入提升性能，但测试集表现下降，表明泛化性有限。
AI.motivation: 旨在从病理文本中独立预测TNM分期标签，为癌症分期提供自动化辅助工具。
AI.method: 将问题构建为三个多标签分类任务，使用TF-IDF及ClinicalBERT、BioBERT、PubMedBERT嵌入，搭配LR、LightGBM、FFNN、WRN模型进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 训练阶段WRN取得AUROC为0.839(T)、0.8502(N)、0.803(M)；LightGBM+TF-IDF取得更高AUROC为0.9368(T)、0.9524(N)、0.8311(M)。测试集Macro-F1从0.938降至0.858，性能下降显著。
AI.conclusion: 提供了有效基线和可复现流程，但模型泛化性不足、对类别不平衡敏感，需进一步优化方能用于临床。

title: MentalThink: Shaping Thoughts in Mental SVG World
summary: We introduce MentalThink, a visual-symbolic reasoning paradigm that equips Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) with an executable mechanism for "mental" visualization. The core of MentalThink is a think-with-SVG pipeline, where the model learns to generate, render, and interpret scalable vector graphics (SVG) code as an intermediate visual representation for multi-turn reasoning. By creating structured vector sketches, the model can externalize spatial hypotheses, inspect them through deterministic rendering, and reason within a constrained geometric space, effectively mimicking the human process of mental imagery. We instantiate this paradigm through a two-stage training framework, combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for SVG syntactic alignment with multi-turn Reinforcement Learning (RL) to encourage iterative inspection, revision, and refinement of intermediate visual hypotheses. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that MentalThink achieves superior performance on spatial understanding and reasoning benchmarks (e.g., 55.1% on VSIBench, 76.0% on MindCube), showing that executable vector graphics provide a verifiable visual workspace for dynamic perspective taking, visual reflection, and compositional scene construction.

AI.tldr: MentalThink是一种视觉-符号推理范式，通过让多模态大模型生成、渲染和解释SVG代码作为中间视觉表示，实现类似人类"心理意象"的多轮推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在需要动态空间推理、视角转换和视觉反思的任务上表现不足，缺乏可执行的中间视觉表征机制来模拟人类的心理意象过程。
AI.method: 提出think-with-SVG流水线，模型生成SVG代码→确定性渲染→在约束几何空间中推理；采用两阶段训练框架：SFT用于SVG语法对齐，多轮RL用于迭代检查、修正和优化中间视觉假设。
AI.result: 在空间理解和推理基准上取得SOTA：VSIBench 55.1%，MindCube 76.0%，证明可执行矢量图为动态视角转换、视觉反思和组合场景构建提供了可验证的视觉工作空间。
AI.conclusion: 可执行的矢量图形表示（SVG）能够为多模态大模型提供类似人类心理意象的结构化视觉推理能力，是一个有效的中间表征范式。

title: H-OPD: Confidence Aware Heterogeneous Multi-Teacher Multimodal On-policy Distillation
comment: Technical report(work-in-progress). Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/buptyqx/H-OPD}
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) has recently emerged as an effective post-training paradigm by providing supervision on student-generated trajectories. However, existing OPD methods for multimodal reasoning usually rely on a static teacher routing, assigning each sample to a single teacher based on modality or task type. This ignores that visual grounding and abstract reasoning may dominate different decoding steps, making a single teacher insufficient for the full trajectory. To this end, H-OPD is proposed as a confidence-aware heterogeneous multi-teacher OPD framework for multimodal reasoning. By verifying the complementarity of heterogeneous teachers in the same reasoning process, H-OPD replaces task or sample level teacher routing with token-level teacher arbitration along the shared student trajectory. H-OPD employs vision-to-language description transfer to enable text-only teachers to access key visual semantics, and uses a confidence-aware arbitration mechanism to dynamically combine vision-language teacher and text-only teachers at each token. Extensive evaluations over 11 widely-used reasoning benchmarks showcase the superior performance of our method.

AI.tldr: H-OPD是一种置信感知的异构多教师在线策略蒸馏框架，通过token级别的教师仲裁和视觉-语言描述转换，在多模态推理任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有OPD方法在多模态推理中采用静态教师路由，为每个样本分配单一教师，忽略了视觉基础和抽象推理可能主导不同解码步骤，导致单一教师无法覆盖完整轨迹。
AI.method: 提出H-OPD框架：1) 将任务/样本级教师路由替换为token级教师仲裁；2) 采用视觉到语言描述转换，使纯文本教师能获取关键视觉语义；3) 置信感知仲裁机制动态结合视觉-语言教师和纯文本教师。
AI.result: 在11个广泛使用的推理基准上进行了大量评估，H-OPD展现出优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过异构教师在同一推理过程中的互补性和动态token级仲裁，H-OPD有效提升了多模态推理的在线策略蒸馏效果。

title: BeSpec: Behavior-Level Specification Alignment for Code Generation
summary:
LLMs have made substantial progress on automated code generation from natural-language descriptions of desired behavior (intent). Most existing methods improve generated programs through execution-guided code refinement: they generate a candidate solution, execute it, and patch the implementation using feedback, while leaving the underlying specification unchanged. This workflow implicitly assumes that the LLM's understanding of the intent is already correct and complete. In practice, however, intents are often ambiguous or underspecified. As a result, even a capable model may produce a correct implementation of the wrong intent, making specification mismatch a central bottleneck.
  This paper presents BeSpec, a behavioral model-based approach to specification alignment. BeSpec treats the task description as partial evidence about the intended behavior of the correct program. It first builds an explicit behavioral model, which are checkable properties that valid outputs must satisfy. BeSpec then generates candidate programs, executes them on probe inputs, and compares their observed behavior with the predicted behaviors. When observed behavior does not match the predicted behaviors, BeSpec either refines the specification or rejects the candidate program.
  We evaluate BeSpec with three LLMs on four benchmarks: CodeContests, xCodeEval, APPS, and the contamination-free LiveCodeBench. Against nine baselines, BeSpec achieves the highest Pass@1 and average pass rate across all settings, improving average Pass@1 over the strongest baseline by 8.1%--25.3% relative across the three LLMs. A failure analysis shows that after alignment, most remaining errors stem from algorithmic difficulty rather than misunderstood specifications, while ablation studies confirm that each major component of BeSpec contributes positively.

AI.tldr: BeSpec通过构建行为模型（可检查的规范属性）来对齐任务描述与程序意图，在代码生成中发现规范不匹配时进行细化或拒绝，从而显著提升了多个基准测试上的Pass@1指标。
AI.motivation: 现有执行引导的代码精炼方法假设LLM对意图的理解已经正确完整，但实际中任务描述往往模糊或欠指定，导致模型可能生成正确实现但意图错误（规范不匹配），成为代码生成的瓶颈。
AI.method: BeSpec首先从任务描述中构建显式的行为模型（可检查的属性），然后生成候选程序并在探针输入上执行，将观察到的行为与预测行为进行对比；当不匹配时，要么细化规范，要么拒绝候选程序。
AI.result: 在CodeContests、xCodeEval、APPS、LiveCodeBench四个基准上，使用三种LLM，BeSpec在所有设置下取得了最高的Pass@1和平均通过率，相比最强基线相对提升8.1%-25.3%。失败分析表明对齐后大部分错误源于算法难度而非规范误解，消融实验证实各主要组件均有正面贡献。
AI.conclusion: BeSpec通过显式行为建模和规范对齐有效解决了代码生成中的规范不匹配问题，将错误来源从规范误解转向算法难度，是一种有效的代码生成规范对齐方法。

title: Learning from Lost Provenance: Multiple Instance Learning for Cancer Registry Tumor Group Classification
summary: Modernizing cancer registries with deep learning is opening new opportunities to automate labor-intensive tasks such as the coding of pathology reports. However, progress is constrained by the scarcity of report-level human-annotated training data. Cancer registries generate substantial volumes of expert-assigned labels as a routine product of their operations, but these exist at the patient level and are not linked to the individual pathology reports that informed them, limiting their direct use for training models. We develop an efficient framework for training deep learning classifiers by leveraging these operationally-generated labels without requiring per-report human annotation, demonstrated for tumor group classification at the BC Cancer Registry. We use Attention-Based Multiple Instance Learning (ABMIL) to recover the lost link between patient-level labels and the reports that informed them, leveraging the attention the model places on each report to distil a large, noisily-labeled corpus into a compact, high-quality per-report training dataset. A classifier fine-tuned on a distilled dataset achieved a macro F1 of 0.83, outperforming established baselines across most tumor groups. By turning routine operational labels into high-quality training data without additional annotation or large-scale computing infrastructure, ABMIL offers a practical and accessible route to automating cancer registry workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用注意力机制的多实例学习（ABMIL）框架，从癌症登记处常规产生的患者级操作标签中自动提取高质量报告级训练数据，无需人工标注，实现病理报告肿瘤分类，宏F1达0.83。
AI.motivation: 深度学习自动化癌症登记病理报告编码需要大量报告级人工标注数据，但获取成本高。癌症登记处虽产生大量专家标注的患者级标签，但这些标签未与具体病理报告关联，无法直接用于训练模型。需要一种方法利用现有的操作标签来训练深度学习模型。
AI.method: 采用基于注意力的多实例学习（ABMIL）框架：利用注意力机制恢复患者级标签与报告之间的关联；通过模型对每个报告的注意力权重，将大规模带噪声的标签数据集蒸馏为紧凑、高质量的报告级训练数据集；最后用蒸馏后的数据集微调分类器。
AI.result: 在BC癌症登记处肿瘤分组分类任务中，微调后的分类器宏F1达到0.83，在大多数肿瘤组中优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ABMIL能将常规操作标签转化为高质量训练数据，无需额外标注或大规模计算基础设施，为自动化癌症登记工作流提供了一条实用且可及的路径。

title: Applying Answer Set Programming with Fuzzy Membership Functions: a Case Study
comment: A shorter version of this paper has been accepted at the 24th International Workshop on Nonmonotonic Reasoning (July 17-19, 2026, Lisbon, Portugal)
summary: Human reasoning often operates through qualitative concepts expressed by linguistic labels such as high, low, expensive, or cheap, whose interpretation depends on context and is usually vague, despite being rooted in numerical data. This paper explores a novel fuzzy-logic-based qualitative extension of Answer Set Programming (ASP) to bridge numerical information and qualitative reasoning. The underlying language, formally introduced in a separate work, provides a principled framework that avoids rigid thresholds and supports robust reasoning under vagueness. Focusing on a representative use case, we illustrate how the framework integrates numerically grounded inputs (such as outputs of machine learning models) with symbolic reasoning over qualitative labels. Key features, including learning-based membership functions and semantically enriched predicates, enable the combination of expert knowledge, contextual factors, and subjective interpretations within a unified declarative setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模糊逻辑的定性扩展ASP框架，用于桥接数值信息与定性推理，支持在模糊性下的稳健推理，并展示了如何将数值输入（如机器学习输出）与符号推理相结合。
AI.motivation: 人类推理常依赖如"高""低""贵""便宜"等定性语言标签，这些标签依赖于上下文且具有模糊性。现有方法难以在数值数据与定性推理之间建立灵活、无刚性阈值的桥接。
AI.method: 基于模糊逻辑对ASP进行定性扩展，引入学习型隶属函数和语义增强谓词，将数值输入（如机器学习模型输出）与符号推理统一于声明式框架中。
AI.result: 通过代表性用例展示了该框架如何整合数值输入与定性推理，支持专家知识、上下文因素和主观解释的结合。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为处理模糊性和数值-符号桥接提供了一种原则性方法，避免了刚性阈值的问题，适用于需要定性推理的数值场景。

title: Token-level Response-visual Attention Guidance for Multimodal LLMs Knowledge Distillation
summary: While knowledge distillation (KD) is widely adopted for training lightweight models by leveraging supervision from larger teacher models, relying solely on output token distributions has proven insufficient for compressing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Since output tokens are a byproduct of the model attending to visual inputs, prior works have explored explicitly distilling attention to provide a direct supervisory signal. While promising, the precise utility of which attention signals to distill remains under-explored. In this work, we challenge the conventional reliance on prompt-to-vision attention by revealing that downstream performance correlates strongly with response-to-vision attention similarity to the teacher, but negligibly with that of prompt-conditioned attention. Furthermore, we observe that attention distributions exhibit significant variance across individual tokens, indicating that a uniform distillation objective is suboptimal. To this end, we introduce Token-level Response-visual Attention Guidance (TRAG), a distillation objective that 1) shifts the focus to response-to-vision signals and 2) employs token-specific objectives by adaptively weighting the Kullback-Leibler divergence based on attention entropy, effectively guiding the student to mirror the teacher's precise visual focus. Extensive experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that TRAG significantly outperforms prior distillation baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRAG方法，通过关注响应到视觉的注意力信号并采用基于熵的token级自适应加权，显著提升了多模态大语言模型的知识蒸馏效果。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在多模态大语言模型压缩中效果不足，仅依赖输出token分布或统一蒸馏注意力信号未能充分利用注意力信号的价值，特别是不同类型注意力信号对下游性能的影响尚不清楚。
AI.method: 提出Token级响应-视觉注意力引导（TRAG），核心包括两点：1）将蒸馏焦点从提示到视觉注意力转移到响应到视觉注意力信号；2）基于注意力熵为每个token自适应加权KL散度，实现token级差异化蒸馏目标。
AI.result: 实验发现，响应到视觉注意力的相似性与下游性能强相关，而提示条件注意力的相关性可忽略；注意力分布在token间方差显著。TRAG在多个基准上显著优于先前的蒸馏方法。
AI.conclusion: 响应到视觉注意力是更有效的蒸馏信号，且token级自适应蒸馏策略优于统一目标，为MLLM压缩提供了更精确的视觉关注引导方案。

title: CAFÉ, an automated feedback tool to approach Formal Methods
summary: We present CAFÉ, a learning platform designed to introduce computer science students to Formal Methods (FM). CAFÉ aims to scaffold students' structural thinking (in contrast with operational thinking) by promoting the practice of Graphical Loop Invariant Based Programming (GLIBP). In the GLIBP approach, students solve loop-based problems by first constructing a Graphical Loop Invariant (GLI) before deriving the corresponding code. The GLI is an informal diagrammatic representation of the loop invariant. It illustrates the variables involved in the loop, their properties, and the relationships between them. To enable automated feedback, students complete a blank GLI, a box-based version of the GLI. Beyond evaluating the code students submit, CAFÉ provides personalized feedback on students' GLI and its alignment with the code. In this demo, we walk through CAFE from both a student's and a teacher's perspective. We show how the tool supports GLI design and provides feedback. We then present how a teacher can encode programming challenges together with a corresponding blank GLI.

AI.tldr: CAFÉ是一个通过图形化循环不变量(GLI)帮助计算机科学学生理解形式化方法的学习平台，提供代码与GLI的自动反馈。
AI.motivation: 帮助学生从操作思维转向结构性思维，降低形式化方法的学习门槛。
AI.method: 学生先构建图形化循环不变量(GLI)，再据此推导代码；平台通过填空式GLI实现自动反馈，检查GLI与代码的一致性。
AI.result: 实现了GLI设计支持、代码与GLI一致性的个性化反馈，以及教师端的问题编码功能。
AI.conclusion: CAFÉ通过GLIBP方法有效促进形式化方法教学，提供了双向（学生和教师）交互的实用工具。

title: Lacuna Inc. at SemEval-2026 Task 4: Structurally Gated State-Space Models for Disentangling Narrative Similarity
summary: In this paper, we present the Invariant-Variant Disentangled State-Space Model (IVD-SSM), our submission to SemEval-2026 Task 4 on Narrative Story Similarity and Narrative Representation Learning. Evaluating narrative similarity is a profound computational challenge that requires models to look past concrete, superficial elements such as specific names, actors, objects, or settings to isolate and compare abstract patterns of causality and plot progression. To model these extended causal chains without the quadratic bottlenecks of standard Transformers, we leverage a hybrid State-Space Model (Jamba-1.5-Mini). Building upon this backbone, we introduce the Structurally Gated Alignment (SGA) head, a novel, differentiable algorithmic architecture. The SGA head operates on two scales: a heavily strided Macro-path maps the coarse structural skeleton of a story, which then acts as a gating mechanism to filter a full-resolution Micro-path, actively suppressing semantic noise and superficial keyword overlaps. Evaluated on both pairwise comparative judgments (Track A) and dense representation learning (Track B), our approach demonstrates that explicitly disentangling structural invariants from lexical variants provides a robust, principled framework for deep narrative understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IVD-SSM模型，通过混合状态空间模型（Jamba-1.5-Mini）结合Structurally Gated Alignment (SGA)头，分离故事的结构不变性与表面词汇变体，用于叙事相似度评估与表示学习，在SemEval-2026任务中表现良好。
AI.motivation: 叙事相似性评估需要模型忽略具体名称、角色、物体或场景等表面元素，提取抽象的因果模式和情节推进模式。现有Transformer模型存在二次复杂度瓶颈，难以高效建模长程因果链。
AI.method: 提出IVD-SSM模型，以混合状态空间模型Jamba-1.5-Mini为骨干，引入Structurally Gated Alignment (SGA)头。SGA包含大跨度Macro-path（提取故事粗粒度结构骨架）和全分辨率Micro-path（处理细节信息），Macro-path作为门控机制过滤Micro-path，抑制语义噪声和表面关键词重叠。
AI.result: 在成对比较判断（Track A）和稠密表示学习（Track B）两个任务上进行了评估，实验表明显式解耦结构不变性与词汇变体为深层叙事理解提供了稳健且原则性的框架。
AI.conclusion: IVD-SSM通过状态空间模型与结构化门控对齐机制，成功实现了叙事结构不变性与词汇变体的分离，为深层叙事理解任务提供了有效方案。

title: How to Avoid Debate: Scalable AI Safety via Doubly-Efficient Interactive Proofs
summary:
As AI models continue to develop powerful capabilities, it becomes critical that we are able to verify that their output is aligned with our intentions. A recent line of work focuses on verification via debate, a model of interactive proofs where two competing powerful provers, or AI models, debate each other to convince a weak verifier, or a human, of the correctness of their claim. However, debate assumes that the two AI models possess equal abilities and that one of them is truthful, which may not be realistic.
  In this work, we show \emph{how to avoid debate}: we initiate the study of \emph{single-prover} interactive proofs for AI safety. Prior results in single-prover interactive proofs do not immediately carry over to the AI safety setting: for example, they do not work when the computation has access to an oracle, such as to human judgment or an external database such as the web. We present doubly-efficient single-prover interactive proofs and arguments for oracle-aided computations (also known as relativizing proofs), in the settings where (1) the computation is robust, in the sense that the output does not change if at most a small fraction of the answers to oracle queries are incorrect, or (2) the oracle is a low-degree polynomial. These results suggest that interactive verification is possible even without debate, under structured or noise-tolerant oracle access.

AI.tldr: 本文研究AI安全中的单证明者交互式验证，提出针对oracle辅助计算的双高效交互式证明和论证，表明在结构化或噪声容忍的oracle访问下，无需双证明者辩论即可实现交互式验证。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全验证依赖"辩论"方法（两个能力相等的AI模型互相辩论，由弱验证者判断），但该假设不现实：两个AI模型能力未必相等，且其中一方需诚实的假设难以保证。因此需要探索单证明者交互式验证方案。
AI.method: 提出针对oracle辅助计算（如人类判断、外部数据库、网络等）的单证明者交互式证明和论证。针对两种场景：1) 计算具有鲁棒性（少量oracle回答错误不影响输出）；2) oracle为低阶多项式。在这两种设定下构造了双高效（doubly-efficient）的单证明者交互协议。
AI.result: 在两种设定下（鲁棒计算和低阶多项式oracle）成功构造了双高效的单证明者交互式证明和论证方案。
AI.conclusion: 在结构化或噪声容忍的oracle访问条件下，即使没有辩论机制，AI输出的交互式验证也是可行的，为AI安全提供了更现实可行的验证路径。

title: An automated method of identifying incorrectly labelled images based on the sequences of loss functions of deep learning networks
comment: Presented at the 6th EAI International Conference on IoT as a Service (IoTaaS 2020). Published by Springer in LNICST, vol 346, 2021
summary: Deep learning is widely applied in medical image analysis, but up to 10% of manually labelled images may be incorrect, degrading model performance. This paper proposes an automated method to identify incorrectly labelled medical images by analyzing sequences of loss functions from deep learning classification networks over multiple training epochs. Identified images can be reviewed and relabelled by experts, improving dataset quality and model performance. Two experiments validate the method on a fundus image dataset for referable diabetic retinopathy screening. In the first, 6% (648) of 10,788 gold-standard labels were intentionally flipped. The method identified 75.31% (488) of the flipped samples, with only 4.85% (492) false positives among correctly labelled samples. In the second, reviewing and correcting the 980 identified samples (9.1% of the dataset) and retraining the model improved best accuracy on an independent test set from 95.93% (with 6% label noise) to 96.50% (with 1.5% noise), approaching the ideal 96.57% (with 0% noise). The results demonstrate the method's effectiveness in improving model performance through automated label quality control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过分析深度学习分类网络多个训练epoch的损失函数序列，自动识别医学图像中错误标注样本的方法。经专家复核修正后，可显著提升数据集质量与模型性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像人工标注存在高达10%的错误率，这些错误标签会降低深度学习模型的性能，因此需要一种自动化的方法来识别并修正这些错误标注。
AI.method: 通过分析深度学习分类网络在多个训练epoch中的损失函数序列，自动识别可能被错误标注的图像，随后由专家进行复核和重新标注。
AI.result: 在眼底图像数据集上，方法识别出75.31%的人为翻转标签，假阳性率仅4.85%；修正后模型准确率从95.93%（6%噪声）提升至96.50%（1.5%噪声），接近理想情况的96.57%（0%噪声）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效实现自动化的标签质量控制，显著提升医学图像数据集的标注质量并改善模型性能。

title: Detection of LLM-assisted Code Plagiarism Using k-gram Software Birthmarks
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, submitted to the 8th World Symposium on Software Engineering (WSSE 2026)
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) have significantly lowered the technical barrier to software plagiarism. By transforming existing source code while preserving its functionality, modern LLMs can generate semantically identical program that may evade traditional plagiarism detection techniques.
  Among such attacks, code paraphrasing modifies the syntax and structure of a program while preserving its behavior. This paper investigates whether software birthmarks can detect such LLM-assisted plagiarism. As a starting point, we employ k-gram software birthmarks based on unique k-grams of Java opcodes, with k ranging from 1 to 6.
  We employ three contemporary LLMs: ChatGPT-5.1-Codex-Mini, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, and Claude-Haiku-4.5. The dataset consists of individually compilable source files extracted from actively maintained BSD-2-Clause licensed Java projects. We further compare five similarity measures for birthmark matching: cosine similarity, Dice index, Jaccard coefficient, Simpson index, and edit-distance-based similarity.
  The results demonstrate that k-gram software birthmarks remain effective for detecting LLM-assisted plagiarism. Among the evaluated models, ChatGPT-5.1-Codex-Mini generated the most difficult-to-detect clones. Furthermore, the findings confirm the higher performance of coding-oriented models for plagiarism task.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于k-gram的软件胎记方法在检测LLM辅助代码抄袭中的有效性，实验证明该方法依然有效，其中ChatGPT-5.1-Codex-Mini生成的代码最难检测。
AI.motivation: LLM降低了软件抄袭的技术门槛，传统抄袭检测技术可能无法有效识别LLM辅助生成的语义等效但语法结构不同的代码，因此需要探索新的检测方法。
AI.method: 采用基于Java操作码唯一k-gram的软件胎记方法（k=1~6），使用三种LLM（ChatGPT-5.1-Codex-Mini、DeepSeek-V4-Flash、Claude-Haiku-4.5）对BSD-2-Clause许可的Java项目进行代码改写，并通过五种相似性度量（余弦相似度、Dice指数、Jaccard系数、Simpson指数、编辑距离相似度）进行胎记匹配。
AI.result: k-gram软件胎记对检测LLM辅助抄袭仍然有效；ChatGPT-5.1-Codex-Mini生成的克隆最难检测；面向编码的模型在抄袭任务中表现更高。
AI.conclusion: k-gram软件胎记可作为检测LLM辅助代码抄袭的有效手段，且不同LLM生成的抄袭代码在可检测性上存在差异。

title: Reading Between the Dots: Decoding Hidden Computation across Filler Tokens
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Mech Interp Workshop, 10 main paper pages, 20 appendix pages
summary: Frontier LLMs can perform multi-step reasoning over content-free filler tokens like dots or counting sequences, producing correct answers with no visible chain-of-thought (CoT). This is a limit case for behavioral oversight, where surface tokens carry no information about the underlying reasoning. But hidden from the output is not the same as hidden from us. On four task families (fact retrieval, parallel numeric composition, string manipulation, and in-context computation), two open-weights frontier models (DeepSeek V3, Kimi K2) compute over filler tokens in a structured, legible way: attention routes the question through the filler region to the answer, logit-lens readouts show retrieved facts emerging early and their composition crystallizing in late layers, and KV-cache transplants at filler positions causally swap outputs between examples. We introduce an unsupervised decoding pipeline that takes only hidden states as input and recovers intermediate values with 80-95% accuracy (best LLM judge) across both models and all four tasks, without ground-truth labels or training. Hidden computation that defeats behavioral CoT monitoring is, on these tasks, directly readable from the residual stream, suggesting monitorability is a property of the model's full computational trace, not just its surface tokens.

AI.tldr: 前沿LLM可以在无实质意义的填充token（如点或计数序列）上执行多步推理并给出正确答案，虽然表面输出不携带推理信息（行为监控失效），但通过注意力路由、logit lens读取、KV缓存移植等方法，可以从残差流中结构化、可读地提取出中间推理过程，且无监督解码流水线在四个任务上达到80-95%准确率。
AI.motivation: 挑战LLM安全监控中的一个盲区：当模型在填充token上进行隐藏推理（无显式CoT）时，行为层面的输出监控彻底失效。作者想证明：隐藏于输出 ≠ 隐藏于我们，即模型的完整计算轨迹（残差流）仍可被解读。
AI.method: 使用两个开源前沿模型（DeepSeek V3、Kimi K2），在四个任务族（事实检索、并行数值组合、字符串操作、上下文计算）上分析填充token上的计算。方法包括：(1) 注意力路由分析（问题通过填充区域路由到答案）；(2) logit lens读取（早期出现检索事实，后期结晶组合）；(3) KV缓存移植（因果交换填充位置的输出）；(4) 提出无监督解码流水线，仅以隐藏状态为输入，恢复中间值。
AI.result: (1) 填充token上的计算是结构化且可读的；(2) 无监督解码流水线在两个模型、四个任务上达到80-95%的准确率（最佳LLM评判）；(3) KV缓存移植可因果性地在样本间交换输出。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏计算虽能规避行为层面的CoT监控，但其完整计算轨迹（残差流）仍可直接读取，说明可监控性取决于模型完整计算轨迹的属性，而非仅表面输出。

title: The Role of Rigor in Artificial Intelligence
comment: To appear in D. Rickles and T. Thebault (eds.) Philosophy of Rigor (Routledge, 2026)
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has achieved extraordinary capabilities despite lacking many of the conceptual and scientific foundations associated with mature disciplines. Unlike traditional sciences, where reliable technology typically emerges from theoretical understanding, modern AI has progressed largely through performance-driven iteration and "alchemical" experimentation. This tension motivates a systematic analysis of AI through the lens of rigor. We introduce a three-part framework consisting of conceptual rigor (clarifying foundational concepts), epistemic rigor (establishing scientific understanding), and operational rigor (ensuring reliable performance and deployment). Using this framework, we analyze competing conceptions of intelligence and understanding, the strengths and limitations of the empirical approach to deep learning, the power and pitfalls of benchmarks, and the obstacles to theory development posed by modern AI systems. We argue that the distinctive trajectory of AI arises from how forms of rigor interact across paradigms, resulting in the primacy of operational rigor in modern deep learning. This perspective helps explain both AI's rapid advances and its persistent uncertainties, while clarifying the challenges involved in transforming AI into a mature science and reliable technology.

AI.tldr: 本文通过概念严谨性、认知严谨性和操作严谨性三部分框架，系统分析了AI在缺乏传统科学基础的情况下如何通过性能驱动和"炼金术"实验取得进展，解释了AI快速进步与其持续不确定性并存的现象。
AI.motivation: AI虽取得了非凡能力，但缺乏成熟学科应有的概念和科学基础。这种"先有技术、后有理解"的反常现象促使作者对AI的严谨性问题进行系统性分析。
AI.method: 提出了三维严谨性分析框架：概念严谨性（澄清基础概念）、认知严谨性（建立科学理解）和操作严谨性（确保可靠性能与部署），并以此分析智能与理解的不同概念、深度学习的经验方法的优缺点、基准测试的利弊以及理论发展面临的障碍。
AI.result: 揭示了AI独特的发展轨迹源于不同范式间严谨性形式的相互作用，导致现代深度学习中操作严谨性占据主导地位。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有助于解释AI的快速进步与持续不确定性并存的现象，并阐明了将AI转变为成熟科学和可靠技术所面临的挑战。

title: CIPHER: Causal Intervention Pathways for Healthcare Equity and Robustness
summary: Deep learning models for medical diagnosis frequently exhibit substantial performance disparities across sensitive subgroups (e.g., race, sex), even when average accuracy is high. While generative data augmentation offers a route to mitigate this, existing strategies are suboptimal; they typically address only one or two dependency channels between sensitive attributes and image features. We formalize the medical image formation process via a structural causal model, revealing that sensitive attributes actually influence image content through four distinct pathways-a structural complexity neglected by prior works. Based on this insight, we introduce CIPHER (Causal Intervention Pathways for Healthcare Equity and Robustness), a framework designed to systematically intervene on all four causal paths. To achieve this, CIPHER utilizes a diffusion backbone equipped with classifier-free guidance and null-text inversion. This technical design enables the faithful reconstruction of patient-specific anatomy while allowing for the precise, editable synthesis of counterfactuals required to break sensitive dependency chains. We tested CIPHER using chest X-ray and dermoscopy benchmarks across both standard and shifted data distributions. By employing a multi-pathway intervention strategy, our model reduced worst-group disparities by an average of 35.8% compared to disease-conditioned synthesis baselines, while also improving total diagnostic accuracy

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIPHER框架，基于结构因果模型揭示敏感属性通过四条路径影响医学图像，利用扩散模型进行多路径因果干预，在胸部X光和皮肤镜数据集上将最差组性能差距平均降低35.8%，同时提升整体诊断准确率。
AI.motivation: 医学诊断中的深度学习模型在不同敏感属性子组（如种族、性别）间存在显著性能差异，现有生成式数据增强方法仅考虑了一两条依赖路径，忽视了敏感属性通过多条因果路径影响图像内容的复杂性。
AI.method: 通过结构因果模型形式化医学图像生成过程，识别出四条因果路径；利用扩散模型结合无分类器引导和空文本反转技术，实现患者特异性解剖结构的忠实重建和可编辑的反事实图像合成，从而对所有四条路径进行系统干预。
AI.result: 在胸部X光和皮肤镜基准测试中，多路径干预策略相比疾病条件合成基线，最差组性能差距平均降低35.8%，同时总诊断准确率也有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 多路径因果干预是缓解医学影像模型中公平性问题的有效途径，CIPHER框架通过全面建模并干预敏感属性与图像特征之间的所有依赖路径，在提升公平性的同时不牺牲甚至改善了整体诊断性能。

title: Compression, structure, and executor capability: a controlled real-cost decomposition of language-model agent skill optimisation
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Data and reproduction script: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21148499
summary: Agent skills, reusable instruction artefacts supplied to a tool-using language model, are increasingly optimised by shortening, structural rewriting, stronger-model compilation, and scoped loading, on the assumption that a smaller or better-organised skill lowers cost while preserving success. That assumption is rarely tested with quality and real monetary cost measured on the same runs and the contributing factors separated. This study reports a controlled decomposition over ten skill-delivery conditions, 40 software-engineering tasks, and three repetitions per cell (1,200 rollouts), separating no-skill execution, raw skills, deterministic shortening, linear and structured rendering from a shared semantic ledger, scoped loading, and the compiler and executor model tiers. Quality is the verifier pass rate at task level; cost is solve-stage token cost at standard provider prices, with a token-volume-normalised view for robustness and compilation cost amortised separately. The task is the unit of inference, intervals are task-clustered, and the contrast family is multiplicity-controlled. Deterministic shortening is close to the raw baseline but does not establish non-inferiority within the preset margin. Structured rendering and scoped loading lower pass rate on the compact executor without lowering cost, and structured rendering is indistinguishable from linear text at matched content. The only contrast surviving correction is executor capability, which raises pass rate by 27 percentage points at roughly five times the real cost, with compiler tier showing no robust effect. Under real prices no optimised representation reaches a practical break-even. The evidence indicates that executor capability is the dominant lever and that no representation strategy improves over the raw skill on either executor tier.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过1200次软件工程任务实验，系统分解了10种技能交付条件对LLM代理的质量和成本影响。结果表明，执行器能力是唯一稳健提升通过率（+27%）的因素，但成本增加约5倍；而缩短、结构化渲染、分范围加载等表示优化策略均未在任一执行器层级上优于原始技能，且无表示策略能在实际价格下实现盈亏平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常假设优化技能表示（缩短、结构化重写、强模型编译、分范围加载）可以降低成本并保持成功率，但该假设很少在同一运行中同时测量质量和实际货币成本，且未分离各因素的独立贡献。
AI.method: 控制实验设计：10种技能交付条件 × 40个软件工程任务 × 3次重复=1200次展开。分离了无技能执行、原始技能、确定性缩短、线性/结构化渲染、分范围加载、以及编译器和执行器模型层级。质量为任务级验证器通过率；成本为按标准供应商价格的令牌成本，并做令牌量归一化处理及编译成本分摊。
AI.result: 确定性缩短接近原始基线但未在预设裕度内建立非劣效性；结构化渲染和分范围加载在紧凑执行器上降低了通过率且未降低成本；结构化文本与线性文本在内容匹配时无区别。唯一通过多重性校正的对比是执行器能力：通过率提高27个百分点，实际成本约增5倍；编译器层级无稳健效果。在实际价格下，无优化表示策略达到盈亏平衡。
AI.conclusion: 执行器能力是主导杠杆，表示优化策略在任一执行器层级上均未优于原始技能。这挑战了当前普遍采用的技能压缩和结构化重写实践，建议将资源集中在提升执行模型本身。

title: Mental Health Disorder Detection Beyond Social Media: A Systematic Review of Available Datasets
summary: Detecting mental health disorders in a timely manner is an important societal challenge. NLP and machine learning (ML) methods used to assist with detection rely on data collected primarily from social media. However, such datasets often have sampling biases and inherent ethical and privacy issues. One avenue to overcome these limitations is non-social media data. We present the first comprehensive review of non-social media, free-text datasets for mental health research. We use the PRISMA methodology to conduct our survey and we review datasets available in multiple languages. We find that non-social media free-text based datasets are predominantly focused on English and on detecting depression. These datasets also vary in demographics, platforms, data types, annotation techniques, and methodologies. This systematic review also reveals key gaps and highlights opportunities to develop more diverse, reliable and clinically-relevant resources.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统综述了非社交媒体自由文本数据集在心理健康研究中的应用，发现这些数据集主要聚焦于英语和抑郁症检测，且在人口统计、平台、数据类型、标注技术和方法上存在差异，揭示了开发更多样、可靠和临床相关资源的机会。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体数据存在采样偏差和伦理隐私问题，非社交媒体数据可克服这些局限，但缺乏系统性的综述来了解该领域的研究现状。
AI.method: 采用PRISMA方法进行系统综述，审查多种语言的非社交媒体自由文本数据集。
AI.result: 非社交媒体自由文本数据集主要以英语为主，聚焦于抑郁症检测；数据集在人口统计、平台、数据类型、标注技术和方法上存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了关键研究空白，为开发更多样化、可靠且临床相关的心理健康资源提供了方向。

title: Robust Feasible Route Construction through Collaborative Partition Optimization
summary: Large-scale Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problems (CVRPs) are commonly solved by partitioning customers into smaller routing problems that can be optimized independently. While this substantially reduces computational complexity, independently constructed routing solutions may leave some customer demand unserved even when sufficient resources exist elsewhere in the fleet. We present Collaborative Routing Constructors (CoRC), a routing framework that enables independently solved subproblems to exchange customers and vehicles during optimization rather than relying solely on a fixed partition or a subsequent global re-optimization stage. Computational experiments on AGS benchmark instances and synthetic instances containing up to 200,000 customers compare CoRC against independent routing, post-routing global re-optimization, and state-of-the-art, end-to-end routing frameworks. Across all evaluated partitioning strategies, CoRC consistently constructs feasible routing solutions where competing partition-based methods do not. Furthermore, it remains effective on problem instances for which the evaluated end-to-end routing frameworks did not produce solutions under the same computational budget. These results demonstrate that collaboration between routing subproblems provides a robust and scalable approach for feasible large-scale route construction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出协作路由构造器（CoRC），允许独立求解的子问题在优化过程中相互交换客户和车辆，解决大规模CVRP中分区方法导致的资源不均问题。实验表明，CoRC在20万客户规模的实例上始终能构建可行解，优于独立路由、全局重优化及端到端方法。
AI.motivation: 大规模CVRP常通过分而治之的方式求解，但独立构建的子路由方案可能因资源分布不均导致部分客户需求无法被服务，即使整个车队存在足够的资源。现有方法依赖固定分区或后续全局重优化，缺乏子问题间的实时协作机制。
AI.method: 提出CoRC框架，在子问题独立优化过程中允许客户和车辆的动态交换，打破固定分区的限制。在AGS基准实例和包含20万客户的合成实例上进行实验，对比独立路由、路由后全局重优化以及最先进的端到端路由框架。
AI.result: 在所有评估的分区策略下，CoRC始终能构建可行解，而其他分区方法在某些情况下无法做到。CoRC在端到端框架无法在相同计算预算下产生解决方案的实例上仍然有效。
AI.conclusion: 路由子问题之间的协作为大规模可行路由构建提供了一种鲁棒且可扩展的方法。

title: Evaluating Agentic Harness Systems for Autonomous Computational Pathology
summary: Autonomous computational pathology (ACP) converts high-level pathology analysis goals into executable, traceable and clinically bounded workflows. Realizing this capability requires adapting general agentic harness systems to pathology-specific tasks, tools, evidence standards and clinical claim boundaries. We contribute ACP-Bench, a framework that adapts existing harness systems from computational pathology support toward ACP workflow capability. ACP-Bench evaluates 41 pathology workflow tasks, including 24 biomarker, 7 morphology and 10 prognosis tasks spanning 6 body-system groups and 9 endpoint families. The benchmark evaluates 9 models and 3 harness groups (Claude Code, Codex and Open Code), yielding 369 complete trajectories. ACP-Bench evaluates each trajectory across workflow execution, diagnostic performance and clinical-boundary alignment, combining expert-adjudicated process audits, diagnostic assessment and pathologist-validated safety review. Across evaluated systems, workflow initiation, task interpretation and diagnostic reporting were more mature than tool-bound execution, result binding and reflective workflow revision, and formal end-to-end completion remained rare. ACP-Bench provides a reusable standard for auditing whether agentic systems can operationalize pathology workflows before claims of reliable clinical autonomy.

AI.tldr: ACP-Bench是一个评估计算病理学中自主智能体工作流能力的基准框架，测试了41项病理任务、3种智能体系统和9个模型，发现工作流启动和诊断报告较成熟，但工具执行和端到端完成仍不理想。
AI.motivation: 将通用智能体系统适应到病理学特定任务中，需要解决任务定义、工具使用、证据标准和临床声明边界的适配问题，目前缺乏系统性的评估标准。
AI.method: 构建ACP-Bench框架，包含41项病理工作流任务（24项生物标志物、7项形态学、10项预后），覆盖6个体系统组和9个终点家族；评估9个模型和3种智能体系统（Claude Code、Codex、Open Code），共369条完整轨迹；从工作流执行、诊断性能和临床边界对齐三个维度进行评估。
AI.result: 工作流启动、任务解释和诊断报告相对成熟，但工具导向执行、结果绑定和反思性工作流修订仍不成熟；正式端到端完成仍然罕见。
AI.conclusion: ACP-Bench为评估智能体系统能否在声称可靠临床自主性之前实际运行病理工作流提供了可复用的审计标准。

title: A Measurement Study on the Adoption of Pledges and Unveils in the OpenBSD Operating System
comment: Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Software Analysis, Evolution and Reengineering (SANER 2026), Limassol, IEEE, pp. 1-6
summary: The paper presents a longitudinal measurement study on the adoption of the pledge and unveil system calls in OpenBSD. These system calls are used to sandbox programs and libraries. Given a dataset covering 19 releases, many programs and libraries were modified to use the system calls already before their introductions in official releases. The adoption rates have also steadily grown; a linear trend provides a coarse but sensible heuristic. Although particularly programs residing in /usr/bin and /usr/sbin have been modified to use the system calls, the sizes of programs and libraries do not correlate well with the amounts of pledge and unveil system calls invoked. Regarding the pledges made, standard input and output operations have frequently been requested, although the full fine-grained arsenal offered by pledge has generally been utilized in OpenBSD. The same observation is seen in that particularly read operations to given paths have frequently been unveiled. All in all, the measurement results indicate that the adoption of system call minimization and sandboxing techniques is not necessarily as troublesome as has often been discussed in the literature.

AI.tldr: 本文对OpenBSD中pledge和unveil系统调用（用于沙箱机制）的采用情况进行了纵向测量研究，覆盖19个发行版。结果显示，许多程序和库在官方发布前就已开始使用这些系统调用，且采用率稳步增长。虽然/usr/bin和/usr/sbin中的程序修改最多，但程序大小与调用数量无明显相关性。/usr/bin和/usr/sbin中的程序修改最多。/usr/bin和/usr/sbin中的程序修改最多。标准输入输出操作是最常见的pledge请求，路径读取是最常见的unveil操作。研究表明，系统调用最小化和沙箱技术的采用并不像文献中讨论的那样困难。
AI.motivation: 现有文献普遍认为系统调用最小化和沙箱技术的采用是困难的，缺乏实际数据支撑这一观点。
AI.method: 对OpenBSD 19个发行版进行纵向测量研究，分析pledge和unveil系统调用的采用模式，包括采用率、分布特征和具体调用类型。
AI.result: 采用率呈线性增长趋势；/usr/bin和/usr/sbin中的程序修改最多；程序大小与调用数量无显著相关性；标准I/O是最常见的pledge操作，路径读取是最常见的unveil操作。
AI.conclusion: 系统调用最小化和沙箱技术的实际采用并不像文献中讨论的那样困难，其采用过程呈现稳步增长的趋势。

title: They Infer What You Meant: Models Represent Communicative Intent More Reliably Than They Act On It
summary: When a person shares something with a language model, the model often answers the surface of the message rather than what the sender was doing by sending it: share a finished project and it critiques the code; share a raw late-night line and it runs a wellness check. We treat the sender's communicative intent, the Gricean what-was-meant, as a first-class interpretability object, and show the failure is one of readout on top of a robust representation. A linear probe decodes the sender's intent, whether they want a thing recognized or evaluated, from a model's default-pass hidden states, cleanly and surface-independently, across six models and four families and in the base checkpoints. The representation generalizes further, to intent that is only pragmatically inferred, and to a second, lexically clean intent (support versus help). The behavioral half of the story, and every causal test, is established on the recognize/evaluate contrast, where what varies is whether the default output acts on the intent. The readout lags the representation in depth within a model (the intent is decodable several layers before it drives the output); across models, which ones act on it by default is model-specific, an observed stratification (three of six show the failure) that we do not read as a scaling law. Where the gap is open, a direction closely tied to the representation, the discriminative direction at a searched-for layer, is a causal handle: steering it recovers the intended behavior, as well as an explicit instruction does and with no prompt at all. This direction is near-orthogonal to the feedback-offering axis, so it routes a represented intent rather than a generic feedback knob, though at the recovery dose the routed intent can override an explicit request. We support each link with controls against obvious deflations and report the nulls as plainly as the confirmations.

AI.tldr: 本文发现语言模型在理解用户交流时存在意图-响应不匹配问题：模型内部隐藏状态已编码了发送者的真实意图（如希望被认可而非被评价），但默认输出却常以表面含义回应。作者通过线性探针验证了意图表征的存在，并通过因果干预（方向控制）成功恢复了符合意图的行为。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型在对话中往往只回应信息的表面内容，而忽略了发送者传递信息时的真实交际意图（Gricean意义）。作者希望将“发送者意图”作为第一类可解释性对象，揭示这一失败的本质并非模型无法表征意图，而是意图表征后无法正确读取和输出。
AI.method: 使用线性探针从模型默认隐藏状态中解码发送者的意图（识别 vs. 评价），跨6个模型、4个模型家族、基础检查点验证。进一步测试了仅靠语用推断的意图以及第二个词法干净的意图（支持 vs. 帮助）。通过行为实验和因果测试建立识别/评价对比的完整证据链，并在发现意图-输出差距的模型上，通过特定层的判别方向进行因果干预（方向控制），恢复符合意图的行为。
AI.result: 1）线性探针能干净且表面无关地解码意图；2）该表征泛化到语用推断意图和词法干净意图；3）意图在模型深层中可解码，但输出层使用滞后；4）6个模型中有3个表现出意图-响应不匹配，这并非缩放定律；5）在差距存在的模型中，特定层的判别方向是因果手柄，方向控制能恢复预期行为，效果与显式指令相当甚至能覆盖显式请求；6）该方向与反馈提供轴近乎正交，表明是路由意图本身而非通用反馈旋钮。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型默认隐藏状态中已经编码了丰富的发送者意图表征，但模型默认输出未能正确利用这一表征，导致表面回应。通过因果干预可以恢复意图驱动的行为，且这种机制独立于通用反馈控制。该发现揭示了模型理解与行为间的表征-输出差距，为改进模型社交智能提供了可操作的方向。

title: Agent Reinforcement Learning via Pivotal-Aware Self-Feedback Retry
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have shown strong decision-making capabilities in long-horizon interactive tasks, yet they still struggle to effectively leverage failed trajectories: full retries incur high interaction costs, while experience retrieval tends to dilute critical experience signals. To address this, we propose PivoARL, a self-feedback retry framework for experience exploitation in LLM agents. PivoARL identifies the pivotal erroneous turn through structured reflection and performs local retry only from the corresponding pivotal state, thereby reusing the correct prefix and reducing redundant interactions. From an information-gain perspective, we further show that pivotal retry concentrates useful experience signals near the error boundary, mitigating the signal dilution caused by state-agnostic experience utilization. Based on this insight, we design a pivotal-aware credit assignment mechanism that rewards correct prefixes while isolating erroneous suffixes, and optimize reflection quality through implicit reflection returns. We conduct a systematic evaluation on 4 agent tasks and 7 search-based QA benchmarks. Results show that PivoARL achieves significant improvements on Pass@2/3 across all tasks, with an average gain of about 11.5\% over MetaRL. Moreover, benefiting from contrastive preference signals induced by pivotal turns, PivoARL also consistently improves Pass@1 on over 80\% of the tasks. On Minesweeper environment, PivoARL improves over GiGPO by more than 45\% and reduces interaction turns by about 42\% on average compared with full-retry methods. Code is available at https://github.com/yuki-younai/PivoARL.

AI.tldr: PivoARL是一个通过识别关键错误轮次进行局部重试的LLM智能体自我反馈框架，在4个智能体任务和7个搜索QA基准上平均提升约11.5%的Pass@2/3，并减少约42%的交互轮次。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在处理失败轨迹时存在两难：完全重试交互成本高，而基于经验检索则会稀释关键经验信号。因此需要一种既能有效利用失败经验又不过度增加交互成本的方法。
AI.method: 通过结构化反思识别关键错误轮次（pivotal turn），仅从对应的关键状态开始局部重试，保留正确前缀；基于信息增益视角设计关键感知的信用分配机制（奖励正确前缀、隔离错误后缀），并通过隐式反思回报优化反思质量。
AI.result: 在4个智能体任务和7个搜索QA基准上，Pass@2/3平均提升约11.5%；Minesweeper环境中比GiGPO提升超45%，比全重试方法平均减少约42%交互轮次；Pass@1在80%以上任务上持续提升。
AI.conclusion: PivoARL通过关键轮次驱动的局部重试策略，有效平衡了经验利用效率与交互成本，证明局部重试结合关键感知信用分配是一种高效的经验利用范式。

title: CV-DCLR: Causal-Visual Dynamic Label Refinement for Robust Zero-Shot Learning
summary: Zero-Shot Learning (ZSL) facilitates knowledge transfer via shared semantic spaces. However, a critical bottleneck in this paradigm is Semantic Entanglement, where visual representations are inevitably conflated with visually similar semantic concepts, such as distinguishing the intrinsic traits of a Wolf from the shared features of a Husky. Existing global alignment methods often indiscriminately maximize correlations between visual and semantic modalities, leading models to overfit spurious similarities rather than capturing distinctive class identities. To address this fundamental limitation, we propose the Causal-Visual Dynamic Label Refinement (CV-DCLR) framework. Unlike traditional approaches that rely on superficial visual statistics, CV-DCLR recalibrates visual-semantic associations via a Dual-Stream Mutual Correction Mechanism. This includes a Visual Likelihood Stream to model observational patterns and a Causal Importance Stream that verifies the structural necessity of candidate prototypes through Counterfactual Intervention. Acting as a logical filter, our adaptive gating mechanism dynamically modulates feature responses to amplify genuine causal traits while suppressing visually plausible but structurally irrelevant distractors. Extensive experiments on the CUB, SUN, and AWA2 benchmarks under a rigorous Semantic Entanglement Injection protocol demonstrate that CV-DCLR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in high-ambiguity scenarios. Specifically, while existing models suffer catastrophic degradation under entanglement, our framework maintains robust performance, effectively disentangling true class identities from semantic confounders.

AI.tldr: 提出Causal-Visual Dynamic Label Refinement (CV-DCLR)框架，通过双流互校正机制（视觉似然流+因果重要性流）解决零样本学习中的语义纠缠问题，在CUB、SUN、AWA2基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有ZSL方法面临语义纠缠瓶颈——视觉表示与视觉相似的语义概念（如狼与哈士奇）被混淆，全局对齐方法容易过拟合虚假相似性而非捕捉独特的类别身份。
AI.method: 提出CV-DCLR框架，包含双流互校正机制：(1) 视觉似然流——建模观测模式；(2) 因果重要性流——通过反事实干预验证候选原型的结构必要性。自适应门控机制动态调节特征响应，放大真实因果特征，抑制视觉上看似合理但结构无关的干扰。
AI.result: 在CUB、SUN、AWA2基准上，通过严格的语义纠缠注入协议，CV-DCLR显著优于现有方法。现有模型在高度模糊场景下性能严重退化，而CV-DCLR保持稳健表现。
AI.conclusion: CV-DCLR通过因果推理和动态标签精炼，有效从语义混淆中解耦真实的类别身份，为解决零样本学习中的语义纠缠问题提供了新范式。

title: A Model-Based Framework for Developing DTs in Industry 4.0
summary: With the rise of Industry 4.0 driven by the integration of Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) and the Internet of Things (IoT), the use of Digital Twins (DTs) has significantly increased over the past decade, as they provide detailed insights and support well-informed decision-making. However, the lack of standardized methodologies, in addition to the time and resources involved for building them remains an important challenge.  Building on the idea that engineering models of the physical twin (PT) are often available, we propose a tool-supported framework that automates the derivation of DTs by leveraging existing structural and behavioral models of the PT and extending them with additional models to build a comprehensive DT. To demonstrate the feasibility of our approach, we applied it to four different use cases, in which we automatically derived DT instances from (1) models of their PT, (2) configuration of our generic framework and (3) minimal ad hoc additional development for connecting the DT to the PT. These experiments illustrate the applicability of our framework for building DTs in contexts that satisfy our assumptions and requirements. By simply configuring the framework, we are able to derive a DT aligned with its operational purpose.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个自动化工具框架，通过复用物理孪生的现有结构和行为模型，并扩展附加模型，实现数字孪生的自动化构建。在四个用例中验证了可行性，仅需配置和少量开发即可生成与运行目的对齐的数字孪生。
AI.motivation: 数字孪生构建缺乏标准化方法，且耗时耗资源。现有工程模型通常可用但未被充分利用，因此希望自动化派生DT以减少人工成本。
AI.method: 提出一个工具支持的框架，利用物理孪生已有的结构和行为模型，通过扩展附加模型来构建完整的数字孪生。用户通过配置框架和少量额外开发（连接DT与PT）即可自动生成DT实例。
AI.result: 在四个不同用例中成功自动推导出DT实例，验证了框架的可行性。实验表明只需配置框架和最小化开发即可获得与运行目的对齐的DT。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效解决DT构建的标准化和自动化问题，在满足假设和要求的场景下具有广泛适用性。

title: Revealing Hidden Model Behaviors with Task-Specific Self-Reports
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables; appendix with 31 additional pages
summary: Fine-tuning can give a language model a hidden behavior--it may give false answers under a narrow condition, or give harmful advice only when a prompt touches a particular topic. We introduce the Stabilized Adapter for self-Report (SAR), a lightweight LoRA adapter that makes a fine-tuned model describe its own hidden behavior in plain language, using only the model and the dataset it was trained on. Across seven implanted behaviors (plus a no-behavior control), SAR detects the hidden behavior in every one--even when the model has generalized into broad misalignment that the training data alone does not predict. Introspection Adapters (IA), the closest existing baseline, detects some behaviors from our suite but misses others entirely--and where it misses, it hallucinates, consistently reporting wrong behaviors. SAR retains positive signal on every setting where IA fails and halves the rate of hallucinations. This makes it much easier for practitioners to audit their models and obtain reliable answers to "what did my model actually learn?" type of questions.

AI.tldr: 提出SAR方法，通过轻量级LoRA适配器让微调模型用自然语言描述自身隐藏行为，在7种植入行为中全部检测成功，且相比基线方法IA将幻觉率降低一半。
AI.motivation: 微调可能给语言模型植入隐藏行为（如特定条件下给出错误答案或有害建议），现有方法难以可靠检测，且存在漏检和幻觉问题。
AI.method: 提出Stabilized Adapter for self-Report (SAR)，一种轻量级LoRA适配器，仅利用模型本身及其训练数据，让微调模型用自然语言描述自身隐藏行为。
AI.result: 在7种植入行为（含无行为对照）中全部检测成功，即使模型已泛化为训练数据无法预测的广泛misalignment；相比IA基线，在IA失败的所有设置上保持正信号，并将幻觉率减半。
AI.conclusion: SAR使从业者更容易审计模型，可靠回答"我的模型到底学到了什么"这类问题。

title: Explainable Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Traffic Signal Control
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for adaptive traffic signal control. However, in safety-critical infrastructure like traffic control, the opaque, black-box nature of deep RL models poses challenges for transportation agency acceptance, regulatory compliance, operational trust, troubleshooting, and fine-tuning. To bridge this gap between high-performance optimization and human-comprehensible interpretability, this effort introduces a novel, explainable entity centric RL framework for safe and transparent traffic signal control. Rather than processing traffic states through monolithic, flat vectors, the proposed architecture disaggregates real-time intersection observations into distinct, high-dimensional lane entities and phase temporal configurations to inherently preserve the structural topology and geometric configurations of the intersection. Relational dependencies and inter-lane conflicts are dynamically extracted via a dual-stage attention network featuring sequential multi-head cross-attention and self-attention blocks. This design yields a real time affinity matrix that quantifies the direct influence of signal phases on specific approach volumes and queues, providing full visual and analytical interpretability. To ensure strict operational reliability, a deterministic action-masking interface is integrated directly into the Proximal Policy Optimization pipeline, explicitly blocking invalid phase transitions to guarantee absolute compliance with established signal timing and safety constraints. Evaluated in a microscopic simulation environment, outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in delay minimization. More importantly, the emergent attention weights align precisely with established traffic engineering principles, offering an auditable, trust-enabling, and deployable architecture for next-generation adaptive traffic control systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种可解释的、基于实体中心的强化学习框架用于自适应交通信号控制，通过解耦交通状态为车道实体和相位配置，结合双阶段注意力网络实现可解释性，并集成动作掩码确保安全约束，在微观仿真中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在交通信号控制中性能优异但模型黑箱，导致交通部门难以接受、难以合规、缺乏信任、难以调试和调优，因此需要在高性能优化与人类可理解的解释性之间架起桥梁。
AI.method: 提出实体中心的RL框架：将交叉口观测分解为独立的高维车道实体和相位时间配置以保留结构拓扑；采用双阶段注意力网络（顺序多头交叉注意力和自注意力）动态提取关系依赖和车道间冲突，生成实时亲和矩阵；在PPO流程中集成确定性动作掩码接口，禁止无效相位转换以确保安全约束。
AI.result: 在微观仿真环境中，该方法在延迟最小化方面优于现有最先进基线；更重要的是，注意力权重与交通工程原理精确对齐，提供了可审计、可信任的架构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在高性能优化与可解释性之间取得平衡，为下一代自适应交通控制提供了可部署、可审计、增强信任的架构方案。

title: DynaWM: A Base-VLA-Guided World Foundation Model for Moving-Object Manipulation
summary: Although vision-language-action (VLA) models have received widespread attention, many challenges remain in manipulating dynamic moving objects. In most existing approaches, end-to-end forward or inverse dynamics models, i.e., world models, are incorporated into high-performance base VLA architectures, which may degrade the performance of well-pretrained base VLA models due to inappropriate fine-tuning. In this paper, we propose DynaWM, a base-VLA-guided world foundation model that adapts to a wide variety of fine-tuned and coarse-tuned base-VLA checkpoints for moving-object manipulation. DynaWM uses a Mamba-3-based action encoder to encode the base action chunk produced by the base VLA into an action-conditioning representation, a V-JEPA 2.1 vision encoder to extract features from multi-view observation history, and a proprioceptive state encoder to encode robotic-arm proprioceptive states. These feature representations jointly condition a flow-matching DiT to regenerate motion-aware action trajectories for moving-object manipulation. For systematic evaluation, we construct the DynaGrasp-32 benchmark, covering six categories of moving-object manipulation tasks, including velocity variation, trajectory variation, and multi-object manipulation, as well as the DynaGrasp-1600 dataset, which consists of 32 scenarios, 1,600 demonstration trajectories, and approximately 1.53M images. For fine-tuned base-VLA checkpoints, DynaWM achieves percentage improvements of 7.19, 45.31, 1.88, and 10.94 over SmolVLA, X-VLA, π0, and π0.5, respectively. For coarse-tuned base-VLA checkpoints, performance increases by 35.13, 44.06, 35.69, and 26.13 percentage, respectively. Ablation experiments show that visual encoding enhances success by 27.50%, while reducing success by 45.44% if action conditioning is removed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynaWM，一种基于基础VLA引导的世界基础模型，通过Mamba-3动作编码器、V-JEPA 2.1视觉编码器和本体感知状态编码器，结合流匹配DiT，实现对动态移动物体的操控。在构建的DynaGrasp-32基准和DynaGrasp-1600数据集上，相比多个基线模型取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将端到端世界模型融入VLA架构时，因不当微调会降低预训练基础VLA模型的性能；且动态移动物体操控面临诸多挑战。
AI.method: DynaWM包含三个编码器：Mamba-3动作编码器编码基础动作块、V-JEPA 2.1视觉编码器提取多视角观察特征、本体感知编码器编码机械臂状态；三者联合条件化流匹配DiT，生成运动感知的动作轨迹。
AI.result: 在微调基础VLA上，相比SmolVLA、X-VLA、π0、π0.5分别提升7.19%、45.31%、1.88%、10.94%；粗调基础VLA上分别提升35.13%、44.06%、35.69%、26.13%。消融实验：视觉编码提升27.50%，移除动作条件降低45.44%。
AI.conclusion: DynaWM有效解决了动态物体操控中基础VLA模型因不当微调导致性能退化的问题，通过多模态编码与流匹配DiT的协同，显著提升了操控成功率，验证了各模块的关键作用。

title: Flow-A11y: Flow-Aware Accessibility Testing
summary: Modern web applications increasingly expose accessibility barriers through interaction flows rather than static page snapshots. Keyboard traps, focus loss, modal leakage, delayed status updates, dynamic controls, and changing page regions often become observable only after users perform concrete actions. These behaviors are directly related to dynamic WCAG criteria, yet they remain difficult to automate because their assessment depends on runtime interaction evidence and is still commonly performed through manual inspection. We present Flow-A11y, a flow-aware accessibility testing system for interaction-dependent WCAG criteria. Given a target page and a natural-language scenario, Flow-A11y executes the flow in a real browser, records an ordered runtime trace, constructs criterion-specific evidence packets, gates unsupported judgments, and emits auditable findings grounded in resolvable runtime evidence. Evaluated on 19 real public-web scenarios covering 45 dynamic WCAG criteria, Flow-A11y achieves over ten times higher oracle agreement than a generic browser-agent audit, while its evidence-calibration layer improves fail precision from 23.5% to 41.4% and eliminates invalid evidence references. These results show that runtime traces provide actionable evidence for assessing interaction-dependent accessibility behavior. They demonstrate a practical path toward automating dynamic WCAG criteria that page-level scanners cannot assess and that have traditionally required manual evaluation.

AI.tldr: Flow-A11y是一个流程感知的无障碍测试系统，通过执行用户交互流程、记录运行时轨迹并构建证据包，实现对依赖交互的动态WCAG标准的自动化评估。在19个真实场景、45个动态WCAG标准上，其oracle一致性比通用浏览器代理审计高出10倍以上，失败精确率从23.5%提升至41.4%，消除了无效证据引用。
AI.motivation: 现代Web应用的无障碍问题往往隐藏在交互流程中（如键盘陷阱、焦点丢失、模态泄漏等），而非静态页面快照。这些动态WCAG标准依赖运行时交互证据，目前仍需手动检查，难以自动化。
AI.method: Flow-A11y接收目标页面和自然语言场景，在真实浏览器中执行交互流程，记录有序运行时轨迹，构建针对特定标准的证据包，对无法判断的情况进行门控，最终输出基于可解析运行时证据的可审计发现。
AI.result: 在19个真实公共Web场景、45个动态WCAG标准上，Flow-A11y的oracle一致性比通用浏览器代理审计高10倍以上；证据校准层将失败精确率从23.5%提升至41.4%，并消除了无效证据引用。
AI.conclusion: 运行时轨迹能为评估依赖交互的无障碍行为提供可操作的证据，证明了自动化评估页面级扫描器无法检测、传统上需手动评估的动态WCAG标准是可行的。

title: Annotating Korean adnominal ending constructions in corpus data: Beyond relative-clause identification
summary: The Korean adnominal ending \texttt{ETM} occurs in diverse noun-modifying constructions, including relative-clause-like modifiers, adjectival and copular forms, bound-noun constructions, and lexicalized expressions. This paper argues that \texttt{ETM} is not a direct marker of relative-clause structure, but a morphological exponent shared by several adnominal constructions. We propose a corpus-based typology that distinguishes these constructions using predicate type, auxiliary structure, argument-structural compatibility, head-noun restriction, and lexicalized patterns. We operationalize the typology as a construction-sensitive annotation layer for the KLUE dependency treebank, implemented through an ordered rule-based procedure and evaluated by manual validation. Productive relative-clause-like uses account for 39.4\% of the analyzed instances; the remainder consists mainly of adjectival, copular, bound-nominal, modal, temporal, and collocational constructions. The findings show that Korean relative-clause-like modification cannot be identified from adnominal morphology alone.

AI.tldr: 本文论证韩语定语词缀ETM并非关系从句的直接标记，而是多种定语结构共享的形态标记。基于语料库提出类型学分类法，并实施于KLUE依存树库。分析显示仅有39.4%的实例属于典型关系从句用法，其余为形容词、系词、体词依附结构等多种类型。
AI.motivation: 传统上将韩语ETM视为关系从句标记存在误判，亟需厘清其实际语法功能范围，建立更精确的定语结构类型学分类。
AI.method: 基于语料库构建类型学分类体系，依据谓词类型、助动词结构、论元兼容性、核心名词限制及词汇化模式区分不同结构；将该分类操作化为KLUE依存树库的注释层，通过有序规则程序实施并人工验证。
AI.result: 典型关系从句用法仅占39.4%，其余主要为形容词结构、系词结构、体词依附结构、情态结构、时间结构及搭配结构。
AI.conclusion: 韩语的关系从句式修饰不能仅凭定语形态识别，需结合多重句法语义特征进行区分。

title: Can Conversational Temporal Dynamics Improve Depression Detection in Dyads? A Preliminary Investigation in Multi-Modality Perspectives
summary: Automatic depression detection from clinical interviews typically models the semantic content and acoustic characteristics of participant speech. However, the interactional timing between the clinician and participant remains comparatively under-modeled. We investigate conversational temporal dynamics, specifically dyadic turn-pair timing, as a primary modality fused with self-supervised encoders. Evaluated on the DAIC-WOZ dataset, we compare a compact 24-dimensional timing module against frozen WavLM-large and RoBERTa-large baseline detectors. This temporal module achieves the highest single-modality performance on the development set. Furthermore, a convex-weighted late fusion strategy improves overall performance to 0.804 and 0.669 macro-F1 on the development and test sets, respectively. The learned fusion effectively assigns zero weight to acoustics, demonstrating that conversational timing serves as a lightweight, interpretable complement for dyadic depression screening.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出利用对话中的双人话轮转换时间特征进行抑郁症自动检测，在DAIC-WOZ数据集上，仅24维的时间模块性能优于WavLM-large和RoBERTa-large基线模型，通过凸加权融合策略在开发和测试集上分别达到0.804和0.669 macro-F1，且融合模型自适应地给声学特征赋零权重，表明对话时间特征可作为轻量级、可解释的抑郁症筛查补充模态。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁症检测模型主要聚焦于语义内容和声学特征，而对话中 clinician 与 participant 之间的交互时序特征（即双人话轮转换的时间模式）被严重忽视，作者旨在探索这一被低估的模态。
AI.method: 1) 提取24维的双人话轮配对时间特征（对话时序模块）；2) 将该时序模块与自监督编码器（WavLM-large和RoBERTa-large）进行对比；3) 采用凸加权晚期融合策略将时序特征与语义、声学特征进行融合。
AI.result: 时序模块在开发集上达到单模态最优性能；凸加权融合后开发集macro-F1为0.804，测试集为0.669；融合模型给声学特征分配了零权重。
AI.conclusion: 对话时序特征是一种轻量级、可解释且有效的抑郁症筛查补充模态，能够替代或优于复杂的声学特征。

title: Latent Visual Cache for Video Reasoning
summary: Video reasoning requires Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) to remain grounded in dense evidence, yet existing systems largely adopt "read-once, generate-many" paradigm, in which visual grounding weakens during generation. This phenomenon has been widely observed and is known as Visual Anchoring Decay. To fill this gap, we introduce Latent Video Cache (Latent-VC), a recurrent latent visual cache inserted into the decoder to preserve compact visual memories throughout reasoning. The cache is trained with supervised contrastive cache alignment and vision-grounded GRPO with a latent grounding reward, while maintaining strict train-inference alignment through native decoder hidden states. Built on Qwen3.5-9B, Latent-VC consistently outperforms strong CoT and SFT+GRPO baselines across six video benchmarks, with especially clear gains on grounding-intensive and long-video tasks. In addition, it also achieves higher accuracy with substantially shorter responses, suggesting that latent visual caching improves video reasoning by preserving visual evidence rather than relying on longer textual chains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Latent Video Cache (Latent-VC)，一种插入解码器的循环潜在视觉缓存机制，用于在视频推理过程中保持视觉锚定，解决现有LMMs中"一次读取、多次生成"范式导致的视觉锚定衰减问题。基于Qwen3.5-9B，在六个视频基准上超越强基线，同时实现更短响应和更高精度。
AI.motivation: 现有视频推理大模型采用"一次读取、多次生成"范式，在生成过程中视觉接地能力逐渐减弱（即视觉锚定衰减现象），导致模型在长视频和密集接地任务上表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出Latent-VC：在解码器中插入循环潜在视觉缓存，通过监督对比缓存对齐和基于视觉接地奖励的GRPO训练，利用原生解码器隐状态保持训练-推理一致性。
AI.result: 在六个视频基准上一致优于强CoT和SFT+GRPO基线，在密集接地和长视频任务上增益尤为明显；同时用更短响应达到更高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 潜在视觉缓存通过保留视觉证据而非依赖更长的文本推理链来提升视频推理能力，验证了视觉记忆保持对推理质量的关键作用。

title: Towards Automatically Inferring Constraints to Identify Implicit Assumptions in Data Analysis
summary: High-level languages such as R or Python are used frequently to analyze and visualize data in the form of scripts or notebooks. However, these artifacts suffer from reproducibility issues due to what we frame as implicit assumptions made by the authors. Such assumptions range from package versions and shapes of involved data tables, to manual and often undocumented setup steps. Within this work, we provide a unified, example-driven perspective on implicit assumptions in data analysis backed by an explorative proof-of-concept implementation. With this perspective, we propose the use of static analysis techniques to identify such assumptions and to make them explicit in the form of code constraints, focusing on the inclusion of data-analysis-specific issues. Such constraints can then be used to automatically transform these scripts into executable and reproducible artifacts, to check these assumptions at runtime, and to serve as documentation to support code reuse and comprehension.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于静态分析技术的方法，用于识别数据科学脚本中隐含的假设（如包版本、数据表结构等），并通过代码约束显式化这些假设，从而提高可重复性。
AI.motivation: R/Python等高级语言编写的脚本或Notebook存在严重的可重复性问题，根源在于作者未明确说明的"隐式假设"（如包版本、数据形状、手动步骤等），导致他人难以复现结果。
AI.method: 1) 提出统一且基于示例的隐式假设分类框架；2) 使用静态分析技术识别脚本中的隐式假设；3) 将假设转化为显式代码约束（如类型断言、版本检查等）；4) 利用这些约束实现自动化脚本转换、运行时检查及文档生成。
AI.result: 提供了探索性概念验证实现，证明静态分析可用于识别数据科学场景下的隐式假设，并能生成可执行的、可重复的工件。
AI.conclusion: 通过将隐式假设显式化为代码约束，可自动提升脚本的可重复性、可理解性和可复用性，为数据科学工件的质量保障提供了新思路。

title: Optimizing Large Language Models for Causality Assessment in Pharmacovigilance: Developing a Performance Metric as Objective for Bayesian Hyperparameter Optimization
summary: Background: Growing individual case safety report (ICSR) volumes have intensified demand for scalable automated causality assessment. Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise, yet performance on clinically demanding tasks remains suboptimal and inference-time hyperparameter optimization has not been investigated. Objective: To develop a Gaussian Process (GP)-compatible optimization objective and investigate whether temperature optimization improves LLM-expert agreement on Naranjo causality assessment of FAERS ICSRs. Methods: Expert causality assessments were performed on 723 stratified FAERS cases. OpenAI's GPT-5.2 was evaluated using chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting. Four composite metrics were developed: Weighted Cosine Similarity (WCS), Information-Weighted Agreement Score (IWAS), Entropy-Weighted Agreement and Cosine Similarity Score (EWACS), and Consensus-Weighted Cosine Similarity (CWCS) and Bayesian optimization using a GP surrogate with Probability of Improvement (PoI) acquisition was applied across temperature [0, 2]. Results: GPT-5.2 outperformed prior biomedical LLMs at baseline (T = 0), achieving 74.1% agreement on question 5 and 65.4% on question 10 of Naranjo algorithm. Entropy analysis identified these as the sole informative optimization targets. Temperature showed no systematic population-level effect (\b{eta} = 0.002, p = 0.959). EWACS-guided Bayesian optimization improved causality classification agreement from 45.0% to 72.0% (+27 pp), with the largest gain in Doubtful cases (+42.9 pp). Conclusion: EWACS was identified as the optimal GP-compatible metric. The absence of a universal temperature optimum indicates LLM performance is driven primarily by ICSR content, yet case-specific temperature selection produced meaningful improvements, supporting temperature optimization for LLM-assisted pharmacovigilance.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了高斯过程兼容的优化目标（EWACS），发现温度优化虽无群体层面的普适最优值，但针对特定个案调整温度可将GPT-5.2与专家在Naranjo因果关系评估中的分类一致性从45.0%提升至72.0%，其中可疑案例提升最显著（+42.9个百分点）。
AI.motivation: 个体安全报告（ICSR）数量激增，亟需可扩展的自动化因果关系评估方法。大语言模型（LLMs）虽有潜力，但在临床高要求任务中表现仍不理想，且推理时的超参数（尤其是温度）优化尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 在723例分层FAERS病例上获取专家因果关系评估，使用GPT-5.2结合思维链提示进行评估。开发了四种复合度量指标（WCS、IWAS、EWACS、CWCS），采用高斯过程（GP）代理模型结合概率提升（PoI）采集函数，在温度[0,2]范围内进行贝叶斯优化。
AI.result: GPT-5.2在基线（T=0）时优于之前生物医学LLMs，Naranjo算法第5题一致性74.1%、第10题65.4%。熵分析确定这两题为唯一有信息量的优化目标。温度无系统性群体效应（β=0.002, p=0.959）。EWACS引导的贝叶斯优化将因果分类一致性从45.0%提升至72.0%（+27个百分点），可疑案例提升最显著（+42.9个百分点）。
AI.conclusion: EWACS被确定为最优GP兼容指标。不存在普适的温度最优值表明LLM性能主要由ICSR内容驱动，但个案特定的温度选择能带来有意义的提升，支持在LLM辅助药物警戒中进行温度优化。

title: Bridging Interleaved Multi-Modal Reasoning as a Unified Decision Process
summary: Unified multi-modal models (UMMs) have shown promising interleaved text-image reasoning capabilities, yet effectively optimizing such multi-turn generation via reinforcement learning (RL) remains an open challenge. Existing approaches apply RL exclusively to text steps, relegating image generation to supervised surrogates, preventing policy gradients from propagating through the full interleaved trajectory across heterogeneous modalities. This leaves the potential of RL for UMMs largely untapped. In the paper, we introduce \textbf{BRAID} (\textbf{B}ridging inte\textbf{R}le\textbf{A}ved mult\textbf{I}-modal reasoning as a unified \textbf{D}ecision process), a simple framework that casts multi-turn text-image-text reasoning as a unified Markov decision process (MDP), enabling joint optimization of textual and visual generation via a single, principled RL objective. BRAID computes a shared trajectory-level advantage and propagates it coherently into both text tokens and image denoising paths, each optimized through its modality-native policy gradient mechanism. To further address long-horizon credit assignment, BRAID employs a vision-language model (VLM) judge that scores each intermediate image on its reasoning utility, supplying dense turn-level feedback to sharpen learning at critical visual branches. Experiments on spatial reasoning and visual perception benchmarks show that BRAID consistently outperforms various baselines, confirming that a unified MDP formulation with vision-thinking guidance is essential for effective multi-modal reasoning.

AI.tldr: BRAID框架将多模态模型中的多轮文本-图像生成视为统一的马尔可夫决策过程，通过共享轨迹级优势和视觉语言模型评判器，实现文本与图像生成的联合强化学习优化，在空间推理和视觉感知任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型（UMMs）在文本-图像交错推理中，强化学习仅应用于文本步骤，图像生成仍依赖监督学习，导致策略梯度无法通过完整的异质模态轨迹传播，未能充分利用强化学习的潜力。
AI.method: 提出BRAID框架，将多轮文本-图像-文本推理建模为统一马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），计算共享轨迹级优势并同时传播到文本token和图像去噪路径，各自通过模态原生的策略梯度机制优化；并引入VLM评判器为每个中间图像提供推理效用评分，提供密集的轮次级反馈。
AI.result: 在空间推理和视觉感知基准测试上，BRAID一致优于多种基线方法，验证了统一MDP公式结合视觉思维引导对有效多模态推理的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 统一MDP框架和视觉思维引导是实现有效多模态推理的关键，BRID打破了现有方法中强化学习与图像生成之间的隔阂，释放了UMMs在交错推理中的潜力。

title: Privacy-Preserving Industrial Ergonomics: mmWave-Based Automated REBA Scoring and Pose Estimation
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. To appear in the Proceedings of the 2026 International Conference on Automation and Computing (ICAC 2026)
summary: Work-related Musculoskeletal Disorders (WMSDs) require continuous ergonomic assessments. While Rapid Entire Body Assessment (REBA) is a gold-standard observation tool, manual monitoring is labor-intensive, and vision-based automation leads to privacy concerns. This paper proposes a novel end-to-end multi-task learning framework for privacy-preserving ergonomic assessment using millimetre-wave (mmWave) radar. A spatio-temporal backbone reconstructs 3D human skeletons, which serves as the biomechanical foundation for a subsequent regression head to generate REBA risk scores. To overcome the sparsity of radar point clouds, we utilise a multi-objective loss function incorporating biomechanical limits and temporal smoothness constraints. Furthermore, we implement an oversampling strategy to address the imbalance of high-risk postures in existing datasets. Experimental results on MMFi dataset demonstrate that our framework achieves a Categorical Accuracy of 77.78% and real-time performance with an inference latency of 5.70 ms. Our method reaches a High-risk REBA MAE of 0.93, which significantly outperforms both direct regression and two-stage pipelines in high-risk scenarios, providing a robust solution for non-invasive industrial ergonomic assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于毫米波雷达的端到端多任务学习框架，通过重建3D骨骼并回归REBA风险评分，在保护隐私的同时实现实时、高精度的工效学评估，高风险场景MAE达0.93，准确率77.78%。
AI.motivation: 传统REBA评估依赖人工观察，耗时耗力；基于视觉的自动化方法存在隐私泄露风险。毫米波雷达可提供隐私保护，但点云稀疏性给人体姿态重建带来挑战。
AI.method: 1) 时空骨干网络重建3D骨骼；2) 回归头生成REBA风险评分；3) 多目标损失函数（含生物力学约束和时间平滑约束）；4) 过采样策略解决高风险姿态数据不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在MMFi数据集上：分类准确率77.78%，推理延迟5.70ms（实时），高风险场景REBA MAE为0.93，优于直接回归和两阶段流水线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了非侵入式、隐私保护的工业工效学评估，在高风险姿态识别上具有显著优势，为实际工业应用提供了鲁棒解决方案。

title: Copper: Unifying Correctness and Performance Specification in Code Generation
summary: Generative AI has made remarkable progress in producing functionally correct code, yet ensuring both correctness and performance remains an open challenge. We present Copper, a framework that combines formal verification with performance-aware specification to generate code that is provably correct and efficiently executable. Our approach integrates AI-driven code synthesis with formal verification tools, and automated performance profiling loops. Evaluated on a diverse set of algorithmic and real-world programming tasks, Copper produces solutions that satisfy strict correctness guarantees while delivering significant improvements in runtime and memory efficiency compared to baseline AI-generated code. This work demonstrates that it is feasible to bridge the gap between trustworthiness and performance in AI-assisted programming, offering a practical pathway toward reliable, high-performance code generation.

AI.tldr: Copper是一个结合形式化验证与性能感知规范的AI代码生成框架，能生成既正确又高效的代码，在多种编程任务上相比基线AI生成代码在正确性保证和运行效率上都有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式AI在生成功能正确的代码方面取得了显著进展，但如何同时保证代码的正确性和性能仍然是一个未解决的挑战。
AI.method: Copper框架将AI驱动的代码合成与形式化验证工具、自动性能分析循环相结合，并引入性能感知规范来指导代码生成。
AI.result: 在多样化的算法和实际编程任务上，Copper生成的解决方案满足严格正确性保证，同时在运行时和内存效率上比基线AI生成代码有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作证明了在AI辅助编程中弥合可信赖性与性能之间差距的可行性，为可靠、高性能的代码生成提供了一条实用路径。

title: GRASP: Graph-Reasoning Aided Survey Planning for High-Fidelity Related Work Generation
comment: 23 pages, 3 figures. Published in Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: Writing a literature review requires a deep understanding of the relationships among cited papers: how they build on, challenge, or offer alternative perspectives to one another. We present Graph-Reasoning Aided Survey Planning (GRASP), a framework combining LLM planning for related work generation with graph algorithms to extract key relationships among cited papers. Our two-layer graph structure consists of a Graph of Thoughts and an Argument-Counterargument Planning Network, representing the cited papers at different levels of granularity, and we apply topology-aware pruning via a Steiner tree to identify the core inter-paper relationships captured in our graph. Our citation analysis-based evaluation shows that GRASP generates related work sections (RWS) that closely match human-written targets in terms of the discourse roles, intents, and grouping of citations.

AI.tldr: GRASP是一个结合LLM规划与图算法的论文综述生成框架，通过双层图结构（思维图与论点-反论点规划网络）和Steiner树剪枝来提取论文间核心关系，生成结构合理的相关工作章节。
AI.motivation: 撰写文献综述需要深入理解引用论文之间的复杂关系（如构建、挑战或提供替代视角），现有方法难以充分捕捉这些关系。
AI.method: 提出GRASP框架，包含双层图结构：思维图（Graph of Thoughts）和论点-反论点规划网络（Argument-Counterargument Planning Network），从不同粒度表示论文关系；采用拓扑感知的Steiner树剪枝提取核心关系；结合LLM规划生成相关工作章节。
AI.result: 基于引文分析的评估表明，GRASP生成的相关工作章节在话语角色、意图和引用分组上与人类撰写的目标文本高度匹配。
AI.conclusion: GRASP框架能有效捕捉论文间的关键关系，生成质量接近人类水平的文献综述相关工作章节。

title: Folding, Reasoning, and Scaling with Open-source Drug Discovery Engine
summary: Accurately modeling biomolecular interactions is a central bottleneck in biology and therapeutic discovery. Here, we introduce Open Drug Discovery Engine (OpenDDE), an open-source, all-atom biomolecular foundation model that uses co-folding as the entry point to a scalable AI-driven drug discovery engine. Rather than treating structure prediction as an isolated endpoint, OpenDDE is designed as a shared structural reasoning layer for modeling sequence-structure-function relationships across biomolecular complexes, enabling complex structure prediction today while providing a foundation for de novo design, affinity estimation, structure-conditioned optimization, and more. OpenDDE integrates advances in all-atom architecture, atomic latent reasoning, inference optimization, and large-scale data processing to achieve IsoDDE-level co-folding accuracy within a reproducible and openly accessible framework. We also identify two scaling-law directions for co-folding models, revealing practical routes for continued improvement through data, model, inference, and training scaling. By releasing training code, inference pipelines, checkpoints, and benchmarks, OpenDDE aims to democratize access to frontier biomolecular intelligence, accelerate global collaboration, and lay an open foundation for next-generation drug discovery systems that can move from predicting molecular structures toward designing, scoring, and optimizing therapeutic candidates for human health.

AI.tldr: OpenDDE是一个开源的全原子生物分子基础模型，以共折叠为切入点构建可扩展的AI驱动药物发现引擎，具备与IsoDDE相当的共折叠精度，并开源训练代码、推理管线、检查点和基准。
AI.motivation: 生物分子相互作用的精确建模是生物学和药物发现的核心瓶颈，现有方法将结构预测视为孤立终点，缺乏可扩展、可复现的开源框架。
AI.method: 采用全原子架构、原子级潜在推理、推理优化和大规模数据处理，以共折叠作为共享结构推理层，统一建模序列-结构-功能关系，并识别了共折叠模型的两个规模化方向。
AI.result: 实现了与IsoDDE级别的共折叠精度，建立了可复现的开源框架，发现了数据、模型、推理和训练规模化提升性能的路径。
AI.conclusion: OpenDDE通过开源方式民主化前沿生物分子智能，为从结构预测转向设计、评分和优化治疗候选分子打下开放基础，加速全球协作与下一代药物发现系统发展。

title: Fusion: A Framework for Unified Sequential Token AdaptatIon in VisiOn TraNsformers
summary: Vision Transformers achieve strong image classification accuracy but process all image regions with nearly the same computation, even when many regions are redundant or uninformative. Recent adaptive inference methods reduce this cost by selectively compressing tokens or terminating inference early, but combining these mechanisms often causes unstable intermediate representations and accuracy degradation. We introduce Fusion, a unified adaptive inference framework that coordinates token merging, early exiting, and token pruning through a simple staged design: tokens are merged first, confidence is evaluated next, and pruning is applied only to samples that continue inference. This ordering allows the three mechanisms to operate cooperatively rather than competitively. Fusion further includes lightweight routing modules that adapt compression strength to each input and support inference-time adjustment of the accuracy--latency trade-off without retraining. On ImageNet-1k with DeiT-S, Fusion matches or surpasses state-of-the-art adaptive ViT methods at comparable compute budgets while reducing calibration error by up to $4\times$ and inference energy by $48\%$. Experiments across ImageNet-100, CIFAR-100, and ImageNette with multiple ViT backbones demonstrate consistent transferability without dataset-specific tuning.

AI.tldr: Fusion是一个统一的自适应推理框架，通过分阶段协调token合并、提前退出和token剪枝，在ViT上实现精度与效率的更好平衡，并在ImageNet-1k上将校准误差降低高达4倍，推理能耗降低48%。
AI.motivation: Vision Transformers对所有图像区域使用几乎相同的计算量，忽略了大量冗余区域，导致计算效率低下。现有的自适应推理方法虽然试图通过token压缩或提前终止来解决，但将这些机制组合使用时往往导致中间表示不稳定和精度下降。
AI.method: 提出Fusion框架，采用分阶段设计：先合并token，再评估置信度，最后仅对继续推理的样本进行剪枝。同时引入轻量级路由模块，为每个输入自适应调整压缩强度，并支持推理时调整精度-延迟权衡而无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k上使用DeiT-S，在相似计算预算下匹配或超越最先进的自适应ViT方法，校准误差降低高达4倍，推理能耗降低48%。在ImageNet-100、CIFAR-100和ImageNette上使用多种ViT骨干网络均表现出一致的迁移性，无需针对特定数据集调参。
AI.conclusion: 通过有序地协调三种自适应机制（合并、退出、剪枝），可以使它们协同工作而非相互竞争，从而在保持精度的同时大幅提升计算效率和校准性能。

title: Detecting Architectural Drift in Safety-Critical Firmware through Runtime Trace Analysis
comment: accepted at 42nd IEEE International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution (ICSME 2026)
summary: Maintaining consistency between architectural design and runtime-observed behavior is challenging in long-lived safety-critical firmware. This paper presents a runtime-informed methodology for detecting architectural drift in ISO 26262-compliant firmware. The approach collects hardware-assisted execution traces, abstracts them into message exchanges among firmware components, and compares the resulting runtime behavior with design-time sequence diagrams through a deterministic differencing step. The computed delta identifies discrepancies as confirmed, missing, additional, or inverted, while a constrained LLM-based step generates a human-readable report only to support expert review. We evaluate the methodology in an industrial firmware context through agreement-based validation and a practitioner survey. Results over 26 test cases show strong agreement between the generated deltas and expert-curated references, while practitioners perceive the reports as useful for interpreting drift, reducing manual analysis effort, and supporting safety-oriented documentation activities. The findings suggest that combining runtime trace analysis, deterministic architectural differencing, and constrained LLM-based reporting can practically support architectural drift detection in evolving safety-critical firmware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种运行时信息驱动的方法，用于在符合ISO 26262的安全关键固件中检测架构漂移，通过收集硬件执行轨迹、抽象为组件间消息交换、与设计时序列图进行确定性差异比较，并利用受限LLM生成可读报告，实验表明该方法在工业环境中有效。
AI.motivation: 在长期运行的安全关键固件中，架构设计与运行时行为之间的一致性难以维持，即存在架构漂移问题，而现有方法难以高效检测这种漂移。
AI.method: 收集硬件辅助执行轨迹 → 抽象为固件组件间的消息交换 → 与设计时序列图进行确定性差异比较（区分确认、缺失、额外、反转四类差异）→ 利用受限LLM生成人类可读报告辅助专家审查。
AI.result: 在26个测试用例上，生成的差异与专家标注参考高度一致；从业者调查表明报告有助于理解漂移、减少手动分析工作量、支持安全导向的文档工作。
AI.conclusion: 结合运行时轨迹分析、确定性架构差异比较和受限LLM报告生成，可以实用地支持演化中的安全关键固件的架构漂移检测。

title: SelfMem: Self-Optimizing Memory for AI Agents
summary: While current AI agents support increasingly long context windows, tool use, and skill execution for long-horizon tasks, they still require memory systems to effectively leverage historical experience. Existing memory frameworks typically rely on fixed storage, retrieval, and summarization mechanisms, which can be rigid across different tasks and often require manual tuning. To address this limitation, we propose SelfMem, a self-optimizing memory framework. Inspired by prior work on self-improving AI, we follow the principle of "teaching an agent to fish rather than giving it a fish."
