Instead of forcing the model to follow a predefined memory strategy or format, SelfMem provides an environment with memory tools and feedback signals that allow the agent to explore, evaluate, and refine its own memory strategy. Our results show that SelfMem consistently outperforms retrieval, compression, and agent-memory baselines on BEAM across conversation scales from 100K to 1M tokens. Compared with the strongest baseline, SelfMem improves the official score by 48.7%, 40.8%, and 41.9% at 100K, 500K, and 1M, respectively. Further question-type analysis shows broad robustness across diverse memory demands, and our optimization study shows that model-guided strategy refinement further improves performance.

AI.tldr: SelfMem是一个自优化的记忆框架，让AI代理自主探索、评估和优化其记忆策略，而非使用固定机制。在BEAM基准测试中，SelfMem在100K到1M token对话规模下持续优于现有基线方法，最高提升48.7%的官方分数。
AI.motivation: 现有AI代理的记忆框架依赖固定的存储、检索和总结机制，缺乏灵活性，且需要大量人工调参。为解决这一问题，作者提出让代理自主学习和优化记忆策略。
AI.method: 遵循"授人以渔"原则，SelfMem不预设记忆策略或格式，而是提供包含记忆工具和反馈信号的环境，让代理自主探索、评估并优化其记忆管理策略。
AI.result: 在BEAM基准上，SelfMem在100K、500K和1M token规模下，相较最强基线分别提升了48.7%、40.8%和41.9%的官方分数，且在不同问题类型上表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: SelfMem通过赋予代理自主优化记忆策略的能力，显著优于固定机制的基线方法，且模型引导的策略优化可进一步提升性能，为长上下文AI代理的记忆管理提供了新范式。

title: Evaluating LLM Uncertainty in Long-Form Generation Using Deterministic Ground Truth
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). Code available at https://github.com/IdoAmit198/SALT
summary: As LLMs generate increasingly long outputs, effective uncertainty estimation must identify errors at fine-grained levels rather than discard entire responses. While such methods exist, evaluating uncertainty at any resolution (token to an entire generation) is challenging and highly sensitive to label imperfections, making zero-noise benchmarks essential; yet, long-form generation benchmarks tend to rely on fallible labels rather than deterministic ground truth. We introduce Single-answer Atomic Long-form Target (SALT), a benchmark of six procedurally generated tasks with single deterministic long textual ground truths, enabling unit-level evaluation of correctness, calibration, and ranking without external judges. Equipped with SALT, our analysis of 50+ LLMs reveals key insights: We identify which confidence functions dominate each uncertainty aspect and show that confidence ranking largely breaks at atomic resolution, even when clearer separability emerges at coarser line-level units. SALT further enables controlled atom-level interventions throughout generation, revealing two separable drivers of future errors: propagation from corrupted prefixes, dominated by global context correctness, and bounded degradation from increasing answer-context length. Finally, we demonstrate that reasoning, via Chain-of-Thought prompting or internalized through training, introduces a trade-off, improving accuracy while degrading confidence ranking. These findings directly impact risk-critical applications requiring reliable error identification and mitigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SALT基准，通过六个确定性长文本生成任务评估LLM细粒度不确定性估计，发现置信度排名在原子级别失效，并揭示了推理机制在提升准确率的同时损害置信度排名的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM不确定性估计缺乏零噪声基准，长文本生成评估依赖易错的标签而非确定性真值，难以在细粒度级别（如token级）可靠评估不确定性。
AI.method: 构建SALT基准，包含六个程序化生成的任务，每个任务具有单个确定性的长文本真值；基于此基准对50+个LLM进行正确性、校准和排名评估，并设计原子级干预实验。
AI.result: 1) 识别了不同不确定性方面占主导的置信度函数；2) 置信度排名在原子级（如token）基本失效，但在粗粒度（行级）可分离；3) 发现未来错误的两个独立驱动因素：前缀污染（全局上下文正确性主导）和答案上下文长度增加导致的边界退化；4) 推理（CoT或训练内化）带来准确率与置信度排名之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度不确定性评估对风险关键应用至关重要，推理机制带来的准确率提升以牺牲可信赖的置信度排名为代价，需要在实际部署中权衡。

title: SE-UNet: Singular Equivariant Imaging for Real-World Constrained Generation
summary: While diffusion models have revolutionized image synthesis, their application to real-world inverse problems is often hampered by the need for massive datasets and the difficulty of imposing strict physical constraints. In this work, we introduce \textbf{SE-UNet} (Singular Equivariant UNet), a framework designed to solve ill-posed imaging tasks without extensive pre-training. By treating generation as an optimization problem constrained by geometric equivariance ($D_4$ group) and singular value gating, SE-UNet effectively standardizes the solution space. We demonstrate that these strong inductive biases allow for state-of-the-art zero-shot inpainting results (80\% missing pixels) on CIFAR-10. Our method surpasses Deep Image Prior (DIP) baselines by over 4 dB in PSNR and exhibits a characteristic "singular snap" convergence -- rapidly locking into the signal manifold. SE-UNet thus offers a data-efficient pathway for constrained generation, aligning with the ReALM-GEN goal of bridging theoretical priors with practical deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出SE-UNet框架，利用几何等变性（D4群）和奇异值门控作为强归纳偏置，无需大规模预训练即可实现零样本图像修复，在80%像素缺失的CIFAR-10上超过DIP基线4 dB PSNR，并呈现出"奇异快照"收敛特性。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在逆问题应用中受限于大规模数据需求和物理约束难以施加的问题。
AI.method: 将生成过程建模为受几何等变性（D4群对称性）和奇异值门控约束的优化问题，通过SE-UNet框架标准化解空间。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上实现80%像素缺失的零样本修复，PSNR比Deep Image Prior基线高出4 dB以上，并展现出"奇异快照"式快速收敛行为。
AI.conclusion: SE-UNet提供了一条数据高效的受约束生成路径，弥合了理论先验与实际部署之间的鸿沟。

title: Which Algorithm Specification Formats Help Language Models Implement Machine Learning Algorithms?
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to implement algorithms from research manuscripts, but papers often leave implementation choices implicit. This study examines how the written format of an algorithm specification affects first-pass LLM implementation accuracy. We compare ordinary prose, LaTeX algorithm-style pseudocode, PDF-like extracted pseudocode, Markdown fields, YAML-like specifications, JSON-like specifications, and Python code stubs across five machine learning tasks, three models, and four experimental settings, yielding 4,020 generated implementations. Hidden tests evaluate details that often determine correctness, including tie-breaking, array shapes, numerical rules, return structures, and invalid-input behavior. Under the core-information setting, LaTeX algorithm-style pseudocode has the largest average format effect, with YAML-like specifications and ordinary prose close behind. Under complete information, GPT-5.4 mini shows no format differences in the matched comparisons, whereas Gemma 3 4B and Llama 3.2 3B still do. Code stubs do not consistently improve correctness despite specifying the function signature. The results support a writing recommendation: authors should state the interface, computation steps, numerical rules, and boundary-case behavior explicitly, instead of relying on a particular surface format to carry those details.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统比较了多种算法规范格式（如自然语言、LaTeX伪代码、JSON等）对LLM首次实现准确性的影响，发现格式本身不如内容明确性重要，建议作者明确陈述接口、计算步骤、数值规则和边界情况。
AI.motivation: 论文常隐含实现选择，导致LLM在根据论文实现算法时出现歧义。作者希望探究算法规范的书写格式是否以及如何影响LLM的首次实现正确性。
AI.method: 在5个机器学习任务、3个模型、4个实验设置下，比较了7种格式（普通散文、LaTeX算法式伪代码、PDF提取式伪代码、Markdown字段、YAML式、JSON式、Python代码存根），共生成4,020个实现，并用隐藏测试评估细节正确性。
AI.result: 核心信息设置下，LaTeX算法式伪代码的平均格式效应最大，YAML式和普通散文紧随其后；完整信息下，GPT-5.4 mini无显著差异，而小模型仍有差异；代码存根并未一致提升正确性。
AI.conclusion: 算法规范的表面格式不如内容明确性重要。写作建议：作者应明确陈述接口、计算步骤、数值规则和边界情况，而非依赖特定格式隐含传达这些细节。

title: ProACT: Towards Breakdown-Aware Proactive Agent in Multi-User Collaboration
summary: Conversational agents are increasingly embedded in human collaborative work, yet they remain fundamentally passive and reactive: they respond to explicit user requests rather than proactively recognizing moments when a team would benefit from timely intervention as human collaborators often do. This reactive design substantially limits the use of agents as active participants in multi-user collaboration, where disagreements, ambiguous goals, forgotten constraints, underspecified plans, discussion loops, and imbalanced participation can gradually undermine group progress. To move agents from passive assistants toward active participants in multi-user collaboration, we introduce ProACT, a breakdown-aware agent framework grounded in theories of common ground, collaborative planning, and coordination work. ProACT observes the speaker-attributed conversation history, determines whether the current turn contains a collaboration breakdown requiring intervention, decides whether the agent should stay silent or speak, and, when speaking is needed, routes the case to a targeted collaboration skill. We further introduce the first multi-user collaboration benchmark for evaluating proactive agents across project planning, product design, research collaboration, logistics, education, and resource-constrained decision making. Across 3,244 turn-level examples and five LLM backbones, ProACT consistently improves collaborative appropriateness, non-interruptiveness, conciseness, and judged intervention quality over direct chat.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProACT框架，使对话代理从被动响应转向主动识别并干预多用户协作中的沟通障碍（如分歧、目标模糊等），通过监控对话历史、检测协作故障并决定是否介入，在多个协作场景和LLM骨干上显著提升了协作质量。
AI.motivation: 现有对话代理在多用户协作中仅被动响应用户请求，无法像人类协作者那样主动识别团队需要干预的时刻（如分歧、目标模糊、讨论循环等），限制了代理作为主动参与者的价值。
AI.method: ProACT框架基于共同基础、协作规划和协调工作理论，通过观察带说话者标记的对话历史，判断当前轮次是否存在协作故障、决定代理是否应发言，并在需要时路由到特定的协作技能模块。
AI.result: 在涵盖项目规划、产品设计、研究协作等6个场景的3,244个轮次样本上，使用5种LLM骨干，ProACT在协作适当性、非干扰性、简洁性和干预质量上均优于直接聊天。
AI.conclusion: ProACT成功将代理从被动助手转变为主动参与者，证明了故障感知框架在多用户协作中的有效性。

title: Harness-Aware Self-Evolving: Co-Evolving Model Weights, Harness, and Task Solutions
summary: Self-evolving frameworks usually optimize task solutions while treating the surrounding harness as fixed. We introduce Harness-Aware Self-Evolving (HASE), an agentic reinforcement-learning framework in which a single model can generate task solutions or edit selected harness components in a multi-turn action space. HASE enables a single Qwen3-8B model to match the text-classification performance of a GPT-OSS-120B model that uses Claude Code as the harness proposer. In alpha factor mining, HASE outperforms the reported GPT-OSS-120B baseline. HASE also repairs imperfect evaluation components and converges to state-of-the-art performance in circle-packing algorithm discovery. These results show that HASE improves the harness and the solution through one unified agentic process.

AI.tldr: 提出HASE框架，让单个模型既能生成任务解决方案，又能编辑评估环境（harness）组件，通过统一智能体强化学习过程同时优化两者。
AI.motivation: 现有自进化框架通常只优化任务解决方案，而将环绕的评估环境（harness）视为固定不变，限制了模型自我改进的能力。
AI.method: 提出Harness-Aware Self-Evolving (HASE)框架，采用智能体强化学习，将生成任务解决方案和编辑harness组件统一到多轮动作空间中，由单个模型完成。
AI.result: Qwen3-8B模型在文本分类任务上匹配GPT-OSS-120B+Claude Code的性能；在alpha因子挖掘中超越该基线；修复不完善的评估组件；在圆填充算法发现中收敛到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: HASE通过统一的智能体过程同时改进harness和解决方案，证明两者可相互促进，实现更优的自进化效果。

title: CLABTOOLKIT: An Open-Source Toolkit for Routine Processing, Manipulation, and Visualization of Neuroimaging Data
comment: Presented at OHBM 2026 in Bordeaux, France. Submitted to Aperture Neuro
summary: Neuroimaging research requires manipulating heterogeneous data structures, including raw MRI volumes, volumetric parcellations, cortical surface meshes, tractograms, and connectivity matrices, across tools with incompatible interfaces and file formats, forcing researchers to repeatedly re-implement routine but technically demanding operations. We present CLABTOOLKIT, an open-source Python package that consolidates these operations into a single, coherent framework by representing volumetric, surface, and streamline data as interoperable Python objects. Five core data structures (Parcellation, Surface, AnnotParcellation, Tractogram, and Connectome) encapsulate common neuroanatomical entities and provide consistent methods for loading, processing, and exporting data across standard neuroimaging formats (e.g., NIfTI, GIFTI, FreeSurfer annotations, TCK/TRK), including connectome generation from a parcellation and scalar-map projection onto tractogram streamlines. Complementary modules support BIDS dataset management, FreeSurfer integration, diffusion MRI processing, morphometric analysis, graph-theoretical network analysis, and GPU-accelerated multi-panel visualization via PyVista. The toolkit comprises 19 modules organised into six layers, exposing 13 object-oriented classes with 234 methods and 207 standalone functions, and a JSON-based configuration system enables workflow customization without code changes. Unlike existing neuroimaging libraries, which typically address these tasks separately, CLABTOOLKIT combines color and lookup-table management, parcellation manipulation, multi-surface visualization, and tractography utilities within a single framework. CLABTOOLKIT is compatible with Python 3.9-3.12 and released under the Apache 2.0 license. Source code, documentation, and example workflows are available at https://github.com/connectomicslab/clabtoolkit.

AI.tldr: CLABTOOLKIT是一个开源Python包，将神经影像学中的体积、表面和纤维束数据整合为统一的框架，提供五种核心数据结构（Parcellation、Surface、AnnotParcellation、Tractogram、Connectome）以及19个模块、234个方法和207个函数，支持BIDS管理、FreeSurfer集成、扩散MRI处理、形态分析、图论网络分析和GPU加速可视化。
AI.motivation: 神经影像学研究需要处理异构数据结构（MRI体积、皮层表面网格、纤维束图、连接矩阵等），但现有工具接口和文件格式不兼容，研究人员不得不重复实现常规但技术要求高的操作。缺少一个统一框架来整合这些操作。
AI.method: 将体积、表面和纤维束数据表示为可互操作的Python对象，五种核心数据结构封装常见神经解剖实体，提供一致的加载/处理/导出方法。19个模块分为六层，13个面向对象类，JSON配置系统支持无代码修改的工作流定制。
AI.result: 支持NIfTI、GIFTI、FreeSurfer注释、TCK/TRK等标准格式；支持从parcellation生成连接矩阵、标量图投影到纤维束；包含BIDS管理、FreeSurfer集成、扩散MRI、形态分析、图论分析、GPU加速可视化等功能。
AI.conclusion: 不同于现有分别处理这些任务的库，CLABTOOLKIT在一个框架内整合了颜色/LUT管理、parcellation操作、多表面可视化和纤维束分析工具。兼容Python 3.9-3.12，Apache 2.0开源协议。

title: Effectiveness of LLM-based Software Diversity for Reliability Improvement -- an Empirical Study
summary: Software diversity has been extensively studied as a means of reducing the risk of common-mode failures. Classic work showed that the central issue is whether failures of diversely redundant components overlap in ways that limit the reliability gains. Traditional software diversity is costly to obtain, since it requires multiple implementations as well as the corresponding validation, maintenance, and deployment effort. Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) may change this. LLMs enable inexpensive code generation: they produce many candidate implementations of the same specification quickly, across different models, decoding settings, and programming languages. This raises a natural question: can LLMs serve as practical generators of software diversity, and how much reliability improvement can that diversity actually provide? In this paper, we extend classical empirical studies of software diversity in human-written programs to LLM-generated code. We study three specifications using both historical human-written programs and large pools of LLM-generated ones evaluated under a common compilation, sandboxing, and exhaustive test suite. We explore LLM diversity along multiple axes, including model family, generation temperature, and programming language. Reliability improvement is evaluated in a 1-out-of-2 configuration across both homogeneous and heterogeneous program populations, including within-LLM pairings and pairings across programming languages and across LLM-generated and human-written programs. The results show that combining LLM-generated programs, especially in heterogeneous settings, can yield reliability gains, although this is partly conditioned by the programming language and generation setting. Taken together, these findings suggest that LLMs provide a scalable source of comparatively low-cost programs whose diversity can be leveraged for reliability improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用大语言模型（LLM）生成多样化代码以提升软件可靠性的可行性。通过对比历史人类编写代码与LLM生成代码的多样性，发现LLM生成的程序在异构组合（如跨语言、跨模型）下能够实现显著的可靠性提升，尽管效果受编程语言和生成设置影响。
AI.motivation: 传统软件多样性需要多个独立实现，成本高昂。LLM能快速生成大量候选代码，但能否作为实际可用的多样性来源、能带来多少可靠性提升，尚不清楚。
AI.method: 选取三个规格说明，收集历史人类代码和LLM生成代码（覆盖不同模型、温度、编程语言）。在统一的编译、沙箱和穷举测试环境下评估，采用1-out-of-2冗余配置测量可靠性改进。
AI.result: 异构组合（如跨语言、跨模型）的LLM生成程序可带来可靠性增益，但效果受编程语言和生成设置条件影响。同质组合（如同一模型不同温度）增益有限。
AI.conclusion: LLM提供了一种可扩展、低成本、多样化的代码来源，其多样性可用于提升软件可靠性，特别在异构部署场景下效果显著。

title: Beyond Static Rules: Automated Discovery of Latent Vulnerabilities in Text-to-SQL
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in Text-to-SQL tasks, their deployment in real-world environments is hindered by latent reliability issues. Identifying these latent weaknesses is critical for building trustworthy database interfaces, yet current diagnostic approaches rely heavily on static, expert-defined rules, which lack the capability for systematic and automated exploration. To bridge this gap, we propose SAGE (Systematic Automated Guided Exploration), a novel framework designed to autonomously uncover latent failure patterns in LLM-based Text-to-SQL generation. Specifically, SAGE generates vulnerability hypotheses for given samples and references a continuously evolving Vulnerability Codex to design targeted perturbations, thereby iteratively verifying and documenting potential defects. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art open-source LLMs demonstrate that SAGE uncovers a substantial number of failure cases, highlighting the significant fragility of current models. Furthermore, our analysis reveals that the Vulnerability Codex exhibits strong cross-model transferability, indicating that the discovered patterns represent generalized structural weaknesses. Finally, we explore SAGE's potential for remediation. Although preliminary, lightweight fine-tuning on the generated samples yields promising improvements, suggesting a scalable pathway for closing the reliability loop in future work.

AI.tldr: 提出SAGE框架，通过自主生成漏洞假设并利用动态更新的漏洞法典设计扰动，系统化地发现LLM在Text-to-SQL任务中的潜在失败模式，实验表明该方法能找到大量失败案例且发现的漏洞具有跨模型可迁移性，初步微调实验也展示了修复潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有诊断方法依赖静态的专家定义规则，缺乏系统化和自动化探索能力，无法有效识别LLM在Text-to-SQL任务中隐藏的可靠性问题。
AI.method: SAGE框架：1) 为给定样本生成漏洞假设；2) 参考持续演进的Vulnerability Codex设计针对性扰动；3) 迭代验证并记录潜在缺陷。
AI.result: 在多个开源LLM上发现了大量失败案例；Vulnerability Codex表现出强跨模型迁移性，表明发现的模式是通用的结构弱点；初步微调可带来性能提升。
AI.conclusion: SAGE能系统化自主发现LLM在Text-to-SQL中的隐藏缺陷，发现的漏洞具有可迁移性，并且生成的样本可用于微调修复，为构建可靠数据库接口提供了新路径。

title: Online Linear Programming for Multi-Objective Routing in LLM Serving
summary: We study the online routing problem in large language model serving, where requests arrive sequentially and must be dispatched to parallel decode workers under tight batch-size and KV-cache constraints. Unlike widely used routing heuristics that are not tied to explicit service-level objectives (SLOs) and offer limited control over latency-throughput trade-offs, we introduce a multi-objective optimization framework that formulates routing as an online linear programming with interpretable decision rewards. We apply an efficient bid-price control policy based on the online linear programming that admits requests when their SLO-weighted benefit exceeds their shadow prices. To meet millisecond decision requirements, we develop a warm-started, projected first-order updates that track the evolving dual shadow prices online with predictable runtime. We integrate our router into the Vidur simulator and demonstrate substantial improvements over standard baselines across multiple SLO regimes, including end-to-end latency, time-to-first-token, throughput, and tail performance. A big picture from our result: a science-based approach outperforms others based on heuristics.

AI.tldr: 本文针对大语言模型服务中的在线路由问题，提出了一种基于在线线性规划的多目标优化框架，通过bid-price控制策略和温启动投影一阶更新方法，在Vidur模拟器上实现了优于传统启发式方法的端到端延迟、首Token时间、吞吐量和尾部性能。
AI.motivation: 现有路由启发式算法未与显式服务级目标（SLO）绑定，对延迟-吞吐量权衡的控制有限，难以满足大规模LLM服务中请求在线到达、需在紧批量和KV缓存约束下分发的需求。
AI.method: 将路由问题建模为在线线性规划，设计可解释的决策奖励；采用bid-price控制策略，当请求的SLO加权收益超过影子价格时准入请求；开发温启动投影一阶更新方法在线跟踪对偶影子价格，满足毫秒级决策需求。
AI.result: 在Vidur模拟器上，该方法在端到端延迟、首Token时间、吞吐量和尾部性能等多个SLO指标上均显著优于标准基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于科学的方法（在线优化理论）优于基于启发式的路由方法，为LLM服务中的在线路由提供了系统化的解决方案。

title: BiSLW: Bi-Spectral Latent Watermarking for Generative Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion-based generative models have transformed visual content synthesis, yet they remain vulnerable to unauthorized usage and lack reliable attribution methods. Existing watermarking techniques often treat latent tensors as static spatial feature maps or depend on pixel-domain modification, and most do not explicitly leverage the internal frequency structure of the latent space for dual-band redundant embedding, leaving them susceptible to the stochastic nature of diffusion and regeneration attacks. We introduce BiSLW, a trainable bi-spectral latent watermarking framework that jointly embeds aligned identity signals across complementary spectral bands of the decoded diffusion latent using learned encoders and decoders, going beyond fixed-pattern frequency approaches. We leverage the inherent frequency structure of diffusion latents to design a dual-band watermarking framework. Low-frequency components encode global semantics, while high-frequency components capture fine texture. We exploit this structure to embed watermarks across complementary spectral bands. The watermark is independently injected into both bands via learned encoders and recombined before decoding, ensuring it becomes intrinsic to the generative trajectory. Dual spectral decoders recover the watermark from each band, while a cross-band consistency constraint enforces alignment between semantic and textural embeddings. Experiments show that BiSLW achieves a strong balance between perceptual fidelity and robustness, improving PSNR by over 3 dB compared to prior latent diffusion watermarking methods while preserving near-perfect bit accuracy under aggressive regeneration and common distortions, all with negligible computational overhead.

AI.tldr: BiSLW是一种针对扩散模型的**双频谱潜空间水印框架**，通过在低频频谱（全局语义）和高频频谱（细粒度纹理）中联合嵌入对齐的身份信号，实现高保真、强鲁棒的水印注入，相比此前方法PSNR提升超过3dB，在再生攻击下仍保持接近完美的比特精度。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型缺乏可靠的版权归属方法，而传统水印技术要么将潜张量视为静态空间特征图，要么依赖像素域修改，未能利用潜空间的内部频率结构进行双频带冗余嵌入，因此易受扩散过程的随机性和再生攻击影响。
AI.method: 提出BiSLW，一种可训练的双频谱潜空间水印框架：1）利用扩散潜变量固有的频率结构，将水印分别注入低频（编码全局语义）和高频（编码细粒度纹理）两个互补频带；2）设计学习型编码器独立嵌入水印，并在解码前重组；3）双频谱解码器分别从两个频带恢复水印，并引入跨频带一致性约束确保语义和纹理嵌入的对齐。
AI.result: 相比此前潜扩散水印方法，PSNR提升超过3dB；在激烈的再生攻击和常见图像失真下仍保持接近完美的比特精度；计算开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: BiSLW在感知保真度和鲁棒性之间取得了良好的平衡，有效解决了扩散模型水印对再生攻击脆弱的问题，为扩散模型的版权保护提供了可行的技术路径。

title: CRRL: A Causality-Based Reinforcement Learning Framework for Autonomous System Recovery
summary:
Traditional reinforcement learning (RL) for recovery in autonomous systems lacks causal understanding and generalizes poorly to novel failure scenarios. RL policies often stall in failure states, spending up to 70% of an episode immobilized. Rule-based recovery alone is inadequate, and adding heuristic recovery to a pretrained PPO policy worsens rewards because policies cannot coordinate well with unanticipated interventions. The issue is not missing recovery mechanisms but a lack of policies trained to collaborate with them.
  We introduce CRRL, a causal-guided RL framework that trains policies to work effectively with rule-based recovery. The recovery detects stalled states and assists the agent. Causal relations from driving logs shape the training signal, teaching the policy to anticipate stalls and adjust actions in recovery contexts. The framework follows MAPE-K, with sensor collection, causal model construction, and hybrid RL policy training corresponding to Monitor, Analyze, and Plan/Execute, respectively.
  We evaluate CRRL through a four-condition ablation study across three driving scenarios, with 20 episodes per condition. We find that causal training significantly improves reward, distance, and velocity. Moreover, 9 of 20 roundabout episodes required zero recovery intervention, confirming navigation competence. These results show that causal-guided training produces effective RL policies that cooperate with rule-based safety components.

AI.tldr: 提出CRRL框架，用因果引导强化学习训练策略与基于规则的恢复机制协作，显著提升自动驾驶在故障场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统RL缺乏因果理解，在故障场景泛化差，策略常卡在失败状态（高达70%时间无法移动）。启发式恢复与预训练策略不协调，反使奖励下降。核心问题不是缺少恢复机制，而是缺乏与之协作训练的策略。
AI.method: 提出CRRL（因果引导RL框架），用MAPE-K架构组织：Monitor（传感器采集）、Analyze（构建因果模型）、Plan/Execute（混合RL策略训练）。恢复模块检测卡死状态并辅助，因果关系从驾驶日志中提取，引导强化学习训练信号，使策略学会预测卡死并调整行动。
AI.result: 三种驾驶场景、四条件消融实验（每条件20轮）。因果训练显著提升奖励、行驶距离和速度。在环岛场景中，20轮里有9轮无需任何恢复干预，证明导航能力。
AI.conclusion: 因果引导训练能产生有效的RL策略，使其主动与基于规则的安全组件合作，弥补了传统RL在故障恢复场景中的短板。

title: Rethinking Scientific Discovery in an Agentic Era
summary: Artificial intelligence has advanced scientific discovery, but most AI4Science systems remain fragmented tools that rely on humans to coordinate problem formulation, literature grounding, model use, simulation, validation, and knowledge reuse. This paper presents \textbf{SCION (Scientific Collaborative Innovation with Agentic Organizational Nexus)}, an agentic scientific operating system that acts as an \textbf{organizational nexus}. Through a Science Agent serving as a \textbf{Meta-Harness}, SCION connects scientific tasks, tools, agents, artifacts, and memory, transforming research into an executable, auditable, and reusable operational process. At its core is the \textbf{Research Execution Plan (REP)}, which compiles high-level scientific intent into staged objectives, dependencies, verification checkpoints, tool requirements, expected artifacts, and fallback conditions. SCION further integrates hierarchical multi-agent execution, profile-driven specialization, selective context construction, governed delegation, and layered epistemic memory to support long-horizon scientific work. We formulate discovery under SCION as \textbf{Target-conditioned Inverse Search} and extend it to hidden-target settings through batch active search under finite experimental budgets. Applications in materials analysis, molecule design, and protein or antibody screening, together with experiments on scientific reading, idea generation, molecule generation, and antibody screening, show that SCION outperforms existing autonomous research-agent baselines, especially in decomposition, verification, refinement, and memory reuse. Overall, SCION shifts AI from isolated tools toward a coordinated operational layer for traceable and reusable scientific innovation.

AI.tldr: SCION 是一个智能体操作系统，通过 Science Agent (Meta-Harness) 协调科学任务、工具、智能体、产物和记忆，利用 Research Execution Plan (REP) 将科学意图转化为可执行流程，在材料分析、分子设计、蛋白质/抗体筛选等任务中优于现有自主研究基线。
AI.motivation: 现有 AI4Science 系统多为碎片化工具，依赖人工协调问题构建、文献引用、模型使用、模拟验证和知识复用，缺乏统一的操作系统级整合。
AI.method: 提出 SCION 操作系统，核心组件包括：(1) Science Agent (Meta-Harness) 作为总控；(2) Research Execution Plan (REP) 将高层次科学意图编译为分阶段目标；(3) 层级化多智能体执行、画像驱动的专业化、选择性上下文构建、受控委派和分层认知记忆。将科学发现形式化为 Target-conditioned Inverse Search 并扩展到隐藏目标下的批量主动搜索。
AI.result: 在材料分析、分子设计、蛋白质/抗体筛选以及科学阅读、创意生成、分子生成、抗体筛选等实验中，SCION 优于现有自主研究基线，尤其在任务分解、验证、细化和记忆复用方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: SCION 将 AI 从孤立工具转变为可溯源、可复用的科学创新协调操作层，推动科学发现过程的系统化和自动化。

title: Explainable AI for Screening Abuse-Related Trauma in Bangladeshi Children: A Training-Free Multimodal Framework Evaluated on Noise-Aware Synthetic Data
summary: Bangladesh has an estimated 1.17 mental-health professionals per 100,000 population and only six child psychiatrists nationwide. No Bengali-language, culturally adapted tool exists for early screening of abuse-related psychological trauma in children. We present ShishuRaksha AI, a decision-support (not diagnostic) framework that fuses four screening modalities: validated questionnaires (SDQ, CPSS), Bengali narrative text, House-Tree-Person (HTP) drawing features, and facial affect. The fusion is training-free and clinically weighted, uses cross-modal attention, and includes a single-modality override rule. Every risk score is explained through clinically weighted, perturbation-based additive attribution and rendered as a bilingual (Bangla/English) report with referral routing to national child-protection services (OCC, DSS, NMHH) under the Children Act 2013. No clinical dataset of abused children can be collected ethically at this stage, so we introduce a noise-aware synthetic benchmark (500 cases, 116 positive [23.2%], four deliberate noise layers, literature-grounded HTP priors) and evaluate tree-ensemble surrogates of the fusion design (facial channel excluded) under 5-fold stratified cross-validation. The fused model reaches an AUC of 0.874 [0.834-0.908], against 0.756 [0.705-0.803] for an SDQ-only baseline, with ablation, operating-point, subgroup, and calibration analyses. We state all limitations openly, including synthetic-only data, no held-out set, text-feature circularity, and an urban-rural subgroup gap. This work is a feasibility study and a design contribution toward ethically deployable child-protection screening in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 由于孟加拉国精神卫生资源极度匮乏且缺乏本土化儿童创伤筛查工具，本研究提出了ShishuRaksha AI——一种融合问卷、孟加拉语叙事文本、房树人绘画特征和面部表情的多模态临床决策支持框架。在无真实临床数据的情况下，通过含噪声的合成基准（500例，阳性率23.2%）评估，融合模型AUC达0.874，优于仅用SDQ的基线模型（0.756），并提供了可解释的风险报告和儿童保护服务转介路径。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉国精神卫生专业人员严重不足（每10万人仅1.17名），全国仅有6名儿童精神科医生，且缺乏针对儿童虐待相关心理创伤的孟加拉语本土化早期筛查工具。
AI.method: 提出ShishuRaksha AI框架，融合四种筛查模态（SDQ/CPSS问卷、孟加拉语叙事文本、房树人绘画特征、面部表情），采用免训练、临床加权的交叉模态注意力机制和单模态覆写规则，通过基于扰动的加性归因生成双语解释报告。由于无法伦理收集真实临床数据，构建了含四层噪声的合成基准（500例），使用树集成代理模型（排除面部通道）进行5折分层交叉验证。
AI.result: 融合模型AUC为0.874（95%CI: 0.834-0.908），显著优于仅使用SDQ的基线模型（0.756, 95%CI: 0.705-0.803）。进行了消融实验、操作点分析、亚组分析和校准分析。
AI.conclusion: 该研究是面向低资源环境中可伦理部署的儿童保护筛查的可行性研究与设计贡献，坦诚列出了所有局限性（仅合成数据、无独立验证集、文本特征循环性、城乡亚组差异等）。

title: EmoteGPT: 3D Human Facial Expressions from Natural Language Descriptions
summary: Precise control of 3D facial expressions from text is crucial for virtual avatars, animation, and human-computer interaction, yet existing text-to-3D methods jointly generate identity, expression, and texture, making fine-grained expression control difficult. We instead formulate text-driven expression synthesis as a regression problem in the disentangled parameter space of a 3D Morphable Model (3DMM). This setting, however, requires paired data linking detailed language to precise expression parameters, which are missing from existing resources. To fill this gap, we introduce Txt2Emote, a benchmark of diverse 3D facial expressions with fine-grained textual annotations obtained from GPT-4o and a high-fidelity face tracker, providing both explicit descriptions detailing facial features and implicit descriptions referencing the situational context behind the expression. Leveraging this dataset, we present EmoteGPT, a text-to-3D expression framework based on a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) with a dedicated <Expr> token to semantically ground expression representations, which are then decoded into 3DMM parameters. We further improve EmoteGPT by augmenting training with large-scale image-to-3DMM data, enabling it to surpass state-of-the-art text-to-3D face synthesis methods on emotion recognition metrics and in perceived expressiveness. Integrated into avatar pipelines, our method enables photorealistic and stylized 3D avatars, as well as expressive 3D-consistent 2D face synthesis from textual input.

AI.tldr: 提出Txt2Emote基准数据集和EmoteGPT框架，利用多模态大语言模型将文本指令精确映射为3D面部表情参数，在解耦的3DMM参数空间中实现细粒度表情控制。
AI.motivation: 现有文本转3D方法联合生成身份、表情和纹理，无法实现细粒度表情控制；且缺乏将细粒度语言描述与精确3D表情参数配对的数据。
AI.method: 1) 构建Txt2Emote数据集（GPT-4o生成文本+高保真面部追踪获得3DMM参数）；2) 提出EmoteGPT，基于MLLM引入专用<Expr> token实现表情语义表征，再解码为3DMM参数；3) 利用大规模图像转3DMM数据增强训练。
AI.result: 在情绪识别指标和感知表现力上超越现有最先进的文本转3D人脸合成方法，可集成到虚拟人管线生成逼真/风格化3D化身及3D一致的2D面部合成。
AI.conclusion: 将文本驱动表情合成重新定义为解耦参数空间中的回归问题，通过数据构建和MLLM框架有效弥补了细粒度文本-3D表情配对的缺失，显著提升了表情控制的精确性和表现力。

title: TATG: Tracking-Aware Testing Objective for LLM-based Test Generation
summary:
Complex Java methods remain challenging for automated unit test generation because achieving high coverage and fault detection often requires satisfying branch-specific testing requirements that are not directly visible from a focal method. Recent LLM-based approaches, such as KTester, PANTA, and MUTGEN, leverage project context, static analysis, coverage feedback, or mutation guidance. However, they do not explicitly represent and track individual testing requirements across iterations. As a result, generation may repeatedly target satisfied requirements while overlooking unresolved branches and weak assertions. Existing approaches also optimize structural coverage and mutation effectiveness separately.
  We present TATG, a tracking-aware LLM-based unit test generation approach. TATG introduces a unified objective representation that captures testing requirements derived from static analysis and dynamic feedback. The representation enables fine-grained tracking of satisfied and unresolved requirements throughout generation. TATG further employs a two-stage workflow: structural rounds improve coverage, followed by mutation-guided hardening rounds that strengthen assertions and improve fault detection.
  We evaluate TATG on 141 complex Java methods, including the 110 KTester subjects and 31 additional challenging methods. Compared with KTester and PANTA, TATG improves line coverage, branch coverage, and mutation score by 22.15, 20.14, and 37.66 percentage points on average. On a selected subset of focal methods, TATG also achieves performance comparable to a proprietary industrial test generation tool while achieving higher line coverage and mutation score.

AI.tldr: TATG是一种基于LLM的跟踪感知单元测试生成方法，通过统一的目标表示来捕获和跟踪测试需求，并采用两阶段工作流（结构覆盖轮+变异引导强化轮），在141个复杂Java方法上相比KTester和PANTA，行覆盖率、分支覆盖率和变异得分平均提升22.15、20.14和37.66个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-based测试生成方法（如KTester、PANTA、MUTGEN）虽利用项目上下文、静态分析、覆盖率反馈或变异引导，但未显式表示和跟踪各测试需求，可能导致重复满足已满足需求而忽略未解决分支和弱断言；同时，结构覆盖与变异有效性被分别优化，缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: TATG提出统一目标表示，从静态分析和动态反馈中捕获测试需求；实现细粒度跟踪已满足和未解决需求；采用两阶段工作流：第一阶段结构轮次提升覆盖率，第二阶段变异引导强化轮次增强断言和故障检测能力。
AI.result: 在141个复杂Java方法（含110个KTester基准和31个额外方法）上，相比KTester和PANTA，行覆盖率、分支覆盖率、变异得分平均提升22.15、20.14、37.66个百分点；在选定子集上与工业级工具性能相当，且行覆盖率和变异得分更高。
AI.conclusion: TATG通过显式跟踪测试需求并统一优化结构覆盖与变异有效性，显著优于现有LLM-based方法，并达到与工业级工具可比甚至更优的性能，证明了跟踪感知机制在单元测试生成中的有效性。

title: Consistent but Miscalibrated: Evaluating LLM Limitations for Risk Communication in Natural Language
summary: LLMs are increasingly deployed as post-hoc explainers of AI-generated outputs, yet it remains unclear whether they can reliably communicate probabilistic information in natural language. For this role to be viable, models must produce identical verbal descriptions for identical inputs, and select descriptions that accurately reflect the magnitude of the underlying numerical quantities. We evaluate whether nine LLMs meet these requirements within a two-stage prediction pipeline, in which an upstream model has produced probabilistic outputs characterized by their likelihood and uncertainty, and LLMs are tasked with selecting an appropriate verbal descriptor for each. We simulate predictions from an upstream model by taking samples from a Beta distribution parameterized by its mode and prior sample size. We then prompt LLMs to explain these predictions under six domain contexts and with ten temperature settings, and repeating each experiment ten times. We find that LLMs are generally consistent but miscalibrated, with substantially weaker performance on uncertainty than on likelihood tasks. Providing models with precomputed summary statistics (mode and prior sample size) reduced sensitivity to contextual framing but did not resolve the underlying miscalibration, suggesting that the bottleneck resides in the verbalization step itself. These findings indicate that current LLMs do not yet constitute reliable zero-shot standalone risk communication tools for probabilistic predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了9个LLM在将概率预测（似然和不确定性）转化为自然语言描述时的一致性和校准性。结果表明LLM普遍一致但校准不佳，尤其是在不确定性任务上表现更差，即使提供统计摘要也无法解决校准问题，说明当前LLM还不能作为可靠的零样本风险沟通工具。
AI.motivation: LLM被越来越多地用作AI输出的后验解释器，但它们在用自然语言可靠地传达概率信息方面是否可靠尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用Beta分布采样模拟上游模型的概率输出，让9个LLM在6个领域上下文和10个温度设置下选择对应的语言描述，每个实验重复10次，评估一致性和校准性。
AI.result: LLM一致性较好但校准性差，不确定性任务的表现明显低于似然任务。提供预计算统计量（众数和先验样本量）能降低对上下文框架的敏感性，但无法解决校准问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM还不能作为可靠的零样本独立风险沟通工具用于概率预测。

title: What is Left for Us? Second Scholarship Against the Degradation of Research by AI
summary: We argue that generative AI can degrade research by eroding the very practices through which scholarly judgement is formed and academic trust is built. As constitutive conditions for the production and validation of knowledge, these practices cannot be reduced to the final outputs of research, which is what AI so effectively simulate. Accordingly, when researchers delegate central tasks of inquiry to systems like Large Language Models, they may stop enacting these practices and, with them, lose access to the formation they provide. An individual research output generated by AI may even appear improved but the researcher behind it fails to develop. Against this risk, merely keeping humans in the loop as prompters or quality checkers of AI outputs is insufficient to preserve research as a site of intellectual formation. What is needed instead is a renewed commitment to research as a lived practice in which judgement is formed gradually, often through frictions, and participation in a scholarly community. We defend it because it rests on four sources and warrants of research that cannot be automated: tacit knowledge, personal commitment, socialisation, and deep reading. This practice enacts what we call second scholarship, by which we understand the reappropriation of scholarly craft, chosen out of a critical experience of what generative AI can and cannot do. What cannot and should not be delegated becomes what research communities must value and answer for. This is what is left for us.

AI.tldr: 本文主张生成式AI通过侵蚀学术判断形成和学术信任建立的实践基础，可能损害研究质量。当研究者将核心任务委托给AI时，他们不再践行这些实践，从而失去了这些实践提供的思维塑造。即使AI生成的个别研究成果看似有所改进，但研究者本身未能得到发展。仅让人类作为提示者或质检者不足以保护研究作为智力塑造的场所，需要重新致力于将研究视为一种活生生的实践——通过摩擦逐渐形成判断，并参与学术共同体。文章提出"第二学术"概念，指在批判性体验生成式AI能力边界后重新掌握学术技艺。
AI.motivation: 指出当前对生成式AI（尤其是LLM）在学术研究中应用的风险认知不足，尤其是当研究者将核心认知任务委托给AI时，会丧失通过实践形成的学术判断力和学术信任的根基。
AI.method: 通过理论论证，分析生成式AI对研究实践的四个不可自动化源泉（隐性知识、个人承诺、社会化、深度阅读）的侵蚀，并提出"第二学术"概念作为应对方案。
AI.result: 论证了AI模拟研究产出但无法替代研究过程中的形成性实践，仅靠"人在回路"的监督模式不足以保护研究的智力塑造功能。
AI.conclusion: 研究者需要重新承诺将研究作为一种活生生的实践，通过"第二学术"重新掌握学术技艺，明确哪些研究要素不能也不应被委托给AI，并以此为学术共同体的价值取向。

title: K9-Bench: Evaluating Multimodal LLMs on Canine-Centric Videos
summary: MLLMs have shown strong zero-shot capabilities across diverse inputs such as across images, video, audio, and text. A crucial, yet underexplored, application of these models lies in understanding and modeling animal-centric scenarios. As animals are integral to millions of households, benchmarking next-generation AI models on pet-focused tasks, ranging from recognizing distress signals to enabling responsive robotic companions, is essential for building AI systems that can work alongside us. We introduce K9-Bench, a novel benchmark focused on real-world domestic dog videos, specifically targeting canine action and interaction understanding via approximately 5000 question-answer pairs across 907 videos spanning 5 distinct task categories that test long-form, canine-centric multimodal reasoning in MLLMs. To create this dataset, we propose a scalable, VLM/LLM-powered data generation pipeline that automatically mines canine-centric videos from the web and curates QA pairs requiring fine-grained, multi-hop reasoning over canine actions and temporally extended interaction sequences. We implement bias mitigation strategies designed to eliminate biases introduced by VLMs during dataset curation. Through extensive experimentation, we find that frontier MLLMs exhibit limited zero-shot performance on canine-centric tasks: although state-of-the-art closed-source models outperform open-source counterparts, they still struggle with compositional reasoning over subtle posture and interaction cues spread over long horizons. We observe that generic chain-of-thought prompting provides only modest performance for such long-horizon reasoning. Beyond a novel dataset for canine activity analysis, K9-Bench provides a general-purpose dataset construction pipeline that can be adapted to other low-data domains for quantitative analysis. Our project website is available at: https://ogmenrobotics.github.io/K9Bench.

AI.tldr: K9-Bench是一个面向真实世界家犬视频的多模态基准测试，包含约5000个问答对、907个视频，涵盖5类任务，用于评估MLLMs在犬类动作与交互理解上的零样本能力。实验发现前沿MLLMs在此类任务上表现有限，尤其是长程组合推理能力不足。
AI.motivation: 动物（尤其是宠物）是人类生活的重要组成部分，但现有MLLMs在动物中心场景（如犬类行为理解）上的能力尚未得到充分评估。构建面向宠物任务的基准测试，对于开发能与人类协同工作的AI系统（如识别求救信号、响应式机器人伴侣）至关重要。
AI.method: 提出一种可扩展的、基于VLM/LLM的数据生成流程：自动从网络挖掘犬类中心视频，并策划需要细粒度、多跳推理的QA对。同时引入偏差缓解策略以消除VLM在数据整理过程中引入的偏差。基准涵盖5种任务类别，测试长程、犬类中心的多模态推理能力。
AI.result: 前沿MLLMs在犬类中心任务上零样本表现有限；最先进的闭源模型优于开源模型，但在细粒度姿态和长程交互序列的组合推理上仍存在困难。通用思维链提示对长程推理的提升效果有限。
AI.conclusion: K9-Bench不仅提供了一个用于犬类活动分析的新数据集，还提供了一个可迁移到其他低数据领域的通用数据集构建流程，为未来研究提供了定量分析工具。

title: Round-Trip Mutation Testing: Translating Code to Natural Language Intent and back
comment: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Software Testing, Verification and Validation Workshops (ICSTW)
summary: This paper presents Round-Trip Mutation Testing (RTM), a novel approach that generates mutants from LLM mistranslations between a program code and its intent. Leveraging the generative capability of LLMs from and to programming and natural language, and given an input program, our approach predicts its intent, that is used to generate programs, which when different from the original one, constitute the output mutants. The approach produces additionally mutants, stemming from artificially provoked mistranslations, by mutating the intent prior to the final programs (mutants) generation. Originating from the propagation of small changes in the intent to the code, our intuition is that these programs would present subtle semantic differences from the original one, simulating likely-to-occur faults that could result from specification misunderstandings, and enabling mutation testing. To evaluate RTM, we run it on 40 real buggy methods and evaluate its effectiveness and cost-efficiency in guiding testing towards detecting the bugs. Our results demonstrate the potential of round-trip mutation testing to produce syntactically more diverse mutants, potentially exposing faults that traditional mutation operators fail to reveal. More interestingly, RTM outperforms traditional pattern-based mutation in producing smaller and stronger test-suites, detecting on average over 4 and 1.7 times more faults when selecting only 4 and 30 tests respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出往返突变测试（RTM），利用LLM在代码与意图之间的翻译错误生成突变体，相比传统方法能产生语法更多样化的突变体，并通过更少的测试用例检测出更多缺陷（4个测试时多4倍，30个测试时多1.7倍）。
AI.motivation: 传统突变测试依赖模式化操作符，生成的突变体难以模拟真实世界因需求理解偏差导致的微妙语义错误，且测试效率有限。
AI.method: 给定输入程序，LLM预测其意图（自然语言描述），再从意图生成程序；若生成结果与原程序不同则作为突变体；进一步通过人为扰动意图（诱导错误翻译）生成额外突变体。
AI.result: 在40个真实buggy方法上评估，RTM生成的突变体语法多样性更高；在仅选择4个和30个测试用例时，分别比传统方法多检测出4倍和1.7倍的缺陷。
AI.conclusion: RTM能生成传统操作符难以覆盖的突变体，通过更精简的测试套件实现更强的缺陷检测能力，在突变测试领域具有显著潜力。

title: Probe, Don't Prompt: A Hidden-State Probe for Metadata Filtering in Multi-Meta-RAG
summary: Multi-Meta-RAG improves retrieval for multi-hop question answering by filtering a vector store on metadata (the news source) that it extracts from each query by prompting gpt-3.5-turbo. We show this proprietary, free-form extractor can be replaced by a local, deterministic probe trained on the hidden states of a small open-source language model. On all 2556 MultiHop-RAG queries the probe reaches 90.9% set-exact accuracy against 88.0% for a model-free substring baseline and 80.9% for GPT-3.5, a margin that comes entirely from null queries, on which GPT-3.5 never abstains; on non-null queries all three stay within about a point. Because the probe's output space is exactly the fixed 49-source vocabulary, it cannot drift outside the allow-list as the prompted model does. Three design choices make it work: selecting a shallow layer, mean pooling, and class-imbalance-aware multi-label training over the long tail of sources. A 135M-parameter model lands within ~1.5 points of a 1.5B one, so the filter is cheap to output: a partial forward pass through the first few layers plus one linear head, with no API. The code is available at https://github.com/mxpoliakov/Multi-Meta-RAG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用轻量级探针（基于小模型隐状态）替代GPT-3.5进行元数据过滤，用于多跳RAG问答，在MultiHop-RAG上达90.9%的集合精确率，超过了GPT-3.5的80.9%和子串基线的88.0%。
AI.motivation: 多跳问答中，现有Multi-Meta-RAG方法依赖GPT-3.5从查询中提取新闻来源元数据来过滤向量库，但这种方法需要调用昂贵的API，且输出可能超出预定义元数据集合，缺乏可控性。
AI.method: 训练一个确定性探针，在小开源语言模型的隐状态上，通过浅层选择、均值池化、类别不平衡感知的多标签训练来预测49个新闻来源标签。探针的输出空间被严格限制在固定词汇表内。
AI.result: 在2556个MultiHop-RAG查询上，探针达到90.9%集合精确率，优于GPT-3.5的80.9%和子串基线的88.0%。优势完全来自空查询（无来源的查询），非空查询三者相差约1个百分点。135M参数模型与1.5B模型仅差约1.5个点。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级探针可以完全替代专有模型进行元数据提取，成本更低、输出更可控，且不依赖外部API，具有良好的实用价值。

title: PLACEMEM: Toward a Compute-Aware Memory Plane for Lifelong Agents
summary: Lifelong agents need more than larger context windows and better retrieval. They need memories that can persist, evolve, and be corrected without forcing the serving stack to recompute the same history on every turn or silently reuse stale runtime state. We present PLACEMEM as a systems position on lifelong-agent memory, instantiated by an executable control-plane prototype. The central claim is that agent memory should be represented as versioned capsules that unify semantics, provenance, validity, and reusable runtime state under one correction-aware identity. In the current prototype, capsules drive prompt-level text retrieval, KV-aware routing, and cascading invalidation over live streamed backends; prospective layer-frontier replay is intentionally framed as a deeper integration agenda rather than a claimed engine feature. We describe a vLLM-first prototype with persistent capsule state, concurrency-safe invalidation, an OpenAI-compatible routing sidecar, a typed metadata contract, and a benchmark harness that measures live first-token latency, reuse, and post-correction behavior. The result is both an executable artifact that demonstrates correction-aware control-plane behavior today and a concrete roadmap for replay-aware serving integration in future lifelong-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PLACEMEM，一个面向终身智能体的记忆系统，通过版本化胶囊统一语义、溯源、有效性和可复用运行时状态，支持可纠正的持久记忆，并提供了基于vLLM的原型实现。
AI.motivation: 现有终身智能体依赖更大的上下文窗口或更好的检索，但缺乏能够持久演化、可被纠正且无需每次重新计算历史或静默重用过时状态的记忆系统。
AI.method: 提出版本化胶囊（versioned capsules）表示智能体记忆，统一语义、溯源、有效性和运行时状态；原型支持提示级文本检索、KV感知路由、级联失效；基于vLLM实现，包含持久胶囊状态、并发安全的失效机制、OpenAI兼容路由sidecar、类型化元数据合约及基准测试框架。
AI.result: 实现了一个可执行的控制平面原型，展示了可纠正感知行为，并测量了首令牌延迟、复用率和纠正后行为，同时给出了面向未来重放感知服务的路线图。
AI.conclusion: PLACEMEM既是一个展示可纠正控制平面行为的可执行构件，也为未来终身智能体系统中重放感知的服务集成提供了具体路线图。

title: S-EMBER: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Streaming Egocentric Memory Retrieval
summary: As wearable devices enable continuous first-person recording, AI assistants must reason across long time horizons to recall past experiences-a capability known as episodic memory. Current benchmarks often rely on offline evaluation with access to entire video files, failing to simulate the streaming reality of wearable intelligence. We introduce S-EMBER (Streaming Egocentric Memory Benchmark for Episodic Retrieval), a large-scale benchmark comprising 3,141 videos totaling 388 hours of organic activity captured via Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses. S-EMBER formalizes grounded streaming episodic retrieval, a paradigm shift from global offline search to causal, active recall triggered by visual events in a continuous stream. We provide 9,448 QA pairs requiring manual visual proof through precise temporal localization and supporting flexible response lengths to simulate natural human-AI interaction. Our extensive benchmarking of frontier models uncovers a localization paradox: while semantic reasoning improves with parameter scale, temporal grounding precision remains a stagnant architectural bottleneck that does not benefit from brute-force increases in model size, resolution, or frame density. S-EMBER establishes a hardware-authentic foundation for developing grounded, reliable episodic memory in the next generation of wearable AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出S-EMBER，一个基于Ray-Ban Meta智能眼镜拍摄的3141个视频（共388小时）的大规模流式自我中心记忆基准测试，包含9448个问答对，用于评估AI在连续流中回忆过去经历的 episodic memory 能力。实验发现参数扩展能提升语义推理，但时间定位精度存在架构性瓶颈，不受模型大小、分辨率或帧密度的简单提升影响。
AI.motivation: 现有基准通常离线评估（访问整个视频文件），无法模拟可穿戴设备真实流式场景。需要建立一个硬件真实的、支持流式检索的基准来推动可穿戴AI的 episodic memory 发展。
AI.method: 构建S-EMBER基准：收集3141个视频/388小时Ray-Ban Meta眼镜拍摄的真实活动数据；设计流式 episodic 检索范式（从全局离线搜索转向因果主动召回）；提供9448个需要精确时间定位和灵活响应长度的QA对。
AI.result: 发现"定位悖论"：语义推理随参数规模提升，但时间定位精度是架构性瓶颈，不受模型大小、分辨率或帧密度增加的改善。
AI.conclusion: S-EMBER为开发可穿戴AI的可靠 episodic memory 提供了硬件真实的基准，揭示了时间定位能力需要架构创新而非简单增加计算资源。

title: An Empirical Study of Downstream Adaptation for Agent Skills
summary: As Large Language Model (LLM) agents become integral to modern software systems, ``skills'' have emerged as a novel unit of software reuse, enabling developers to package workflows, decision procedures, and prompt-based policies. While skills are intended for reuse, downstream developers frequently modify published skills to fit local contexts, yet little is known about the nature of such adaptations. This paper presents the first empirical study of downstream skill adaptation in public forks, to understand how published skills are adapted, and to provide implications for researchers and engineers on improving skill design, evolution, and orchestration. Specifically, we analyze 1,126 skill-adaptation instances from six widely adopted skill repositories and develop a taxonomy comprising 46 adaptation patterns organized into 13 families. Our key findings reveal a reuse paradox: although skills are intended to be easily imported and reused, developers spend a lot of effort rewriting what the skills do, fixing skill discoverability, and translating them for different tools and languages, indicating a need for better abstractions, standardized interfaces, and automated support for skill adaptation. Furthermore, adaptations are highly interdependent, with changes in one component often requiring coordinated updates elsewhere, motivating automated support for detecting inconsistent modifications. We also find that nearly one-fifth of adaptations introduce security-sensitive content within the same instruction text that governs behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对LLM agent技能（skills）在下游fork中的适配进行实证研究，分析了1,126个适配实例，归纳出46种适配模式（13类），发现存在“复用悖论”：开发者需大量重写、修复可发现性、跨工具/语言翻译技能，且适配高度相互依赖，近五分之一引入安全敏感内容。
AI.motivation: 技能（skills）作为LLM agent软件复用的新单元被广泛使用，但下游开发者在实际应用中常需修改已发布的技能，然而这些适配行为的性质、模式及影响尚缺乏系统性认知，理解适配现象有助于改进技能的设计、演化和编排。
AI.method: 对六个广泛采用的技能仓库中的1,126个技能适配实例进行实证分析，通过定性编码方法构建了包含46种适配模式（分属13个家族）的分类体系。
AI.result: 发现“复用悖论”：技能本意是易于复用，但开发者需付出大量精力重写功能、修复可发现性、跨工具/语言翻译；适配高度相互依赖，一个组件的变更常需协同更新其他组件；近五分之一的适配在控制行为的指令文本中引入了安全敏感内容。
AI.conclusion: 需要更好的抽象机制、标准化接口和自动化支持来降低技能适配成本，同时需发展检测不一致修改的自动化工具，并警惕适配过程中引入的安全风险。

title: Can Dialects Be Steered Like Languages? Sparse Neurons and Distributed Directions in Arabic LLMs
summary: A key challenge in Arabic NLP is the scarcity of dialectal data relative to Modern Standard Arabic (MSA), causing LLMs to overproduce MSA and struggle with dialectally accurate generation. From an interpretability perspective, this raises a fundamental question: where and how are dialectal features encoded within model internals, and can these representations be leveraged to improve dialect generation without fine-tuning? This study investigates two complementary inference-time approaches that serve simultaneously as interpretability probes and control mechanisms. First, we conduct a neuron-level analysis, identifying sparse neuron populations that encode dialect-specific features and showing that amplifying or suppressing these neurons can steer model outputs toward target dialects. Second, motivated by the entanglement of dialectal features at the single-neuron level, we apply a vector-steering approach that extracts dialect-specific activation directions and injects them during inference. Together, these methods illuminate the geometry of dialectal knowledge in Arabic LLMs and offer a principled, interpretability-grounded framework for dialect control without requiring dialect-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了阿拉伯语大语言模型中方言特征的编码机制，提出了两种无需微调的推理时方言控制方法：神经元级分析和向量引导，能够有效识别和操控方言特征，改善模型生成方言的能力。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语NLP面临方言数据稀缺的问题，LLMs倾向于过度生成标准阿拉伯语（MSA），缺乏方言准确性。作者从可解释性角度出发，探究模型内部如何编码方言特征，以及能否利用这些表征来改善方言生成。
AI.method: 提出两种互补的推理时方法：1）神经元级分析——识别编码方言特征的稀疏神经元群体，通过放大或抑制这些神经元来引导输出方言；2）向量引导——提取方言特定的激活方向，在推理时注入这些方向向量以控制方言输出。
AI.result: 两种方法均能有效引导模型输出目标方言，揭示了阿拉伯语LLM中方言知识的几何结构，为无需微调的方言控制提供了可解释性驱动的框架。
AI.conclusion: 该研究阐明了阿拉伯语LLMs中方言知识的内在表征结构，提出了无需方言特定微调、基于可解释性的原则性方言控制框架。

title: Forethought: Verifiable Reasoning from Neurosymbolic Primitive Programming
summary: Current agentic workflows usually involve decomposing user requests into sequences of tool calls with correctly resolved parameters, the results of which are processed through reasoning traces in the language model's context window. The prevailing route to improve such reasoning is test-time scaling, which trains models to search over long chains of thought; but the resulting capability is entangled in model weights, is not verifiable step-by-step, and is costly at inference. We present Forethought, a neurosymbolic reasoning system that instead treats reasoning as an explicit, verifiable program, that builds from a library of symbolic and neural primitives which are composed through a domain-specific language. The result are reasoning programs, which are concrete representations of the model's work, and as such can be inspected and modified before deployment. Instantiated as a tool-calling execution kernel and evaluated across five benchmarks, Forethought improves base-model accuracy by about 30% relative and outperforms vanilla prompting, reinforcement learning scaffolds, and prompt-evolution methods, enabling small models to match or exceed frontier models capabilities. In a direct comparison, a non-reasoning model augmented with Forethought competes with a dedicated reasoning model while requiring roughly three orders of magnitude less post-training investment, and remains model-agnostic and auditable.

AI.tldr: 提出Forethought，一种将推理过程显式化为可验证程序（推理程序）的神经符号系统，通过符号原语和领域特定语言组合，在五个基准测试上将基础模型准确率提升约30%，使小模型在无需大量后训练的情况下媲美前沿推理模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于思维链的推理能力与模型权重深度耦合，无法逐步骤验证，推理成本高昂，且测试时扩展的优化路径投入大、结果不透明。
AI.method: 将推理视为显式、可验证的程序，通过领域特定语言组合符号原语和神经原语构建推理程序；实例化为工具调用的执行内核。
AI.result: 在五个基准上，基础模型准确率相对提升约30%；非推理模型借助Forethought可与专用推理模型竞争，后训练投入减少约三个数量级。
AI.conclusion: Forethought实现了模型无关、可审计的推理，小模型以极低后训练成本即可达到前沿模型水平。

title: An Automated Multimodal Glaucoma Detection Framework Using ViT and a Stacking-Based Ensemble
summary: Glaucoma is a progressive eye disease that can lead to irreversible vision loss if not detected at an early stage. Conventional diagnostic procedures are often time-consuming and rely heavily on expert interpretation, limiting their scalability for large-scale screening. In this study, glaucoma detection is investigated under two evaluation settings: sample-wise, where individual samples are analyzed independently, and patient-wise, where data from each patient are aggregated for final prediction. An automated multimodal framework is proposed that integrates fundus images with clinical data. Under the sample-wise setting, detection is performed using fundus images and clinical features individually, as well as through their multimodal combination. Under the patient-wise setting, predictions are obtained by aggregating multiple fundus image representations with corresponding clinical information for each patient. Deep visual features are extracted using a Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture and classified using classical machine-learning models, with a stacking-based ensemble of the three best-performing classifiers employed to optimize performance. Experiments conducted on the publicly available PAPILA dataset demonstrate strong diagnostic performance, achieving 97.47% accuracy and a 97.50% F1-score for sample-wise multimodal classification, and 98.97% accuracy and F1-score for subject-wise detection. The proposed framework is further deployed as an end-to-end web-based platform to support automated glaucoma screening and clinical decision support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合眼底图像和临床数据的多模态青光眼检测框架，在样本级和患者级两种评估设置下分别达到97.47%和98.97%的准确率，并部署为端到端网页平台。
AI.motivation: 传统青光眼诊断耗时长、依赖专家经验，难以大规模筛查，需要自动化、高精度的检测方法。
AI.method: 使用Vision Transformer (ViT)提取深度视觉特征，结合经典机器学习分类器，通过堆叠集成优化性能；在样本级和患者级两种设置下融合眼底图像与临床数据进行多模态分类。
AI.result: 样本级多模态分类准确率97.47%，F1-score 97.50%；患者级检测准确率98.97%，F1-score 98.97%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合框架在青光眼检测上表现优异，且已部署为Web平台，具备临床应用潜力。

title: Socio-Technical Anti-Patterns in Building ML-Enabled Software: Insights from Leaders on the Forefront
summary: Although machine learning (ML)-enabled software systems seem to be a success story considering their rise in economic power, there are consistent reports from companies and practitioners struggling to bring ML models into production. Many papers have focused on specific, and purely technical aspects, such as testing and pipelines, but only few on socio-technical aspects. Driven by numerous anecdotes and reports from practitioners, our goal is to collect and analyze socio-technical challenges of productionizing ML models centered around and within teams. To this end, we conducted the largest qualitative empirical study in this area, involving the manual analysis of 66 hours of talks that have been recorded by the MLOps community. By analyzing talks from practitioners for practitioners of a community with over 11,000 members in their Slack workspace, we found 17 anti-patterns, often rooted in organizational or management problems. We further list recommendations to overcome these problems, ranging from technical solutions over guidelines to organizational restructuring. Finally, we contextu-alize our findings with previous research, confirming existing results, validating our own, and highlighting new insights.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对MLOps社区66小时演讲的定性分析，识别出17种将机器学习模型投入生产时的反模式，这些反模式多源于组织和管理问题，并给出了相应的解决建议。
AI.motivation: 尽管ML系统在经济上取得成功，但企业和从业者仍难以将ML模型投入生产。现有研究多聚焦纯技术方面（如测试、流水线），缺乏对社会技术层面（尤其是团队内部及团队间的协作问题）的关注。作者旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 对该领域最大规模的定性实证研究：手动分析MLOps社区录制的66小时演讲，社区Slack拥有超过11,000名成员。从从业者向从业者的演讲中提取经验。
AI.result: 识别出17种反模式，这些问题通常根植于组织或管理问题。同时给出了从技术方案、指导原则到组织重构的多层次建议。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果与先前研究相互印证，既确认了已有发现，也验证了自身结论，并揭示了新的洞察。表明ML生产化中的主要瓶颈往往不是技术本身，而是人与组织层面的问题。

title: The Remarkable Effectiveness of Providing AI Agents with Natural Language Tools: A Replication Study Validating NLT Performance Across 14 Models
comment: 28 pages, 6 figures, replication study, replication of arXiv:2510.14453 findings
summary: This study independently replicates and extends the Natural Language Tools (NLT) framework of Johnson et al.~(2025), which questions the use of structured tool calling in large language model (LLM) agentic systems. We evaluated NLT across 14 models and 8,560 trials, adding newer frontier, reasoning, and open-weight models to the original set. The results confirm the core findings and add detail. NLT improves tool-calling accuracy by 14.9 percentage points overall (62.3\% versus 47.4\% structured) and reduces critical errors by 93\% (51 versus 755 errors). The gains depend on model capability: models without native tool calling, reasoning models, and smaller models gain substantially (+24.0pp to +43.1pp), while heavily optimized frontier models (GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro) show smaller or reversed advantages. This matches recent analyses of reinforcement-learning-optimized tool use (Martinez, 2025). NLT also cuts token usage by 25.2\%. The reliability and efficiency advantages compound in recursive agentic workflows, where agents chain many tool calls across sub-agents: a structured failure triggers retries, fallback routing, and coordination overhead, while NLT avoids most of that cost at the source. This work makes three contributions: (1) the first independent validation of NLT using open-source tooling, (2) evidence that model capability moderates NLT's advantages (Chen et al., 2025; Zhang et al., 2025), and (3) a measurement of NLT's reliability benefit (93\% fewer errors), its most deployment-relevant property given the known fragility of structured tool calling. NLT is a practical alternative to structured tool calling, especially for production systems that value reliability over parseability.

AI.tldr: 本研究独立复现并扩展了Johnson等人(2025)的NLT框架，在14个模型、8560次试验中验证了自然语言工具调用相比结构化工具调用的优势：准确率提升14.9个百分点，关键错误减少93%，token消耗降低25.2%，尤其对无原生工具调用能力的模型、推理模型和小模型效果显著。
AI.motivation: 质疑LLM智能体系统中结构化工具调用的必要性，想验证NLT（自然语言工具调用）是否更优，并探究模型能力如何调节这种优势。
AI.method: 独立复现并扩展Johnson等人的NLT框架，在14个模型（包含前沿模型、推理模型、开源模型）上进行8560次试验，比较NLT与结构化工具调用的准确率、错误率和token消耗，并在递归智能体工作流中测试其累积效应。
AI.result: NLT整体准确率提升14.9个百分点（62.3% vs 47.4%），关键错误减少93%（51 vs 755），token消耗降低25.2%。无原生工具调用能力的模型、推理模型和小模型获益最大（+24.0pp至+43.1pp），而优化充分的GPT-5、Gemini 2.5 Pro等前沿模型优势较小甚至反转。在递归智能体工作流中，NLT避免了结构化调用失败引发的重试、回退路由和协调开销。
AI.conclusion: NLT是结构化工具调用的实用替代方案，尤其适合重视可靠性而非可解析性的生产系统。模型能力是调节NLT优势的关键因素，且NLT在部署中最有价值的特性是其可靠性（93%更少错误）。

title: Language models guide symbolic equation discovery by controlling search
summary: Scientific equation discovery must combine broad domain priors with strict numerical testing. Symbolic regression supplies numerical grounding but faces a combinatorial search space, whereas many language-model systems ask the model to propose or select formulas directly. We test a different division of labour. We compare role specifications in which the language model acts as equation author, candidate decider or search controller, alongside end-to-end language-model and purely numerical baselines. In the controller setting we propose here, implemented as LLM-PySR, language models specify variables, operators, transformations and search depth; symbolic regression enumerates and fits expressions; and deterministic metrics govern retention. Across 74 AI-Feynman equations and seven complex formula-recovery tasks, search control achieved the strongest observed balance of accuracy, complexity, stability and cost. On an independent battery dataset, LLM-PySR identified a compact piecewise-linear relation between early voltage-curve displacement and cycle life. The results suggest that language models should shape hypothesis exploration rather than decide which equations survive.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM-PySR框架，将语言模型用于控制搜索空间（指定变量、算子等），而由符号回归枚举表达式、确定性指标决定方程保留，在多个基准上取得了准确率、复杂度、稳定性和成本的最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 符号回归面临组合爆炸搜索空间，而纯语言模型直接提出或选择公式缺乏数值验证；因此需要一种更好的分工方式，结合两者优势。
AI.method: 对比了语言模型作为方程作者、候选决策者、搜索控制器三种角色分工，其中控制器方案（LLM-PySR）由LLM指定变量、算子、变换和搜索深度，符号回归枚举并拟合表达式，确定性指标控制方程保留。
AI.result: 在74个AI-Feynman方程和7个复杂公式恢复任务上，搜索控制方案取得了最佳的准确率、复杂度、稳定性和成本平衡；在独立电池数据集上，LLM-PySR发现了一个紧凑的分段线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型应塑造假设探索的方向，而非决定哪些方程应该被保留。

title: Property-Constrained 3D Porous Media Reconstruction from 2D Images via Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to the 87th EAGE Annual Conference & Exhibition, Aberdeen, UK, June 2026
summary: This study presents a conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) framework for generating 3D porous media volumes with controlled porosity, trained exclusively on 2D thin section images. The key innovation lies in combining property-conditioned generation with 2D-to-3D reconstruction, eliminating the need for expensive 3D training data while maintaining control over petrophysical properties. The framework employs a hybrid architecture with a 3D generator and 2D discriminator, where multi-axis slice extraction enables learning 3D-consistent structures from 2D training data. Porosity labels are extracted using an Enhanced U-Net segmentation model. The methodology was demonstrated on two carbonate samples with different lithologies: dolomite-anhydrite and pure dolomite. Results show that the framework successfully generates realistic 3D volumes capturing lithological features such as anhydrite inclusions and fine crystalline textures. Porosity control achieved an $R^2$ of 0.93, with mean absolute errors of 0.019 and 0.010 for the heterogeneous and homogeneous samples, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种条件GAN框架，仅用2D薄片图像训练即可生成可控孔隙度的3D多孔介质体积，避免了昂贵的3D训练数据需求。
AI.motivation: 传统3D多孔介质生成需要大量3D训练数据，获取成本高昂。本文旨在结合属性条件生成与2D-to-3D重建，降低数据依赖同时保持物性可控性。
AI.method: 采用3D生成器+2D判别器的混合架构，通过多轴切片提取从2D数据学习3D一致结构；使用Enhanced U-Net提取孔隙度标签作为条件输入。
AI.result: 在两种碳酸盐岩样本上成功生成了包含岩性特征的逼真3D体积；孔隙度控制R²达0.93，异质/均质样本MAE分别为0.019和0.010。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效从2D图像生成3D多孔介质，实现高精度孔隙度控制，为缺乏3D数据的岩石物理建模提供了可行方案。

title: Regulatory compliance-readiness in the AI Supply Chain: examining datasets in Hugging Face
summary: A very large number of datasets are made available via Hugging Face (HF). These datasets are used to train a vast number of AI models, also available via HF. There are regulatory issues that might arise in the AI supply chain when those datasets do not follow, for instance, data privacy practices, or do not disclose their data sources, cleaning and preparation processes. In this preliminary work, regulatory compliance-readiness is examined as a quality attribute in the framework of HF datasets, with a main focus on data privacy (e.g. GDPR, CCPA). Towards this direction, an analysis on regulatory compliance (e.g. with privacy laws) of the dataset using the dataset card and the dataset structure overview as starting points has been performed. We collected 11,682 HF datasets that have a dataset card, are not gated and have at least 500 downloads and analyzed the datasets using automated techniques and manual analysis on a sample of the dataset. The results show that a very small number of datasets are explicit on the datasets creation processes and mention data sources, while some make mentions to Personally Identifiable Information (PII) or other sensitive data in their data schemas. These results show the need for more detailed examinations of regulatory compliance in AI datasets and models, and research on tools that provide guidance to practitioners and automate the compliance process.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了Hugging Face上11,682个数据集，发现极少数据集明确说明创建过程和数据来源，部分数据集在数据模式中提及个人身份信息或敏感数据，表明AI数据集的监管合规性存在严重不足。
AI.motivation: HF上大量数据集用于训练AI模型，但这些数据集可能存在数据隐私实践不足、数据来源和预处理过程不透明等监管合规问题，亟需系统性评估。
AI.method: 收集了11,682个HF数据集（有数据集卡片、非门控、下载量≥500），通过自动化技术结合人工样本分析，以数据集卡片和数据集结构概览为起点，重点检查数据隐私合规性（如GDPR、CCPA）。
AI.result: 极少数据集明确说明数据创建过程和数据来源；部分数据集在数据模式中提及PII或其他敏感数据。
AI.conclusion: 需要对AI数据集和模型进行更详细的监管合规性检查，并开发工具为从业者提供指导并实现合规流程自动化。

title: NormWorlds-CF: Solver-Verified Counterfactual Normative Reasoning with Metamorphic-Relation GRPO
summary: Language models can reach the right normative verdict for the wrong reason. We introduce NormWorlds-CF, a solver-verified environment for counterfactual normative reasoning in executable rule worlds. Its deterministic solver produces final answers, proof and falsification certificates, argument statuses, support sets, and paired-world change labels, enabling supervision and evaluation without LLM judges. The benchmark contains staged SFT diagnostics and a compact paired-world task with 270 root families and 1080 canonical-to-variant pairs. The SFT diagnostics show that final-answer supervision is an unsafe proxy: answer-only SFT reaches perfect accuracy on answer tasks but scores zero on falsification, while proof-plus-falsification training with targeted replay reaches strong all-task accuracy. For the structured-change task, we introduce metamorphic-relation GRPO (MR-GRPO), a class-conditioned reward for GRPO that gives partial credit for relation families and solver-visible change fields. In matched 1.7B continuation experiments, MR-GRPO improves held-out relation accuracy and relation-family correctness, and reduces wrong-family error, compared to sparse and answer-only GRPO. In Qwen3-4B three-seed validation, answer-only reward improves answer-change fields but weakens relation-family structure, sparse reward preserves coarse relation labels best, and MR-GRPO delivers the strongest balanced performance across answer-change, support-change, status-change, and soft root-level metamorphic-relation metrics. These results show that verified counterfactual structure can shape post-training beyond final answers, while exact full change-record generation, invariant subtype recognition, and out-of-distribution (OOD) transfer remain open problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 NormWorlds-CF，一个基于可执行规则世界的反事实规范推理环境，并引入 MR-GRPO 方法优化结构化变化任务，实验证明基于反事实结构的训练优于仅关注最终答案的训练方式。
AI.motivation: 语言模型可能"答对但理由错误"，现有方法仅监督最终答案无法确保推理正确性，需要更细粒度的反事实推理能力评估与训练信号。
AI.method: 构建 NormWorlds-CF 环境（确定性求解器生成答案、证明、证伪等），设计 SFT 诊断实验和 MR-GRPO（基于变形关系的分组奖励）用于结构化变化任务训练。
AI.result: 仅答案监督的 SFT 在答案任务上满分但证伪任务零分；MR-GRPO 在保持关系准确率、减少错误分类方面优于稀疏奖励和仅答案奖励的 GRPO。
AI.conclusion: 验证的反事实结构能有效塑造后训练过程，但完整变化记录生成、不变子类型识别和 OOD 迁移仍是开放问题。

title: A Clustering-Based Framework for Identifying Suspicious Trading Patterns in Capital Market
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE 2nd International Conference on Quantum Photonics, Artificial Intelligence & Networking (QPAIN), 2026. This is the authors preprint version. The final version is available via IEEE Xplore
summary: Market manipulation is the dubious practice of manipulating stock prices in order to make a quick profit, which truly degrades confidence on trading platforms. We implemented an unsupervised fraud-detection toolkit that begins with K-Means++ clustering to address this issue. A dataset of roughly one million financial transactions from 2012 to 2024 is used. In order to identify fraudulent trades and categorize them using market practice heuristic thresholds, the study suggests a clustering-based pipeline. The method highlights 2.02% of trades as suspicious where 51.10% clearly indicate spoofing, 0.10% indicate pump and dump, 0.55% indicate insider trading, 1.43% indicate a fake breakout, and 46.83% are unclassified. Despite the lack of ground truth, the model's performance is confirmed by a Silhouette Score of 0.561.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于K-Means++聚类的无监督欺诈检测工具，对2012-2024年约100万笔金融交易进行分析，识别出2.02%的可疑交易，其中包含幌骗、拉高出货、内幕交易等多种操纵类型，轮廓系数为0.561。
AI.motivation: 市场操纵行为严重破坏交易平台的可信度，现有方法缺乏高效的无监督检测手段来识别大规模交易中的欺诈模式。
AI.method: 采用K-Means++聚类算法构建无监督欺诈检测管道，结合市场实践启发式阈值对可疑交易进行分类。
AI.result: 在约100万笔交易中识别出2.02%的可疑交易，其中51.10%为幌骗、0.10%为拉高出货、0.55%为内幕交易、1.43%为虚假突破、46.83%未分类；轮廓分数0.561。
AI.conclusion: 无监督聚类方法能有效识别市场操纵行为，尤其在缺乏真实标签数据的情况下仍具良好表现。

title: Aircraft Detection in Satellite Imagery using Deep Learning Object Detectors
summary: The object detection in satellite imagery has garnered considerable attention due to its extensive real-world applications and the inherent challenges it presents, including noise, fluctuating image quality, and intricate backgrounds. This paper proposed a framework for object detection that combines image enhancement and Deep Learning (DL) to make detection more accurate. First, a Gabor filter is used to process the input image to bring out important features and reduce noise. Then, normalization is applied to make sure that the data is evenly distributed so that the model works properly. After that, a model based on YOLOv11 is used to quickly learn and find object features. The proposed method achieves a mAP of 95%, precision of 97%, recall of 85%, and F1-score of 91%, which demonstrates the superior aircraft detection performance. These results show the framework accurately identify aircraft in satellite imagery and is suitable for real-time applications such as surveillance, air traffic monitoring and remote sensing analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合Gabor滤波图像增强与YOLOv11的卫星图像目标检测框架，在飞机检测任务上达到mAP 95%、精确率97%、召回率85%、F1-score 91%，适用于实时监控和遥感分析。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像目标检测面临噪声、图像质量波动和复杂背景等挑战，现有方法难以同时兼顾精度与实时性，需要更鲁棒的检测框架。
AI.method: 先使用Gabor滤波器提取重要特征并降噪，再进行数据归一化处理，最后基于YOLOv11模型进行快速目标特征学习与检测。
AI.result: mAP 95%、精确率97%、召回率85%、F1-score 91%，展现出优越的飞机检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能准确识别卫星图像中的飞机目标，适用于监控、空中交通管制和遥感分析等实时应用场景。

title: Is Agentic Code Review Helpful? Mining Developers' Feedback to CodeRabbit Reviews in the Wild
summary: Agentic code review, where autonomous agents provide code review comments on pull requests, is increasingly integrated into development workflows, yet there is limited empirical evidence on how developers respond to such comments in practice. In this paper, we present an empirical study of agentic code reviews using CodeRabbit as a case study. Through an empirical study of 31,073 pairs of code reviews and developer feedback from 10,191 pull requests across 239 GitHub repositories, our results show that agentic reviews receive mixed reception: 36.4% were accepted and 7.3% triggered discussion, while 56.3% were rejected. Rejections were primarily associated with invalid suggestions that were false positives, redundant, or out of scope, as well as misalignment with developer intent and coding practices. We further found that agentic reviews tend to focus more on functional concerns than evolvability-related comments, yet they were more likely to be invalid. To improve effectiveness in review practices, we explored various LLM-based approaches for predicting review rejection. We found that lightweight learning-based methods achieve up to 76% F1 score, suggesting learnable patterns exist between code reviews and their corresponding feedback. Our results highlight the current state of CodeRabbit's agentic code reviews, showing opportunity gaps for improvement, as well as shortcomings hindering its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过对 CodeRabbit 在 239 个 GitHub 仓库中 31,073 条代码审查记录的分析，发现 AI 代理代码审查的接受率仅为 36.4%，56.3% 被拒绝，主要原因包括误报、冗余、超出范围、与开发者意图不符等问题。研究还探索了基于 LLM 的拒绝预测方法，F1 最高达 76%。
AI.motivation: 尽管智能代码审查代理已广泛集成到开发流程中，但缺乏关于开发者如何在实际中回应这些审查评论的实证证据。
AI.method: 以 CodeRabbit 为案例，收集了 239 个 GitHub 仓库中 10,191 个 PR 的 31,073 条审查-反馈对，进行定量分析，并探索了多种基于 LLM 的拒绝预测方法。
AI.result: 36.4% 接受，7.3% 引发讨论，56.3% 被拒绝；拒绝的主要原因是无效建议（误报、冗余、超出范围）及与开发者意图不符；功能性问题比可进化性问题更受关注但也更易无效；基于学习的轻量方法拒绝预测 F1 达 76%。
AI.conclusion: CodeRabbit 的代理代码审查存在改进空间，识别了阻碍其有效性的关键缺陷，且审查与反馈之间存在可学习的模式。

title: TRACER: Early Failure Detection for Task-Oriented Dialogue
summary: Task-oriented dialogue systems often fail before the final breakdown is obvious, but most evaluation only measures failure after the conversation has already gone wrong. We present TRACER, a method for early failure detection in task-oriented dialogue. TRACER predicts from a partial dialogue whether the full conversation will eventually fail by combining simple trajectory signals from belief-state changes with text representations of the evolving dialogue state. We evaluate the method in both oracle and generated belief-state settings, and test how well it works when only 25%, 50%, 75%, or 100% of the dialogue is visible. Across these settings, TRACER detects useful failure signals well before the end of the conversation and outperforms heuristic, classical, and single-stream baselines. These results suggest that early failure detection can provide a practical warning signal for dialogue systems before the interaction fully breaks down.

AI.tldr: 提出TRACER方法，通过结合信念状态变化轨迹信号和对话状态文本表征，在对话进行到25%-75%时即可提前检测任务导向型对话系统的失败，效果优于各类基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统评估通常在对话完全失败后才进行度量，缺乏在对话早期就能预警失败的方法，导致系统在用户察觉问题前无法及时干预。
AI.method: TRACER结合信念状态变化的简单轨迹信号与演化对话状态的文本表征，从部分对话中预测完整对话是否会最终失败。
AI.result: 在oracle和生成信念状态下均有效，当仅可见25%、50%、75%对话时就能检测到失败信号，性能优于启发式、经典和单流基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 早期失败检测能在对话完全崩溃前提供实用预警信号，为对话系统的实时干预和修复创造了可能。

title: VLRC: Vision-Language Reprojection Consistency as a scalable signal for better feed-forward 3D pretraining
summary: Feed-forward 3D models are commonly trained using either expensive geometric supervision or self-supervised photometric objectives, both of which provide incomplete learning signals. We introduce Vision-Language Reprojection Consistency (VLRC), a scalable auxiliary objective that exploits frozen vision-language representations as semantic multi-view supervision. Given a predicted 3D reconstruction, VLRC reprojects dense vision-language features across views and enforces feature consistency between corresponding image locations, requiring no additional 3D annotations. The objective integrates seamlessly with both self-supervised monocular reconstruction and supervised-pretrained feed-forward 3D models during unlabeled adaptation. By aligning geometry with language-grounded features, VLRC not only improves depth and camera estimation but also enables more coherent multi-view semantic fusion for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding. Experiments on indoor and outdoor benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains in 3D reconstruction accuracy and zero-shot open-vocabulary 3D semantic segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLRC，一种利用冻结的视觉-语言表征作为语义多视图监督的辅助目标，无需额外3D标注，能同时提升自监督和预训练前馈3D模型的深度估计、相机估计与开放词汇3D语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈3D模型依赖昂贵的几何监督或自监督光度目标，两者都提供不完整的学习信号，缺乏语义信息，限制了模型在开放词汇3D场景理解上的能力。
AI.method: VLRC将预训练的视觉-语言特征（如CLIP）投影到预测的3D重建上，在多视图间施加密集的特征一致性约束，作为辅助损失函数，可无缝集成到自监督或预训练前馈模型中。
AI.result: 在室内外基准上，VLRC一致提升了3D重建精度和零样本开放词汇3D语义分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将几何与语言对齐，VLRC不仅改善了深度和相机估计，还能实现更连贯的多视图语义融合，为开放词汇3D场景理解提供了有效且可扩展的解决方案。

title: AtomicCommitBench: Can Coding Agents Reconstruct Commit Histories from Squashed Patches?
comment: 21 pages, 6 figures, benchmark paper on coding agents and software engineering; preprint
summary: Coding agents often finish a session by returning one squashed patch that mixes feature implementation, bug fixes, refactorings, tests, and configuration edits. While the final code may be correct, collapsing unrelated edits into one patch removes the history structure needed for review, selective revert, and later maintenance. We study retrospective commit-history reconstruction: given a completed squashed change, an agent groups its hunks into commits and materializes a replayable commit sequence. We formalize the task as hunk-to-commit partitioning with a replay requirement and build AtomicCommitBench, containing 800 real consecutive-commit episodes from 10 Python projects. Because multiple decompositions may be reasonable, we evaluate outputs using complementary metrics: PPAR for replay validity, ARI for reference-based grouping quality, and TCR for failure containment on scoreable modified-test episodes. Natural retrospective reconstruction proves substantially harder than replay checking or synthetic tangling. Although nearly all non-random methods achieve replay validity (PPAR >= 0.988), grouping quality ranges from 0.03 to 0.46 ARI. Matched synthetic composites are much easier than real same-author squashed diffs (+0.333 ARI). In our evaluation, the GPT-5.4 setup driven by Codex CLI (0.46 ARI) and the GLM-5 setup driven by Claude Code (0.43 ARI) outperform MiniMax (0.31) and Kimi (0.29). Qualitative analysis identifies same-file lumping and support-hunk drift as recurring failure modes. Dependency-Aware Commit Evidence (DACE) improves the lower-scoring setups by 0.05 to 0.08 ARI, indicating that dependency cues and hunk-role information help agents avoid locality-driven grouping errors. AtomicCommitBench enables evaluation of the commit histories produced by coding agents alongside the final code.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了代码智能体完成编码后，如何将混杂的单一补丁（squashed patch）自动拆解并重构成符合历史的多个提交（commits），提出了AtomicCommitBench基准和DACE方法，发现当前模型在该任务上表现差异大，且依赖信息和hunk角色能帮助提升分组质量。
AI.motivation: 代码智能体常常将功能实现、bug修复、重构、测试、配置编辑等混杂在一个补丁中，破坏了代码提交历史的结构，导致代码审查、选择性回退和后续维护变得困难。因此需要一种方法，将完成后的混杂变更按逻辑拆解为可回放的提交序列，恢复历史结构。
AI.method: 将任务形式化为hunk-to-commit划分问题，并引入重放（replay）约束；构建AtomicCommitBench基准（800个真实连续提交片段，来自10个Python项目）。提出DACE（Dependency-Aware Commit Evidence）方法，利用依赖线索和hunk角色信息辅助分组。使用PPAR（重放有效性）、ARI（分组质量）、TCR（失败隔离）三个互补指标评估。
AI.result: 几乎所有非随机方法都能实现高重放有效性（PPAR >= 0.988），但分组质量差异大（ARI 0.03~0.46）。真实场景下的重构难度远高于合成场景（ARI差+0.333）。GPT-5.4 + Codex CLI（0.46 ARI）和GLM-5 + Claude Code（0.43 ARI）表现最好。DACE能提升低分模型0.05~0.08 ARI。
AI.conclusion: AtomicCommitBench可用于评估代码智能体生成的提交历史质量，而不仅是最终代码。DACE验证了依赖信息和hunk角色在避免局部性分组错误中的价值。当前模型在分组质量上仍有很大提升空间，同文件合并和辅助hunk漂移是主要失败模式。

title: BanglaMemeEvidence: A Multimodal Benchmark Dataset for Explanatory Evidence Detection in Bengali Memes
comment: Accepted at 6th International Conference on Innovations in Computational Intelligence and Computer Vision (ICICV 2026)
summary: Memes have become influential communication tools on social media, combining viral visuals with concise messaging to convey impactful ideas. While substantial research has examined the affective dimensions of memes, key challenges such as detecting harmful content, identifying cyberbullying, and performing accurate sentiment analysis remain critical, largely due to the need for deeper contextual understanding.
