In this paper, we introduce MemeEvidenceDetect, a hybrid task aimed at analyzing a meme and its contextual information to identify specific sentences that explain or elucidate its meaning and humor. To support this task, we present BanglaMemeEvidence, a curated dataset of 2,917 Bengali memes, emphasizing its significance as a resource for the Bangla language. Each meme is annotated with natural language explanations, including Meme OCR, Meme Context, and Evidence Sentences, alongside relevance scores that reflect the relationship between a meme and its corresponding annotations. To address the gap in dynamically inferring a meme's context, we propose BengaliMemeEvidenceNet, a hybrid multimodal framework that integrates textual and visual features for comprehensive meme representation. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of BengaliMemeEvidenceNet, achieving an F1 score of 0.74. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to focus on evidence detection in Bengali memes, marking a notable step forward in the analysis of memes in low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemeEvidenceDetect任务，通过构建BanglaMemeEvidence数据集（2,917个孟加拉语模因）和BengaliMemeEvidenceNet多模态框架，实现模因证据句检测，F1达0.74，是首个针对孟加拉语模因证据检测的研究。
AI.motivation: 现有模因研究多聚焦情感分析、有害内容检测等，但缺乏对模因语义和幽默背后深层语境的理解，尤其是低资源语言（如孟加拉语）中缺乏证据检测的相关工作。
AI.method: 提出MemeEvidenceDetect混合任务，构建BanglaMemeEvidence数据集（含OCR文本、上下文、证据句及相关性评分），并设计BengaliMemeEvidenceNet多模态框架，融合文本与视觉特征进行模因表示。
AI.result: BengaliMemeEvidenceNet在证据检测任务上达到0.74的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 该工作是首个聚焦孟加拉语模因证据检测的研究，为低资源语言的模因分析迈出重要一步。

title: Unsupervised Features Mining via Activation Geometry
summary: Interpretability methods aim to reveal the features represented inside large language models (LLMs). Many existing methods begin with labeled examples of a human-defined concept that may reflect human biases, and then identify how that concept is represented within the model, for example in its activation space or through other decomposition methods. We introduce \emph{Mining via Activation Geometry} (MAG), a simple unsupervised framework for extracting reasoning features from model activations by prepending the same natural-language instruction $Q$ to every input $p$, where $Q$ defines the reasoning feature of interest, such as ``Can this object be found in the desert?'' or ``Is this prompt malicious?'' We measure how the instruction changes the model's internal representation using $m(Q \mid p) - m(p)$ at a single readout point. We explore eight different MAGs. The extracted reasoning features predict the models' own world understanding and judgment, can be approximated into a single activation direction, we found that some features are more linearly represented and some less, this linear representation, which is vector steering, can change the LLMs' decisions through activation steering by injecting reasoning features. Finally, we use the same method to select the best training datasets for prompt-injection classifier probes: while similarity between ordinary activations is almost unrelated to downstream performance, RFD-based similarity achieves $94.7\%$ Top-1 and $100\%$ Top-2 accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAG（基于激活几何的挖掘）方法，一种无监督框架，通过向输入添加统一指令Q并计算激活变化，从LLM中提取推理特征。实验发现这些特征可近似为单一方向，通过激活操控可改变模型决策。此外，基于推理特征的相似度选择训练数据，对提示注入分类探针的Top-1准确率达94.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法通常依赖带有标签的人为概念样本，可能反映人类偏见。MAG旨在提供一种无监督、无需预定义标签的推理特征提取方法，避免人工先验偏差。
AI.method: 对每个输入p，统一添加自然语言指令Q（如“这个物体能在沙漠中找到吗？”），计算激活差m(Q|p) - m(p)作为推理特征；探索了8种不同的MAG；通过近似为单一方向进行激活操控。
AI.result: 提取的推理特征能预测模型自身世界理解与判断；可近似为单一激活方向；通过激活操控可改变LLM决策；推理特征相似度（RFD）用于选择训练数据时，Top-1达94.7%，Top-2达100%。
AI.conclusion: MAG是一种简单有效的无监督推理特征提取方法，特征具有线性可表示性，可用于模型理解与决策干预，并在数据选择任务上显著优于普通激活相似度。

title: When Does Resolution Help a Frozen Backbone? Global Attention at Resolution Predicts Scalable Adaptation for Camouflaged and Marine Animal Segmentation
summary: Adapting frozen vision foundation models to fine-grained segmentation now largely depends on backbone selection. Whether the backbone applies global attention to a high-resolution token set predicts whether a low-rank adapter turns resolution into accuracy. Isotropic ViTs attend globally over the full grid and keep improving with resolution; hierarchical backbones confine early attention to local windows and pool the grid before their global stages, plateauing at lower resolutions. A controlled six-backbone study establishes the pattern, and editing the backbone points to the cause: pooling keeps the benefit, removing global attention does not. The effect is specific to low-rank adaptation. Under one fixed pipeline, SALT (Side-stem, Attention-gated U-Net, Low-rank Tuning), one RGB-only pass on a strong isotropic backbone wins the best S-measure on the four data-matched camouflaged sets, and leads every marine and salient set. It reaches a new state of the art on both marine-animal benchmarks (MAS3K mIoU 0.878).

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了视觉基础模型在细粒度分割任务中的关键规律：只有采用全局注意力的各向同性（Isotropic）ViT骨干网络才能通过低秩适配器将分辨率提升转化为分割精度的提升，而分层（Hierarchical）骨干网络由于早期使用局部窗口注意力并池化，性能在低分辨率下即饱和。基于此发现，作者提出SALT框架（Side-stem, Attention-gated U-Net, Low-rank Tuning），在RGB单次推理下，使用强各向同性骨干在多个伪装/海洋/显著目标分割数据集上取得SOTA。
AI.motivation: 探究冻结的视觉基础模型在适配细粒度分割任务时，骨干网络架构选择对分辨率-精度转换关系的影响机制，并基于此设计最优适配方案。
AI.method: 1) 进行六种骨干网络的受控对比实验，验证全局注意力与分辨率提升的关系；2) 通过编辑骨干网络（移除全局注意力/保留池化）进行因果分析；3) 提出SALT框架：Side-stem（侧支stem）+ Attention-gated U-Net（注意力门控U-Net）+ Low-rank Tuning（低秩微调）。
AI.result: 在四个数据匹配的伪装目标检测集上取得最佳S-measure；在海洋和显著目标数据集上全面领先；在MAS3K海洋动物基准上达到新SOTA（mIoU 0.878）。
AI.conclusion: 低秩适配条件下，骨干网络的全局注意力是分辨率提升能否带来性能增益的关键；各向同性ViT优于分层架构；SALT框架可有效适配冻结的视觉基础模型到细粒度分割任务。

title: SkillOpt-Lite: Better and Faster Agent Self-evolution via One Line of Vibe
summary: While skill optimization for autonomous agents has gained traction, existing methods rely on complex pipelines. This leaves a fundamental question unaddressed: What constitutes a minimal viable pipeline for skill optimization, where every component is justified by theory or empirical necessity? We formalize skill optimization via Zeroth-Order (ZO) optimization, mapping classical counterparts (central difference, trust regions) to recent literature. Noting that unlike blind numerical perturbations in classical ZO, skill trajectories serve as interpretable debugging feedback. Grounded in Claude Code philosophy and PAC learning, we establish three principles for convergence and generalization: file-system-based trajectory exploration, consensus attribute mining, and independent validation gating. Eliminating redundancies, we propose SkillOpt-Lite. It accelerates convergence and outperforms full SkillOpt: improving LiveMath by +8.8 points on GPT-5.5 and +25.4 points on GPT-5.4-nano, allowing the nano model to surpass standard GPT-5.4 optimized by SkillOpt. Finally, we integrate our framework into production coding agents like VSCode Copilot, enabling developers to evolve agent skills via one line of vibe. Because our framework treats all agent components simply as standard editable code, this minimal pipeline naturally generalizes to full harness optimization (HarnessOpt). On SpreadsheetBench, HarnessOpt enables GPT-5.4-nano to achieve 0.7758 accuracy, outperforming the larger GPT-5.5 running standard pipelines (0.7620). Code is available at https://github.com/EvolvingLMMs-Lab/SkillOpt-Lite.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillOpt-Lite，一种基于零阶优化（ZO）的最小化技能优化流水线，通过文件系统轨迹探索、共识属性挖掘和独立验证门控三大原则，在多个任务上超越完整版SkillOpt，并推广到全系统优化（HarnessOpt）。
AI.motivation: 现有技能优化方法依赖复杂流水线，缺乏对最小可行流水线的理论论证。本文旨在回答：什么是每个组件都有理论或经验必要性支撑的最小技能优化流水线？
AI.method: 将技能优化形式化为零阶优化问题，建立经典ZO方法（中心差分、信任域）与现有文献的映射关系。基于Claude Code哲学和PAC学习理论，提出三条原则：1）基于文件系统的轨迹探索；2）共识属性挖掘；3）独立验证门控。据此设计SkillOpt-Lite，去除冗余组件。
AI.result: SkillOpt-Lite在LiveMath上相比完整SkillOpt提升+8.8分（GPT-5.5）和+25.4分（GPT-5.4-nano），使nano模型超越标准GPT-5.4优化结果。HarnessOpt在SpreadsheetBench上使GPT-5.4-nano达到0.7758准确率，超越更大模型GPT-5.5（0.7620）。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了最小化原则驱动的技能优化流水线不仅可行，而且效果优于复杂方案。该方法已集成到VSCode Copilot等生产级编码代理中，并自然推广到全系统优化。

title: Candidate-Constrained Retrieval-Augmented Generation for LongEval-RAG: System Design and Empirical Analysis
summary: We present a candidate-constrained retrieval-augmented generation system for LongEval-RAG, where each query is associated with an organizer-provided candidate set and all retrieved evidence and final citations must remain within that set. The system combines deterministic provenance tracking with passage-based retrieval, deterministic query expansion, pseudo-relevance feedback (PRF), reciprocal rank fusion (RRF), lightweight evidence reranking, citation-aware evidence aggregation, and optional MiniLM sentence reranking. We evaluate ten pipeline variants using a primary organizer evaluation and a supplementary self-generated diagnostic protocol. The primary evaluation shows that the strongest balanced variant is rule-minilm: a rule-based chunking pipeline with query expansion, PRF, RRF, reranking, citation prior, and late MiniLM sentence selection. This variant obtains the highest BERTScore, retrieval precision, nugget coverage, and average grade among our submissions. The result suggests that the main gain does not come from more complex semantic or topic-shift chunking, but from pairing stable rule-based evidence units with sentence-level neural selection before generation. The supplementary LLM-judge evaluation remains useful for early diagnosis and additional analysis, but it emphasizes different systems than the primary gold-answer and nugget-based evaluation, highlighting the need for multi-metric RAG evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对LongEval-RAG的候选集约束检索增强生成系统，通过规则分块、查询扩展、伪相关反馈、倒数排名融合、证据重排序和MiniLM句子选择等组件组合，发现基于规则分块搭配句子级神经选择的方法效果最佳，同时揭示了LLM评判与标准评估之间的差异，表明RAG系统需要多指标综合评估。
AI.motivation: 在LongEval-RAG任务中，查询必须从组委会提供的候选集中检索证据并生成答案，现有方法在候选集约束下的检索精度和答案质量仍有改进空间，需要探索不同组件组合对系统性能的影响。
AI.method: 构建候选集约束的检索增强生成系统，包含确定性溯源追踪、段落检索、确定性查询扩展、伪相关反馈（PRF）、倒数排名融合（RRF）、轻量级证据重排序、引文感知的证据聚合以及可选的MiniLM句子重排序。评估了十种流水线变体，并设计了辅助的LLM评判诊断协议。
AI.result: 最优变体为rule-minilm（规则分块+查询扩展+PRF+RRF+重排序+引文先验+MiniLM句子选择），在BERTScore、检索精确率、nugget覆盖率和平均等级评分上均取得最高分。语义分块或主题偏移分块并未带来性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 性能提升主要来源于稳定的规则分块证据单元与生成前的句子级神经选择的结合，而非更复杂的分块策略；LLM评判评估与基于黄金答案和nugget的标准评估结果不一致，说明RAG评估需要采用多指标体系。

title: Biological Motifs for Agentic Control
summary:
The transition of Large Language Models (LLMs) from passive generators to autonomous agents has introduced significant challenges in reliability, security, and state management. Current agentic architectures are often constructed ad-hoc, prone to hallucination cascades, infinite loops, and prompt injection attacks. This paper argues that many of these failure modes can be analyzed using control motifs long studied in systems biology, provided the comparison is made at the level of typed interfaces and coordination structure rather than literal biological mechanism.
  We develop a typed interface correspondence between Gene Regulatory Networks and agentic software systems using polynomial functors and wiring diagrams. Five biological motifs are mapped to composable software design patterns: Coherent Feed-Forward Loops for noise suppression, Adaptive Immunity for layered security, Mitochondrial Signaling for resource governance, Endosymbiosis for neuro-symbolic integration, and Morphogen Diffusion for spatially varying coordination. An epistemic topology layer derives Kripke-style knowledge operators from the wiring diagram's observation structure and proves four predictive theorems for multi-agent scaling.
  The core contributions are: (1) the Agentic Operad, a typed syntax for agent composition with provable error suppression bounds for feed-forward topologies; (2) an epistemic topology with four theorems (error amplification, sequential penalty, parallel acceleration, and tool density scaling) whose qualitative predictions are consistent with published multi-agent benchmarks; and (3) a six-layer progression from structure through development, grounded in autonomous learning frameworks and convergence proxies from the empirical literature. A reference implementation with 1,813 tests and 116 examples illustrates practical feasibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic Operad框架，利用多项式函子与接线图将生物调控网络（基因调控网络、线粒体信号、内共生等）的五个经典控制基序映射为可组合的软件设计模式，并在认识论拓扑层证明四个多智能体扩展定理，通过1813个测试和116个示例验证了实用可行性。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM从被动生成器转向自主智能体后，面临幻觉级联、无限循环、提示注入等可靠性、安全性和状态管理挑战。现有架构是ad-hoc的，缺乏形式化基础。作者认为这些失效模式本质上与系统生物学中长期研究的控制基序同构，但需要在类型化接口和协调结构层面而非字面生物机制上进行比较。
AI.method: 利用多项式函子(Polynomial Functors)和接线图(Wiring Diagrams)建立基因调控网络与智能体软件系统之间的类型化接口对应关系。将五种生物学基序映射为可组合的软件设计模式：相干前馈环(噪声抑制)、适应性免疫(分层安全)、线粒体信号(资源治理)、内共生(神经-符号集成)、形态素扩散(空间变异协调)。在此基础上构建认识论拓扑层，从接线图的观测结构推导Kripke风格的知识算子。核心形式化产物是Agentic Operad——一种带类型的智能体组合语法，可证明前馈拓扑的误差抑制界。
AI.result: 提出了三大贡献：(1) Agentic Operad——带类型的智能体组合语法，可证明前馈拓扑结构的误差抑制上界；(2) 认识论拓扑层，包含四个定理（误差放大、顺序惩罚、并行加速、工具密度缩放），其定性预测与已发表的多智能体基准一致；(3) 从结构到发展的六层递进框架，立足于自主学习和经验文献中的收敛代理。参考实现含1813个测试和116个示例。
AI.conclusion: 基于控制论的跨学科映射方法可以有效形式化智能体系统的核心失效模式，为多智能体系统的可靠性、安全性和可扩展性提供了兼具理论保证和实用可行性的新范式。

title: RayTun3R: Online Camera Adaptation in 3D Foundation Models
summary: Recent 3D foundation models, such as DUSt3R, MASt3R, VGGT, $π^3$, and Depth Anything 3, provide strong feed-forward depth and pose estimates on pinhole imagery, but degrade sharply under fisheye camera geometry. We show that this failure is partly caused by a pinhole camera bias in the positional encodings of pretrained 3D foundation models, and propose RayTun3R, a lightweight camera adaptation approach. It keeps the pretrained network fixed and adapts only lightweight components tied to token position and camera geometry. RayTun3R learns parameter-efficient residual corrections to absolute and rotary positional encodings, together with parameter-free tokenization and corrections to prediction-grid coordinates that remove residual pinhole assumptions. The resulting adapter contains only 10,752 trainable parameters and can be learned from a short temporal segment using geometric losses. Once adapted, RayTun3R transfers effectively to the remaining frames of the sequence without incurring additional runtime costs. Across diverse fisheye datasets with fields of view from $110^\circ$ to $200^\circ$, our adapter reduces rotation error by $2$-$12\times$ relative to the unadapted model, outperforms LoRA while using $\sim\!14\times$ fewer trainable parameters, improves pose over adaptation-free baselines while avoiding their multi-view inference cost, and remains competitive on depth accuracy.

AI.tldr: 针对鱼眼相机几何导致3D基础模型性能退化的问题，提出RayTun3R，一种轻量级相机适配方法。仅通过训练10,752个参数的位置编码残差校正和网格坐标修正，无需修改预训练网络，即可显著提升鱼眼图像上的深度和位姿估计精度，旋转误差降低2-12倍，且不增加推理开销。
AI.motivation: 现有3D基础模型（如DUSt3R、MASt3R等）在针孔图像上表现优秀，但在鱼眼相机几何下性能急剧下降，原因是预训练模型的位置编码存在针孔相机偏差。
AI.method: 保持预训练网络固定，仅适配与token位置和相机几何相关的轻量组件：学习绝对位置编码和旋转位置编码的参数高效残差校正，结合无参数的分词化和预测网格坐标修正，消除残留的针孔假设。适配器仅含10,752个可训练参数，通过短时间序列片段使用几何损失学习。
AI.result: 在视场角110°-200°的多种鱼眼数据集上，旋转误差降低2-12倍；比LoRA少约14倍可训练参数的同时性能更优；优于无适配基线且避免多视图推理成本；深度精度保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种极轻量级、即插即用的鱼眼相机适配方案，可有效消除3D基础模型中的针孔偏差，显著提升鱼眼场景下的3D估计性能，且不增加推理成本。

title: CAGE-1: Control, Assurance, and Governance Evaluation for Enterprise Agentic AI
summary:
Enterprise artificial intelligence is moving from experimentation into operational workflows. Early programs focused on model access and retrieval-augmented generation, but enterprises are now beginning to deploy agents that plan, retrieve, remember, call tools, update systems, and coordinate work across applications.
  This changes the evaluation problem. Leaders are no longer asking only whether an answer is accurate or fluent. They need to know who authorized an action, which policy applied, whether evidence was current, whether memory was valid, whether a tool call was permitted, whether the decision can be replayed, and whether the agent can be stopped before it creates business impact.
  This paper introduces CAGE-1: Control, Assurance, and Governance Evaluation for Enterprise Agentic AI. CAGE-1 is an evaluation framework for deciding whether enterprise agents are ready for deployment. It evaluates authority, policy enforcement, retrieval quality, memory integrity, tool safety, auditability, human oversight, conflict handling, safe failure, Prebind Assurance, operational readiness, and business fitness.
  CAGE-1 introduces Prebind Assurance to describe the evaluated ability to prove that an agentic action is controlled before it becomes binding, effective, or operationally consequential. The framework tests whether a proposed action is admitted, held, narrowed, refused, escalated, quarantined, or made non-effective before protected consequence forms.

AI.tldr: CAGE-1是一个专为企业级AI Agent部署设计的评估框架，涵盖控制、保证和治理三大维度，引入"预绑定保证"概念，确保智能体在产生业务影响前可被验证、追溯和控制。
AI.motivation: 企业AI正从实验阶段进入运营流程，AI Agent开始执行规划、记忆、工具调用等复杂操作。传统仅关注答案准确性和流畅度的评估方式已无法满足需求，企业领导者需要知道谁授权了操作、适用哪个策略、证据是否最新、工具调用是否合规等关键治理问题。
AI.method: 提出了CAGE-1框架，从12个维度（权威性、策略执行、检索质量、记忆完整性、工具安全性、可审计性、人工监督、冲突处理、安全失败、预绑定保证、运营就绪度和业务适配度）进行评估。核心创新是"预绑定保证"——在智能体的操作产生约束性、有效性或运营影响之前，验证该操作是否被允许、暂缓、缩小、拒绝、升级、隔离或使其无效。
AI.result: CAGE-1框架为企业级AI Agent部署决策提供了一套系统化的评估方法，覆盖了从技术层面到治理层面的完整评估维度。
AI.conclusion: 企业级AI Agent的部署需要从单纯的模型准确性评估转向涵盖控制、保证和治理的全面评估体系，CAGE-1框架为此提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Separating Representation from Reconstruction Enables Scalable Text Encoders
summary: While decoders have rapidly scaled, encoders have remained largely unchanged since BERT. We revisit this disparity by frozen backbone evaluation via probing. Under this lens, the representations of BERT encoders become increasingly $\textit{unexploitable}$ by frozen probes, despite improved perplexity. The misalignment originates in BERT's flat design, which couples representation learning to the token reconstruction loss. We propose $\textbf{CrossBERT}$, a two-part architecture that separates the learning of high-quality encoded representations from the rigid grounding of token reconstruction. This design further enables high masking ratios ($\ge 50\%$) and gradient collection over all tokens via a $\textit{Complementary Masking Strategy}$, respectively increasing throughput by $1.5$ to $2\times$ and sample efficiency by $2\times$. Overall, CrossBERT demonstrates monotonic scaling and superior performance on MTEB(eng, v2) and frozen GLUE benchmarks.

AI.tldr: CrossBERT提出了一种分离编码表示学习与标记重建的两部分架构，解决了BERT中表示随模型增大而难以被冻结探测利用的问题，同时实现了更高吞吐量和样本效率。
AI.motivation: 随着解码器规模快速扩展，编码器自BERT以来几乎未有本质变化。研究发现，BERT编码器的表示随模型增大越来越难以被冻结探针利用，表明表示学习与token重建损失之间存在错位问题。
AI.method: 提出CrossBERT两阶段架构：(1) 将高质量编码表示的学习与token重建的刚性目标分离；(2) 采用互补掩码策略(Complementary Masking Strategy)，支持高掩码率(≥50%)，并对所有token进行梯度收集。
AI.result: 吞吐量提升1.5-2倍，样本效率提升2倍；在MTEB(eng, v2)和冻结GLUE基准上表现出单调缩放和优越性能。
AI.conclusion: CrossBERT通过解耦表示学习与重建任务，有效解决了BERT表示随规模增长而难以被探测利用的问题，证明平坦架构设计是导致该问题的根源。

title: Progress- and Reliability-Oriented Group Policy Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Group-based reinforcement learning (RL) has become an effective paradigm for improving large language model agents on long-horizon interactive tasks. To obtain finer-grained policy updates than trajectory-level optimization, recent work has moved toward step-level group-based RL, where intermediate steps are grouped and compared within a rollout batch. However, step-level advantage estimation is sensitive to how groups are formed: grouping by broad state keys improves coverage but may compare actions taken under different histories, while enforcing historical consistency yields fairer comparisons at the cost of fragmented groups and missing peer-comparison signal. In this paper, we propose ProGPO (Progress- and Reliability-Oriented Group Policy Optimization), a learned-critic-free method for context-consistent step-level learning. ProGPO keeps exact-prefix action comparison, and complements sparse peer comparisons with transition credit derived from rollout-based state potentials. To estimate these potentials reliably, ProGPO combines semantic expansion with inverse-variance fusion across history depths. We evaluate ProGPO on two challenging agentic tasks, ALFWorld and WebShop, with Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct. Results show that ProGPO improves over matched agentic RL baselines under comparable computational overhead, and additional Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct experiments further test the scalability of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: ProGPO提出了一种无需学习批评者的上下文一致步级分组策略优化方法，通过精确前缀动作比较和基于rollout状态势能的过渡信用来解决步级优势估计中的分组敏感性问题，在ALFWorld和WebShop任务上超过了同等的智能体RL基线。
AI.motivation: 现有步级分组RL中，优势估计对分组方式敏感：按状态键分组覆盖广但可能比较不同历史下的动作，保持历史一致性则导致分组碎片化并丢失同伴比较信号。需要一种既能保持上下文一致又能获得可靠优势估计的方法。
AI.method: ProGPO保持精确前缀动作比较，利用rollout状态势能导出过渡信用来补充稀疏的同伴比较。势能估计结合语义扩展和跨历史深度的逆方差融合，无需学习批评者。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop任务上，使用Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct和Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct的实验中，ProGPO在可比计算开销下优于匹配的智能体RL基线，且方法具有良好的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: ProGPO通过解耦上下文一致性和同伴比较信号，有效解决了步级分组RL中的分组困境，为长程交互任务提供了一种更鲁棒且高效的策略优化方案。

title: Global Pose Control for Generative View Synthesis in Normalized Object Coordinate Space
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page https://lizb6626.github.io/GlobalNVS/
summary: Novel View Synthesis (NVS) enables the generation of unseen views of a scene from a single or multiple images, allowing users to freely explore an object from any viewpoint. Despite the recent impressive qualitative improvements of generative models for this task, existing methods struggle to provide global and intuitive control of target viewpoints because they either use input-relative camera poses or are limited to generating sparse global views. This lack of global pose control severely limits the number of downstream tasks potentially enabled by NVS. To address this limitation, we propose a novel approach for precise camera control in a customizable Normalized Object Coordinate Space (NOCS), requiring single or few unposed images. Our method operates solely on the absolute camera pose of the target view in NOCS, eliminating the need for a relative world frame or camera poses of the input images. Unlike previous methods that treat NVS as a standalone generation task, we formulate it as an image editing problem and build upon state-of-the-art editing models to leverage their superior generalization capability. Camera information is injected as dedicated camera tokens via an in-context multi-modal conditioning strategy. To alleviate the inherent ambiguity of NOCS, we incorporate text descriptions that explicitly define the object's canonical coordinate frame, which also enhances generalization to unseen object categories. Furthermore, we curate a high-quality dataset with consistently aligned orientations and corresponding NOCS text definitions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method robustly generates novel views with accurate and consistent orientations from arbitrary unposed images across diverse categories, achieving state-of-the-art image quality and fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于可定制归一化物体坐标空间（NOCS）的新视角合成方法，通过绝对相机位姿控制和图像编辑框架，实现从任意未摆拍图像生成精确、一致的视角，并利用文本描述解决NOCS歧义性，达到SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 现有新视角合成（NVS）方法无法提供全局直观的视角控制（仅用输入-相对相机位姿或生成稀疏全局视角），严重限制了NVS的下游应用。作者希望实现绝对相机位姿控制，无需输入图像的相机位姿，从而赋予用户更自由、精确的视角操控能力。
AI.method: 1) 将NVS重构为图像编辑问题，基于SOTA编辑模型；2) 采用可定制的NOCS空间，以绝对相机位姿作为输入，无需输入图像位姿或世界坐标系；3) 通过上下文多模态条件注入专用相机token；4) 引入文本描述明确物体规范坐标系，缓解NOCS歧义性；5) 构建高质量、朝向一致且附带NOCS文本定义的数据集。
AI.result: 在多个类别的未摆拍图像上，该方法能鲁棒生成朝向准确且一致的视角，图像质量和保真度达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 通过绝对相机位姿控制、图像编辑框架与文本辅助定义，成功解决了NVS中全局可控性不足的问题，为下游任务提供了更灵活的视角生成能力。

title: AGL-1: The Enterprise AI Governance Layer as a Control Plane for Trusted Enterprise Intelligence
summary:
Enterprise artificial intelligence is moving from isolated experimentation toward operational dependency across copilots, retrieval-augmented generation systems, autonomous agents, and AI-enabled business workflows. As this transition accelerates, the primary enterprise challenge is no longer only model access or inference scale. It is governed intelligence operations: the ability to enforce authorization, preserve contextual lineage, control persistent memory, detect stale or conflicting knowledge, constrain agentic execution, and produce audit-ready evidence across distributed AI estates.
  This paper introduces AGL-1, the Enterprise AI Governance Layer, as a vendor-neutral reference model for the control plane that should operate across foundation models, retrieval systems, orchestration frameworks, enterprise memory, policy engines, observability systems, tools, APIs, and business applications.
  Building on governed knowledge-system principles introduced in GKS-5, AGL-1 generalizes the governance problem from retrieval-specific controls to full AI execution-path governance. It identifies recurring failure modes such as unauthorized retrieval, stale grounding, unmanaged memory, weak provenance, policy drift, fragmented observability, and uncontrolled autonomous execution. It then defines seven governance domains: identity-aware retrieval, policy enforcement, provenance management, memory governance, knowledge integrity monitoring, agentic execution control, and trust observability.
  The central claim is that durable enterprise value from AI will increasingly depend on the ability to govern intelligence at scale. In complex enterprises, trust is not a property of the model alone. It is a property of the system around the model: identity, knowledge, policy, memory, tools, human oversight, and evidence working together as a managed control plane.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGL-1，一个面向企业AI治理的供应商中立参考模型，旨在解决AI从实验走向生产依赖过程中面临的权限、记忆、溯源、执行控制等治理难题。
AI.motivation: 企业AI正从孤立实验转向运营依赖，核心挑战已不再是模型访问或推理规模，而是如何在分布式AI资产中实施授权、维护上下文溯源、控制持久化记忆、检测过时或冲突知识、约束智能体执行、生成可审计证据。
AI.method: 在GKS-5基础上，将治理从检索领域泛化到完整AI执行路径，识别七类故障模式（未授权检索、过时基础信息、未管理记忆、弱溯源、策略漂移、碎片化可观测性、失控自主执行），定义七大治理域：身份感知检索、策略执行、溯源管理、记忆治理、知识完整性监控、智能体执行控制、信任可观测性。
AI.result: 提出了一个覆盖基础模型、检索系统、编排框架、企业记忆、策略引擎、可观测性系统、工具、API和业务应用的治理控制平面参考模型。
AI.conclusion: 企业AI的持久价值日益依赖于规模化治理能力。在复杂企业中，信任不是模型本身的属性，而是模型周围系统（身份、知识、策略、记忆、工具、人工监督和证据共同构成的管理控制平面）的属性。

title: CrossHallu: Do Hallucination Signals Generalize Across Languages and Domains in Large Language Model's Internals?
summary: Recent hallucination detection techniques in large language models (LLMs) focus on directly extracting features from a model's internal representations and training a classifier on these features to detect hallucinations, demonstrating promising results. Notwithstanding this advancement, most internal-state hallucination detection techniques have been explored predominantly in English, raising the question of whether such internal signals generalize across different languages and domains. To address this gap, we present CrossHallu, the first study to evaluate the cross-lingual and cross-domain generalization of hallucination detection using internal representations from six LLMs on the generative question-answering task. We conduct a systematic Arabic <-> English evaluation using TruthfulQA, an Arabic translated version of TruthfulQA, and HalluScore. This evaluation encompasses monolingual training and testing, cross-lingual transfer, cross-domain transfer, and combined cross-lingual and cross-domain transfer. The results reveal that internal-state hallucination signals in LLMs transfer across languages and domains for most models, with cross-lingual performance highly dependent on both class separability and language alignment in the feature space, whereas cross-domain transfer within Arabic varies depending on the training and testing datasets used for the hallucination detector. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/aishaalansari57/CrossHal.

AI.tldr: CrossHallu首次系统评估了基于LLM内部表征的幻觉检测在跨语言（阿拉伯语↔英语）和跨领域的泛化能力，发现大多数模型的内部幻觉信号可跨语言和领域迁移，但跨语言性能依赖特征空间中的类别可分性与语言对齐度，而阿拉伯语内部跨领域迁移则受训练/测试数据集影响。
AI.motivation: 现有内部状态幻觉检测技术主要集中在英语上，尚不清楚这些内部信号能否推广到不同语言和领域。
AI.method: 在6个LLM上，使用TruthfulQA及其阿拉伯语翻译版、HalluScore，进行系统性阿拉伯语↔英语评估，涵盖单语训练测试、跨语言迁移、跨领域迁移以及跨语言+跨领域联合迁移。
AI.result: 大多数模型的内部状态幻觉信号可跨语言和领域迁移；跨语言性能高度依赖于特征空间中的类别可分性和语言对齐度；阿拉伯语内部跨领域迁移效果因训练/测试数据集不同而存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 内部状态幻觉检测在跨语言和跨领域场景下表现出较好的泛化能力，为多语言和低资源场景下的幻觉检测提供了可行性证据。

title: Shortcut Learning in Legal Judgment Prediction: Empirical Evidence from the UK Employment Tribunal
summary: Current Legal Judgment Prediction (LJP) is constrained by its reliance on post-hoc judicial materials, increasing the likelihood that models perform retrospective classification rather than true forecasting. This paper empirically investigates shortcut learning in this context by studying claim-level outcome prediction in UK Employment Tribunal (UKET) decisions. Using a corpus of 33,158 individual claims, we predict outcomes from claim texts and LLM-extracted case summaries, evaluating models ranging from interpretable TF-IDF-based classifiers to black-box LLMs. While headline predictive performance figures appear strong, we demonstrate that such performance in LJP systems trained on post-hoc judicial text can be driven by the retrospective nature of the source material. Stratifying the test data by human judgments of leakage reveals that performance increases where outcome-revealing cues are embedded in the narrative. Moreover, a model trained on just the 4% of features identified as leakage achieves high performance, outperforming human experts. These findings substantiate concerns that LJP performance may be exaggerated by linguistic artefacts. Yet this vulnerability is not fatal to the research agenda. Instead, post-hoc judgments might be treated as potentially contaminated texts, requiring active auditing. Retraining models after masking leakage features results in only a negligible reduction in Macro-F1. Hence, while models will opportunistically exploit shortcuts when available, they remain capable of extracting useful predictive signals when these artefacts are removed.

AI.tldr: 本文实证研究了法律判决预测中的捷径学习问题，发现模型在事后司法文本上的高表现主要源于泄漏特征（如叙事中隐含的结果线索），而非真正的预测能力。通过掩码泄漏特征重新训练，模型性能仅小幅下降，表明模型仍具备提取有用预测信号的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前法律判决预测依赖事后司法材料，模型更可能进行回顾性分类而非真正预测。作者旨在实证检验这一背景下的捷径学习问题，揭示模型性能是否被语言伪迹夸大。
AI.method: 使用33,158条英国就业法庭索赔数据，从索赔文本和LLM提取的案例摘要中预测结果，评估从可解释的TF-IDF分类器到黑盒LLM的多种模型，并通过人工判断泄漏特征对测试数据进行分层分析。
AI.result: 模型在泄漏特征存在的文本上表现更高；仅用4%的泄漏特征训练的模型即可超越人类专家；掩码泄漏特征后重新训练，Macro-F1仅小幅下降。
AI.conclusion: 事后判决文本可作为潜在污染文本处理，需要主动审计。模型在无泄漏特征时仍能提取有用信号，因此该研究路线并非不可行。

title: Diagnosing Aerial-View Object Detectors with Foundational Image Generative Models
summary: Recent advances in large-scale image generative models enable photorealistic scene synthesis with controllable attributes. Beyond data augmentation, their potential as diagnostic tools for trained vision systems remains unexplored in the aerial and remote sensing domains. We introduce a synthetic diagnostic framework for aerial-view vehicle detection that combines text-guided generation, attribute-controlled editing, and automated attribute verification to construct a controllable synthetic testbed. This enables fine-grained evaluation of pretrained detectors under diverse scene types and environmental conditions that are difficult to isolate in real datasets. Across three detection architectures and three real aerial datasets, synthetic scene-wise performance trends closely match real-world weaknesses. Guided by these diagnostics, targeted supplementation with small real datasets from the identified weak categories yields improvements of up to 13% AP50 while requiring substantially fewer additional samples than non-targeted augmentation. Our results show that controlled synthetic probing can predict real-domain performance gaps and guide efficient data collection. The proposed diagnostic framework is modular and can incorporate alternative generative or vision-language models as capabilities evolve. Our code and datasets are available here: https://humansensinglab.github.io/AVODDiag/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成式模型的合成诊断框架（AVODDiag），用于评估航拍视角下车辆检测器的性能。通过文本引导生成、属性控制编辑和自动验证构建可控合成测试集，揭示检测器在复杂场景和极端环境下的真实弱点，并指导针对性数据补充。实验表明，合成探测结果与真实域性能趋势高度一致，且定向补充少量真实数据即可提升AP50最高达13%。
AI.motivation: 大规模图像生成模型在航拍和遥感领域尚未被用作诊断工具，传统方法难以隔离评估检测器在特定场景/环境条件下的表现，缺乏可控的合成测试平台来预测和指导实际部署中的性能短板。
AI.method: 提出一个模块化诊断框架，包含三个核心组件：1）文本引导生成（扩散模型）创建多样化的航拍场景；2）属性控制编辑调节场景类型和环境条件（如天气、光照、密度）；3）自动属性验证确保合成图像符合预期属性。将合成测试集输入预训练检测器，分析其在不同场景类别下的性能弱点。
AI.result: 在三种检测架构和三个真实航拍数据集上验证，合成场景的性能趋势与真实域弱点的匹配度高。基于诊断结果定向补充识别出的弱类别真实数据，相比非定向数据增强，仅需极少额外样本即可实现AP50最高提升13%。
AI.conclusion: 受控合成探测能够有效预测真实域的性能差距，指导高效的数据采集策略。该框架具有模块化可扩展性，可随生成模型和视觉-语言模型能力的提升而演进。

title: Anchored Self-Play for Code Repair
summary: Code repair is an important capability for language models (LMs): given a buggy program and unit tests, an LM must produce a fixed program that passes the tests. Because code repair data is limited, we aim to scale supervision by using an LM to generate bug--fix tasks. We propose __generator--fixer self-play__, in which a single model is trained with reinforcement learning to generate bugs and fix them. As the fixer improves, the generator adapts to produce more difficult bugs, yielding an automatic curriculum. To test whether this curriculum generalizes, we introduce BugSourceBench, a repair benchmark spanning realistic bug sources: bugs in human-written code, LM-generated code, and human-edited LM-generated code. On BugSourceBench, we find that self-play drifts toward difficult but unrealistic bugs, improving on synthetic bugs but degrading on human-authored ones. We propose Anchored Self-Play (ASP), which anchors self-play with a small reference set by adding a code-embedding similarity reward for generation and mixing reference bugs into fixer training. Across bug sources, ASP achieves the best fix rates, improving average fix rate over standard self-play by $+24\%$ relative / $+7.0$ pp absolute, with gains on bugs from both LMs and humans.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种锚定自博弈（ASP）方法，通过在自博弈训练中引入代码嵌入相似度奖励和参考数据混合，解决了标准自博弈在代码修复任务中向不真实bug偏移的问题，在混合bug源基准测试中取得最优修复效果。
AI.motivation: 代码修复数据稀缺，自博弈训练虽然能生成大量bug-fix任务，但生成的bug逐渐偏离真实场景，导致在人类编写的代码bug上性能下降。
AI.method: 提出Anchored Self-Play (ASP)，在标准的generator-fixer自博弈中增加两个锚定机制：1）生成bug时加入代码嵌入相似度奖励，使其更贴近真实bug；2）在fixer训练中混合少量参考真实bug数据，防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在BugSourceBench（包含人类代码、LM生成代码、人类编辑LM代码三类bug源）上，ASP相比标准自博弈平均修复率提升24%（相对）/7.0个百分点（绝对），在所有bug源上均取得最佳效果，尤其对LM和人类bug均有改善。
AI.conclusion: 自博弈训练需要锚定现实数据才能避免向不真实bug漂移；ASP是一种有效的轻量级方法，能在提升合成数据生成能力的同时保持对真实场景的泛化能力。

title: Telescope: Improving Zero Shot Detection of LLM Generated Content By Measuring Token Repetition Probability
summary: Distinguishing Large Language Model (LLM) generated text from human writing is a critical and difficult challenge. While LLMs are trained to write like humans, we hypothesize that this training leaves an indelible mark. LLMs develop a particularly strong aversion to token repetition very early in training. This bias persists as a ''Vestigial Heuristic'' (a developmental artifact) that is activated in LLM-generated text, separating LLM from human writing. To probe this phenomenon, we introduce Telescope Perplexity, a metric that evaluates the token repetition of the model, $P(s_i | s_{1:i})$ . Our empirical investigation reveals that the Telescope Perplexity signature emerges early in pre-training, and Telescope Perplexity empirically enables highly effective zero-shot LLM detection. We show state-of-the-art or competitive performance across diverse datasets (including modern evaluation sets we introduce), reference models, and perturbation schemes with greater efficiency than other methods.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LLM在早期训练中形成对token重复的强烈规避，这种“残留启发式”特征可通过Telescope Perplexity指标检测，实现高效零样本LLM文本检测。
AI.motivation: 区分LLM生成文本与人类写作是一项关键且困难的挑战，现有方法存在效率或泛化性不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出Telescope Perplexity指标，用于评估模型的token重复模式P(s_i | s_{1:i})；通过该指标捕捉LLM早期训练中形成的“残留启发式”特征。
AI.result: 在多个数据集（包括新引入的现代评估集）、参考模型和扰动方案下，实现了零样本LLM检测的最新或竞争性性能，且效率优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: LLM对token重复的规避是一种早期训练中固化的残留启发式特征，可作为高效检测LLM生成文本的可靠信号。

title: Agentic SABRE: An Uncertainty-Aware Neuro-Symbolic Multi-Agent Framework for Adaptive Ransomware Detection
summary: Ransomware has evolved into a complex, adaptive, and fast-moving adversary category in which static signatures and monolithic classifiers fail to generalise under concept drift, evasion, and behavioural polymorphism. In this paper, we present Agentic SABRE (Semantic-Behavioural Arbitration for Ransomware Evaluation), an uncertainty-aware, neuro-symbolic, multi-agent framework for adaptive ransomware detection. SABRE fuses semantic, representation-based evidence with behavioural, time-window forensic telemetry and employs Monte Carlo Dropout inference to quantify epistemic uncertainty for each agent. We introduce a decision-layer orchestrator that performs risk- and uncertainty-aware triage using two interpretable thresholds: a risk score and an uncertainty budget. High-confidence, high-risk samples are automatically contained, while uncertain or borderline cases are escalated to human analysts, establishing a flexible computational contract between autonomous response and analyst oversight. To support auditability and trust, SABRE integrates post-hoc explainability mechanisms, including gradient saliency, permutation importance, and counterfactual analysis, enabling both local and global interpretation of agent decisions. Extensive evaluation on RDset and RanSMAP demonstrates that Agentic SABRE preserves perfect discrimination on saturated semantic datasets, with AUC equal to 1.0, while improving robustness under weak behavioural signals. It achieves up to a 4.9 percent relative reduction in false escalations at equal recall while maintaining calibrated predictive uncertainty. Counterfactual analysis further shows that semantic and behavioural decisions can be reversed with bounded perturbation cost, indicating stable and interpretable decision boundaries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic SABRE，一个融合语义与行为证据、具备不确定性感知能力的多智能体勒索软件检测框架，通过风险与不确定性阈值实现自动响应与人工分析的灵活协作，在保持完美判别性能的同时显著降低误报率。
AI.motivation: 勒索软件已演变为复杂、自适应且快速变化的对抗类别，静态签名和单一分类器在概念漂移、规避和行为多态性下难以泛化，亟需更鲁棒、可解释且具备不确定性感知能力的检测方案。
AI.method: 提出Agentic SABRE，包含：（1）语义（表征学习）和行为（时间窗取证）双模态智能体；（2）Monte Carlo Dropout量化每个智能体的认知不确定性；（3）决策层编排器使用风险分数和不确定性预算两个可解释阈值进行分流；（4）三种事后可解释机制（梯度显著性、置换重要性、反事实分析）。
AI.result: 在RDset和RanSMAP上，语义饱和数据集上AUC=1.0保持完美判别；在弱行为信号下鲁棒性提升；等召回率下误报相对降低4.9%；反事实分析表明决策边界稳定可解释。
AI.conclusion: Agentic SABRE通过神经符号多智能体架构与不确定性量化，在勒索软件检测中实现了高精度、鲁棒性、可解释性与人机协作的平衡，为自适应安全检测提供了新范式。

title: GRCD: Grounded Region Change Detection for Multi-Finding Chest X-Ray Pairs
summary: Radiologists routinely compare current and prior chest X-rays to track disease progression, producing follow-up reports that describe multiple findings, each localised to an anatomical region and annotated with a temporal change status. Existing automated methods either generate reports from a single image without modelling temporal context, or incorporate temporal information but do not ground their outputs spatially. The few approaches that combine temporal reasoning with spatial grounding are restricted to single-finding descriptions, leaving multi-finding reports with mixed change directions unaddressed. We present GRCD, a framework for grounded report generation from chest X-ray pairs in the multi-finding setting. We first construct a rigorously cleaned dataset of temporal chest X-ray pairs by identifying and correcting two systematic labelling errors in the source annotations. We then introduce a Region-Guided Change Token module that encodes per-region temporal change across anatomical structures and injects this signal into a language model through a dual-pathway strategy combining prepended spatial tokens with gated cross-attention. On a multi-finding test set, GRCD outperforms existing baselines on text generation and clinical accuracy metrics, with gains in change detection. Ablation studies confirm that the dual-pathway design outperforms either integration strategy in isolation on text and clinical metrics, and that region-level change encoding is necessary for multi-finding generation. Code is available at https://github.com/UTSA-VIRLab/GRCD

AI.tldr: GRCD是一个针对胸部X光片对的接地报告生成框架，通过区域引导变化令牌模块和多路径策略，在多个发现场景中优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么缺乏时间建模，要么有时间信息但无空间定位，少数结合时空推理的方法仅限于单发现描述，无法处理多发现混合变化的报告生成问题。
AI.method: 先构建了清洁的时间胸部X光片对数据集（修正了两类系统标注错误），然后提出了区域引导变化令牌模块，通过前置空间令牌和门控交叉注意力的双路径策略，将每个解剖区域的时序变化信号注入语言模型。
AI.result: 在多发现测试集上，GRCD在文本生成和临床准确性指标上优于现有基线，尤其在变化检测方面有显著提升。消融实验证实双路径设计优于单一策略，且区域级变化编码对多发现生成至关重要。
AI.conclusion: GRCD通过区域引导的变化编码和双路径注入策略，成功实现了胸部X光片对的多发现接地报告生成，填补了现有方法在时空推理与多发现生成结合方面的空白。

title: GameEngineBench: Evaluating Coding Agents on Real C++ Runtime Environments
summary: Game engines provide real-time simulation, rendering, physics, interaction, networking, and asset pipelines, making them valuable not only for games but also for 3D applications in healthcare, robotics, architecture, manufacturing, and related domains. Because game development is where these systems are most mature and publicly available, it offers a practical testbed for evaluating coding agents that must modify C++ code within stateful, interactive, real-time systems. We present GameEngineBench, a benchmark for evaluating coding agents on scoped C++ implementation tasks inside Unreal Engine 5 projects, built from nine real-world game repositories. The evaluation set consists of 110 tasks spanning gameplay mechanics, multiplayer behavior, AI and world orchestration, animation and movement, UI and session code, loading behavior, online-service integration, persistence, data serialization, XR behavior, and rendering-oriented plugins. These tasks require models to make native C++ changes that compile and satisfy behavioral tests within executable Unreal Engine projects. Across twelve evaluated configurations, the strongest model reaches 55.5\% pass@1, while 31 tasks remain unsolved by every configuration. Our results demonstrate that frontier coding agents continue to struggle with deeply integrated C++ development for real-time interactive software, highlighting game-engine benchmarks as a valuable complement to existing software engineering evaluations.

AI.tldr: GameEngineBench是一个针对Unreal Engine 5中C++代码修改任务的基准测试，包含来自9个真实游戏仓库的110个任务。最强模型仅达到55.5%的通过率，有31个任务未被任何配置解决，表明前沿编码智能体在实时交互软件的深度集成C++开发上仍面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 游戏引擎在医疗、机器人、建筑等领域有广泛应用，但现有的编码智能体评估缺乏针对状态化、交互式、实时系统（如游戏引擎）中C++代码修改的测试基准。作者希望填补这一空白，评估编码智能体在真实游戏引擎环境中的表现。
AI.method: 构建GameEngineBench基准测试，从9个真实游戏仓库中提取110个任务，涵盖游戏玩法、多人行为、AI、动画、UI、序列化、XR等多种类型。任务要求模型修改C++代码，编译并通过行为测试。评估了12种配置的模型表现。
AI.result: 最强模型在110个任务上达到55.5%的pass@1；仍有31个任务未被任何配置解决。
AI.conclusion: 前沿编码智能体在深度集成的实时交互软件C++开发上仍存在困难，游戏引擎基准测试是对现有软件工程评估的有价值补充。

title: Speaker-Disentangled Chunk-Wise Regression for Syllabic Tokenization
comment: Accepted by IEEE Open Journal of Signal Processing (OJSP), 10 pages, 4 figures
summary: Unsupervised syllabic tokenization aims to learn discrete syllabic tokens that capture latent linguistic content-related structure from raw speech. Recent syllabic tokenization methods employ teacher-student distillation of the pretrained HuBERT to organize latent speech frame representations into syllabic segments. However, when trained with an utterance-level cross-entropy objective, the model predicts speaker identity rather than linguistic content, thereby compromising the purity of syllabic tokens. To address this problem, we propose a speaker-disentangled syllabic tokenizer that regresses speaker-perturbed student representations toward clean teacher targets within fixed-length chunks. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in syllable boundary detection and syllabic segment clustering. Moreover, a speech language model trained on our syllabic tokens achieves a 7% relative improvement in syntactic and semantic understanding over the phone-level SpiRit-LM.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种说话人解耦的音节分词器，通过说话人扰动学生表示回归到干净教师目标，解决了音节分词中说话人身份干扰问题，在音节边界检测和聚类上达到SOTA，并将语音语言模型的句法和语义理解提升了7%。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督音节分词方法在训练时使用话语级交叉熵目标，导致模型倾向于预测说话人身份而非语言内容，从而损害了音节token的纯净度。
AI.method: 提出说话人解耦的音节分词器，在固定长度块内将经过说话人扰动的学生表示回归到干净的教师目标，通过这种方式去除说话人信息，保留语言内容相关的音节结构。
AI.result: 在音节边界检测和音节段聚类任务上达到了当前最优性能；基于该音节token训练的语音语言模型在句法和语义理解上比基于音素的SpiRit-LM提升了7%。
AI.conclusion: 说话人解耦策略有效提升了音节token的语言内容纯度，进而改善了下游语音语言模型的语言理解能力。

title: HAS-Bench: Evaluating LLM-Based Human-Agent Systems under Configurable Human Participation
summary: Large language models increasingly operate in settings where humans are active collaborators rather than passive task providers. We introduce HAS-Framework, a graph-based framework that represents humans and LLM-powered agents as first-class participants with explicit roles, permissions, communication paths, and action authority. Building on this framework, HAS-Bench evaluates Human-Agent Systems under configurable human participation across agency levels, interaction channels, and persona policies. The benchmark measures both task outcomes and process-level collaboration behavior, including clarification quality, feedback utilization, control calibration, safety, initiative, and interaction cost. Experiments across six domains show that human participation can substantially improve task completion and failure recovery, but the gains depend on when, how, and by whom human input is exercised.

AI.tldr: 提出HAS-Framework（图结构框架）和HAS-Bench（基准测试），用于评估大语言模型与人类协作时的任务表现及过程行为，发现人类参与能提升任务完成率和故障恢复能力，但效果取决于参与时机、方式和角色。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估多假设人类是被动任务提供者，但实际应用中人类是主动协作者，缺乏系统评估人机协作的框架和基准。
AI.method: 设计基于图的HAS-Framework，将人类和LLM智能体视为一等参与者，定义显式角色、权限、通信路径和行动权限；在此基础上构建HAS-Bench，支持可配置的人类参与（不同代理级别、交互渠道、个性策略），测量任务结果和过程行为（澄清质量、反馈利用、控制校准、安全性、主动性、交互成本）。
AI.result: 在6个领域实验表明：人类参与可显著提升任务完成率和故障恢复能力，但收益取决于人类输入的实施时机、方式和由谁执行。
AI.conclusion: 人机协作中人类参与策略需精细化设计，不能简单认为"有人参与就好"，时机、方式和角色分配是关键因素。

title: Provable Pruning for Efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting via Coresets
comment: 39 pages, 15 figures, including supplementary material. Code: https://github.com/waseem-m/3dgs_provable_coresets
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-quality real-time novel-view synthesis, but practical scenes often contain millions of Gaussians, making compression essential for deployment on limited hardware. Existing reduction methods are effective but mostly heuristic: they provide no multiplicative approximation guarantee for the rendered objective, and thus rely heavily on costly post-pruning finetuning to recover quality. We ask a basic question: can a 3DGS scene be provably replaced by a much smaller weighted subset (coreset) while preserving the objective of interest? We first show that, in the unrestricted setting, no non-trivial multiplicative 3DGS coreset exists. We then show that multiplicative guarantees are not impossible, but resolution-dependent. For a prescribed rendering resolution, such as representative views or grids of views/rays, we provide the first weighted coreset construction theorem for 3DGS. The construction samples Gaussians by sensitivity: provable importance scores measuring each Gaussian's role in the full-scene objective. Finally, under explicit validity and log-transmittance stability assumptions, we turn this objective guarantee into a rendering guarantee. Empirically, our method is strongest where deployment needs it most: aggressive compression with no or minimal recovery compute. In prune-only and very short finetuning regimes, it achieves state-of-the-art performance, showing that principled importance estimation can be both theoretically meaningful and practically useful. Open-source code is available at https://github.com/waseem-m/3dgs_provable_coresets.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出3D高斯溅射(3DGS)场景的可证明加权核心集压缩方法。在无限制条件下，不存在非平凡的乘法3DGS核心集；但在给定渲染分辨率下，通过敏感性采样（每个高斯对全场景目标的重要性分数）可构建带乘法保证的核心集。实验表明，该方法在无微调或极短微调的高压缩场景下达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS压缩方法虽有效但大多基于启发式，缺乏对渲染目标的乘法近似保证，严重依赖昂贵的后剪枝微调来恢复质量。作者试图回答一个基本问题：能否在保证目标质量的前提下，用更小的加权子集（核心集）可证明地替换原始3DGS场景？
AI.method: 1) 理论证明无限制条件下不存在非平凡乘法3DGS核心集；2) 证明乘法保证是分辨率依赖的，在给定渲染分辨率下（如代表视图或视图/射线网格），首次提出3DGS加权核心集构造定理；3) 通过敏感性（每个高斯对全场景目标的贡献）采样构建核心集；4) 在显式有效性和对数透射率稳定性假设下，将目标保证转化为渲染保证。
AI.result: 在无微调（prune-only）和极短微调场景下达到最先进性能，证明基于原则的重要性估计既具有理论意义又具有实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在部署需求最迫切的场景（激进压缩且极少或无需恢复计算）中表现最强，为3DGS的可证明压缩奠定了理论基础。

title: LogSemFuse: Semantic Evidence Fusion for Explainable Log Anomaly Detection
summary: Log anomaly detection is critical for reliability monitoring and failure diagnosis in modern software systems. Existing model-based detectors provide useful anomaly signals, but they can still miss anomalous sessions and typically expose only scores or labels rather than the operational semantics behind a decision. This lack of semantic evidence limits their ability to explain why a session is anomalous, even when the final anomaly label is correct. The gap matters in practice because operators need to distinguish urgent failures from benign deviations and trace suspicious sessions back to concrete operational behavior. LLMs can recover richer log semantics, but using them as standalone detectors or repeatedly generating free-form explanations can be costly and difficult to reuse. We present LogSemFuse, an evidence-guided plug-in framework that enhances existing backbone detectors without replacing their original pipelines. LogSemFuse combines backbone predictions with reusable semantic evidence from local event patterns, LLM-based semantic reasoning, and cluster-derived executable rules to produce both anomaly decisions and evidence-based explanations. The resulting output reports the final label together with the semantic evidence that supports it, such as fired local patterns, triggered rules, and LLM rationale. We evaluate LogSemFuse on HDFS, BGL, and Liberty using DeepLog, LogAnomaly, LogBERT, and NeuralLog as backbones. LogSemFuse improves every non-perfect baseline, preserves the already perfect case, recovers 98.8% of backbone false negatives, and produces explanations preferred over direct LLM explanations in a human study. These gains require only modest and stable inference-time overhead, showing that semantic augmentation can improve detection effectiveness and interpretability without imposing large runtime costs.

AI.tldr: LogSemFuse是一个即插即用的语义增强框架，通过融合局部事件模式、LLM语义推理和聚类规则为现有日志异常检测器提供语义证据和可解释性，在HDFS、BGL和Liberty数据集上显著提升了检测效果（恢复98.8%假阴性）并支持人工偏好解释。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模型的日志异常检测器只能输出分数或标签，缺乏可解释的操作语义证据，导致运维人员无法区分紧急故障与良性偏差，也难以将异常追溯到具体行为。
AI.method: LogSemFuse作为插件框架，在不替换原始检测管线的前提下，融合三种语义证据：局部事件模式、LLM语义推理和聚类导出的可执行规则，最终输出异常标签及对应的语义解释。
AI.result: 在HDFS、BGL、Liberty上使用DeepLog、LogAnomaly、LogBERT、NeuralLog作为骨干，LogSemFuse提升了所有非完美基线，保持完美情况，恢复了98.8%的骨干假阴性，且人工研究偏好其解释。
AI.conclusion: 语义增强可以同时提升日志异常检测的有效性和可解释性，且推理开销稳定可控，适合实际部署。

title: Beyond Multilingual Averages: MTEB-PT, a Benchmark for Portuguese Sentence Encoders
comment: Accepted at BRACIS 2026 - 36th Brazilian Conference on Intelligent Systems
summary: Portuguese remains underrepresented in text embedding evaluation, despite being one of the most widely spoken languages in the world. As a result, embedding models are often selected based on English or multilingual metrics, while their effectiveness in Portuguese remains unclear. We present MTEB-PT, a Portuguese benchmark constructed from a subset of MMTEB, comprising 14 existing datasets across Semantic Textual Similarity (STS), classification, retrieval, and reranking. We use this benchmark to evaluate 17 open- and closed-source embedding models under a unified protocol. Our results show that Portuguese performance is strongly task-dependent: multilingual rankings do not reliably predict Portuguese-specific performance across task families, no single model dominates all settings, and models with stronger long-context capacity are particularly advantageous on longer-input tasks such as retrieval and reranking. The benchmark also shows that language-specific fine-tuning still improves model performance in Portuguese, especially on task types that match the adaptation data most closely. To examine this effect, we fine-tune three representative backbone models with Portuguese contrastive supervision and Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL). These benchmark-informed baselines yield their strongest gains on STS, consistent with the predominantly symmetric supervision used during training, while also improving retrieval and remaining competitive under dimensional truncation. We release the MTEB-PT benchmark, the fine-tuned models, and the training and evaluation code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MTEB-PT，一个面向葡萄牙语的文本嵌入评估基准，包含14个数据集，评估了17个嵌入模型。结果表明葡萄牙语性能高度依赖任务类型，多语言排名不能可靠预测葡萄牙语表现，且语言特定微调能提升效果，尤其是在STS任务上。
AI.motivation: 葡萄牙语虽然是全球使用最广泛的语言之一，但在文本嵌入评估中仍被严重忽视，导致嵌入模型通常基于英语或多语言指标选择，其在葡萄牙语上的有效性不明确。
AI.method: 从MMTEB中选取14个现有数据集构建MTEB-PT基准，涵盖STS、分类、检索和重排序任务；在统一协议下评估17个开源和闭源嵌入模型；并对三个代表性骨干模型进行葡萄牙语对比监督和Matryoshka表示学习的微调。
AI.result: 葡萄牙语性能高度任务依赖；多语言排名不能可靠预测各任务族的葡萄牙语表现；没有单一模型主导所有场景；长上下文能力在检索和重排序等长输入任务中更有优势；语言特定微调能提升性能，在STS上增益最大。
AI.conclusion: MTEB-PT填补了葡萄牙语嵌入评估的空白，揭示多语言指标在葡萄牙语上的局限性，验证了语言特定微调的价值，并提供了公开的基准、模型和代码。

title: Do GUI Agents Believe Their Eyes? Diagnosing State-Belief Reliance on Pixels versus Structure
summary: Multimodal GUI agents read an interface through two redundant channels: the rendered pixels of a screenshot and a serialized structure such as a DOM or accessibility tree. Before acting, an agent forms a belief about the current interface state, but existing benchmarks score task success, element grounding, or attack resistance and do not ask whether that belief is drawn from the pixels. We formalize visual state reliance, the attribution of a state belief to pixels, structure, or priors, and measure it with paired single-channel interventions over 310 real web, mobile, and desktop probes. Every probe is scored by deterministic forced choice, with no model-generated item and no model judge. Our central metric is the Perception-Fusion Gap, the fraction of probes a model perceives correctly yet resolves toward structure under conflict. Across five models from three vendors, textual state beliefs defer to structure while image-only accuracy stays near ceiling, and Perception-Fusion Gap is positive for every model; non-text identity, by contrast, stays largely pixel-bound. The substitution is specific to the serialized-text and indexed-action channel, and coordinate-action agents are largely immune. For textual conflicts, a white-box ablation traces the effect to a single copied structural value, and in two live environments the conflict drives wrong actions and real task failure. Visual state reliance therefore gives a measurable diagnostic of whether agent state beliefs are visually grounded, and the errors it exposes propagate to actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“视觉状态依赖”概念，通过双通道干预测量GUI智能体在像素与结构化表示冲突时是否依赖视觉信息，并引入“感知-融合差距”指标。实验发现文本智能体倾向依赖结构而非像素，导致动作错误和任务失败。
AI.motivation: 现有基准评估GUI智能体的任务成功率、元素定位或攻击鲁棒性，但未区分智能体对界面状态的信念究竟来源于像素（截图）还是结构化表示（DOM/无障碍树），缺乏对视觉基础依赖性的诊断工具。
AI.method: 定义视觉状态依赖为状态信念归因于像素、结构或先验的程度；通过310个真实Web/移动/桌面探针进行成对单通道干预（像素 vs 结构冲突），采用确定性强制选择评分（无模型生成项和模型评判）；核心指标为感知-融合差距（PFG），即模型感知正确但在冲突时偏向结构的比例。
AI.result: 五个模型（三家厂商）中，文本状态信念在冲突时偏向结构，而图像准确率接近天花板；所有模型的PFG均为正值；非文本身份（如图标）保持像素绑定。替换仅限于序列化文本+索引动作通道，坐标动作智能体几乎免疫。消融实验发现单个复制的结构值导致冲突，在真实环境中冲突驱动错误动作和任务失败。
AI.conclusion: 视觉状态依赖可量化诊断GUI智能体状态信念的视觉基础，暴露的误差会传播到实际动作，为评估智能体对视觉信息的真实依赖提供了可测量的指标。

title: Signal from Space: Detecting Schools and Towers to Bridge the Digital Divide
summary: Reliable internet access is essential for modern education, yet millions of school-aged children especially in developing regions remain offline due to unconnected schools. The Giga Initiative aims to connect every school to the internet, but doing so at scale requires efficient methods to map schools and assess surrounding connectivity infrastructure without relying on sparse or noisy third-party datasets. In this work, we propose a scalable, vision-only framework that uses high-resolution satellite imagery and transfer learning to address both tasks simultaneously. By adapting pre-trained object detection models to new geographical regions with minimal labeled data, we detect schools and cell towers directly from space. We then analyze the spatial relationship between detected schools and nearby towers as a proxy for connectivity availability. This purely imagery-driven pipeline enables large-scale infrastructure mapping, reduces dependency on auxiliary data, and supports data-driven prioritization of connectivity investments in underserved areas. Our approach is demonstrated on real satellite imagery from Lesotho, showing strong performance across this region.

AI.tldr: 提出一个仅依赖卫星影像的视觉框架，通过迁移学习同时检测学校与信号塔，无需第三方数据即可评估网络连接可用性，并在莱索托地区验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 全球仍有数百万学龄儿童因学校未联网而无法上网，Giga倡议旨在连接每所学校，但现有方法依赖稀疏、高噪声的第三方数据，难以大规模高效绘制学校地图并评估周边基础设施。
AI.method: 基于高分辨率卫星影像，利用迁移学习适配预训练目标检测模型，仅需少量标注数据即可同时检测学校和信号塔；随后分析检测到的学校与附近信号塔的空间关系，作为网络连接可用性的代理指标。
AI.result: 在莱索托的真实卫星影像上展示了强性能，验证了该框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该纯影像驱动的管线能实现大规模基础设施测绘，减少对辅助数据的依赖，支持在服务不足地区进行数据驱动的连接投资优先级排序。

title: AutoCedar: An Agentic Framework for Verifier-Guided Access Control Policy Synthesis
summary: Large Language Models are increasingly used to turn natural-language requirements into code. In access control, that shortcut is dangerous: a generated policy can compile and read correctly while granting access that no one approved. The difficulty is not only writing policy code. It is fixing what the requirements mean before code is written, and then checking that the final policy actually satisfies that intent. We present AutoCedar, a verifier-guided system that first turns natural-language access-control requirements into a reviewed, checkable target, and then synthesizes Cedar policies against that target. AutoCedar decomposes schema and policy authoring into small intent atoms: reviewable claims about vocabulary and behavior. Once those atoms pass mechanical validation and human intent review, the model proposes a candidate policy, the verifier checks it against the approved target, and each failure is turned into a repair signal that tells the model whether to broaden, narrow, or restructure the policy without changing the target. Because the model's work is split into small problems, each grounded in reviewed intent and backed by verifier feedback, end-to-end policy authoring becomes tractable. AutoCedar converges on all 221 tasks of CedarBench, our benchmark of authorization tasks paired with executable semantic boundaries. Across three requirements-corpus case studies covering healthcare, education, and conference management, AutoCedar converts noisy prose and extracted access-control fragments into reviewed schemas, formal checks, and a globally verified Cedar policy store for each scenario.

AI.tldr: AutoCedar 是一个验证器引导的系统，通过将自然语言访问控制需求分解为可审查的意图原子，生成形式化目标，然后合成并验证 Cedar 策略，最终在 221 个任务上收敛，并在医疗、教育、会议管理三个案例中成功将噪声文本转化为已验证的策略库。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型将自然语言需求转化为代码时，访问控制策略可能编译通过且看起来正确，但实际授予了未经批准的权限。问题不仅在于编写策略代码，更在于在编写代码之前明确需求含义，并检查最终策略是否满足该意图。
AI.method: AutoCedar 将模式（schema）和策略编写分解为小的意图原子（intent atoms）——关于词汇和行为的可审查声明。这些原子通过机械验证和人工审查后，模型提出候选策略，验证器检查其是否满足已批准的目标，每个失败被转化为修复信号，指导模型扩宽、缩小或重构策略，而不改变目标。
AI.result: 在包含 221 个授权任务的基准测试 CedarBench 上全部收敛。在医疗、教育、会议管理三个需求语料库案例研究中，成功将噪声文本和提取的访问控制片段转化为经过审查的模式、形式化检查以及全局验证的 Cedar 策略库。
AI.conclusion: 通过将模型的工作分解为小问题，每个问题基于已审查的意图并得到验证器反馈的支持，端到端的策略编写变得可行。

title: Semantic Integration and Lexical Expectation Shape N400 and P600 Dynamics During Naturalistic Reading
summary: Word surprisal is a well-established computational predictor of human neural responses during language comprehension, but it remains less clear whether local semantic fit explains neural response variation beyond lexical expectation during naturalistic reading. Using the Dublin EEG-based Reading Experiment Corpus (DERCo), this study examined whether contextual semantic relevance predicts word-locked EEG activity in the N400 and P600 windows. Contextual semantic relevance was computed as an attention-aware measure of how strongly a target word is semantically connected to its recent discourse context, and it was compared with GPT-based word surprisal. Across 22 participants and 32 EEG channels, we tested both predictors using regression-based ERP analyses and generalized additive mixed models while controlling for lexical variables and repeated observations. Both predictors were reliably associated with EEG responses, but they showed partly different temporal and scalp-level patterns. Surprisal captured expectancy-related variation, whereas contextual semantic relevance showed robust effects across N400- and P600-window mean voltages, with particularly strong explanatory support in the P600 window. Model comparisons indicated that contextual semantic relevance contributed explanatory value beyond lexical controls and surprisal. These findings suggest that naturalistic reading depends on both lexical expectation and local semantic integration, and that contextual semantic relevance offers an interpretable computational link between discourse semantic fit and ERP dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用DERCo语料库（EEG阅读实验数据），对比了词汇惊讶度（GPT-based surprisal）与上下文语义相关性（contextual semantic relevance）对N400和P600窗口脑电活动的预测能力。结果表明，两种指标都能预测脑电反应，但语义相关性在P600窗口表现出更强的解释力，且能提供超越词汇惊讶度的额外解释价值。
AI.motivation: 词汇惊讶度已被证实能预测语言理解中的神经反应，但局部语义拟合（local semantic fit）是否能在线索化阅读中解释超出词汇预期的神经反应变异，尚不清楚。本研究旨在探究上下文语义相关性是否能够预测N400和P600窗口的脑电活动。
AI.method: 使用DERCo语料库（22名参与者，32个EEG通道），以注意力感知的上下文语义相关性作为目标词与最近话语上下文语义连接强度的度量，与GPT-based词汇惊讶度进行比较。采用回归式ERP分析和广义可加混合模型，控制词汇变量和重复观测。
AI.result: 两种预测因子均与EEG反应可靠关联，但呈现不同的时间和头皮分布模式：惊讶度捕捉预期相关变异，而上下文语义相关性在N400和P600窗口的平均电压上均有稳健效应，尤其在P600窗口解释力更强。模型比较表明语义相关性提供了超越词汇控制和惊讶度的额外解释价值。
AI.conclusion: 自然阅读既依赖词汇预期也依赖局部语义整合，上下文语义相关性为话语语义拟合与ERP动态之间提供了可解释的计算桥梁。

title: Server-side Anti-cheat in FPS games for Aimbot detection using Deep learning and Machine learning
summary: Modern video games are becoming more complex day by day. Most of these modern games are multiplayer first-person shooter (FPS) games. The rising popularity of FPS games emphasizes the need to combat cheating for fair and enjoyable gaming. As the number of players using cheating techniques like aimbots, wallhacks, and speed hacks is also increasing, we need a way to detect players who are using cheating tools to gain an unfair advantage over regular players. In this system, we focus exclusively on detecting aimbot cheats. Players who use aimbot cheats generally do not prioritize other aspects of the game. To distinguish between regular and cheating players, we identify specific features encompassing time-series data such as aim velocity, number of shots, distance to target, and more, along with behavioral data such as utility usage, player movement, and other gameplay patterns. Utilizing these features, we construct a server-side aimbot detection classifier named 'YAACS'. YAACS comprises a parser, a deep learning model, and intermediary connection utilities designed for integration with the game server. The proposed system achieves a classification accuracy of 88.6% with a false positive rate of 0.97% using a Stacked LSTM with Dense layers trained on sequences of 128 ticks (Tick Delta Negative=56, Tick Delta Positive=24), outperforming the Decision Tree baseline which achieves a higher accuracy of 96.2% but at a false positive rate of 2.68%, 2.76x worse than the best LSTM configuration. These results demonstrate that incorporating temporal context through sequence modelling is critical for minimising false accusations in FPS cheat detection.

AI.tldr: 提出YAACS系统，利用堆叠LSTM模型基于时间序列数据（瞄准速度、射击次数、距离等）和行为数据检测FPS游戏中的自瞄作弊，在128帧序列上达到88.6%准确率和0.97%误报率。
AI.motivation: FPS游戏作弊问题日益严重，现有方法误报率高，需在保证检测准确性的同时最大限度降低误报率，以避免误封正常玩家。
AI.method: 构建YAACS系统，包含解析器、深度学习模型和服务器连接工具。提取时间序列特征（瞄准速度、射击次数、目标距离等）和行为特征（道具使用、移动模式等），使用堆叠LSTM+密集层处理128帧序列数据。
AI.result: YAACS（LSTM）达88.6%准确率、0.97%误报率；决策树基线达96.2%准确率但误报率2.68%（LSTM的2.76倍）。
AI.conclusion: 时间序列建模对降低FPS反作弊误报率至关重要，LSTM虽准确率略低但误报率显著优于决策树，更适合实际部署。

title: Biomechanics-aware Multi-view Markerless Motion Capture of Dexterous Hand Movements
summary: Markerless motion capture (MMC) techniques have been widely beneficial in biomechanical analysis of human movement; however, application to complex motions of the hand lags other musculoskeletal systems. The primary goal of this study was to evaluate the performance of a biomechanical reconstruction method that implements a gradient-based optimization approach with a biomechanical model in the loop for tracking dexterous, unconstrained hand movements using MMC. Using a custom, 8-camera setup, we acquired 121 video recordings from 6 participants performing 11 different tasks that spanned 6 hand postures, 5 object manipulation tasks, and involved motion of the proximal upper limb joints. Performance of the proposed MMC pipeline was directly compared to a more commonly adopted two-stage reconstruction method that first triangulates 2D keypoints from computer vision pose estimation algorithms to 3D and then enforces biomechanical constraints by solving a constrained inverse kinematics problem. Relative performance was assessed qualitatively by visual inspection and quantitatively using a computer vision metric. Our method generated solutions for all 121 video recordings; the two-stage method did not converge for 15% of the recordings. Across the remaining videos, our method produced more biomechanically plausible hand kinematics than the two-stage method and was more robust to occlusion effects during tasks that involved objects. The relative robustness of the end-to-end method suggests that it is more effective in utilizing the available 2D digital keypoint information. Automatic and biomechanically meaningful tracking of hand kinematics during dexterous movements has the potential to support clinical evaluation, rehabilitation monitoring, and studies of human motor control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度优化的生物力学重建方法，用于无标记手部运动捕捉。与传统的两阶段方法相比，该方法在121个视频记录中全部收敛（传统方法15%不收敛），生成的运动学更符合生物力学规律，对遮挡更鲁棒，能够有效利用2D关键点信息。
AI.motivation: 无标记运动捕捉技术在人体运动生物力学分析中已有广泛应用，但应用于复杂的手部运动仍落后于其他肌肉骨骼系统。现有方法多采用两阶段流程（先三角化2D关键点到3D，再通过逆向运动学施加约束），在处理手部精细、灵活运动时容易失败。因此，需要一种端到端的方法来更有效地跟踪手部运动。
AI.method: 提出一种端到端的梯度优化方法，将生物力学模型嵌入优化循环中。使用8相机定制系统，采集6名参与者执行11种不同任务（涵盖6种手部姿势、5种物体操作任务及近端上肢关节运动）的121个视频记录。与传统的两阶段方法（先三角化3D关键点，再求解带约束的逆向运动学问题）进行直接对比。
AI.result: 1) 所提方法在所有121个视频记录中均成功生成解，而两阶段方法在15%的记录中不收敛。2) 在收敛的剩余视频中，所提方法生成的手部运动学更符合生物力学合理性。3) 对于涉及物体的遮挡任务，所提方法更鲁棒。该方法能更有效地利用2D关键点信息。
AI.conclusion: 端到端梯度优化的生物力学重建方法在无标记手部运动捕捉中表现优于传统两阶段方法，具有更高的收敛率、生物力学合理性和遮挡鲁棒性。该方法有望应用于临床评估、康复监测和运动控制研究。

title: Don't Blame the Large Language Model: How Scaffolding Evolution Shapes Coding Agent Quality
summary: Coding agents, autonomous systems that use large language models (LLMs) to resolve software engineering tasks, rely on agentic scaffolding: a middleware layer in between a developer and a large language model that orchestrates system prompts, tool execution, context management, and iterative reasoning loops. While these scaffoldings evolve at extreme velocities, no study has examined how this evolution affects agent quality (i.e., effectiveness and efficiency) over time. Practitioners regularly report quality regressions after scaffolding updates, yet consistently attribute them to the underlying model rather than the scaffolding itself. In this paper, we address this gap by conducting the first controlled longitudinal study that isolates the scaffolding's contribution. Unlike prior work that fixes the scaffolding and varies the model, we fix the model and vary only the scaffolding, evaluating 35 sequential releases to measure their impact on agent effectiveness and efficiency. We first empirically study the development and release evolution of five major open-source scaffoldings (i.e., Codex, Qwen Code, Gemini, OpenCode, and OpenHands), revealing extreme release velocities exceeding two releases per day and thousands of issues within months. We then perform a controlled deep dive into 35 sequential releases of the Qwen Code CLI, evaluating each against 50 stratified SWE-bench Verified tasks while holding the underlying LLM constant. We trace the resulting quality fluctuations to specific development patterns and architectural components, and illustrate our findings with concrete qualitative evidence linking individual pull requests to measured quality shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文首次通过控制实验，在固定LLM模型的情况下，系统研究了35个版本的开源编码智能体脚手架（如Qwen Code CLI）的迭代演化对智能体质量（有效性和效率）的影响，发现脚手架更新会导致质量波动，并追溯至具体的开发模式和架构组件。
AI.motivation: 现有研究大多固定脚手架而改变模型，但实践中脚手架更新频繁且常导致质量回退，却常被误归因于模型问题。作者希望填补这一空白，分离并量化脚手架自身演化对智能体质量的影响。
AI.method: 1) 对5个主流开源脚手架（Codex、Qwen Code、Gemini、OpenCode、OpenHands）进行实证分析，研究其版本发布和问题演化；2) 固定LLM模型，对Qwen Code CLI的35个连续版本，在50个SWE-bench Verified任务上进行控制实验；3) 将质量波动追溯至具体开发模式和架构组件，并通过PR级别的定性证据验证。
AI.result: 1) 脚手架发布频率极高（超过每天2个版本），数月内产生数千个issue；2) 固定模型下，脚手架版本的迭代会引发显著的质量波动；3) 能够将质量变化追溯到具体的开发模式（如PR粒度）和架构组件。
AI.conclusion: 脚手架的演化本身会对编码智能体的有效性和效率产生实质性影响，开发者应重视脚手架层面的质量控制和回退机制，而非仅关注LLM模型的更新。

title: Detecting Hallucinations in Retrieval-Augmented Generation through Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP)
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces but does not eliminate hallucination, and existing detectors return a single answer-level score that does not indicate which sentence is unsupported, or why. To close this gap, we introduce Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP), a span-level detector that scores each answer sentence by how strongly its likelihood depends on the retrieved evidence, a quantity we term grounding sensitivity. GASP holds the answer fixed and re-scores it under the full context, under no context, and with each chunk removed, then measures the log-likelihood drops and Jensen-Shannon divergences (JSD). The likelihood of a grounded sentence collapses once its supporting passage is removed, whereas a hallucinated sentence is almost unaffected, a contrast we interpret by casting decoding as a random nonlinear iterated function system (RNIFS). We evaluate GASP on three benchmarks (RAGTruth, TofuEval, RAGBench) with three instruction-tuned scorers from two model families (Qwen2.5-0.5B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and SmolLM2-1.7B) under a leakage-clean protocol. On RAGTruth it reaches a response-level area under the ROC curve (AUC) of about 0.73 and a span-level AUC of about 0.67, improving significantly over perplexity and by clear margins over length, whole-context natural language inference (NLI), and self-consistency baselines. The only baseline competitive at the span level is a well-configured chunk-level entailment verifier, which requires a separate model, whereas a training-free threshold on the grounding features matches the trained classifier without labeled data and serves as the default detector. Beyond RAGTruth, the signal transfers to TofuEval but not to short-answer question answering in RAGBench, showing GASP is best suited to outputs constructed from the retrieved context rather than answers recoverable from parametric knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GASP方法，通过扰动检索证据并观察句子对数似然的变化来检测RAG系统中的幻觉，无需训练即可在句子级别识别不支持的答案。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG幻觉检测器仅返回单一答案级分数，无法指出哪个句子不成立或原因。作者希望填补这一空白，实现句子级别的可解释幻觉检测。
AI.method: GASP通过三种扰动方式（完整上下文、无上下文、逐块移除）重新评分答案句子，测量对数似然下降和JS散度，利用"接地敏感性"指标区分真实句子（移除支撑证据后似然崩溃）与幻觉句子（几乎不受影响）。
AI.result: 在RAGTruth上达到响应级AUC约0.73、跨度级AUC约0.67，显著优于困惑度、长度、NLI和自一致性基线。无监督阈值与有监督分类器性能相当。
AI.conclusion: GASP最适合于从检索上下文构建的输出，而非可从参数知识恢复的短答案。信号可迁移到TofuEval但无法迁移到RAGBench的短答案问答场景。

title: Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B: Compressing Hybrid MoE LLMs
summary: We present Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B, a compressed variant of Nemotron-3-Super optimized for interactive deployment. We designed the model to maximize server throughput under high user throughput constraints. In interactive serving workloads on a single 8xB200 node, Puzzle-75B-A9B achieves approximately 2x higher server throughput than Nemotron-3-Super at matched user throughput constraints. In ultra-long-context deployment on a single H100 GPU, the compressed model increases 1M-token concurrency from 1 request to 8 requests. Puzzle-75B-A9B is constructed using a multi-stage pipeline that combines the Iterative Puzzle compression framework with knowledge distillation, reinforcement learning, quantization, and a Multi-Token Prediction head. The compression process jointly optimizes heterogeneous MoE pruning, active parameter budget, and Mamba pruning to improve inference efficiency while preserving model quality. We evaluate Puzzle-75B-A9B on a broad suite of reasoning, coding, multilingual, long-context, and agentic benchmarks. Despite substantial compression, the model retains strong downstream accuracy relative to the parent model across a wide range of tasks. These results demonstrate that large hybrid MoE models can be substantially optimized for deployment efficiency while maintaining strong downstream capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B，一种通过多阶段压缩流水线（包括迭代Puzzle压缩、知识蒸馏、强化学习、量化和多Token预测头）从Nemotron-3-Super压缩得到的模型。在单个8xB200节点上，交互式服务吞吐量提升约2倍；在单个H100 GPU上，超长上下文部署的1M-token并发数从1提升到8。模型在推理、编程、多语言、长上下文和agent基准测试中保持了较强的下游精度。
AI.motivation: 现有大型混合MoE模型在交互式部署场景下面临服务器吞吐量瓶颈和高用户并发需求，亟需在保持模型质量的前提下大幅提升推理效率。
AI.method: 采用多阶段压缩流水线：结合迭代Puzzle压缩框架、知识蒸馏、强化学习、量化以及多Token预测头；联合优化异构MoE剪枝、活跃参数预算和Mamba剪枝。
AI.result: 在8xB200节点上交互式服务吞吐量提升约2倍；在单H100 GPU上1M-token超长上下文并发从1提升到8；在多种基准上保持强下游精度。
AI.conclusion: 大型混合MoE模型可以通过多阶段压缩显著优化部署效率，同时保持强大的下游能力。

title: Track the Noise, Move the World:3D-Grounded Motion-Consistent Noise for Controllable Video Generation
summary: Modern image-and-text-to-video diffusion models can synthesize highly realistic videos by iteratively denoising an initial Gaussian noise tensor conditioned on reference image and text inputs. However, existing approaches still lack precise and unified controllability over both object motion and camera motion within a single generation process. We present UniCaMo, a unified framework that enables simultaneous control of object trajectories and camera viewpoints by directly constructing the input noise of the diffusion model. Specifically, UniCaMo builds a shared 3D-grounded motion-consistent noise space across latent video frames. Sparse 3D point tracks are used to warp the Gaussian noise of the reference frame along desired object trajectories, while a virtual spherical noise representation provides globally consistent noise values for newly revealed scene regions under camera motion. By combining local track-guided noise warping with global sphere-based noise sampling, UniCaMo maintains geometric and temporal consistency under both object movement and viewpoint changes. Because UniCaMo modifies only the input noise, it requires no auxiliary adapters, control branches, or architectural changes to the underlying video diffusion model. With lightweight LoRA fine-tuning on large pretrained video diffusion models, including Wan 2.1 (14B), UniCaMo achieves state-of-the-art results in both video quality and motion controllability on standard controllable video generation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: UniCaMo通过在扩散模型的输入噪声空间中构建3D一致的轨迹与视角控制，无需修改模型架构即可同时控制物体运动和相机运动，在Wan 2.1等大模型上达SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有文图生视频扩散模型虽能生成逼真视频，但缺乏在同一生成过程中对物体运动和相机运动进行精确且统一控制的能力。
AI.method: 构建共享的3D运动一致噪声空间：利用稀疏3D点轨迹对参考帧高斯噪声进行扭曲（物体运动控制），结合虚拟球面噪声表示实现相机运动下新区域的全局一致噪声采样。仅修改输入噪声，无需额外适配器或架构改动。
AI.result: 在标准可控视频生成基准上，结合轻量LoRA微调（如Wan 2.1 14B），在视频质量和运动可控性方面均达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: UniCaMo以极简方式（仅操作输入噪声）实现了对物体轨迹和相机视角的联合精确控制，证明了噪声空间优化是可控视频生成的高效范式。

title: Fault Detection and Explainable Classification in Automotive HIL Validation via Denoising Autoencoders and In-Context Large Language Models
summary: Validating automotive software systems produces large multivariate test recordings that are still examined through effort-intensive manual review and rule-based evaluation, which detects faults beyond predefined rules poorly. Machine and deep learning have advanced fault diagnosis, yet most supervised models require large labelled datasets, generalise poorly to unseen conditions, and offer little insight into their decisions. We propose a generalisable and explainable two-phase framework for fault detection and classification during real-time validation. A denoising autoencoder trained only on healthy signals first flags abnormal behaviour through reconstruction-error analysis, removing the need for fault labels. Each abnormal window is then encoded as compact textual statistical evidence relative to a time-aligned healthy reference and classified by a frozen large language model under zero-shot and few-shot prompting, returning the predicted class, ranked alternatives, a confidence value, the fault location, and a short evidence-based explanation. Eight open-source models are evaluated across two powertrains and three driving regimes. The detector attains average F1-scores of 0.97 across powertrains and 0.98 across regimes, with average mean error below 0.03. Zero-shot prompting proves insufficient (best 0.519 F1-score), whereas few-shot prompting reaches perfect discrimination under stable regimes, showing that prompting strategy, rather than parameter count, governs classification quality: a nine-billion-parameter model surpasses every zero-shot medium and large model. Mistral Small 24B is adopted as the main pipeline model for its balance of accuracy, class-balanced reliability, calibration, and inference cost, giving engineers interpretable diagnostic reports and more efficient validation.

AI.tldr: 提出一个两阶段可解释框架，先用去噪自编码器检测异常，再用大语言模型进行零样本/少样本故障分类，在实车验证中达到高精度，并消除对故障标签的需求。
AI.motivation: 传统汽车软件验证依赖人工审查和基于规则的评估，难以检测预定义规则之外的故障；监督学习模型需要大量标注数据、泛化能力差且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：(1) 仅用健康信号训练的去噪自编码器通过重构误差检测异常；(2) 异常窗口编码为统计证据文本，由冻结的大语言模型在零样本/少样本提示下进行分类，输出预测类别、置信度、故障位置及解释。
AI.result: 检测器F1分数达0.97-0.98，平均误差低于0.03；零样本提示效果不佳（最高0.519 F1），少样本提示在稳定工况下达到完美判别；Mistral Small 24B因精度、可靠性、校准和推理成本的平衡被选为主模型。
AI.conclusion: 提示策略比参数量更关键地决定分类质量；所提框架能为工程师提供可解释的诊断报告，实现更高效的验证流程。

title: Spinning Straw into Gold: Relabeling LLM Agent Trajectories in Hindsight for Successful Demonstrations
summary: Large language model agents operate in partially observable, long-horizon settings where obtaining supervision remains a major bottleneck. We address this by utilizing a source of supervision overlooked in existing post-training methods: unintended yet successful goals embedded within agent rollouts. Specifically, we introduce Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL), where an auxiliary LLM reviews each completed trajectory and relabels it with all of the natural-language goals the agent actually achieved. HSL then pairs the trajectory with its relabeled goals and uses these pairs for additional fine-tuning. To mitigate suboptimality in the relabeled data, we propose two learning techniques for HSL, irrelevant-action masking and sample reweighting. Our experiments show that HSL is flexible and compatible with existing post-training pipelines. It improves both SFT and DPO, with larger gains on long-horizon tasks with more diverse goal spaces. Moreover, HSL is sample-efficient: on ALFWorld, it surpasses baselines trained on the full dataset while using only one quarter of the ground-truth demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL)方法，利用智能体轨迹中无意达成的成功目标作为额外监督信号，通过辅助LLM对已完成轨迹重新标注目标，并结合无关动作掩码和样本重加权技术进行微调，在ALFWorld等任务上显著提升了样本效率。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型智能体在部分可观测、长时间跨度的场景中工作，获取有效监督信号一直是主要瓶颈。现有后训练方法忽视了智能体轨迹中隐含的、非预期的成功目标这一监督来源。
AI.method: HSL方法包含两个核心步骤：1) 利用辅助LLM对已完成的完整轨迹进行审查，重新标注智能体实际达成的所有自然语言目标；2) 将轨迹与重标目标配对，用于额外的微调训练。同时提出两种学习技术——无关动作掩码和样本重加权——以缓解重标数据中的次优性问题。
AI.result: HSL与现有后训练流程（SFT和DPO）兼容，在长时间跨度和多样化目标空间的任务上提升更显著。在ALFWorld上，仅使用四分之一的真实标注演示即可超越使用完整数据集的基线方法，展示了出色的样本效率。
AI.conclusion: HSL通过挖掘轨迹中天然存在的成功信号，为LLM智能体的后训练提供了一种灵活、高效且兼容性强的监督增强方法，尤其适用于长时序、多目标场景。

title: Decentralized Aggregation of LLM Predictions via Wagering Mechanisms
summary: It is increasingly common to aggregate predictions from multiple LLMs, each with domain expertise or access to private tools and data, to improve collective prediction performance. In decentralized settings, aggregation weights need to be determined without access to models' private information and should remain robust to strategic reporting. We propose a family of advantage-aligned wagering mechanisms for LLM aggregation (WALLA), in which each model reports a prediction and a learned wager, and predictions are aggregated using wagers as weights.
