AI.motivation: 现有根因分析（RCA）和日志分析评估主要聚焦于诊断阶段，缺乏对诊断后如何将诊断结果转化为具体恢复行动、应用到可接受目标并验证服务恢复的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出R2Act框架，定义事故模式、质量门、行动空间表示、恢复有效性指标、离线评估器和实时重放协议。基于Kubernetes系统构建包含302个质量审计事故的数据集，提供多模态观测、根因标签、事故特定行动空间以及标注的有效/无效恢复计划。
AI.result: 最强的RAG-LLM方法根因服务准确率达91.4%-99.7%，但恢复有效性仅为36.8%-60.3%。即使根因服务和故障类型都正确，仍有39.5%-62.0%的正确诊断事故选择了无效行动。
AI.conclusion: 恢复失败主要源于从诊断证据到有效恢复行动的转化困难，而非诊断知识的缺失。这项工作为相关研究和评估提供了可复现的简化起点。

title: Turning Off-Policy Tokens On-Policy: A Plug-in Approach for Improving LLM Alignment
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training for large language models (LLMs) follows a efficient paradigm of "rollout then update", which inevitably results in off-policy training data. To resolve this, Importance sampling (IS) is proposed, while the token-level ratios compound over long sequences, causing severe variance exploded. A natural idea is "transferring" these off-policy token into on-policy token, so that the importance scores for correction are unnecessary. Following this idea, we propose Selective Importance Sampling (SIS), which is inspired by rejection sampling. Concretely, SIS implements by viewing off-policy model as proposal distribution, and implement a token-level rejection test: accepted tokens are viewed as on-policy, so that receive unit importance score, while rejected tokens retain the standard IS correction. Our proposed SIS is theoretically proved reducing the gap between token-level and sequence-level off-policy gradient estimators. The SIS acts as a plug-in that only modifies the importance ratio in the policy loss, adding negligible wall-clock overhead, and can be combine with a vast vary of RL post-training algorithms. Experiments on dense and MoE LLMs across math and agent benchmarks show that SIS consistently improves all objectives, while providing substantially stronger robustness under off-policy data.

AI.tldr: 提出选择性重要性采样(SIS)，通过拒绝采样将离策略token转化为在策略token，减少重要性比率的方差，提升LLM强化学习后训练的效果和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: RL后训练中"rollout then update"范式导致离策略数据，而传统重要性采样(IS)的token级比率在长序列中累积导致方差爆炸。
AI.method: 受拒绝采样启发，将离策略模型视为提议分布，实施token级拒绝测试：接受token视为在策略（单位重要性分数），拒绝token保留标准IS校正。理论上证明减少了token级与序列级离策略梯度估计器之间的差距。
AI.result: 在密集和MoE LLM上，覆盖数学和agent基准测试的实验表明，SIS持续改善所有目标，并在离策略数据下提供更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SIS作为即插即用模块，仅修改策略损失中的重要性比率，增加极小的墙钟时间开销，可广泛应用于各种RL后训练算法。

title: AgentGym2: Benchmarking Large Language Model Agents in De-Idealized Real-World Environments
comment: Accepted as a main conference paper at ACL 2026
summary: Language agents, i.e., LLM agents, progress rapidly and are increasingly deployed in production environments. This trend underscores the urgent need for rigorous and realistic evaluations. However, most existing benchmarks evaluate agents in simplified, idealized settings. They typically rely on pre-packaged tool interfaces, overlook critical steps, and assume inputs are clean and fully specified. Consequently, they understate the difficulty of real deployments, where uncertainty and noise are ubiquitous and agents must proactively explore the environment to uncover new tools. To bridge this gap, we present AgentGym2, a new evaluation framework with task instances grounded in real-world end-to-end working demands. Beyond reasoning and planning, it measures agents' ability to execute end-to-end procedures, discover tools via exploration, compose tools for unseen tasks, and remain robust to noisy and underspecified information. Experiments on 15 proprietary and open-source models show that even SOTA systems like Gemini and GPT-5 struggle on AgentGym2, revealing a substantial gap between the capability of current agents and the demands of real-world applications.

AI.tldr: AgentGym2是一个评估框架，测试LLM智能体在真实、噪声环境中的端到端任务执行、工具发现与组合能力，实验表明即使是GPT-5等SOTA模型也表现不佳，显示出当前智能体与现实需求之间存在巨大差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试在简化、理想化环境中评估智能体，依赖预打包工具接口、忽略关键步骤、假设输入干净完整，低估了真实部署中的难度（不确定性、噪声、需主动探索环境发现新工具），因此需要更贴近实际的评估框架。
AI.method: 构建AgentGym2评估框架，包含基于真实世界端到端工作需求的任务实例，衡量智能体在四个维度的能力：执行端到端流程、通过探索发现工具、组合工具完成未见任务、对噪声和模糊信息的鲁棒性。在15个专有和开源模型上进行实验。
AI.result: 即使是Gemini和GPT-5等SOTA模型在AgentGym2上也表现挣扎，揭示了当前智能体能力与现实应用需求之间的实质性差距。
AI.conclusion: 当前语言智能体在真实、噪声环境下的端到端任务执行能力仍远未达到实际部署要求，AgentGym2为衡量这一差距提供了更贴近现实的评估工具。

title: MambaLIE: Scene Light Intensity-Boosted Low-Light Image Enhancement with State Space Model
summary:
Images captured by consumer electronic devices, such as mobile phones and digital cameras, often suffer from low-light degradation due to sensor limitations and imaging pipelines, which degrades visual quality and affects downstream vision tasks.
  Existing methods based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Transformers have dominated current low-light image enhancement (LIE) due to their excellent ability to model hierarchical features.
  However, CNNs operate in local receptive fields that cannot model long-range dependencies, while Transformers overcome this problem but incur substantial computational costs.
  To address these challenges, we propose MambaLIE, a Scene Light Intensity-Boosted Low-Light Image Enhancement method based on a State Space Model (SSM).
  We first introduce scene light intensity to improve the structural distribution of illumination, which is then gated with the low-light input to guide enhancement.
  To better model the illumination while maintaining computational efficiency, we propose the Locally Enhanced State Space Model (LESSM) for efficient light enhancement.
  Our LESSM contains two branches: an SSM branch and a Local Enhanced branch, where the former is used to model the long-range dependencies with linear time complexity, while the latter is used to enhance local feature representations.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate that MambaLIE outperforms state-of-the-art CNN-based and Transformer-based LIE methods on four widely used synthetic benchmarks and five publicly available real-world benchmarks in terms of accuracy, speed, and model size, making it suitable for practical deployment on resource-constrained devices.

AI.tldr: 提出MambaLIE，一种基于状态空间模型（SSM）的低光照图像增强方法，通过引入场景光强度和局部增强状态空间模型（LESSM），在准确性、速度和模型大小上优于现有CNN和Transformer方法，适合资源受限设备部署。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN方法无法建模长距离依赖，Transformer虽能解决但计算成本高，因此需要一种既能建模长距离依赖又保持计算高效的低光照图像增强方法。
AI.method: 提出MambaLIE，引入场景光强度改善光照结构分布，并与低光照输入进行门控引导增强；提出局部增强状态空间模型（LESSM），包含SSM分支（线性时间复杂度建模长距离依赖）和局部增强分支（增强局部特征表示）。
AI.result: 在四个合成基准和五个真实世界基准上，MambaLIE在准确性、速度和模型大小方面均优于现有SOTA的CNN和Transformer方法。
AI.conclusion: MambaLIE兼顾了长距离依赖建模能力和计算效率，适合在资源受限设备上实际部署。

title: Correctness, confidence, and context: Framing software assurance in the AI age
comment: 9 pages, 11 figures, text for invited keynote at FSE 2026 in Montreal
summary:
Software engineering has a complicated relationship with "correctness". We recognize the challenges of full formal rigor as well as many required properties beyond functional correctness. Although we satisfice in practice, we are still stuck in the mindset that we could reason our way to correctness, if only we had enough information.
  Generative AI has introduced a new dimension to assurances: its foundation is statistical rather than formal. Traditional software engineering establishes confidence through rigorous reasoning, domain knowledge and expert judgment. In contrast, generative AI's results are sophisticated predictions, in Valiant's words "probably approximately correct". This inherently limits assurances about the results are to probabilistic assertions. Further, the nuances and implicit associations that guide human judgment are not accessible to its training sets, so that tacit knowledge cannot be incorporated in its models.
  We have many approaches for developing assurances that a software system does what it's expected to do, though most of them focus on the specification of the code rather than the requirements for the system, let alone fitness for purpose. We have failed to develop a systematic understanding of the relative merits of the various approaches. I hope that generative AI will finally force us to tackle this.
  To that end, I will challenge us to think systematically about our assurance techniques. We need ways to make informed, reasoned choices about cost-effective combinations of approaches to devel-oping confidence in our systems.
  We call ourselves software engineers. Let's act like engineers.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了生成式AI（统计基础）与传统软件工程（形式化推理）在正确性保证上的根本差异，指出AI只能提供"概率近似正确"的保证，无法融入隐性知识。作者呼吁软件工程界系统性地思考不同保证技术的相对优劣，以做出成本效益合理的组合选择。
AI.motivation: 传统软件工程执着于形式化推理达至正确性的思维模式，与生成式AI基于统计的"概率近似正确"保证之间存在根本张力。现有保证方法多聚焦于代码规范而非系统需求或适用性，且缺乏对各种方法相对优劣的系统性理解。作者希望生成式AI能迫使业界正视这一问题。
AI.method: 本文并非提出具体技术方法，而是以批判性视角对比传统软件工程（形式化推理、领域知识、专家判断）与生成式AI（统计预测、PAC学习）的保证范式差异，并呼吁建立系统性的保证技术评估框架。
AI.result: 指出生成式AI的保证本质上是概率性的，其训练集无法获取人类隐性知识中的微妙关联和隐含假设，因此无法将隐性知识融入模型。现有保证方法大多只关注代码规范而非系统需求或适用性。
AI.conclusion: 我们需要发展系统性的方法来理解不同保证技术的相对优势，以便在构建系统信心时做出明智的、基于推理的成本效益组合选择。作者呼吁软件工程师真正像工程师一样行事。

title: LP-SFT: Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning via Multimodal Entropy Structure
comment: 21 pages, 3 figures. Code is available at https://github.com/Wakaka161/LP-SFT
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is the standard approach for adapting pretrained language models to downstream domains, yet it often improves target-domain behavior at the cost of degrading pre-existing capabilities. Standard cross-entropy fine-tuning promotes only the observed label token and leaves unconstrained how probability mass is redistributed over other plausible alternatives, potentially distorting the rich local preference structure learned during pretraining. We first analyze next-token predictions using Shannon and Renyi entropies, revealing that pretrained models exhibit a regular multimodal entropy structure. These entropy peaks correspond to varying numbers of plausible alternatives, indicating that the base model intrinsically encodes rich distributional knowledge beyond the single supervised token. Motivated by this observation, we propose LP-SFT, a Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning objective designed to explicitly protect this inherent entropy structure. At each step, LP-SFT constructs an adaptive support of alternative tokens and applies a locally normalized preservation loss to maintain the base model's relative structure among them, while standard cross-entropy independently optimizes the supervised token. Across mixed-domain and single-domain fine-tuning experiments, LP-SFT improves overall performance over vanilla SFT and recent SFT-enhancement baselines, achieving the best balance between pass@1 accuracy and pass@k performance. These results suggest that local preservation helps mitigate capability degradation without collapsing sampling-accessible diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LP-SFT，一种在微调过程中通过局部归一化保持预训练语言模型熵结构的损失函数，在不牺牲采样多样性的前提下缓解了能力退化问题。
AI.motivation: 标准SFT仅优化标注token，破坏了预训练模型学到的丰富分布知识（表现为多模态熵结构），导致目标域能力提升但原有能力下降。
AI.method: 先分析预训练模型的Shannon和Renyi熵结构，发现其呈现规律性的多模态分布；然后在每个时间步构建自适应候选token集合，通过局部归一化的保持损失维持基础模型在该集合中的相对结构，同时用交叉熵优化监督token。
AI.result: 在混合域和单域微调实验中，LP-SFT在pass@1准确率和pass@k性能之间取得了最佳平衡，优于标准SFT和近期SFT增强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 局部保持策略能够有效缓解微调中的能力退化问题，同时不破坏模型采样时可获得的多样性。

title: CP-WSP: A Declarative CP-SAT Framework for Configurable Multi-Constraint Workforce Scheduling
summary: Workforce scheduling is an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem requiring simultaneous satisfaction of labor regulations, coverage requirements, employee preferences and operational objectives. Existing CP formulations typically model simplified instances with 6-12 constraints at shift-level granularity and critically lack explicit support for: mandatory break scheduling with midpoint placement control; acuity weighted workload equity; sub-shift temporal granularity enabling demand-driven staffing; inter-week schedule stability; and cross-midnight shift patterns common in 24-hour operations. This paper presents CP-WSP: a declarative CP-SAT framework enforcing 14 hard constraints as mathematically inviolable requirements (zero regulatory violations by construction) while optimizing 15 soft objectives through a unified weighted penalty function -- all configurable via a JSON specification with no code changes required. Key contributions include: a shift-window variable decomposition enabling mandatory break scheduling with centrality control; acuity-weighted workload equity; multi-granularity temporal resolution from 30 minutes to 2 hours; inter-week schedule stability; a grid-offset preprocessing technique for cross-midnight shifts; and a reproducible 36-configuration benchmark suite for community comparison. Evaluated on INRC-II benchmarks at both hourly and shift-level granularity and on 36 synthetic configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CP-WSP，一个基于CP-SAT的声明式排班框架，支持14个硬约束和15个软目标，通过JSON配置无需改代码，包含强制休息排班、加权工作量公平、多粒度时间分辨率、周间稳定性、跨午夜班次等关键特性，在INRC-II基准测试和36个合成配置上进行了评估。
AI.motivation: 现有CP排班模型仅处理6-12个约束且粒度粗糙，缺乏对强制休息排班（含中点位置控制）、加权工作量公平、子班次时间粒度、周间稳定性及跨午夜班次等实际需求的显式支持。
AI.method: 提出CP-WSP框架，采用CP-SAT求解器，以14个硬约束（零违规）+15个软目标（加权罚函数）建模，通过shift-window变量分解、网格偏移预处理等技术实现，全部配置通过JSON完成。
AI.result: 在INRC-II基准测试（小时级和班次级粒度）及36个合成配置上进行了评估，验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CP-WSP提供了一个高度灵活、可配置、零代码修改的排班解决方案，填补了现有CP模型在关键实际需求上的空白，并提供了可复现的基准测试套件。

title: $C^3$ASD: Multi-Level Consistency-Driven Representation Learning
summary: Active Speaker Detection determines whether a visible person in a video is speaking at each moment. While recent audio-visual fusion methods perform well on clean data, they degrade under real-world corruptions such as background noise, occlusion, or simultaneous modality degradation. We attribute this limitation to the absence of explicit consistency constraints that promote robust, semantically aligned representations across modalities. Without such guidance, models tend to learn fragile modality-specific shortcuts that fail under corrupted conditions. We propose $C^3$ASD, a multi-level consistency-driven framework with three complementary constraints: embedding-level inter-modality consistency aligns audio-visual representations during speech; sequence-level intra-modality consistency separates speaking and non-speaking clusters via track-aware contrastive learning; and prediction-level consistency stabilizes fusion through knowledge distillation. Extensive experiments demonstrate significant improvements under diverse audio, visual and joint corruptions, while maintaining competitive performance on clean data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出C³ASD框架，通过多层级一致性约束（嵌入级、序列级、预测级）增强主动说话人检测在真实世界噪声环境下的鲁棒性，在多种音视频损坏条件下表现显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有音视频融合方法在干净数据上表现良好，但在真实世界的噪声、遮挡等损坏条件下性能严重下降，原因是缺乏显式的一致性约束来促进跨模态鲁棒语义对齐，模型容易学习脆弱的模态特定捷径。
AI.method: 提出C³ASD框架，包含三种互补约束：1) 嵌入级跨模态一致性：对齐说话时的音视频表示；2) 序列级模态内一致性：通过轨迹感知对比学习分离说话与非说话聚类；3) 预测级一致性：通过知识蒸馏稳定融合结果。
AI.result: 在多种音频、视觉及联合损坏条件下展现出显著性能提升，同时在干净数据上保持具有竞争力的表现。
AI.conclusion: 多层级一致性约束是提升主动说话人检测在损坏条件下鲁棒性的有效策略，为实际部署提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: AI Agent Pull Requests on GitHub: Frequency, Structure, and Merge Conflict Rates
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Replication package: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21186464
summary: AI coding agents can create and submit pull requests (PRs) to a common repository at the same time; however, there is little research on the frequency of such concurrent submissions or the cost associated with them. In this study, we use the AIDev-pop dataset (33,596 PRs across 2,807 repositories) to perform the first large-scale empirical analysis of concurrency among agent-authored PRs. We find that under exact temporal overlap, 40.2% of repositories have co-active agent-authored PR pairs, and these co-active pairs account for 79.4% of all PRs submitted by an AI agent. When examining co-activity within a conventional one-week collaboration period, these percentages increase to 53.4% and 95.0%, respectively. For the vast majority of co-active PR pairs, both PRs were authored by the same agent (intra-agent), whereas only 0.5% of co-active pairs were cross-agent, and these were located in only 122 of the 2,807 total repositories examined (approximately 4.3%). Furthermore, we replayed actual three-way git merge operations on 747 unique co-active pairs (one per repository) to determine the rate of textual conflict when merging the two PRs in each pair. We found that the rate of textual conflict was significantly greater for cross-agent pairs than for intra-agent pairs: 41.7% versus 19.8%, respectively, with non-overlapping 95% confidence intervals. Finally, we developed a classification system based upon the output of git's conflict detection, and determined that the majority of conflicts result from changes to source code files (84.4% of conflicted files) rather than dependency manifest files, and that nearly 42% of the conflicts we observed were structural (modify/delete or add/add). Because these metrics capture only the textual layer, they represent a conservative lower bound on the cost associated with uncoordinated AI teammates working together.

AI.tldr: 本文首次大规模实证分析AI编码智能体并发提交PR的现象，发现40.2%的仓库存在时间重叠的共活跃PR对（占所有AI提交PR的79.4%），且绝大部分为同一智能体提交；跨智能体PR对仅占0.5%，但文本冲突率显著更高（41.7% vs 19.8%），冲突主要源于源代码文件修改。
AI.motivation: AI编码智能体可同时向同一仓库提交PR，但关于此类并发提交的频率及其代价（如合并冲突）的研究尚属空白。
AI.method: 基于AIDev-pop数据集（33,596个PR，2,807个仓库），分析精确时间重叠和一周协作窗口下的共活跃率；对747个唯一共活跃PR对回放实际三方git合并操作，测量文本冲突率；基于git冲突检测输出构建分类系统。
AI.result: 精确时间重叠下40.2%仓库有共活跃PR对（占所有AI PR的79.4%）；一周窗口下增至53.4%和95.0%；跨智能体PR对仅0.5%（122个仓库），但冲突率41.7%显著高于同智能体19.8%；84.4%冲突源于源代码文件，42%为结构性冲突。
AI.conclusion: 未协调的AI智能体协作存在显著代价，且当前数据仅反映文本层面，实际成本可能更高。

title: Evaluating the Effect of Linguistic Relatedness on Cross-Lingual Transfer in Large Multilingual Automatic Speech Recognition
summary: Extending automatic speech recognition (ASR) to low-resource African languages is constrained by the prohibitive demands of data collection at scale. A promising direction is to leverage linguistic relatedness to enhance cross-lingual transfer from a related auxiliary language to the low-resource target by sequentially adapting on both. Although this strategy has shown meaningful improvements in small ASR models, its effectiveness in large ASR remains unclear. We extend this framework to large multilingual ASR through a systematic controlled experimental design spanning six factors, two Africa-centric corpora, and four large ASR models, isolating whether linguistic relatedness reliably predicts cross-lingual transfer gains in this setting. Across all conditions, pre-adaptation on related auxiliary languages yields no practically meaningful transfer improvements given minimal target-language data, suggesting that linguistic relatedness alone may not reliably predict cross-lingual transfer gains in large multilingual ASR, or constitute an effective strategy for extending such models to low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统检验了在大规模多语言语音识别模型中，利用语言亲缘关系进行跨语言迁移的策略是否有效。结果表明，在仅使用少量目标语言数据的情况下，在亲缘语言上预适应并未带来有实际意义的迁移增益，说明语言亲缘关系本身可能无法可靠预测或作为扩展大模型到低资源语言的有效策略。
AI.motivation: 将自动语音识别扩展到低资源非洲语言面临数据收集成本高昂的挑战。利用语言亲缘关系进行跨语言迁移（先在亲缘辅助语言上适应，再在低资源目标语言上适应）在小规模ASR模型中已显示改进，但其在大规模ASR中的有效性尚不清楚，因此需要系统验证。
AI.method: 采用系统受控实验设计，涵盖六个因素、两个非洲语言语料库和四个大型ASR模型，严格控制实验条件，隔离测试语言亲缘关系是否能可靠预测跨语言迁移收益。
AI.result: 在所有实验条件下，在亲缘辅助语言上预适应后，在仅有少量目标语言数据时，未产生有实际意义的迁移提升。
AI.conclusion: 语言亲缘关系本身在大规模多语言ASR中可能无法可靠预测跨语言迁移增益，也并非将此类模型扩展到低资源语言的有效策略。

title: Rethinking On-Policy Self-Distillation for Thinking Models
summary: Self-distillation is a promising recipe for self-improvement in language models. In this setting, a model can serve as its own teacher when given privileged information, such as a solution to a math problem. This seems especially appealing for thinking models, which can use test-time reasoning to absorb the privileged information. Surprisingly, we show that privileged self-distillation degrades thinking models on long reasoning traces: across five Qwen3 and OLMo thinking models evaluated on AIME24, AIME25, and HMMT25, privileged-context distillation causes a relative drop of up to 17% in avg@16 accuracy. The degradation scales with the amount of privileged context withheld from the student and is most pronounced at long rollout budgets, where thinking models otherwise obtain their largest gains. This failure mode is not specific to self-distillation: on-policy distillation (OPD) improves thinking models, but privileged OPD reverses these gains. Our diagnostics link this failure mode to how privileged teacher context reshapes learning at high-entropy forking positions, where multiple continuations remain plausible and may lead to different reasoning paths. Privileged context lowers fork rates in thinking-model rollouts but not in instruction-model rollouts. This leads to an interesting dichotomy, where privileged context can help instruction-tuned models but hurts stronger thinking models. The effect is visible when the student begins a self-correction branch, where privileged OPD penalizes sampled reconsideration tokens that vanilla OPD supports. Thinking models trained with a privileged teacher produce fewer verification, backtracking, and hedging markers, even after length normalization. These findings indicate that self-distillation for strong thinking models requires attention to token-level signal, especially around correction and reasoning steps.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在思维模型（thinking models）上使用特权自蒸馏（privileged self-distillation）会显著降低长推理链的性能，最高导致AIME等数学竞赛题上avg@16准确率下降17%。特权上下文会减少模型在推理岔路口的验证、回溯和修正行为，损害思维模型的自我改进能力。
AI.motivation: 自蒸馏被认为是语言模型自我改进的有效方法，特别是思维模型可以利用测试时推理吸收特权信息。作者想探究这种特权自蒸馏是否真的能提升思维模型的长链推理能力。
AI.method: 在Qwen3和OLMo两类思维模型上，对比特权自蒸馏与无特权蒸馏的效果，在AIME24/25和HMMT25基准上评测avg@16准确率。通过分析推理岔路口的token分布、回溯/验证标记频率等诊断退化机制。
AI.result: 特权自蒸馏导致思维模型准确率下降高达17%，且退化程度与特权信息隐藏量正相关。特权上下文降低了思维模型的岔路分支率，减少了验证、回溯和修正标记的产生。但特权上下文对指令模型反而有益，形成有趣的分化。
AI.conclusion: 特权自蒸馏对强思维模型有害，因为特权上下文会抑制推理过程中的自我修正行为。思维模型的自蒸馏需要关注token级别的信号，特别是修正和推理步骤。

title: OmniDS: Dual-Stream Context Fusion for Omnidirectional Depth from Fisheye Cameras
summary: Omnidirectional depth estimation from multi-fisheye camera rigs is complicated by visibility conflicts: wide baselines cause different cameras to observe different portions, or even different faces, of the same object, so aggregating their features into a unified equirectangular (ERP) representation under fixed projection produces ambiguous matching evidence near occlusion boundaries and thin structures. Although existing methods mitigate this by down-weighting unreliable views, they do not resolve the underlying discrepancy because context formation and cross-view fusion remain tied to rigid fisheye-to-ERP sampling. We present OmniDS, an iterative depth refinement framework that replaces rigid aggregation by combining dynamic context fusion with consensus-aware multi-view similarity. A dual-stream encoder pairs a lightweight CNN for geometric detail with a frozen DINOv3 for semantic priors; their features are reprojected into ERP space at each refinement step via learned view weighting and deformable cross-attention with geometric distortion bias. In parallel, a multi-view consensus volume captures global cross-camera agreement through group-wise correlation and feature variance, regularized by a 3D U-Net. For efficient deployment, we distill the dual-stream representation into a single MobileNet-based encoder. OmniDS achieves state-of-the-art performance on the OmniThings, OmniHouse, and Sunny benchmarks while maintaining competitive inference speed. Project page and codes are available at https://parkchaesong.github.io/omnids.

AI.tldr: OmniDS提出一种迭代深度细化框架，通过动态上下文融合和共识感知多视角相似度，替代传统刚性聚合，解决多鱼眼相机深度估计中的可见性冲突问题，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 多鱼眼相机系统的全景深度估计面临可见性冲突：宽基线导致不同相机观测到同一物体的不同部分甚至不同面，将特征聚合到固定ERP表示会产生歧义匹配证据，尤其在遮挡边界和薄结构附近。现有方法仅通过降低不可靠视图权重来缓解，但未解决底层不一致性。
AI.method: 提出OmniDS，包含：(1) 双流编码器（轻量CNN几何细节 + 冻结DINOv3语义先验）；(2) 动态上下文融合：通过学习的视图权重和带几何畸变偏置的可变形交叉注意力，将特征重投影到ERP空间；(3) 共识感知多视角相似度：通过组别相关性和特征方差构建多视角共识体，并用3D U-Net正则化；(4) 知识蒸馏：将双流表示蒸馏到单MobileNet编码器以实现高效部署。
AI.result: 在OmniThings、OmniHouse和Sunny基准上达到SOTA性能，同时保持有竞争力的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 动态融合与共识感知相结合能有效解决多鱼眼相机深度估计中的可见性冲突问题，且可通过蒸馏实现高效部署。

title: Dashboard2Code: Evaluating Multimodal Models on Reconstructing Interactive Dashboards
summary: Automatic data visualization generation has advanced rapidly with multi-modal large language models, yet existing efforts largely focus on static charts and overlook the interactive dashboards commonly used for real-world data exploration. We introduce Dashboard2Code, a novel task that requires a model to proactively explore an interactive dashboard, acquire and integrate feedback from its own interactions (e.g., clicking and filtering), and generate code that reproduces the target dashboard. To support comprehensive evaluation, we present DashboardMimic, the first Plotly+Dash benchmark for Dashboard2Code, comprising 180 carefully designed and manually verified dashboard-code pairs spanning three difficulty levels and covering eight common real-world interaction patterns. We further propose an automated evaluation framework tailored to dashboards that combines code semantic analysis with dynamic interaction-based testing to assess visual and interaction consistency, showing strong agreement with human judgments. Experiments across a range of open- and closed-source multi-modal models reveal that even the strongest systems struggle on high-complexity dashboards and that a substantial performance gap remains between open-source and closed-source models on the Dashboard2Code task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dashboard2Code任务，要求多模态大模型主动探索交互式仪表盘、从自身交互中获取反馈并生成复现代码，同时构建了包含180个仪表盘-代码对的DashboardMimic基准和自动化评估框架，实验表明现有模型在高复杂度仪表盘上表现困难，开源与闭源模型间存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有自动数据可视化生成研究多聚焦于静态图表，忽略了实际数据分析中广泛使用的交互式仪表盘。
AI.method: 提出Dashboard2Code任务，要求模型主动探索交互式仪表盘、从自身交互（点击、筛选等）中获取并整合反馈，生成复现代码；构建DashboardMimic基准（180个Plotly+Dash仪表盘-代码对，分三个难度等级，覆盖八种交互模式）；设计自动化评估框架，结合代码语义分析与动态交互测试。
AI.result: 在多种开源和闭源多模态模型上实验，发现即使最强模型在高复杂度仪表盘上仍表现困难，开源与闭源模型在Dashboard2Code任务上存在显著性能差距。
AI.conclusion: Dashboard2Code作为新任务揭示了现有模型在交互式仪表盘生成上的不足，DashboardMimic基准和自动化评估框架为未来研究提供了标准化的评测平台。

title: Semantic Homogenization in Italian Popular Music: A Diachronic Analysis
summary: In recent years, studies have revealed a decline in semantic variety across popular music lyrics, particularly in English-language songs on streaming platforms like Spotify. This research examines whether a similar trend can be observed in a different linguistic and cultural context: the lyrics of all finalist songs from the 75 editions of the Sanremo Music Festival, Italy's most renowned music competition. What sets this work apart is the development of a flexible and efficient methodology for tracking changes in semantic similarity over time, which can be applied to different datasets to study similar phenomena. Drawing on a combination of full-text, segment-based, topic-based, and word-level analyses, the approach leverages both embedding techniques and large language models. When applied to the Sanremo corpus, this framework reveals a gradual move toward increasing semantic uniformity, echoing the global patterns identified in previous studies. These findings underscore the value of natural language processing tools in uncovering long-term shifts in musical language and cultural expression.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了圣雷莫音乐节75届决赛歌曲的歌词，发现语义多样性呈下降趋势，与全球流行音乐趋势一致，并开发了可迁移的语义相似度分析方法。
AI.motivation: 以往研究主要关注英语流行歌词的语义多样性下降，本文想探究非英语文化背景下是否也存在类似趋势。
AI.method: 结合全文级、段落级、主题级和词级分析，利用嵌入技术和大语言模型，构建了一套灵活高效的语义相似度变化追踪方法。
AI.result: 圣雷莫音乐节歌词语料库呈现出逐渐走向语义统一化的趋势，与全球流行音乐模式的发现一致。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言处理工具在揭示音乐语言和文化表达的长期变迁方面具有重要价值，且该分析框架可迁移应用于不同数据集。

title: ClassicLogic: A Knowledge-Driven Benchmark of Classic Puzzle Games for Evaluating Compositional Generalization
summary: Compositional generalization, the ability to understand and produce novel combinations of known components, remains a fundamental challenge for modern artificial intelligence. While few benchmarks exist, many focus on linguistic tasks and lack complex, explicit compositional structures. We introduce ClassicLogic, a new benchmark suite designed to evaluate an agent's ability to learn and compose problem-solving strategies. The benchmark consists of four classic logic puzzles: Sudoku, KenKen, Kakuro, and Futoshiki. Its core innovation is a hierarchical, explicit knowledge base for each game, where complex solving strategies are formally defined as compositions of simpler, foundational strategies. This structure allows for fine-grained evaluation of an agent's reasoning capabilities, from learning basic rules to applying multi-step compositional strategies to solve puzzles of increasing, mathematically validated difficulty. The open-source benchmark provides a challenging new testbed for advancing neuro-symbolic and other advanced AI reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClassicLogic基准测试套件，通过四个经典逻辑谜题（数独、KenKen、数墙、不等式）的层级化显式知识库，系统评估AI的 compositional generalization 能力，从基础规则学习到多步组合策略推理。
AI.motivation: 现有组合泛化基准多聚焦于语言任务，缺乏复杂且显式的组合结构，难以深入评估智能体的组合推理能力。
AI.method: 构建四个经典逻辑谜题的层级化显式知识库，将复杂求解策略形式化定义为简单基础策略的组合，并支持数学验证的难度递增。
AI.result: 提出了一个开源、难度可控、支持细粒度评估的基准测试套件，可检验从基础规则学习到多步组合策略推理的全链路能力。
AI.conclusion: ClassicLogic为神经符号推理等高级AI系统提供了具有挑战性的新测试平台，有助于推动组合泛化能力的研究。

title: Natural Language Camera Movement Understanding
summary: Understanding camera movement in natural language is critical for training and evaluating video generation models, among other applications. However, we demonstrate that existing vision-language models (VLMs) fail this task in surprising ways, frequently confusing translation with rotation, left with right, and object movement with camera movement. To address these limitations, we establish natural language camera movement understanding as a standalone research task. We introduce a two-level cinematographic taxonomy and an extensive, atomic benchmark featuring both real and synthetic videos. Furthermore, we curate a large-scale, multi-source training set enhanced by targeted camera movement augmentation. Our fine-tuned VLM-8B outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro by 10% and 11% on our benchmark's real and synthetic videos, respectively. Despite these gains, a significant gap remains relative to human performance, underscoring the need to promote and facilitate future research on natural language camera movement understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文发现现有视觉语言模型(VLM)在理解自然语言描述的摄像机运动方面表现不佳，经常混淆平移与旋转、左右方向、物体运动与摄像机运动。为此，作者将自然语言摄像机运动理解确立为一个独立研究任务，提出了两级电影摄影分类法和包含真实与合成视频的原子化基准，并通过大规模多源训练集和针对性数据增强微调VLM-8B，使其在基准上超越Gemini 3.1 Pro 10%和11%，但距人类表现仍有显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在理解自然语言描述的摄像机运动时表现糟糕，频繁出现混淆平移与旋转、左右方向、物体运动与摄像机运动等基本错误，而这一能力对视频生成模型的训练与评估至关重要，有必要将其确立为独立研究任务。
AI.method: (1) 提出两级电影摄影分类法；(2) 构建包含真实和合成视频的原子化基准数据集；(3) 收集大规模多源训练集并引入针对性摄像机运动数据增强；(4) 基于以上数据微调VLM-8B模型。
AI.result: 微调的VLM-8B在真实视频和合成视频上分别比Gemini 3.1 Pro高出10%和11%，但相比人类表现仍有显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言摄像机运动理解仍是一个远未解决的任务，现有模型与人类表现之间存在明显鸿沟，需要更多未来研究来推动该领域发展。

title: Cam2Sim: Neural Scenario Reconstruction for Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving Simulation
comment: In proceedings of the 41st IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE '26) - Tools and Datasets track
summary: Simulation-based testing enables safe and repeatable evaluation of autonomous driving systems, but its effectiveness is limited by the gap between synthetic simulator outputs and real-world camera observations. To address this problem, we present Cam2Sim, a tool that transforms real-world driving recordings into playable CARLA simulation scenarios. Starting from camera images and poses, Cam2Sim reconstructs road geometry, ego trajectories, parked vehicles, and simulation assets, and augments the reconstructed environment with Gaussian Splatting to render camera observations that resemble the original recording. The framework supports ROS-based data extraction, parked-vehicle detection, OpenStreetMap-based map generation, CARLA scenario construction, Gaussian Splatting training, trajectory replay, and closed-loop execution with a system under test. We validate Cam2Sim on a real-world urban-driving scenario with a camera-based end-to-end driving model, comparing reconstruction quality, image-generation quality, and closed-loop behavior against both a simulation-only baseline and the real-world target. Results show that Gaussian-Splatting-based rendering reduces the visual gap with respect to standard simulator rendering and improves behavioral similarity to the real-world reference runs. The artifact is publicly available at https: //github.com/ast-fortiss-tum/cam2sim, and a screencast showing the tool is available at https://youtu.be/KmZ74l1__lI

AI.tldr: Cam2Sim 是一个将真实世界驾驶记录转化为CARLA仿真场景的工具，利用高斯泼溅渲染缩小仿真与现实之间的视觉差距，提升自动驾驶系统闭环测试的逼真度。
AI.motivation: 基于仿真的自动驾驶测试受限于合成输出与真实摄像头观测之间的差距（sim-to-real gap），现有方法难以在保持可重复性的同时还原真实驾驶场景的视觉细节。
AI.method: 从真实摄像头图像和位姿出发，重建道路几何、自车轨迹、停放车辆等仿真资产，并用高斯泼溅（Gaussian Splatting）增强渲染，支持ROS数据提取、车辆检测、OSM地图生成、CARLA场景构建、轨迹回放及闭环执行。
AI.result: 在真实城市驾驶场景中，相比纯仿真基线，高斯泼溅渲染显著缩小了视觉差异，并使闭环行为更接近真实世界参考轨迹。
AI.conclusion: Cam2Sim有效弥合了仿真与现实之间的视觉鸿沟，为基于仿真的自动驾驶测试提供了更逼真的环境重建方法，工具已开源。

title: Evaluating Large Language Models for Antisemitic Incident Classification
comment: Accepted to Digital Hate Review 2026 Issue 1
summary: Addressing hate and violence in society requires timely detection of hateful events from public reporting, but automated identification of hateful events remains underexplored. We introduce the task of hateful event detection and investigate the ability of AI systems, specifically large language models (LLMs), to discover and classify reports of antisemitic events with fine-grained labels. We evaluate OpenAI's GPT-4o and Meta's Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct on multiple expert-annotated datasets containing antisemitic event descriptions from news articles, civil society reports, and official records. We show that LLMs, particularly GPT-4o, have potential for this task, but substantial improvement is needed. Providing clear term definitions and in-context examples in prompts can improve performance: definitions are most helpful for rhetoric-oriented events (e.g. classical antisemitic tropes), while examples help label action-oriented events (e.g. physical assault). A case study of college newspapers demonstrates that LLMs can help surface relevant real-world events, supporting early monitoring and intervention. Overall, our findings highlight both opportunities and critical gaps in AI's ability to recognize complex harms and underscore the need for collaborative efforts among AI developers, policymakers, and civil society to design models, implement robust evaluation, and develop policy frameworks for defining and combating hate efficiently and effectively.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了利用大语言模型（LLMs）自动检测和分类反犹仇恨事件的任务。研究发现GPT-4o在该任务上表现优于Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct，但仍需显著改进；提供定义和上下文示例能提升性能，其中定义对修辞类事件帮助更大，示例对行动类事件更有效。论文通过大学校报案例研究展示了LLMs在早期监测中的潜力，同时指出了AI识别复杂伤害方面的关键差距。
AI.motivation: 当前社会亟需从公共报道中及时检测仇恨事件，但自动化仇恨事件识别研究尚不充分。本文旨在探索AI系统（特别是大语言模型）发现和分类反犹事件报告的能力，以填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 论文定义了仇恨事件检测任务，使用多个专家标注的数据集（包含新闻文章、民间社会报告和官方记录中的反犹事件描述），评估了OpenAI的GPT-4o和Meta的Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct两个模型。通过提示工程（提供术语定义和上下文示例）测试了不同提示策略对性能的影响，并进行了大学校报案例研究。
AI.result: GPT-4o在该任务上表现优于Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct；提供定义对修辞类事件（如经典反犹陈规定型）提升最明显，而示例对行动类事件（如人身攻击）帮助更大；大学校报案例表明LLMs能有效发现相关真实世界事件。但总体而言，模型性能仍需大幅改进。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在仇恨事件自动检测方面具有潜力，但存在关键差距，尤其在识别复杂伤害方面。需要AI开发者、政策制定者和民间社会协作，共同改进模型设计、建立稳健评估体系和制定反仇恨政策框架。

title: Reason, Reward, Refine: Step-Level Errors Corrections with Structured Feedback for Physics Reasoning in Small Language Models
summary: Physics reasoning fails structurally in small language models: an error at any step propagates forward, corrupting every inference that follows. Limited domain knowledge, hallucination under multi-step derivation, and distributional sensitivity compound this failure. We propose a step-level reward framework that identifies the first reasoning error, generates targeted structured feedback, and trains the model to revise its solution via policy gradient with KL regularization, without exposing it to ground truth solutions as generation targets. Unlike annotation-dependent step-level methods, no preference data construction is required and the external verifier operates exclusively at training time. Across five physics benchmarks, our framework delivers accuracy gains of 17-20% over CoT prompting and 10-16% over the strongest baseline, reduces calculation errors from 56.9% to 23.5%, and reduces miscomprehension errors from 22.3% to 12.0% in the best observed cases. Conceptual errors reduce from 89.7% to 68.7%, yet persist as the hardest failure mode across all conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种步骤级奖励框架，通过识别首个推理错误并生成结构化反馈，在不暴露真实解的情况下，利用策略梯度和KL正则化训练模型修正解。在五个物理基准上，相比CoT提示提升17-20%准确率，将计算错误从56.9%降至23.5%，理解错误从22.3%降至12.0%。
AI.motivation: 小模型在物理推理中面临结构性失败——任何一步的错误都会级联传播，且受到领域知识有限、多步推导中的幻觉和分布敏感性等问题的叠加影响。
AI.method: 提出步骤级奖励框架，识别首个推理错误并生成结构化反馈，通过策略梯度+KL正则化训练模型修正解。无需构建偏好数据，外部验证器仅在训练时使用。
AI.result: 在五个物理基准上，准确率提升17-20%（优于CoT提示）和10-16%（优于最强基线）；计算错误从56.9%降至23.5%；理解错误从22.3%降至12.0%；概念错误从89.7%降至68.7%，但仍是最难解决的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效缓解了小模型在物理推理中的级联错误，计算和理解类错误显著下降，但概念性错误仍是核心挑战。

title: CURE: Controllable Unified Image Restoration for Complex Degradations
summary: The presence of composite degradations poses a significant challenge, since the underlying corruption factors exhibit complex and interdependent interactions. Even when the degradation types are known, accurately restoring the image remains difficult due to the intertwined nature of their effects and the need for selective control during the recovery process. To address this, we introduce CURE, a unified framework that enables controllable restoration in complex degradation settings by learning disentangled and adjustable representations. CURE is driven by four complementary objectives. First, an identity embedding is incorporated, along with a reconstruction constraint, to ensure that the model can reproduce the input image when restoration is unnecessary. Second, the ratio control mechanism blends the identity embedding with degradation-specific embeddings using user-regulated mixing ratios, allowing continuous control over restoration intensity. Third, an intermediate loss is applied to supervise stepwise outputs, each encouraged to tackle the removal of only a single degradation factor within a composite mixture. Finally, a permutation-invariant loss ensures that the model achieves consistent restoration quality regardless of the order in which multiple degradations are addressed. Since CURE modifies only the training strategy and not the underlying network architecture, it can be seamlessly integrated into existing controllable restoration models. Experiments demonstrate that CURE delivers state-of-the-art performance on composite degradation benchmarks, while enabling both selective and jointly fused restoration through flexible modulation of embedding ratios. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/bo-oseng/CURE.

AI.tldr: CURE是一个统一的框架，通过解耦和可调节的表征学习，实现对复合降解图像的可控恢复。它引入了四个互补目标：身份嵌入、比率控制机制、中间损失和置换不变损失，在不改变网络架构的情况下，实现选择性或联合融合的恢复，在复合降解基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 复合降解（多种退化因素交织存在）使得图像恢复极具挑战性。现有方法难以在复杂退化场景中实现可控、选择性的恢复，无法灵活调节对不同退化因素的去除强度。
AI.method: CURE提出四个互补目标：(1) 身份嵌入+重建约束，确保无需恢复时可重建原图；(2) 比率控制机制，通过用户调节的混合比率融合身份嵌入与特定降解嵌入，实现恢复强度的连续控制；(3) 中间损失，监督逐步输出，每一步仅去除一种降解因素；(4) 置换不变损失，确保不同降解处理顺序下恢复质量一致。该方法只修改训练策略，不改变网络架构。
AI.result: 在复合降解基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，能够通过灵活调节嵌入比率实现选择性和联合融合的恢复。
AI.conclusion: CURE提供了一种通用且有效的方案来解决复合降解下的可控图像恢复问题，具有良好的集成性和灵活性。

title: A Temporal Reasoning Benchmarking Framework for LRMs via Difficulty-controlled and Dynamic Test Generation
comment: Accepted to ISSTA 2026. 23 pages including references, 3 figures
summary:
Defining the reasoning boundaries and ensuring the reliability of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) remains a critical challenge. Current benchmarks primarily rely on static datasets susceptible to data contamination or synthetic tasks lacking fine-grained difficulty control. Furthermore, standard outcome-based evaluations often conceal reasoning flaws by neglecting the reasoning process.
  To address these limitations, we introduce TRACE, a testing framework that models temporal reasoning as constraint satisfaction problems via Allen's Interval Algebra. This approach enables precise regulation of logical complexity and incorporates a Trace-Based Verification Oracle to validate reasoning faithfulness. Using this framework, we construct TRACEBench, an extensive benchmark comprising 1,200 synthesized test instances across graded difficulty levels. We employ TRACE to evaluate eight widely used LRMs on TRACEBench. The results confirm a strong negative correlation between model performance and our difficulty metric (Pearson's r approximately -0.96), validating the effectiveness of our difficulty control mechanism. Moreover, our trace-based analysis exposes significant discrepancies between reasoning validity and final answers, revealing a high spurious guessing rate of approximately 28% in mid-sized models. In addition, we diagnose scale-dependent failure modes, ranging from Degenerative Loops in small models to Reasoning Explosion in advanced architectures. TRACE thus provides a robust, automated platform for benchmarking the true temporal reasoning capabilities of LRMs.

AI.tldr: 提出TRACE框架，通过Allen区间代数将时序推理建模为约束满足问题，构建了包含1200个实例的TRACEBench基准，发现模型性能与难度呈强负相关（r≈-0.96），并揭示约28%的虚假猜测率及不同规模模型的失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有基准依赖静态数据集易受污染、缺乏细粒度难度控制，且基于结果的评估忽略了推理过程，无法真实反映大型推理模型的时序推理能力与可靠性。
AI.method: 利用Allen区间代数将时序推理转化为约束满足问题，实现逻辑复杂度的精确调控；设计基于轨迹的验证预言机（Trace-Based Verification Oracle）来检验推理过程的忠实性；构建包含1200个合成测试实例、分级的TRACEBench基准。
AI.result: 模型性能与难度指标呈强负相关（Pearson r≈-0.96）；中等规模模型存在约28%的高虚假猜测率；发现了从退化循环（小模型）到推理爆炸（先进架构）的规模依赖失败模式。
AI.conclusion: TRACE提供了一个鲁棒、自动化的基准测试平台，能够有效评估LRMs的真实时序推理能力，并暴露结果正确但推理过程有缺陷的问题。

title: Ossetic-COT: Designing a morphologically annotated corpus and morphological analyzer for Ossetic
summary: In this work we present the first morphologically annotated corpus for Iron Ossetic that conforms to the Universal Dependencies schema. The corpus includes 5454 manually annotated sentences from the Iron Ossetic Corpus of Oral Texts, containing 74032 tokens. We use this corpus to train a BERT-based morphological analyzer. The analyzer achieves tag accuracy of 95.60%.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了首个符合Universal Dependencies标准的铁奥塞梯语形态标注语料库，包含5454句（74032个token），并基于此训练了BERT形态分析器，准确率达95.60%。
AI.motivation: 铁奥塞梯语缺乏符合Universal Dependencies标准的形态标注语料库，制约了该语言的NLP研究发展。
AI.method: 从Iron Ossetic Corpus of Oral Texts中人工标注了5454句（74032个token），构建符合Universal Dependencies schema的语料库，并基于该语料库训练BERT形态分析器。
AI.result: BERT形态分析器在标签准确率上达到95.60%。
AI.conclusion: 首次为铁奥塞梯语提供了符合Universal Dependencies标准的形态标注资源，并验证了BERT在该语言形态分析任务上的有效性。

title: EvoAgentBench: Benchmarking Agent Self-Evolution via Ability Transfer
summary: Agent self-evolution in long-horizon LLM systems is largely procedural: useful experience is not merely stored information, but reusable procedures for searching, debugging, and verification. Yet current evaluations do not isolate this form of transfer. Agent benchmarks test single-episode task solving; memory benchmarks target information retention rather than procedural reuse. We introduce EvoAgentBench, a benchmark for agent self-evolution via Ability-guided transfer across four agentic domains: web research, algorithmic reasoning, software engineering, and knowledge work. EvoAgentBench extracts trace-grounded Abilities from agent executions, canonicalizes them into operational units, and builds domain-specific Ability Graphs linking tasks that share procedural overlap. By design, every test task is backed by verified training-side Ability support. Across a 528/267 train/test split, two scaffolds, and three backbones, curated Ability content transfers reliably across model families, but no current automatic method sustains positive gain in all settings. EvoAgentBench shifts self-evolution evaluation from aggregate accuracy comparison to fine-grained diagnosis of experience encoding, routing, and uptake. The benchmark is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/EverMind-AI/EvoAgentBench.

AI.tldr: 提出EvoAgentBench基准，用于评估LLM智能体在长程任务中的自我进化能力（程序性经验迁移），而非传统的信息记忆或单轮任务求解。
AI.motivation: 现有评估无法隔离智能体将经验转化为可复用程序性知识（搜索、调试、验证）的能力，因此需要专门的基准来测量这种程序性迁移。
AI.method: 从智能体执行轨迹中提取"能力"（Ability），规范化为操作单元，构建跨四个领域（网络研究、算法推理、软件工程、知识工作）的能力图，连接具有程序性重叠的任务。528/267训练/测试划分。
AI.result: 精心整理的能力内容在不同模型家族间可靠迁移，但尚无自动方法能在所有设置下持续获得正向收益。
AI.conclusion: EvoAgentBench将自我进化评估从聚合精度比较转向对经验编码、路由和吸收的细粒度诊断。

title: Text-to-Image Generation for Projector-Camera System Registration
summary: Establishing correspondence between projector and camera images in a procam (projector + camera) system is essential for achieving high-resolution pixel matching, referred to as procam registration. The highest accuracy is typically obtained using structured light patterns (e.g., stripes or blobs). However, these methods are often inefficient and lack meaningful information for human viewers. Although some have explored the use of natural images, these often fail to provide a sufficient distribution of features to achieve comparable accuracy. Additionally, existing methods struggle to cope with environmental factors such as surface textures and variations in brightness due to ambient light or changes in camera exposure. To address these limitations, we propose a method based on deep neural networks. Our approach aims to generate a single natural image from text-based prompts that not only appears realistic but also possesses rich spatial features to enhance registration accuracy in procam applications. We have developed a deep neural network trained on a synthesized dataset that simulates potential geometric and photometric distortions encountered in a procam system illuminating a relatively smooth object (see Figure 1). Our trained network predicts the correspondence between projector and camera images, significantly improving registration accuracy across various procam configurations. By jointly considering the naturalness and feature richness of the projector images, our method minimizes visual disruptions in projected content without sacrificing precision. A user study confirms that our technique enhances perceived naturalness and usability compared to existing methods, validating its practical utility in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于深度神经网络的投影仪-相机（procam）配准方法，通过文本生成具有丰富空间特征的自然图像，替代传统结构光图案，在保持高精度配准的同时提升图像自然度和用户体验。
AI.motivation: 现有procam配准方法中，结构光图案虽然精度高但效率低且缺乏视觉意义；自然图像则特征分布不足、精度较低；同时现有方法难以应对表面纹理和光照变化等环境因素。需要一种兼顾自然感与高精度配准的方法。
AI.method: 1) 利用文本提示生成单张自然图像，使其既真实又具有丰富的空间特征；2) 训练深度神经网络，在合成数据集上模拟procam系统中可能出现的几何与光度畸变；3) 网络预测投影仪图像与相机图像之间的对应关系。
AI.result: 该方法在多种procam配置下显著提升了配准精度，同时最小化了投影内容的视觉干扰；用户研究证实其在自然感和可用性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合考虑投影图像的自然性与特征丰富度，该方法在保持高精度配准的前提下有效减少了视觉干扰，具有良好的实际应用价值。

title: An Exploration of Agentic Information Fusion for Test Maintenance Prediction
summary:
Test maintenance is a critical, yet costly, activity - particularly as codebases rapidly evolve. To assist, we present MAST, a multi-agent framework that predicts which test cases require maintenance following changes to the production code. This identification task is necessary as a precondition to any subsequent maintenance activities, but remains challenging due to the complex relationships between production and test code. MAST advances the state-of-the-art by integrating multiple analyses -- including static, lexical, and semantic analyses - through an intelligent fusion and post-check procedure and by focusing on a realistic use and evaluation setting - i.e., standardized input formats, repository-level analyses, and the ability to infer relations between test and production artifacts rather than assuming a pre-existing mapping.
  We evaluated MAST on 21 industrial Java repositories from Ericsson AB, considering situations where test maintenance both was and was not required in the ground truth. MAST yielded superior precision to a state-of-the-art baseline - resulting in a higher accuracy, F1, and F2 score - with only some loss in recall. Our ablation study demonstrates the value of each analysis in producing the final recommendations. MAST illustrates the potential of multi-agent systems that can fuse multiple information sources when performing software testing tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAST，一个多智能体框架，用于预测哪些测试用例在代码变更后需要维护。通过在Ericsson的21个工业Java项目上评估，MAST在精确度、准确率、F1和F2分数上优于基线方法，仅召回率略有损失。
AI.motivation: 测试维护成本高昂且关键，特别是在代码快速演进的场景下。现有方法难以处理生产代码与测试代码之间的复杂关系，且常依赖预设映射而非自动推断。
AI.method: MAST采用多智能体架构，融合静态分析、词汇分析和语义分析等多种分析手段，通过智能融合和后检查流程，在仓库级别进行分析，自动推断测试与生产工件间的关系。
AI.result: 在21个工业Java仓库上，MAST相比基线方法在精确度、准确率、F1和F2分数上表现更优，召回率略有下降。消融实验验证了每种分析方法的贡献价值。
AI.conclusion: MAST展示了多智能体系统在融合多种信息源执行软件测试任务方面的潜力，为测试维护预测提供了有效的解决方案。

title: DuplexChat: Constructing Speaker-Separated Full-Duplex Dialogue Speech at Scale for Spoken Dialogue Language Modeling
comment: 4 pages, 1 figures, submitted to SLT demo track
summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue models are trained on conversational speech in which each speaker is represented as a separate stream, but existing large-scale public speech corpora are mostly monaural, making them unsuited for SDLM training. We present DuplexChat, an open-source corpus for full-duplex spoken dialogue models, and DuplexChat-Pipe, a pipeline for constructing speaker-separated full-duplex dialogue speech from public podcast feeds. DuplexChat-Pipe filters language-specific podcast feeds, retrieves and cleans episode audio, extracts diarization-guided two-speaker dialogue clips, and applies speech separation and restoration to produce one channel per speaker. Running this pipeline yields a speaker-separated spoken dialogue corpus covering 282,634 hours of English and 132,723 hours of Japanese. Analysis results on DuplexChat show that it contains turn-taking dynamics present in human dialogues.

AI.tldr: 提出了DuplexChat语料库和DuplexChat-Pipe流水线，用于从播客构建双通道全双工对话语音数据，涵盖英语（28万小时）和日语（13万小时）。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模语音语料库多为单声道，不适合训练全双工口语对话模型（SDLM），需要一种能生成说话人分离的双工对话数据的方法。
AI.method: 设计DuplexChat-Pipe流水线：过滤特定语言播客源→检索并清洗音频→基于说话人日志提取双人对话片段→应用语音分离与恢复，生成每说话人一个通道的语料。
AI.result: 构建了DuplexChat语料库，含英语282,634小时和日语132,723小时的双通道对话语音，并验证了其中包含人类对话的轮流交替动态。
AI.conclusion: DuplexChat为全双工对话模型提供了大规模、开放、说话人分离的训练数据，有效弥补了现有数据缺口。

title: MoP-JEPA: Hard-Assigned Predictor Mixtures for Stochastic JEPA World Models
summary: JEPA world models predict the next latent state with a single deterministic predictor trained by latent regression. We show that this fails structurally when the environment is stochastic: at a branching transition, the regression-optimal predictor outputs the conditional mean of the successor embeddings, a point between the true next states that corresponds to no state at all. We prove this collapse for deterministic and gated mixture-of-experts predictors, and prove that MoP-JEPA's hard-assigned predictors converge instead to a quantizer of the transition distribution: one head per successor mode, enumerable in a single forward pass, which is the interface a planner consumes. On official OGBench offline data with leak-free evaluation, planning over single-predictor rollouts performs poorly ($0.02$--$0.09$ success) while planning over our predicted modes reaches up to $0.85$, ahead of deterministic, gated-MoE, and variational predictors on every task. Because multi-prediction evaluation invites coverage freeloading, a verification protocol is part of the method: an input-agnostic codebook control, a shuffled-context test, router-gated readouts, transition-precision guards, and a verified-route criterion in which the model proposes its transition graph blind and ground truth is used only to check the result. Under this criterion our method outperforms the strongest soft alternative on all three mazes ($2$--$5\times$), and the protocol identifies the remaining gap in that baseline's raw scores as routes through predicted transitions that do not exist. The same model executes in the real environment, placing second of seven against the published OGBench baselines on the hardest maze. Multimodal dynamics decide whether a JEPA world model can plan at all; a mixture of predictors with hard assignment is a minimal and verifiable fix.

AI.tldr: 本文指出标准JEPA世界模型在随机环境中会因回归最优预测器输出条件均值而导致预测状态"坍塌"（位于分支之间，不对应任何真实状态）。作者提出MoP-JEPA，使用硬分配混合预测器来量化转移分布，每个预测头对应一个后继模式，并结合验证协议防止评测作弊。实验表明该方法在OGBench离线数据和真实环境中均显著优于确定性、门控MoE和变分预测器。
AI.motivation: 标准JEPA世界模型在随机环境中存在结构性缺陷：当环境存在随机分支转换时，使用潜在回归训练的单一确定性预测器会输出后继嵌入的条件均值——这个点位于可能的真实下一个状态之间，不对应任何真实状态，导致预测"坍塌"。
AI.method: 提出MoP-JEPA：使用硬分配混合预测器（Mixture of Predictors），每个预测头通过硬分配专注于一个后继模式，在单次前向传播中枚举所有可能的未来模式。同时设计了包含输入无关码本控制、乱序上下文测试、路由器门控读出、转换精度守卫和验证路径准则在内的验证协议。
AI.result: 在OGBench离线数据上，单一预测器 rollout 的成功率仅为0.02-0.09，而MoP-JEPA的规划成功率达到0.85，全面超越确定性、门控MoE和变分预测器。在验证路径准则下，该方法在三个迷宫中比最强软替代方法好2-5倍。在真实环境执行中，在 hardest maze 上排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 多模态动态性决定了JEPA世界模型能否进行规划；具有硬分配的混合预测器是一种最小且可验证的修复方案。

title: RIGS-Refiner: Risk-Guided Recursive Refinement in Prediction Space for Colonoscopy Polyp Segmentation
summary: Post-refinement can improve colonoscopy segmentation after host inference, but many designs still rely on extra correction heads or multi-stage pipelines with non-negligible parameter or computational cost. For polyp segmentation, host predictions are often already reasonable globally, with remaining errors clustered around ambiguous boundaries and difficult local structures. These residual errors matter in colonoscopy images because useful masks need correct lesion coverage and clean contour delineation across subtle mucosal transitions. This setting favors selective local repair in prediction space over reprocessing the entire mask. We therefore propose RIGS-Refiner, a lightweight post-refinement plugin for risk-guided recursive refinement in prediction space. Starting from a frozen host anchor prediction, RIGS-Refiner extracts lightweight image priors and prediction cues, applies risk-guided update, and writes back residual corrections through a shared recursive cell. The module adds only +519 parameters and +0.631 GFLOPs, keeping the refinement path compact for deployment. Experiments use Kvasir-SEG for training and Kvasir, ClinicDB, ColonDB, and ETIS for evaluation under two frozen hosts, namely PraNet and SegFormer-B0. Results show consistent gains on both hosts and a favorable efficiency-accuracy trade-off against representative post-refinement methods. Code is available at https://github.com/tyui99/RIGS-Refiner.

AI.tldr: 提出RIGS-Refiner，一种轻量级后处理插件，通过风险引导的递归修正机制，仅用+519参数和+0.631GFLOPs即可改善息肉分割结果，在多个数据集上取得一致性提升。
AI.motivation: 现有后处理方法依赖额外的修正头或多阶段流水线，参数量和计算成本较高。而息肉分割中宿主预测结果已较合理，错误主要集中在模糊边界和局部结构，因此需要一种轻量级的选择性局部修复方法。
AI.method: 提出RIGS-Refiner插件，包含三部分：(1) 提取轻量级图像先验和预测线索；(2) 风险引导的更新机制；(3) 通过共享递归单元将残差修正写回预测空间。整个过程在预测空间中进行，无需完整的掩膜重处理。
AI.result: 在Kvasir-SEG训练，Kvasir、ClinicDB、ColonDB、ETIS上评估。基于PraNet和SegFormer-B0两个冻结宿主，均获得一致性提升。参数量仅+519，计算量+0.631GFLOPs，在效率-精度权衡上优于代表性后处理方法。
AI.conclusion: RIGS-Refiner以极低的参数和计算开销实现了有效的肠镜息肉分割后处理修正，验证了在预测空间中进行选择性局部修复的可行性与高效性。

title: E-CoDrive: A Co-Simulation Framework for Testing Energy-Critical Driving Scenarios
comment: In proceedings of the 41st IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE '26) - Tools and Datasets track
summary: Autonomous driving research has largely focused on safety while giving limited attention to non-functional aspects such as energy consumption and sustainability. As Autonomous Electric Vehicles (AEVs) become increasingly common in urban traffic, understanding how complex traffic dynamics influence their energy consumption is paramount to test whether AEVs can complete trips before battery depletion. To support energy-aware scenario-based testing of AEVs, we present E-CoDrive, a framework for reproducible closed-loop driving co-simulations that integrates an energy consumption model, a micro-traffic simulator, and a high-fidelity driving simulator to test AEV software stacks in urban scenarios. This tool paper describes the architecture of E-CoDrive and demonstrates its applicability by testing an Autoware-based AEV stack. Our evaluation shows that varying traffic conditions produce substantial differences in vehicle energy consumption. The artifact is publicly available at https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.32244783, and a screencast showing the tool is available at https://youtu.be/yX9fWHqCvgc.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 E-CoDrive，一个集成能量消耗模型、微观交通仿真器和高保真驾驶仿真器的闭环协同仿真框架，用于在城市场景下测试自动驾驶电动汽车的能量消耗和可持续性，实验表明不同交通条件会显著影响车辆能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶研究主要关注安全性，忽视了能量消耗和可持续性等非功能方面。随着自动驾驶电动汽车在城市交通中普及，需要理解复杂交通动态如何影响其能量消耗，以验证车辆能否在电池耗尽前完成行程。
AI.method: 提出 E-CoDrive 框架，集成三个核心组件：能量消耗模型、微观交通仿真器、高保真驾驶仿真器，实现可复现的闭环驾驶协同仿真，用于测试基于 Autoware 的自动驾驶电动汽车软件栈在城市场景中的表现。
AI.result: 评估表明，不同的交通条件会导致车辆能量消耗发生显著差异，验证了该框架能够有效支持能量感知的场景化测试。
AI.conclusion: E-CoDrive 为自动驾驶电动汽车的能量感知场景化测试提供了可行的协同仿真解决方案，有助于推动自动驾驶系统在可持续性方面的测试与验证。

title: You Frame It: How Conceptual Representations Shape LLM Detection and Reasoning about Antisemitism
summary:
LLMs enable the integration of external conceptual resources at inference time, creating new opportunities for detecting ideologically and historically complex phenomena such as antisemitism. We investigate how different forms of conceptual grounding affect antisemitism detection and explanation behavior across four state-of-the-art LLMs.
  Using two expert-annotated datasets, we compare definitional, fine-grained taxonomic, example-augmented, and large-context representations of antisemitism.
  We find that fine-grained taxonomic representations substantially improve recall, while simultaneously reducing precision. Surprisingly, supplying substantially larger conceptual resources yields no additional quantitative benefit. Post-Holocaust antisemitism poses the most persistent challenge across models and configurations. Analysis of explanations further reveals systematic limitations including overproduction of conceptual references, reliance on lexical cues, overconfidence, and difficulties with subtle or justificatory forms of antisemitism.
  Our findings highlight both the potential and the remaining limitations of conceptually grounded LLMs for antisemitism detection and reasoning.

AI.tldr: 研究对比了四种LLM在不同概念锚定方式（定义、细粒度分类、示例增强、大上下文）下检测和解释反犹太主义的表现。发现细粒度分类能提高召回率但降低精确率，更大的概念资源没有带来额外收益，后大屠杀时代的反犹太主义最难检测，模型存在过度引用概念、依赖词汇线索、过度自信等系统性问题。
AI.motivation: LLM可以在推理时整合外部概念资源，这为检测意识形态和历史复杂性现象（如反犹太主义）创造了新机会。研究旨在探索不同形式的概念锚定如何影响反犹太主义检测和解释行为。
AI.method: 使用两个专家标注的数据集，在四种最先进的LLM上比较定义式、细粒度分类式、示例增强式和大上下文式四种反犹太主义概念锚定方式的效果。
AI.result: 细粒度分类表示显著提高了召回率，但同时降低了精确率。提供更大的概念资源没有带来额外的定量收益。后大屠杀时代的反犹太主义是最持久的挑战。模型存在过度引用概念、依赖词汇线索、过度自信、难以处理微妙或合理化形式的反犹太主义等问题。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了概念锚定LLM在反犹太主义检测和推理中的潜力和现有局限性。

title: MetaSkill-Evolve: Recursive Self-Improvement of LLM Agents via Two-Timescale Meta-Skill Evolution
summary: Recent LLM agents tackle increasingly long-horizon, open-ended tasks, and external skills, reusable procedural knowledge supplied to the agent, further extend this capability. However, a fixed, hand-authored skill is rarely optimal, and cannot adapt to the diversity of tasks an agent encounters. Self-improving agents address this by rewriting their own skill files from execution traces, yielding meaningful gains on challenging benchmarks. Yet such self-evolution remains non-recursive: it improves only the task skill (what the agent does) while the improvement procedure (how it improves) is authored once and held fixed. We introduce MetaSkill-Evolve, a two-timescale framework that makes agentic skill improvement recursive: every branch carries both a task skill $s$ and a branch-local meta-skill $m=(ψ,σ,α,π,\varepsilon)$ whose five components parameterise the Analyzer, Retriever, Allocator, Proposer, and Evolver agents of the improvement pipeline. Task skills evolve on a fast loop while the meta-skill evolves on a slower one under the same pipeline applied to itself, with no additional model or objective. With all five pipeline agents sharing a single frozen backbone, MetaSkill-Evolve outperforms no-skill, static-skill, and single-level evolution baselines on three agentic benchmarks (OfficeQA, SealQA, ALFWorld), improving held-out test accuracy over the raw backbone by +23.54, +16.09, and +1.92 points respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出MetaSkill-Evolve，一种双时间尺度的递归技能进化框架，让智能体不仅能进化任务技能，还能进化改进技能本身的元技能，在三个基准测试上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自进化智能体只能改进任务技能（做什么），但改进过程本身（如何改进）是固定不变的，缺乏递归性，无法自适应任务多样性。
AI.method: 提出双时间尺度框架：快循环进化任务技能，慢循环进化元技能（包含分析器、检索器、分配器、提议器、进化器五个组件），两者共享同一个冻结骨干模型，无需额外模型或目标函数。
AI.result: 在OfficeQA（+23.54）、SealQA（+16.09）、ALFWorld（+1.92）三个基准上，相比无技能、静态技能、单层进化基线，测试准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 递归技能进化是可行的，且元技能的自改进能在不引入额外资源的情况下带来显著性能增益，为智能体持续自我进化提供了新范式。

title: Lightweight Polyp Segmentation via a Gain-Aware Prediction-Space Recursive Controller
summary: While lightweight polyp segmentation is highly desirable for low-cost deployment, reported performance gains often stem from upgraded backbone encoders, complex decoders, or heavy refinement branches. Consequently, it remains difficult to isolate whether a lightweight correction mechanism is inherently effective on its own. We address this limitation by formulating refinement as a prediction-space recursive correction task, introducing a recursive controller that operates directly on backbone logits. Under a fixed recursion budget, this controller aggregates discrepancy and uncertainty evidence, updates a compact state tracking recent correction utility, and applies additive residual logit corrections. By design, this correction path remains small, host-portable, and deployment-explicit. Utilizing a unified Kvasir-trained protocol, we evaluate our approach across seven lightweight backbones on Kvasir-SEG and three transfer datasets, measuring segmentation accuracy (Dice/IoU) alongside deployment efficiency (parameters, GMACs, and peak memory). The controller yields consistent improvements in the source domain, achieves competitive performance against both training-side baselines and heavier structural refiners on representative hosts, and delivers selective transfer gains with minimal static overhead. Code is available at https://github.com/tyui99/Gain-Aware-Prediction-Space-Recursive-Controller.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的预测空间递归控制器（Prediction-Space Recursive Controller），直接在骨干网络logits上运行，通过递归修正机制提升息肉分割性能，同时保持极低的计算开销和部署成本。
AI.motivation: 现有轻量级息肉分割方法的性能提升常源于升级骨干编码器、复杂解码器或重细化分支，难以判断轻量级修正机制本身是否有效。作者希望隔离这一问题，提出一个纯粹、轻量的递归修正方法。
AI.method: 将细化问题形式化为预测空间的递归修正任务。引入递归控制器，直接在骨干logits上操作，在固定递归预算内聚合差异与不确定性证据，更新跟踪最近修正效用的紧凑状态，并施加加性残差logit修正。
AI.result: 在Kvasir-SEG源域上取得一致改进；在三个迁移数据集上达到与训练侧基线及更重的结构细化器可比的性能；选择性迁移增益显著，静态开销极低。
AI.conclusion: 该控制器设计小巧、可移植、部署明确，验证了轻量级预测空间递归修正机制本身的有效性，为低算力场景下的息肉分割提供了实用方案。

title: Teaching LLMs a Low-Resource Language: Enhancing Code Completion in Pharo
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) unlocked new possibilities in automated code writing, becoming the backbone of most code completion tools. While LLMs excel in mainstream languages, they often lack support for the so-called low-resource languages where training data is scarce. As a result, these languages lag behind in the quality of code completion tooling available to their communities. A concrete example is Pharo, a Smalltalk-inspired language whose IDE currently offers only single-token completion. In this work, we report on our experience bringing LLM-based code completion to Pharo. First, we describe an end-to-end pipeline that combines Pharo-specific data curation, continued pre-training and fine-tuning of open code LLMs. Second, we introduce a set of Pharo code completion benchmarks designed to evaluate whether models (i) learn Pharo's syntax and (ii) accurately complete masked Pharo code from real-world GitHub repositories. Third, we show empirically that Pharo-specialized models substantially outperform their original base checkpoints and also exceed the accuracy of substantially larger code LLMs on Pharo completion. Overall, our case study demonstrates the feasibility of bringing strong LLM-based code completion to low-resource programming languages, with models small enough to provide ``real-time'' in-IDE support.

AI.tldr: 本文报告了为低资源编程语言Pharo（类似Smalltalk）构建LLM代码补全的经验，通过数据整理、持续预训练和微调开源代码LLM，使小型专用模型在Pharo补全任务上显著超越原始基座模型甚至更大的通用代码LLM，证明了低资源语言也能获得高质量的实时IDE代码补全。
AI.motivation: 主流编程语言的LLM代码补全已非常成熟，但低资源语言（如Pharo）因训练数据稀缺，代码补全工具质量严重落后。Pharo的IDE目前仅支持单token补全，亟需引入LLM来提升开发体验。
AI.method: (1) 构建端到端流程：收集Pharo特定数据并进行数据整理 → 对开源代码LLM进行持续预训练 → 在Pharo代码上微调；(2) 设计两组Pharo代码补全基准：评估模型学习Pharo语法和从真实GitHub仓库中补全掩码代码的能力；(3) 对比实验：将Pharo专用模型与原始基座模型及更大的通用代码LLM进行精度比较。
AI.result: Pharo专用模型在补全精度上大幅超越原始基座模型，并且超过了参数量更大的通用代码LLM在Pharo任务上的表现。模型足够小，能够在IDE中实现实时补全。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计的数据整理和模型定制训练，即使数据稀缺的低资源编程语言也能获得高质量的LLM代码补全，且不需要超大模型，小型专用模型即可满足实时性要求，具有实际可行性。

title: Who's Behind It? Annotating and Extracting Conspiratorial Actors from German Telegram Posts
summary: Conspiracy theories commonly attribute important events to the actions of powerful and secretive actors. While computational research has largely focused on document-level analyses of conspiracy theories, less attention has been paid to identifying the actors that drive such narratives. We develop annotation guidelines for conspiratorial actors, present a span-annotated corpus of German Telegram posts, and investigate their automatic extraction using transformer-based models. We further apply the resulting model to the \textit{Schwurbelarchiv}, a large-scale archive of German conspiracy-related Telegram channels. Our results demonstrate that conspiratorial actors can be annotated with meaningful agreement and extracted with reasonable accuracy despite the linguistic complexity of conspiracy discourse, enabling large-scale analyses of actor representations in conspiracy narratives.

AI.tldr: 本文聚焦阴谋论叙述中的关键行动者识别，开发了标注指南、构建了德语Telegram帖子语料库，并用Transformer模型实现了对阴谋论行动者的自动抽取，验证了该方法在大规模分析中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有的阴谋论计算研究多聚焦于文档层面的分析，而忽视了对驱动阴谋论叙述的核心行动者（如"深层政府"、精英集团等）的识别与抽取，这限制了对阴谋论叙事结构的深入理解。
AI.method: 1) 制定了阴谋论行动者的标注指南；2) 构建了德语Telegram帖子的跨度标注（span-annotated）语料库；3) 使用基于Transformer的模型进行自动抽取；4) 将训练好的模型应用于大规模德语阴谋论Telegram频道数据库（Schwurbelarchiv）进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，尽管阴谋论话语具有复杂的语言特征，但阴谋论行动者可以被标注出具有意义的一致率（annotated with meaningful agreement），且模型能够以合理精度自动抽取这些行动者，支持大规模分析。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了利用Transformer模型自动识别阴谋论叙述中关键行动者的可行性，为后续大规模分析阴谋论中的行动者角色和叙事结构提供了方法论基础。

title: Evaluating and Understanding Model Editing for Medical Vision Language Models
comment: Accepted to the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026. Code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/BioMed-AI-Lab-U-Michgan/M3Bench
summary:
Model editing promises a fast, targeted way to correct post-deployment mistakes in medical vision-language models (VLMs) without costly retraining. However, existing multimodal model editing benchmarks focus on general-purpose tasks and do not reflect realistic clinical domain requirements and variability. To address this, we introduce M3Bench, a clinically grounded benchmark for multimodal model editing that evaluates whether an edit remains reliable, precise, and generalizable under the challenges of image and text variation, modality and protocol shifts, clinical knowledge composition, and temporal progression. M3Bench contains 16,276 questions spanning diverse anatomy, modalities, and specialties, and supports both single and sequential edits.
  By evaluating 4 representative editors across 6 medical and general VLMs, we find that no method excels across all criteria. Gradient-based editors achieve strong transfer but suffer from catastrophic locality violations, whereas memory-based methods preserve locality but lack compositional generality and exhibit high backbone-dependent hyperparameter sensitivity. We further attribute these failures to the latent space geometry of VLMs and how different editing methods shift its landscape. Overall, M3Bench establishes a rigorous clinical stress test for multimodal model editing and offers actionable guidance for safer post-deployment adaptation. The benchmark is publicly available at https://github.com/BioMed-AI-Lab-U-Michgan/M3Bench .

AI.tldr: 本文提出M3Bench，一个面向临床领域的多模态模型编辑基准，包含16,276个问题，评估编辑在图像/文本变化、模态转换、知识组合和时间演进下的可靠性、精确性和泛化性。实验表明现有编辑方法在临床场景下各有缺陷，梯度方法破坏局部性，记忆方法缺乏组合泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型编辑基准聚焦通用任务，无法反映真实临床领域的复杂需求（如图像/文本变异、模态转换、知识组合、时间演进），缺乏针对医学视觉语言模型的专用评估基准。
AI.method: 构建M3Bench基准，包含16,276个问题，覆盖多样解剖部位、模态和专业领域，支持单次和序列编辑。从可靠性、精确性、泛化性三个维度评估，并引入图像/文本变异、模态与协议转换、临床知识组合、时间演进四项临床挑战。
AI.result: 在6个医学/通用VLM上评估4种编辑方法，发现：梯度编辑方法迁移性强但严重破坏局部性；记忆方法保留局部性但缺乏组合泛化能力，且对骨干模型的超参数高度敏感。
AI.conclusion: M3Bench为多模态模型编辑提供了严格的临床压力测试，揭示了现有方法在临床场景下的根本缺陷，归因于VLM潜在空间几何结构及编辑方法对其的影响，为安全的后部署模型适应提供了可操作指导。

title: PixCon: Clean-Positive Contrastive Learning for Foundation-Model Semi-Supervised Segmentation
summary: Semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSSS) has long turned on one question, which pseudo-labels to trust, and answered it with ever more careful confidence filtering. Foundation backbones change the regime: with a DINOv2 teacher a strict threshold already retains a measured 98%-clean pseudo-label set, so the accuracy that remains lives not in the filter but in how the embedding space is structured by class. We propose PixCon, a clean-positive pixel-contrastive framework. PixCon maintains a per-class memory bank that admits only labeled pixels the student already classifies correctly, guaranteeing a contamination-free positive set ($ρ_F=0$) by construction, unlike prior contrastive SSSS banks (ReCo, U$^2$PL) built from confidence-filtered pseudo-labels. It is a single branch over a consistency backbone, adds no inference-time parameters, and needs no bank-specific threshold. A first-order analysis of the supervised-InfoNCE gradient explains why contamination hurts: its false-positive term scales as $ρ_F/(1-ρ_F)$, which we measure (0.018 on Pascal, 0.106 on ADE20K) rather than assume. Across Pascal VOC, Cityscapes, and ADE20K, PixCon matches or improves a strong DINOv2-based UniMatch V2 baseline in a compute-matched one-switch protocol: it improves every Pascal-1/8 seed (a per-seed gain of about +0.2 mIoU) and its three-seed mean reaches 87.90, the published UniMatch V2-B figure. Because contamination is already rare under foundation-model teachers, our analysis indicates the $ρ_F=0$ guarantee acts chiefly as robustness as teachers weaken, while the accuracy gain comes from cleaner positive supervision, making clean-positive contrast a robust, low-cost default for foundation-model SSSS.

AI.tldr: 提出PixCon，一种基于干净正样本的像素级对比学习框架，用于半监督语义分割。在DINOv2等基础模型教师下，PixCon通过保证正样本集零污染（ρ_F=0）来提升分割精度，无需额外的置信度过滤或推理参数。
AI.motivation: 半监督语义分割的核心问题在于如何选择可信的伪标签。传统方法依赖置信度过滤，但基础模型（如DINOv2）已能生成高达98%纯净度的伪标签，此时过滤不再关键，而嵌入空间的类别结构成为瓶颈。现有对比方法（ReCo、U²PL）使用置信度过滤的伪标签构建记忆库，正样本仍可能被污染，影响对比学习效果。
AI.method: 提出PixCon：维护每个类别的记忆库，仅存入学生模型已正确分类的干净标注像素，从构造上保证正样本集零污染（ρ_F=0）。在一致性正则化骨干上添加单分支对比模块，无推理参数，无需额外的阈值调整。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC、Cityscapes、ADE20K上，PixCon在计算量匹配的单次切换协议下匹配或超越强基线UniMatch V2。在Pascal上，每个种子提升约+0.2 mIoU，三种子均值达87.90，与已发表的UniMatch V2-B持平。
AI.conclusion: 在基础模型教师下，污染本就罕见，ρ_F=0的保证主要作为教师变弱时的鲁棒性保障；精度提升的核心来自更干净的对比正监督。干净正样本对比可作为基础模型半监督语义分割的稳健、低成本的默认方案。

title: Using Process Mining to Generate AI Agents from Software Engineering Process Records
comment: To be published at the 24th International Conference on Business Process Management (BPM 2026), Process Technology Forum
summary: Integrating AI agents into Software Engineering (SE) raises an important challenge: how can we specify and realize AI agents that work effectively alongside humans in hybrid SE teams? Determining the right granularity and separation of concerns for such agents is non-trivial. Coarse-grained agents may introduce unmanageable complexity, whereas micro-agents may create severe coordination overhead. Moreover, existing multi-agent SE frameworks typically rely on predefined role structures and do not account for project-specific characteristics or process adaptations. We address this by combining object-centric, imperative, and declarative process mining. Using event logs extracted from software repositories, our approach discovers project-specific agent roles using a predefined SE role vocabulary grounded in repository behavior and generates matching agent specifications and implementations. As proof-of-concept, we applied our approach to a well-established open-source project. We performed functional tests and an exploratory user study to determine how well the generated AI agent specifications are aligned with human expectations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合三种过程挖掘技术，从软件仓库事件日志中自动发现项目特定的AI智能体角色，并生成对应的智能体规格说明和实现，以支持人类与AI在混合软件工程团队中的有效协作。
AI.motivation: 粗粒度智能体可能引入难以管理的复杂性，而微智能体则会造成严重的协调开销。现有多智能体软件工程框架通常依赖预定义角色结构，未能考虑项目特定特征或过程适应性。
AI.method: 结合面向对象、命令式和声明式过程挖掘技术，从软件仓库事件日志中，基于预定义的SE角色词汇表（以仓库行为为基础）发现项目特定智能体角色，并生成匹配的智能体规格说明和实现。
AI.result: 将方法应用于一个成熟的开源项目作为概念验证，进行了功能测试和探索性用户研究，以评估生成的AI智能体规格说明与人类期望的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够基于项目实际行为自动发现并生成与人类期望一致的AI智能体规格，为混合SE团队中智能体的合理粒度和关注点分离提供了数据驱动的解决方案。

title: The syntax of wh-agreement in Yemeni Ibbi Arabic
summary: This article tackles an important phenomenon in the syntax of Yemeni Ibbi Arabic (YIA), viz., wh-agreement, a phenomenon common to several languages including Greek, Indonesian, Lubukusu, Irish, etc. In YIA, wh-agreement manifests itself via agreement inflections on the Wh-Op, C, T/V, v. To account for this phenomenon, we propose an Agree across phases (AAP) approach anchored in the mechanism of Feature Inheritance (FI) in which Agree as MATCHING (AM) is a bit separated from feature valuation (FV). AM concerns Cs/vs, but FV Ts/Vs. Analyzing the agreement patterns observed between Wh-Op(erators), functional heads (precisely C, (T), v), and verbal complexes, we argue that the suffixes -eh, -uh, -nen, -um, having undergone grammaticalization process from Stannard Arabic (SA) third person pronouns, function as morphological marking of wh-agreement. Findings indicate that YIA data offer a unique empirical contribution to generative syntax, specifically concerning wh-agreement in this dialect operating via MATCHING mechanism. Our proposal straightforwardly accounts for wh-agreement cross-linguistically. This study provides further evidence that incorporating under-investigated typology provides further support for the universality of Universal Grammar (UG) by revealing how specific I-language operations reflect deeper, invariant principles of human language architecture. It concludes that the wh-agreement mechanism in YIA is more morphosyntactically robust than in languages such as Greek, Indonesian, Palauan, and Irish, providing compelling evidence for AAP as a UG approach to long-distance dependencies.

AI.tldr: 本文研究也门伊比阿拉伯语（YIA）中的wh-一致现象，提出了一种基于特征继承机制的跨阶段一致（AAP）方法，证明YIA的wh-一致在形态句法上比其他语言更强健，为普遍语法的跨语言长距离依赖提供了新证据。
AI.motivation: 解决YIA中wh-一致现象的句法机制问题，探讨该方言中疑问词与功能核心（C、T、v）及动词复合体之间的一致模式，为生成句法学提供来自未被充分研究语言的实证贡献。
AI.method: 提出跨阶段一致（AAP）方法，基于特征继承（FI）机制，将一致作为匹配（AM）与特征赋值（FV）相分离——AM涉及C/v，FV涉及T/V。通过分析YIA中Wh-Op、功能核心及动词复合体间的一致模式进行论证。
AI.result: YIA中的wh-一致在形态句法上比希腊语、印尼语、帕劳语和爱尔兰语等语言更加稳健；后缀 -eh、-uh、-nen、-um 经历了从标准阿拉伯语第三人称代词的语法化过程，作为wh-一致的形态标记。YIA数据为生成句法学提供了独特的实证贡献。
AI.conclusion: YIA的wh-一致机制通过匹配机制运作，AAP方法能够跨语言解释wh-一致现象；纳入未被充分研究的语言类型学有助于支持普遍语法的普适性，说明具体的I-语言操作反映了人类语言架构更深层的不变原则。

title: OptiAgent: End-to-End Optimization Modeling via Multi-Agent Iterative Refinement
summary: We propose OptiAgent, a multi-agent framework that, given a natural language description of an Operations Research problem, is able to output a solver-ready mathematical formulation as well as executable code. Our architecture prioritizes the mathematical modeling step, where dedicated agents extract structures, such as decision variables and constraints, enabling iterative self-correction. We introduce a novel multi-loop validation architecture with four specialized feedback mechanisms, each targeting a distinct failure mode such as misinterpretation, structural defects, mathematical inconsistencies, validation failures, and code errors. Alongside accuracy, our modular design improves the process of solving optimization problems by improving transparency, as each agent exposes its reasoning and feedback, making the full modeling process auditable. Our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3 out of 4 benchmarks across LP, MILP, and Nonlinear Programming tasks, while remaining highly competitive on the remaining dataset.

AI.tldr: OptiAgent是一个多智能体框架，能根据自然语言描述的运筹学问题自动生成数学公式和可执行代码，采用多循环验证架构和四种专门反馈机制，在3/4基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理运筹学问题时，从自然语言描述到数学建模和代码生成的过程中存在多种故障模式（如误解、结构缺陷、数学不一致性等），需要一个系统化的多智能体协作框架来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出OptiAgent多智能体框架，包含：1) 专门的数学建模步骤，由专用智能体提取决策变量和约束等结构；2) 新颖的多循环验证架构，包含四种专门化反馈机制（分别针对误解、结构缺陷、数学不一致性、验证失败和代码错误）；3) 模块化设计使每个智能体的推理和反馈可追溯。
AI.result: 在4个基准测试（涵盖LP、MILP和非线性规划任务）中，OptiAgent在3个上达到了最先进的性能，在剩余数据集上也保持高度竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体协作结合专门化反馈机制可以有效提升从自然语言到运筹学求解的自动化水平，模块化透明设计也提升了建模过程的可审计性。

title: SafeGuard: A Multi-Agent Perception-Reasoning Framework for Social-Risk AI-Generated Video Detection
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026, The code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/williamw99/SafeGuard
summary: As video generation paradigms evolve from localized manipulation to full-scene synthesis, AI-generated video detection becomes increasingly challenging, as forgeries exhibit coherent global structure and high perceptual realism. However, existing benchmarks are biased toward perceptual fidelity and primarily evaluate detectors based on perceptual artifacts, providing limited coverage of scenarios that require reasoning about violations of physical laws, structural coherence, or social logic. This dataset bias shapes current approaches and results in a Perception-Reasoning Gap: artifact-centric models capture low-level statistical irregularities yet lack semantic inference, whereas vision-language models perform semantic reasoning but remain insensitive to fine-grained forensic cues. To bridge this gap, we propose SafeGuard, a multi-agent framework that enables collaborative specialization between forensic perception and semantic reasoning. A hierarchical perceptual solver extracts fine-grained forensic evidence, while a self-reflective verifier enforces consistency between semantic inference and physical plausibility, forming an interpretable evidence chain. To support evaluation, we introduce SafeVid, a novel AI-generated video detection benchmark comprising 20K videos spanning 10 social risk categories, designed to evaluate physical plausibility, structural consistency, and the rationality of social behaviors. Extensive experiments demonstrate the generalization of SafeGuard, improving accuracy on SafeVid by +18.7% and consistently outperforming prior methods across four public benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出SafeGuard多智能体框架，结合分层感知求解器和自反验证器，弥合AI生成视频检测中的感知-推理鸿沟；同时构建SafeVid基准（20K视频，10类社会风险），在物理合理性、结构一致性等方面显著提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成视频检测基准偏向感知保真度，主要基于感知伪影评估，缺乏对物理定律违背、结构连贯性或社会逻辑推理的覆盖，导致模型存在感知-推理鸿沟：伪影模型缺乏语义推理，视觉语言模型对细粒度取证线索不敏感。
AI.method: 提出SafeGuard多智能体框架：分层感知求解器提取细粒度取证证据，自反验证器确保语义推理与物理合理性的逻辑一致性，形成可解释的证据链。
AI.result: 在SafeVid基准上准确率提升+18.7%，在四个公开基准上持续优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过协同感知推理的协作专业化策略，有效弥合了AI生成视频检测中的感知-推理鸿沟，实现了泛化性能与可解释性的双重提升。

title: Real-World Perturbation Testing of Autonomous Driving Systems
comment: In proceedings of the 41st IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE '26)
summary: Autonomous Driving Systems (ADS) must operate reliably under diverse conditions, yet representative data for rare or adverse scenarios is difficult to obtain. Perturbation-based testing is widely used to assess robustness, but most studies focus on offline datasets or simulation, leaving open questions about how such results translate to real-world driving. We present a large-scale study of 72 camera and LiDAR perturbations, evaluated across three testing modalities: offline model-level analysis, hardware-in-the-loop execution, and closed-loop system-level testing on a full-scale autonomous vehicle. The study covers both an end-to-end vision-based driving model and a modular LiDAR-based perception and planning stack. Our results reveal a clear gap between testing levels. For camera-based systems, perturbations with limited offline impact can still induce unstable control and failures in real-world driving. For LiDAR-based systems, degradation is more consistent at the perception level but weakly predictive of system-level failures.
