Across both modalities, model-level metrics alone are insufficient to identify the most harmful perturbations. We further show that real-time feasibility is a key constraint in real-world testing, and that robustness observations obtained from recorded data do not consistently transfer to closed-loop behavior on a physical vehicle, highlighting the importance of complementary real-world, system-level evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模实验（72种摄像与激光雷达扰动）对比了离线模型级、硬件在环和全尺寸自动驾驶车辆闭环测试三种评估方式，发现模型级指标无法充分反映真实驾驶中的系统级故障，强调了真实世界闭环测试的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有的扰动测试多基于离线数据集或仿真环境，缺乏对真实驾驶场景中鲁棒性迁移效果的验证，需要系统性地量化不同测试层级之间的差距。
AI.method: 在三种测试模态（离线模型级、硬件在环、全尺寸自动驾驶车辆闭环测试）下，对72种摄像头和激光雷达扰动进行大规模实验，涵盖端到端视觉驾驶模型和模块化激光雷达感知规划栈。
AI.result: 1) 摄像头系统中，离线影响小的扰动也能在真实驾驶中引发失控；2) 激光雷达系统中，感知层的退化与系统故障相关性弱；3) 模型级指标无法识别最危险的扰动；4) 实时可行性是真实测试的关键约束，记录数据上的鲁棒性结论不能迁移到实际车辆闭环行为。
AI.conclusion: 仅依赖模型级指标不足以评估自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性，需要结合真实世界、系统级的闭环评估来弥补不同测试层级之间的差距。

title: Knowledge Knows, Verbalization Tells: Disentangling Latent Directions for Mathematical Solvability in LLMs
summary: Although LLMs have made significant progress in mathematical reasoning, determining whether a mathematical problem is solvable remains a fundamental yet challenging capability. While recent studies have probed internal representations of model solvability beliefs, verbalization has primarily been studied behaviorally rather than as an internal representation, limiting its analysis and manipulation. We address this gap by separately probing representations of solvability knowledge and verbalization, allowing us to disentangle the two within model hidden states. Across multiple LLMs, we show that knowledge and verbalization are encoded as distinct, linearly decodable representations and that fabrication is primarily associated with changes in verbalization rather than the underlying knowledge. Prompting with unsolvability cues reduces fabrication primarily by shifting verbalization, while activation steering demonstrates that these representations can be echanistically manipulated to improve model abstention.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM在数学推理中判断问题是否可解的能力，发现模型内部对可解性的知识表示和语言表述（verbalization）是分离的、可线性解码的不同表征，并且模型的虚构回答（fabrication）主要与语言表述的变化相关，而非底层知识。通过提示和激活操控可以有效改善模型的拒绝回答能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽然探测了模型对可解性的内部表征，但语言表述（verbalization）主要被作为行为现象研究，而非内部表征，限制了其分析和操控。本文旨在将可解性知识和语言表述作为独立的内部表征进行分离探测。
AI.method: 在不同LLM中分别探测可解性知识和语言表述的表征，通过线性解码验证两者是否分离；分析虚构回答与知识/语言表述变化的关系；使用不可解提示和激活操控（activation steering）进行干预实验。
AI.result: 知识和语言表述是独立的、可线性解码的不同表征；虚构回答主要与语言表述的变化相关，而非底层知识变化；不可解提示通过改变语言表述来减少虚构；激活操控可以机制性地操控这些表征以改善模型拒绝回答。
AI.conclusion: 模型对数学问题可解性的知识判断与语言输出是可以分离的，通过操控语言表述表征而非修改底层知识，可以有效减少模型的虚构回答并提高其正确拒绝能力。

title: Graph Sparse Sampling: Breaking the Curse of the Horizon in Continuous MDP Planning
summary: Planning under uncertainty in continuous domains is essential for autonomous systems, yet computationally demanding. Tree-based search methods such as Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) remain popular, but their branching structure can require sampling budgets that grow exponentially with lookahead depth in the worst case. From a tree perspective, continuous state or action spaces become especially challenging, since the planner must decide where to search in an infinite branching hierarchy. We propose Graph Sparse Sampling (GSS), an online planning algorithm that shares sampled futures across many candidate decisions, rather than sampling separate successors for each candidate action. This branch-free graph exposes large GPU-friendly batches, while using heuristics to focus computation. We prove finite-sample performance guarantees for GSS covering full-rank or low-rank generative simulators via smoothed backups, and discrete or sampled continuous action spaces. Under suitable overlap, regularity, and action-coverage conditions, these bounds have polynomial dependence on the planning horizon, formalizing when shared futures can avoid the exponential horizon dependence of tree-shaped sparse sampling. We demonstrate continuous-control simulations where GSS substantially outperforms tree-based planners on long horizons or achieves near-optimal performance, supporting no-branching graph planning as a complementary design principle for online control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Graph Sparse Sampling (GSS)，一种无分支的图结构在线规划算法，通过在候选决策间共享未来采样来避免传统MCTS的指数复杂度，并在连续控制任务中显著优于树基方法。
AI.motivation: 连续域中的在线规划面临计算挑战，树搜索方法（如MCTS）的分支结构在最坏情况下需要随搜索深度指数增长的采样预算，尤其是在连续状态/动作空间中，搜索分支无限庞大。
AI.method: 提出Graph Sparse Sampling (GSS)，一种无分支的图结构在线规划算法。GSS在多个候选决策间共享采样未来（而非为每个动作单独采样），从而形成适合GPU的大规模批处理，并利用启发式方法聚焦计算资源。
AI.result: 在连续控制仿真中，GSS在长序列规划上显著优于树基规划器，或达到接近最优的性能。理论分析证明在适当的重叠性、正则性和动作覆盖条件下，GSS的有限样本性能保证对规划时域具有多项式依赖，避免了树形稀疏采样的指数依赖。
AI.conclusion: 无分支图规划可作为在线控制中树搜索的一种互补设计原则，在长时域连续规划中具有显著优势。

title: Attention-Guided Efficientnet Architecture For Precise Criminal Identification in Surveillance Images
summary: Criminal identification from surveillance imagery has become a critical research area in intelligent forensic surveillance systems due to the increasing deployment of CCTV cameras in public and private environments. However, surveillance-based face recognition remains highly challenging because of low image resolution, illumination variation, motion blur, pose changes, facial occlusion, and background clutter. To address these limitations, this paper proposes an Attention-Guided EfficientNet (AG-EfficientNet) framework for precise criminal identification in surveillance images. The proposed framework integrates EfficientNet-B0 with Convolutional Block Attention Modules (CBAM) to enhance discriminative facial feature learning under degraded surveillance conditions. In addition, a multi-scale surveillance feature fusion strategy is introduced to preserve both local texture information and high-level semantic identity representations. A hybrid Softmax-Triplet optimization mechanism is further employed to improve inter-class separability and intra-class compactness for robust criminal identity discrimination. The proposed framework was experimentally evaluated using the Labeled Faces in the Wild (LFW) and SCFace datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed AG-EfficientNet framework achieved superior surveillance recognition performance with an identification accuracy of 98.2%, Precision of 97.9%, Recall of 97.6%, F1-Score of 97.7%, and ROC-AUC of 0.99, outperforming conventional deep learning architectures including AlexNet, VGG16, ResNet50, MobileNetV2, and standard EfficientNet-B0. Furthermore, Grad-CAM visualization and ablation analysis confirm the effectiveness of the proposed attention-guided feature learning strategy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种注意力引导的EfficientNet（AG-EfficientNet）框架，用于监控场景下的罪犯识别。该框架结合CBAM注意力机制、多尺度特征融合和Softmax-Triplet混合优化，在LFW和SCFace数据集上取得了98.2%的识别准确率，优于AlexNet、VGG16等传统深度学习模型。
AI.motivation: 监控图像中的面部识别面临低分辨率、光照变化、运动模糊、姿态变化、面部遮挡和背景杂乱等挑战，传统方法难以在退化条件下实现精确的罪犯识别。
AI.method: 提出AG-EfficientNet框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 在EfficientNet-B0中集成Convolutional Block Attention Modules (CBAM)增强判别性特征学习；(2) 多尺度监控特征融合策略保留局部纹理和高层语义信息；(3) 混合Softmax-Triplet优化机制提升类间可分性和类内紧凑性。
AI.result: 在LFW和SCFace数据集上，识别准确率98.2%、精确率97.9%、召回率97.6%、F1分数97.7%、ROC-AUC 0.99，全面优于AlexNet、VGG16、ResNet50、MobileNetV2和标准EfficientNet-B0。
AI.conclusion: AG-EfficientNet框架在监控场景罪犯识别任务中表现优异，Grad-CAM可视化和消融分析验证了注意力引导特征学习策略的有效性。

title: A Comprehensive Study of Implementation Bugs in Multi-modal Agents
summary: Multi-Modal Agents (M-agents), empowered by Large Language Models (LLMs), excel in various complex, open-world scenarios such as autonomous driving and robotics. However, their unique requirements to interact with dynamic and diverse multi-modal environments introduce novel implementation challenges beyond those faced by traditional agents. Outdated perception, untrustworthy planning and inapplicable execution could cause traffic accident and financial loss. Despite growing study on agent issues, there has not been a systematic study focusing on M-agent-specific implementation bugs. To address this gap, we conducted the first systematic study of implementation bugs in M-agents. We collected 34 representative M-agents from diverse sources and, through meticulous filtering,identified 158 M-agent-specific bugs from 1,268 issue reports. Using a top-down strategy, we developed a comprehensive taxonomy that classifies bugs by global symptoms, functionality component-level symptoms, and root causes. We then implemented MATester, an automatic proof-of-concept bug identifier by analyzing runtime inter-component outputs. When applied to 12 extra M-agents, MATester successfully covered 61.4% of known open issues and discovered 31 additional bugs, demonstrating the practical usefulness of our study. Our work provides a comprehensive reference and guideline for classification, prevention and fix of M-agent bugs.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了多模态智能体（M-agent）的实现缺陷，收集34个代表性M-agent，筛选出158个特定缺陷，构建了涵盖全局症状、功能组件症状和根本原因的分类体系，并开发了自动化缺陷识别工具MATester，在12个额外M-agent上覆盖61.4%已知问题并发现31个新缺陷。
AI.motivation: 多模态智能体在自动驾驶、机器人等复杂开放场景中表现优异，但其与动态多模态环境交互的特性带来了新颖的实现挑战，现有研究缺乏对M-agent特定实现缺陷的系统性分析。
AI.method: 收集34个代表性M-agent，从1268个issue报告中筛选出158个M-agent特定缺陷；采用自顶向下策略，构建按全局症状、功能组件症状和根本原因分类的分类体系；开发MATester工具，通过分析运行时组件间输出自动识别缺陷。
AI.result: 在12个额外M-agent上，MATester覆盖了61.4%的已知开放问题，并发现了31个额外缺陷，验证了研究的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为M-agent缺陷的分类、预防和修复提供了全面的参考和指南，填补了该领域系统性研究的空白。

title: Multi-Large Language Model Orchestrated Severity Assessment of Clinical Records (MOSAIC)
summary: Background: Disease severity is a multidimensional construct difficult to capture with rule-based approaches in Electronic Healthcare Records (EHR). Agentic large language model (LLM) systems could synthesise clinical evidence and reason over EHRs, but remain unevaluated for this task. Methods: MOSAIC is a two-phase agentic LLM framework for severity phenotyping, using type 2 diabetes (T2D) as a proof-of-concept. MOSAIC was evaluated on a synthetic cohort (SyntheticMass; open-weight N = 4,886; closed-weight N = 200) against three algorithmic ground truths (DCSI, DiSSCo, Cooper) and against all-cause mortality and incident complications. Open-weight (locally deployable) and proprietary pipelines were also compared. Results: The generated framework spanned domains absent from the comparators, including biomarker-based glycaemic staging, beta-cell function, and social determinants of health. Open-weight MOSAIC matched the proprietary pipeline (closed- vs open-weight weighted kappa = 0.773) and reached moderate agreement with Cooper (kappa = 0.597) and DCSI (kappa = 0.534) and fair agreement with DiSSCo (kappa = 0.320). Agent-based (Type 1) tiers showed significant separation of all-cause mortality (log-rank p < 0.001; crude hazard ratios 1.6-2.4 for non-Baseline tiers), with non-monotonic separation at the upper tiers, and an inverse gradient for incident complications (log-rank p < 0.001) consistent with depletion of susceptibles. Agentic classification also diverged from deterministic execution of the same rubric (MOSAIC Frozen; kappa = 0.428), indicating reasoning beyond fixed rules. Conclusion: MOSAIC shows agentic LLM systems can generate and apply clinically meaningful severity phenotypes from structured EHR data in T2D. Extending it to other diseases with similarly multidimensional severity warrants further research.

AI.tldr: MOSAIC是一个两阶段智能体LLM框架，用于从结构化EHR数据中生成和验证2型糖尿病严重程度表型。开放权重版本性能与专有版本相当，在死亡率分层上优于传统算法，并能识别传统方法未覆盖的维度（如生物标志物、β细胞功能、社会健康决定因素）。
AI.motivation: 疾病严重程度是多维度的，难以用基于规则的EHR方法准确捕获。现有算法（如DCSI、DiSSCo、Cooper）覆盖维度有限，而智能体LLM系统有望综合临床证据进行推理，但尚未针对此任务进行评估。
AI.method: 提出MOSAIC两阶段智能体LLM框架：第一阶段生成严重程度分层规则，第二阶段应用这些规则进行表型分类。以2型糖尿病为概念验证，在合成队列上评估，对比三种算法金标准，并比较开放权重与专有LLM管道。
AI.result: MOSAIC覆盖了传统算法缺失的维度（生物标志物血糖分期、β细胞功能、社会健康决定因素）。开放权重与专有管道一致性高（加权kappa=0.773）。与Cooper中度一致（kappa=0.597），与DCSI中度一致（kappa=0.534），与DiSSCo公平一致（kappa=0.320）。智能体分层在死亡率上显著分离（p<0.001），非单调分离提示易感人群耗竭效应。
AI.conclusion: 智能体LLM系统（如MOSAIC）能够从结构化EHR数据中生成并应用有临床意义的T2D严重程度表型，超越了固定规则方法。将该框架扩展到其他具有类似多维严重程度的疾病值得进一步研究。

title: SovereignPA-Bench: Evaluating User-Owned Personal Agents under Evolving Intent, Platform Mediation, and Consent Constraints
summary: Personal agents are becoming persistent user-owned intermediaries: they remember preferences, filter platform-mediated information, use tools, and negotiate with services. Existing benchmarks evaluate tool use, web navigation, desktop control, personalization, recommendation, and evolving context, but rarely ask whether an agent preserves user sovereignty: advancing the user's current interests while respecting privacy, consent, evidence, user burden, and resistance to manipulative incentives. We introduce SovereignPA-Bench, an executable benchmark for evaluating user-owned personal agents under evolving intent, platform mediation, privacy boundaries, consent constraints, evidence requirements, and burden tradeoffs. The benchmark separates agent-visible ObservableState from evaluator-only HiddenLabels, reports component metrics for task success, alignment, privacy, consent, evidence, manipulation, burden, and auditability, and preserves paired scenario ordering for model and policy comparisons. We evaluate 120 sovereignty stress scenarios across 4 model families and 8 policy baselines, yielding 3,840 frozen-prompt trajectories with raw prompts, outputs, provider-form responses, parsed actions, recomputable metrics, hard-set analyses, qualitative cases, and a blinded 3-annotator audit over 240 items. Full-sovereign scaffolding improves sovereignty score over direct, memory-only, consent-only, evidence-only, ReAct/tool-use, safety-prompt, and judge-guard baselines while reducing privacy leakage, consent violation, over-concession, and manipulation capture. Human audit shows high agreement on privacy and consent and lower agreement on manipulation, identifying the subjective frontier of platform-persuasion judgments. These results show that personal-agent evaluation must move beyond task completion toward representative, consent-aware, evidence-grounded action.

AI.tldr: 作者提出了SovereignPA-Bench基准，用于评估用户拥有的个人代理在保护用户主权（隐私、同意、证据、负担、抗操纵性）方面的能力，实验表明考虑完整主权的代理框架在多项指标上优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要评估智能体的工具使用、网页导航等任务完成能力，但忽略了智能体是否真正维护用户主权——即在推进用户当前利益的同时尊重隐私、同意、证据、用户负担并抵抗操纵性激励。
AI.method: 设计SovereignPA-Bench基准，区分智能体可见的ObservableState和仅评估者可用的HiddenLabels，包含120个主权压力场景，覆盖4个模型家族和8个策略基线，生成3,840条轨迹数据，并通过3人盲审进行审计。
AI.result: 完整主权支撑框架在主权得分上优于直接回答、仅记忆、仅同意、仅证据、ReAct/工具使用、安全提示、裁判守卫等基线，同时减少了隐私泄露、同意违规、过度让步和操纵捕获。人工审计显示隐私和同意的一致性高，但操纵判断的一致性较低。
AI.conclusion: 个人代理的评估必须从任务完成转向具有代表性的、知情的、基于证据的行动，需考虑用户主权维度。

title: SNR-Adaptive Unified Diffusion for Multi-Task Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Accepted to IEEE SMC 2026. 6 pages, 15 figures
summary: Clinical cardiac imaging pipelines currently deploy separate models for each dataset and modality, incurring redundant training costs and precluding knowledge sharing across anatomically related tasks. Consolidating semi-supervised learning, unsupervised domain adaptation, and domain generalisation into one model is therefore a practical necessity, yet naive joint training exposes a fundamental barrier: conflicting label semantics between datasets collapse LA Dice from 90.31\% to 83.38\%, while gradient imbalance across tasks of unequal complexity suppresses the weaker tasks throughout training. We present UniT-Diff, a unified diffusion segmentation framework that resolves these conflicts through three targeted mechanisms. An 11-channel task-specific output space physically partitions label categories, eliminating cross-task gradient sign reversal by construction. SNR-Adaptive Task Conditioning (SATC) scales the task token by the log signal-to-noise ratio of the current diffusion timestep, suppressing domain-specific bias during coarse denoising and restoring full task guidance as the signal clears. Task-Type-Aware Conditional Dropout (TTACD) permanently removes the task token for domain-generalisation inputs, routing them through a shared neutral pathway that draws on cross-dataset cardiac anatomy rather than source-vendor statistics. Under a single parameter set, UniT-Diff surpasses independently trained task-specific baselines on all three benchmarks simultaneously: +0.87\% on LA, +1.77\% on MMWHS, and +0.88\% on MNMS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniT-Diff统一扩散分割框架，通过任务特定输出空间、SNR自适应任务调节和任务类型感知条件丢弃三种机制，解决多数据集联合训练中的标签语义冲突和梯度不平衡问题，在三个心脏影像基准上超越独立任务基线。
AI.motivation: 现有心脏影像管线为每个数据集和模态单独部署模型，导致训练成本冗余且无法跨解剖相关任务共享知识。将半监督学习、无监督域适应和域泛化整合到单一模型是实际需求，但朴素联合训练面临标签语义冲突（LA Dice从90.31%降至83.38%）和梯度不平衡问题。
AI.method: UniT-Diff包含三个机制：(1) 11通道任务特定输出空间物理隔离标签类别，消除跨任务梯度符号反转；(2) SNR自适应任务调节(SATC)根据扩散时间步的信噪比缩放任务token，粗去噪时抑制域偏置，信号清晰时恢复任务引导；(3) 任务类型感知条件丢弃(TTACD)永久移除域泛化输入的任务token，引导其通过共享中性路径学习跨数据集心脏解剖特征。
AI.result: 在单一参数集下，UniT-Diff同时超越三个独立任务基线：LA +0.87%，MMWHS +1.77%，MNMS +0.88%。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性机制解决多任务联合训练中的标签冲突和梯度不平衡，UniT-Diff实现了统一框架下多心脏影像分割任务的同时提升，证明了跨数据集知识共享的可行性和有效性。

title: LLM-Based Test Oracles: Source-of-Authority Taxonomy -- A Systematic Literature Review
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures, 7 tables. Systematic literature review. Submitted to IEEE Access
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to produce test oracles, the part of a test that decides whether observed behavior is correct. Yet a clear account of where these oracles draw their authority is missing. Prior secondary studies organize the area by oracle form or by LLM technique. None organizes it by the source of the verdict's authority, the property that governs how far a verdict can be trusted. This article presents a systematic literature review, conducted and reported under the PRISMA 2020 guidelines. From 2,436 records, an LLM pre-filter followed by independent dual human screening (reviewer agreement, a Cohen's kappa of 0.79) and full-text assessment yielded 54 included studies. We analyze these along three axes: the source of an oracle's authority, the form it takes, and the mechanism that adjudicates it. We characterize the landscape of domains, languages, models, and adaptation strategies. Specification-derived authority, though the most common single source, covers about half of the studies (28 of 54). The remaining 26 reach a verdict with no specification at all. The source of authority and the adjudication mechanism cross-cut: the same source is checked by several mechanisms and one mechanism serves several sources, so a label such as LLM-as-a-judge names a mechanism rather than a basis for trust. We further report how these oracles are evaluated and how they fail, and read the sparse and empty regions of the taxonomy as a research agenda. The protocol, search query, and per-study coding sheet are released as supplementary material.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统性文献综述（PRISMA 2020），分析了LLM生成测试预言（test oracles）的权威来源。从2436篇文献中筛选出54篇，发现规范推导的权威（specification-derived authority）占半数（28/54），其余26篇无规范支持。文章指出"LLM-as-a-judge"只是机制而非信任基础，并提出研究空白作为未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究按预言形式或LLM技术组织，但缺乏从权威来源（verdict authority）角度审视LLM测试预言的可信度。作者认为，明确预言判断的权威来源，才能理解其可信范围。
AI.method: 遵循PRISMA 2020指南进行系统文献综述：从2436篇记录出发，先由LLM预筛选，再经双人独立人工筛选（Cohen's κ=0.79），最终全文评估纳入54篇。从权威来源、形式、裁决机制三个维度分析。
AI.result: 规范推导的权威是最常见的单一来源（28/54），但其余26篇在无规范情况下做出裁决。权威来源与裁决机制呈交叉关系：同一来源可由多种机制检验，同一机制也可服务多个来源。"LLM-as-a-judge"实际上是机制而非信任基础。文章还报告了预言评估方式和失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM测试预言领域半数研究缺乏规范权威支撑，存在可信度隐患。分类学中的稀疏和空白区域构成了未来研究议程，提示需要更清晰的权威来源界定和评估框架。

title: Beyond Independent Labels: Schwartz-Geometry Decoding for Human Value Detection
summary: Human value detection is commonly formulated as sentence-level multi-label classification over the 19 refined Schwartz values, typically predicted as independent labels. Schwartz theory, however, describes them as a circular motivational continuum, in which adjacent values are compatible and opposing values are in tension. We ask whether this structure can be operationalized as an explicit output-space geometry and used as a soft bias rather than a hard constraint. On a DeBERTa-v3-base classifier, we compare two ways of injecting it: training-time geometry-aware objectives and a post-hoc Schwartz-aware energy decoder that scores whole label sets jointly. Across five seeds, training-time geometry gives only limited gains-no larger for the true continuum than for a random ordering-whereas the decoder makes label sets more coherent with the continuum-on theory-aware coherence metrics we introduce-at no cost to Macro-F1 or Micro-F1 (held fixed by its selection rule). The gain is specific to the true Schwartz ordering: it does not appear for a random permutation or an empirical co-occurrence graph through the identical decoder. A bounded Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct diagnostic shows that supplying the continuum at inference shifts behavior but does not match supervised structured prediction. Theory-aware decoding thus offers a lightweight, controllable way to make value detection faithful to its label space.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何将Schwartz价值观的圆形动机连续体结构注入价值检测模型。训练时引入几何感知目标收益有限，而后处理的Schwartz感知解码器能在不影响F1分数的情况下提升标签集的连续一致性，且这种提升仅对真实Schwartz排序有效。
AI.motivation: 现有价值检测通常将19个Schwartz价值观视为独立标签进行多标签分类，忽视了Schwartz理论中价值观呈圆形连续体结构（相邻兼容、对立冲突）。作者希望探究能否将这种结构显式地作为输出空间的几何偏置（软约束而非硬约束）来提升模型性能。
AI.method: 基于DeBERTa-v3-base分类器，比较两种注入方式：(1) 训练时几何感知目标（geometry-aware objectives）；(2) 后处理的Schwartz感知能量解码器（Schwartz-aware energy decoder），联合对整个标签集评分。并引入理论感知一致性指标（theory-aware coherence metrics）进行评估。
AI.result: 训练时几何方法提升有限，且对真实连续体和随机排序的效果无显著差异。而后处理解码器在不降低Macro-F1和Micro-F1的前提下，使标签集与理论连续体更一致。这种收益仅对真实Schwartz排序有效，对随机排列或经验共现图无效。大模型（Qwen2.5-72B）在推理时注入连续体可改变行为，但无法匹配监督结构化预测的水平。
AI.conclusion: 理论感知解码器是一种轻量级、可控的方式，能在不牺牲分类性能的前提下使价值检测更忠实于标签空间的结构。该方式优于训练时注入，且验证了圆形连续体对模型是有价值的先验知识。

title: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework
summary: Scaling pre-training, post-training, and test-time compute have become the central paradigms for improving the capabilities of LLMs. In this work, we identify verification, the ability to determine the correctness of a solution, as a new scaling axis. To unlock this and demonstrate its effectiveness, we introduce LLM-as-a-Verifier, a general-purpose verification framework that provides fine-grained feedback for agentic tasks without requiring additional training. Unlike standard LM judges that prompt LLMs to produce discrete scores for candidate solutions, LLM-as-a-Verifier computes the expectation over the distribution of scoring token logits to generate continuous scores. This probabilistic formulation enables verification to scale along multiple dimensions: (1) score granularity, (2) repeated evaluation, and (3) criteria decomposition. In particular, we show that scaling the scoring granularity leads to better separation between positive and negative solutions, resulting in more calibrated comparisons. Moreover, scaling repeated evaluation and criteria decomposition consistently lead to additional gains in verification accuracy through variance and complexity reduction. We further introduce a cost-efficient ranking algorithm for selecting the best solution among candidates using the verifier's continuous scores. LLM-as-a-Verifier achieves state-of-the-art performance on Terminal-Bench V2 (86.5%), SWE-Bench Verified (78.2%), RoboRewardBench (87.4%), and MedAgentBench (73.3%). Beyond verification, the fine-grained signals from LLM-as-a-Verifier can also serve as a proxy for estimating task progress. We build an extension for Claude Code, enabling developers to monitor and improve their own agentic systems. Finally, we show that LLM-as-a-Verifier can provide dense feedback for RL, improving the sample efficiency of SAC and GRPO on robotics and mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM-as-a-Verifier框架，通过计算评分token logits的期望分布生成连续分数，在无需额外训练的情况下为智能体任务提供细粒度验证。该框架在多个维度上扩展验证能力，并在Terminal-Bench V2等四个基准上达到SOTA。此外，验证信号还可用于估计任务进度和强化学习中的密集反馈。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩展范式（预训练、后训练和测试时计算）主要集中在提升LLM生成能力，但缺乏有效的验证机制来判断解决方案的正确性。作者希望将验证识别为一种新的扩展轴，通过细粒度、可扩展的验证框架来提升LLM在智能体任务中的表现。
AI.method: LLM-as-a-Verifier利用评分token logits的分布期望生成连续分数，而非传统的离散打分。该方法从三个维度扩展验证：（1）评分粒度：更细粒度能更好区分正负方案；（2）重复评估：通过方差降低提升准确率；（3）标准分解：通过复杂度降低提升准确率。同时提出基于连续分数的成本高效排序算法。
AI.result: 在Terminal-Bench V2（86.5%）、SWE-Bench Verified（78.2%）、RoboRewardBench（87.4%）和MedAgentBench（73.3%）四个基准上达到SOTA。验证信号可提升SAC和GRPO在机器人和数学推理任务上的样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 验证可作为LLM扩展的新轴，LLM-as-a-Verifier通过概率化连续评分实现了更灵活、可扩展的验证，并在多个智能体任务中验证了其有效性。该方法无需额外训练，且验证信号可服务于任务监控和强化学习，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: ExpoMotion: A Large-Scale Benchmark and A Householder Projection Network for Multi-Exposure Fusion
summary: Multi-Exposure Fusion (MEF) effectively extends dynamic range, but practical deployment is hindered by motion-induced ghosting and the scarcity of high-quality dynamic benchmarks. Current benchmarks largely neglect dynamic scenes and lack reliable ground truth, making it difficult to handle the complexity of real-world motions. In response, we introduce ExpoMotion, a large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate deghosting capabilities. Comprising 1,738 sequences and 10,909 images across diverse environments, it covers a wide range of motions and provides high-fidelity GTs constructed through an expert-guided acquisition pipeline. To tackle the complex dynamics and extreme conditions captured in this benchmark, we propose the Householder Orthogonal Projection network (HOP), which revisits MEF deghosting from a mathematical perspective via Householder transformation, decoupling multi-frame alignment into exposure pre-alignment and ghost filtering. Specifically, the Global Priors Illumination Alignment (GPIA) module first rectifies drastic dynamic range discrepancies by utilizing global statistics for exposure harmonization. Regarding ghost removal, our Householder Orthogonal Attention (HOA) models artifacts as orthogonal perturbations. By employing a dynamic Householder reflector, HOA effectively projects ghosts out of the feature manifold while preserving high-frequency details. Experiments demonstrate that our ExpoMotion dataset enables superior generalization and artifact-free detail restoration, while also validating the effectiveness and efficiency of the HOP method. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/Leo-LiuYao/ExpoMotion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出大规模去鬼影基准数据集ExpoMotion（1738序列/10909图像）及基于Householder正交投影的HOP网络，通过全局先验照明对齐（GPIA）和Householder正交注意力（HOA）模块，从数学角度解耦多帧对齐与鬼影消除，有效处理动态多曝光融合中的运动鬼影和极端光照条件。
AI.motivation: 现有MEF基准缺乏动态场景和高保真GT，难以处理真实世界运动复杂性；同时传统方法难以解耦动态范围校正与鬼影去除的耦合问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建ExpoMotion数据集：1738序列/10909图像，专家引导采集高保真GT；2) 提出HOP网络：GPIA模块利用全局统计量进行曝光预对齐，HOA模块通过动态Householder反射器将鬼影建模为正交扰动并投影出特征流形。
AI.result: ExpoMotion数据集实现更优泛化能力和无损细节恢复，HOP方法在去鬼影效果和效率上均验证有效。
AI.conclusion: ExpoMotion为动态MEF提供了可靠评测基准，HOP方法从几何变换角度提供了新颖的解耦思路，在复杂动态场景中兼顾去鬼影保真度与细节保持。

title: When AI Is Wrong on Purpose: How Students Respond to Buggy GenAI Code
summary: As Generative AI (GenAI) becomes increasingly central to software development, CS education is integrating prompt-centered workflows where students describe intended program behavior in natural language to elicit code. However, professional practice requires careful review and verification of GenAI-generated code that may appear correct while containing subtle faults. This creates a challenge for CS1-level activities, where current models often solve tasks correctly and reduce students' incentive to closely inspect generated outputs. We investigate how prompt-centered programming activities can be adapted to better foster these practices. Specifically, we explore an approach where realistic, runnable bugs are injected into otherwise correct solutions, thus requiring students to read and repair generated outputs. We analyzed 2,636 sessions from 917 students, and examined behavior across instances of naturally occurring prompt-related failures and deliberately injected bugs within each session. Our findings show that students responded differently across bug sources. Deliberately injected bugs more often led to direct code edits and higher next-attempt success, suggesting localized repair of near-miss solutions. Prompt-related failures instead more often led students to refine prompts by clarifying constraints, updating function signatures, adding edge cases, or reframing the task. Student reflections reinforce the emphasis on review and repair, describing useful practice in code understanding, code review, and debugging, as well as a more careful verification mindset and greater awareness of GenAI limitations. Ultimately, prompt-related failures and injected bugs together support a pedagogically useful GenAI workflow, where students practice both specification refinement through prompts and debugging through code editing.

AI.tldr: 本研究探索在CS1教学中，通过向GenAI生成的正确代码中注入真实可运行的bug，促使学生阅读和修复代码，从而培养代码审查与验证能力。分析917名学生的2636次编程会话发现，注入的bug引导学生进行直接代码编辑与局部修复，而提示词相关的失败则促使学生优化提示词。两种错误来源共同支持了提示词精炼与代码调试并重的教学流程。
AI.motivation: GenAI在编程教育中日益普及，但学生倾向于信任AI生成的代码而不仔细审查。现有CS1级别的提示词编程活动缺乏激励学生验证代码的机制，因此需要设计新的教学方式，让学生在实践中培养代码审查和调试的能力。
AI.method: 在正确解法中人为注入真实可运行的bug，让学生阅读并修复。收集917名学生的2636次编程会话数据，分析学生在自然发生的提示词相关失败和故意注入的bug下的行为差异。
AI.result: 注入的bug更多导致直接代码编辑且后续尝试成功率更高，提示词相关失败则引导学生优化提示词（如明确约束、更新函数签名、添加边界用例等）。学生反馈强调了代码理解、代码审查和调试能力的提升，以及更谨慎的验证心态和对GenAI局限性的意识。
AI.conclusion: 提示词相关失败与注入的bug在教学中互补：前者锻炼学生通过提示词精炼明确需求的能力，后者锻炼学生通过代码编辑调试修复的能力。两者结合可构建更具教学价值的GenAI编程工作流。

title: MIRAGE: Defending Long-Form RAG Against Misinformation Pollution
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) improves factuality by grounding LLMs in external evidence, but real-world retrieval is often polluted: semantically relevant passages may contain subtle misinformation, misleading framings, or fabrications. We introduce MIRAGE, a training-free, model-agnostic defense for long-form RAG. MIRAGE builds an NLI-based cross-document claim graph and applies a Defended-Claims Gate to either condition generation on a consistent, multi-source supported subset or to block retrieval and answer parametrically. We also release a minimal-edit pollution protocol spanning four perturbation families (Unambiguous, Conflicting, Misleading, Fabricated) to construct matched clean, mixed, and fully polluted evaluation regimes. Across four long-form QA benchmarks and multiple commercial and open-weight LLMs, pollution severely degrades vanilla RAG, while MIRAGE consistently restores factuality under mixed and fully polluted evidence and outperforms prior robust-RAG methods. Our implementation and datasets are available at https://github.com/SaadElDine/MIRAGE.

AI.tldr: MIRAGE是一种无需训练、模型无关的防御方法，通过构建NLI为基础的跨文档声明图，并应用Defended-Claims Gate来过滤污染证据，从而提升长文本RAG在检索污染场景下的事实正确性。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统在实际检索中常遇到语义相关但包含误导、虚假信息的污染文档，严重影响生成事实性，亟需一种不依赖训练或特定模型的鲁棒防御方法。
AI.method: 提出MIRAGE框架：1）构建基于NLI的跨文档声明图；2）通过Defended-Claims Gate选择多源一致支持的子集进行生成，或在污染严重时回退到参数化回答。
AI.result: 在四个长文本QA基准和多个商用/开源LLM上，污染严重降低了标准RAG性能，而MIRAGE在混合和完全污染场景下持续恢复事实性，并优于已有的鲁棒RAG方法。
AI.conclusion: MIRAGE有效应对检索污染，无需训练即可提升RAG系统的鲁棒性，并配套发布了最小编辑污染协议及评估数据集。

title: SiamixFormer: a fully-transformer Siamese network with temporal Fusion for accurate building detection and change detection in bi-temporal remote sensing images
summary: Building detection and change detection using remote sensing images can help urban and rescue planning. Moreover, they can be used for building damage assessment after natural disasters. Currently, most of the existing models for building detection use only one image (pre-disaster image) to detect buildings. This is based on the idea that post-disaster images reduce the model's performance because of presence of destroyed buildings. In this paper, we propose a siamese model, called SiamixFormer, which uses pre- and post-disaster images as input. Our model has two encoders and has a hierarchical transformer architecture. The output of each stage in both encoders is given to a temporal transformer for feature fusion in a way that query is generated from pre-disaster images and (key, value) is generated from post-disaster images. To this end, temporal features are also considered in feature fusion. Another advantage of using temporal transformers in feature fusion is that they can better maintain large receptive fields generated by transformer encoders compared with CNNs. Finally, the output of the temporal transformer is given to a simple MLP decoder at each stage. The SiamixFormer model is evaluated on xBD, and WHU datasets, for building detection and on LEVIR-CD and CDD datasets for change detection and could outperform the state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SiamixFormer的孪生网络模型，利用灾前和灾后遥感图像进行建筑物检测和变化检测，通过分层Transformer架构和时间Transformer进行特征融合，在多个数据集上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑物检测模型大多仅使用单张灾前图像，认为灾后图像中毁坏建筑会降低模型性能。本文旨在利用灾前和灾后图像的双时相信息，以更有效地进行建筑物检测和变化检测。
AI.method: 提出SiamixFormer孪生模型，包含两个编码器（分层Transformer架构），每个阶段的输出送入时间Transformer进行特征融合：查询(Query)来自灾前图像，键值对(Key, Value)来自灾后图像。融合后的特征送入简单的MLP解码器。
AI.result: 在xBD和WHU数据集上进行建筑物检测，在LEVIR-CD和CDD数据集上进行变化检测，均取得了优于现有最先进方法的结果。
AI.conclusion: 双时相输入结合时间Transformer可以有效提升建筑物检测和变化检测的性能，且能够保持Transformer编码器产生的大感受野优势。

title: Vidu S1: A Real-Time Interactive Video Generation Model
summary: We introduce Vidu S1, a real-time interactive video generation model supporting voice control of digital characters. Users can control video generation content at any moment through voice instructions. Vidu S1 supports infinite-length real-time video generation without blurring, drift, or visual distortion. Built with TurboDiffusion and TurboServe, Vidu S1 outputs 540p real-time videos at up to 42 FPS on regular consumer GPUs. Users can upload custom images of real people, anime, and pets, and choose different voice tones for personalized experiences. Experiments show that Vidu S1 achieves the best performance across all test metrics while fully meeting real-time inference requirements. A playable online demo is available at https://vidu.com/vidu-stream.

AI.tldr: Vidu S1是一个支持语音控制数字角色、可无限时长实时生成540p视频（最高42 FPS）的交互式视频生成模型，在消费级GPU上运行，效果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型多为离线生成，缺乏实时交互能力，用户无法在生成过程中通过自然语音控制视频内容，限制了数字角色在实时互动场景中的应用。
AI.method: 基于TurboDiffusion和TurboServe架构，支持语音指令实时控制视频内容生成，可上传自定义图像（真人、动漫、宠物）并选择不同语音音色，实现无限时长无模糊/漂移/失真的实时视频生成。
AI.result: 在消费级GPU上实现540p分辨率、最高42 FPS的实时视频生成，所有测试指标均达到最优性能，满足实时推理要求。
AI.conclusion: Vidu S1在实时交互式视频生成领域取得了领先成果，提供了可玩的在线Demo，验证了语音控制数字角色实时视频生成的可行性和优越性。

title: Can Code Specify a System Precisely Enough to Formally Verify It?
comment: 25 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Artifacts and reference models at https://github.com/jdubray/SysMoBench-1
summary: Formal verification is seldom applied to production software, because writing and maintaining a model has historically cost more than it returns. A companion study [1] extended SysMoBench [4] with a lower-cost alternative: specifications are graded against traces captured from the running system. It found that when large language models write the specifications, reliability is governed by the structure of the specification contract, not the language. This paper evaluates both on production software: the payment workflow of an operational restaurant point-of-sale system, which must keep the register, payment terminal, and payment processor in agreement. We report three results. First, the core protocol is correct relative to a hand-built, line-cited model under a precisely stated failure model. The audit found seven failure-handling gaps, nearly all with a common root cause; three were reproduced as real executions, and a patch closing them was re-checked with all failure gates enabled, after which a follow-up patch closed a defect the re-check itself exposed. Systematic extensions of the failure model (crash-restart, stale reads, two attempts) each found the windows they were designed to probe. Second, a single probe of the production payment sandbox exposed a response-shape divergence that makes an entire recovery ladder unreachable against the live API. The emulator-based audit could not detect it, because code and emulator share the same misreading: a correlated-oracle failure. Third, the companion study's central finding replicates across seven models from two vendors: contract structure, not language, governs what LLMs specify reliably. The replication concerns the ordering of contracts and the failure taxonomy, not the absolute level: only the strongest models reached the corpus ceiling, and the harder task restores discriminating power the benchmark had lost.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了在正式验证生产级软件（餐厅POS系统支付工作流）时，LLM编写规范的可靠性。发现协议核心正确但存在7个故障处理漏洞；生产沙箱暴露了模拟器无法检测的响应形状分歧；验证了同行研究结论：规范合同的**结构**（而非语言）决定LLM可靠性。
AI.motivation: 正式验证很少应用于生产软件，因为编写和维护模型的成本高于收益。本文尝试用低成本替代方案（基于运行时轨迹分级规范）来评估生产级支付系统的正确性。
AI.method: 1) 对POS系统支付工作流建立手工、逐行引用的模型，在精确故障模型下验证核心协议。2) 用LLM生成规范，比较不同合同结构和语言对可靠性的影响。3) 通过生产沙箱探测与模拟器对比，发现相关Oracle失效。
AI.result: 1) 发现7个故障处理缺口，根因相同；3个可重现为真实执行。2) 生产沙箱暴露了一个响应形状分歧，使整个恢复阶梯不可达；模拟器无法检测（相关Oracle失效）。3) 跨7个模型证实：合同结构而非语言决定LLM可靠性；最强模型才达语料库上限，更难任务恢复了基准的区分能力。
AI.conclusion: 正式验证生产级支付协议可以低成本进行且能发现真实缺陷；LLM规范可靠性由合同结构主导；模拟器与真实API之间存在相关Oracle失效问题，需要结合生产探测才能全面评估。

title: Rating the Pitch, Not the Product: User Evaluations of LLMs Reflect Expectations More Than Performance
summary: Imagine two users interact with the same LLM. One has been told it is the cutting-edge flagship model; the other, an older, weaker model. They walk away with markedly different ratings of its usefulness and intelligence, yet they used the same model. In a controlled study, 162 participants each used one of six LLMs from two families across three collaborative tasks, after first viewing a landing page that matched, overstated, or understated their model's true capability. This pre-interaction framing shifted user opinions and interaction behavior while task performance did not. Oversold users rated the model more favorably and used more directive prompting, while Undersold users wrote longer, more collaborative prompts. The quality of what users and the model produced together depended only on the model's true capability, not on what users were told. Participants' change in model impressions after use, measured across two impression measures, was not predicted by task performance ($β= -0.01$ and $0.11$, both n.s.), but by whether the model met users' expectations ($β= 0.47$ and $0.50$, both $p < .001$) and how confident they felt working with it ($β= 0.47$ and $0.36$, both $p < .001$). After interaction, users are still rating the pitch, not the product: user-elicited LLM evaluations, including the preference data driving public leaderboards, measure expectation management at least as much as the model itself.

AI.tldr: 用户对LLM的评价更多取决于预期管理而非模型真实能力。预先告知模型是旗舰版或旧版会显著改变用户评分和行为，但不会影响实际任务表现。用户对模型的印象变化主要预测因素是期望是否被满足和工作信心，而非任务表现。
AI.motivation: 探究用户对LLM的主观评价在多大程度上反映模型真实能力，还是受到交互前预期的影响。
AI.method: 162名参与者分别使用两个家族的六种LLM完成三项协作任务。任务前，参与者看到的登陆页面会匹配、夸大或低估模型真实能力。测量用户评分、交互行为和任务表现。
AI.result: 预期操控显著改变了用户评分和交互行为（被夸大的用户评分更高、使用更多指令性提示；被低估的用户写更长、更协作的提示），但任务表现仅取决于模型真实能力。用户印象变化不由任务表现预测，而由期望是否被满足和工作信心预测。
AI.conclusion: 用户对LLM的评价更多反映的是预期管理效果而非模型本身。通过用户 elicitation 获得的LLM评估（包括驱动公开排行榜的偏好数据）至少与模型本身一样多地衡量了预期管理。

title: PotatoGANs: Utilizing Generative Adversarial Networks, Instance Segmentation, and Explainable AI for Enhanced Potato Disease Identification and Classification
summary: Numerous applications have resulted from the automation of agricultural disease segmentation using deep learning techniques. However, when applied to new conditions, these applications frequently face the difficulty of overfitting, resulting in lower segmentation performance. In the context of potato farming, where diseases have a large influence on yields, it is critical for the agricultural economy to quickly and properly identify these diseases. Traditional data augmentation approaches, such as rotation, flip, and translation, have limitations and frequently fail to provide strong generalization results. To address these issues, our research employs a novel approach termed as PotatoGANs. In this novel data augmentation approach, two types of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are utilized to generate synthetic potato disease images from healthy potato images. This approach not only expands the dataset but also adds variety, which helps to enhance model generalization. Using the Inception score as a measure, our experiments show the better quality and realisticness of the images created by PotatoGANs, emphasizing their capacity to resemble real disease images closely. The CycleGAN model outperforms the Pix2Pix GAN model in terms of image quality, as evidenced by its higher IS scores CycleGAN achieves higher Inception scores (IS) of 1.2001 and 1.0900 for black scurf and common scab, respectively. This synthetic data can significantly improve the training of large neural networks. It also reduces data collection costs while enhancing data diversity and generalization capabilities. Our work improves interpretability by combining three gradient-based Explainable AI algorithms (GradCAM, GradCAM++, and ScoreCAM) with three distinct CNN architectures (DenseNet169, Resnet152 V2, InceptionResNet V2) for potato disease classification.

AI.tldr: 提出PotatoGANs方法，利用两种GAN（CycleGAN和Pix2Pix）从健康马铃薯图像生成合成病害图像进行数据增强，并结合三种可解释AI算法与三种CNN架构进行病害分类。实验表明CycleGAN生成图像质量更优，Inception分数更高。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在农业病害分割中常因过拟合导致在新条件下性能下降，传统数据增强方法（旋转、翻转、平移）存在局限性且泛化能力不足。马铃薯病害对产量影响重大，需要快速准确的识别方法。
AI.method: 提出PotatoGANs方法，使用两种GAN（CycleGAN和Pix2Pix）从健康马铃薯图像生成合成病害图像以扩充数据集。同时结合三种梯度可解释AI算法（GradCAM、GradCAM++、ScoreCAM）与三种CNN架构（DenseNet169、Resnet152 V2、InceptionResNet V2）进行病害分类。
AI.result: CycleGAN在图像质量上优于Pix2Pix，对黑痂病和普通疮痂病的Inception分数分别达到1.2001和1.0900。生成的合成数据能有效提升大型神经网络的训练效果，降低数据采集成本，增强数据多样性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PotatoGANs是一种有效的数据增强方法，能够生成高质量合成病害图像，提升模型泛化能力并降低数据成本，对马铃薯病害识别具有实际应用价值。

title: A Multi-Task Deep Learning Framework for Real-Time Intelligent Video Surveillance with Temporal Event Validation
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. Project repository available at: https://github.com/DumitruEstera/ai-surveillance-system
summary: Modern video surveillance systems generate far more video streams than human operators can effectively monitor, making automated analysis essential for timely detection of security events. This paper presents a unified multi-task deep learning framework that simultaneously performs face recognition with zone-based authorization, automatic license plate recognition, weapon detection, fire and smoke detection, and human action recognition on a shared GPU platform. Among the integrated modules, two task-specific deep-learning models are proposed in this work to address scenarios that are insufficiently represented in publicly available datasets: a single-class weapon detector fine-tuned on a merged and relabeled dataset, achieving a mean average precision (mAP@0.5) of 0.947, and a SlowFast-R50 action recognition model trained on a purpose-built vandalism dataset comprising 614 video clips, achieving 94.33% classification accuracy. To improve robustness in continuous video, all detection modules are integrated into a temporal event-validation architecture based on multi-frame confirmation, confidence-weighted voting, and cascaded filtering, transforming frame-level predictions into reliable security events. Each module is evaluated independently on established public datasets (LFW, D-Fire, FIRESENSE, and UCF-Crime), followed by integrated end-to-end system evaluation. The proposed temporal validation strategy reduces the fire and smoke false-alarm rate from 52% to 4% and improves video license plate exact-match accuracy from 66.7% to 81.8%, while the complete framework maintains real-time operation with a per-frame latency below 100 ms on commodity hardware. These results demonstrate that combining specialized deep-learning models with temporal event validation provides an effective and practical solution for reliable real-time intelligent video surveillance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的多任务深度学习框架，在共享GPU平台上同时执行人脸识别、车牌识别、武器检测、火灾烟雾检测及行为识别。特别针对公开数据集中代表性不足的场景，提出了单类武器检测器（mAP@0.5=0.947）和基于SlowFast-R50的故意破坏行为识别模型（准确率94.33%）。通过多帧确认、置信度加权投票和级联滤波的时间事件验证架构，将帧级预测转化为可靠安全事件，将火灾烟雾误报率从52%降至4%，车牌精确匹配率从66.7%提升至81.8%，且保持实时运行（<100ms/帧）。
AI.motivation: 现代视频监控系统产生的视频流远超人类监控能力，需要自动化分析来及时检测安全事件。现有方法在武器检测和特定行为识别（如故意破坏）等场景中数据不足，且缺乏统一的多任务框架与时间维度验证机制，导致误报率高、实用性差。
AI.method: 1）构建统一多任务深度学习框架，集成人脸识别、车牌识别、武器检测、火灾烟雾检测、行为识别五个模块；2）提出单类武器检测器（基于合并重标注数据集微调）；3）构建SlowFast-R50行为识别模型（基于614个视频片段的故意破坏数据集）；4）设计时间事件验证架构，包括多帧确认、置信度加权投票和级联滤波。
AI.result: 武器检测器mAP@0.5=0.947；故意破坏行为识别准确率94.33%；火灾烟雾误报率从52%降至4%；车牌精确匹配率从66.7%提升至81.8%；端到端延迟<100ms/帧。
AI.conclusion: 将专用深度学习模型与时间事件验证相结合，能够为实时智能视频监控提供可靠实用的解决方案，大幅降低误报率的同时保持实时性能。

title: RepoTrace: Browser-Assisted Evidence Collection for GitHub Research Datasets
summary:
Empirical software engineering studies frequently build datasets from GitHub issues and pull requests. In many projects, researchers inspect pages in a browser, copy selected fields into spreadsheets, keep side notes in separate documents, and later run scripts to normalize or export the data. This workflow is flexible, but the page evidence, the research codes, and the rationale behind each decision end up spread across tabs and files, which leaves provenance, update tracking, and multi-reviewer labeling hard to audit.
  RepoTrace is a browser-assisted research tool that collects GitHub issue and pull-request evidence into a local SQLite-backed workspace. It combines a Chrome side-panel extension, an Express backend, and a React dashboard to capture page snapshots, comments, labels, notes, screening and labeling decisions, refresh history, and scoped exports, keeping the source evidence and the research interpretation linked together.
  A validation pass collected and checked 20 Matplotlib issues across two study projects. The resulting dataset preserves 22 snapshots, 38 comments, 20 research notes, 98 annotations, 20 screening reviews, 20 fix-evidence entries, and 4 simulated unresolved consensus conflicts. The results show that RepoTrace can support a complete local evidence-collection workflow for manually constructed GitHub issue and pull-request datasets.

AI.tldr: RepoTrace 是一个浏览器辅助研究工具，用于收集 GitHub issue 和 pull request 证据，将其整合到本地 SQLite 工作区，支持完整的手动数据收集工作流，并保留溯源信息。
AI.motivation: 现有 GitHub 数据收集工作流中，页面证据、研究代码和决策依据分散在多个标签页和文件中，导致溯源、更新跟踪和多审阅者标注难以审计。
AI.method: RepoTrace 结合 Chrome 侧边栏扩展、Express 后端和 React 仪表盘，捕获页面快照、评论、标签、笔记、筛选和标注决策、刷新历史及作用域导出，将源证据与研究解释关联。
AI.result: 通过收集并检查 20 个 Matplotlib issue，验证了 RepoTrace 能够保存 22 个快照、38 条评论、20 条研究笔记、98 个标注、20 个筛选审查、20 个修复证据条目和 4 个模拟的未解决共识冲突。
AI.conclusion: RepoTrace 能够支持手动构建 GitHub issue 和 pull request 数据集的完整本地证据收集工作流。

title: EdgeBench: Unveiling Scaling Laws of Learning from Real-World Environments
summary: Pretraining scaling laws reveal that model capability improves predictably with data and compute. But learning from real world environments after deployment remains far less understood. Analyzing roughly 38,000 hours of agent interaction with the environment across 134 real world tasks, we find, to the best of our knowledge, the first evidence that overall performance during environment learning follows a log-sigmoid scaling law with remarkably high precision, reaching R^2 = 0.998. Across model generations, we also find that agent learning speed roughly doubles every three months. This discovery stems from EdgeBench, a suite of 134 real world tasks with ultra-long horizons, spanning scientific discovery, software engineering, combinatorial optimization, professional knowledge work, formal mathematics, and interactive games. Each task sustains at least 12 hours of continuous agent operation under rich, multilevel feedback, and is built through substantial expert effort. We publicly release 51 tasks and our full evaluation framework to accelerate the study of how agents learn from real world experience.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对134个真实世界任务中约38,000小时的智能体交互数据进行分析，首次发现智能体在环境学习中的整体性能遵循对数Sigmoid缩放定律（R²=0.998），并发现智能体学习速度大约每三个月翻倍。基于此，作者发布了EdgeBench基准测试套件及51个开源任务。
AI.motivation: 预训练缩放定律已揭示模型能力随数据和计算量可预测提升，但部署后从真实环境学习的行为尚不明确。作者旨在探索智能体在真实世界经验中的学习规律。
AI.method: 收集EdgeBench套件中134个真实世界任务（涵盖科学发现、软件工程等领域），每个任务需至少12小时连续操作并有多级反馈。分析约38,000小时的智能体交互数据，拟合性能随交互时间的变化曲线。
AI.result: 整体性能遵循对数Sigmoid缩放定律，拟合精度极高（R²=0.998）；跨模型代际，智能体学习速度约每三个月翻倍。
AI.conclusion: 真实环境中的智能体学习也存在高度可预测的缩放规律，且学习速度呈指数级增长。EdgeBench为研究提供了重要基准，开源部分任务以推动该领域发展。

title: Specific Domain Ontology Construction Using Large Language Models
summary: Ontologies are useful structures to organize and maintain information that can be understood both by humans and systems. However, since their manual crafting is a laborious task, many specific domains lack reference ontologies. The outstanding ability for understanding natural language demonstrated by the Large Language Models (LLMs) has motivated their application to aid on a variety of fields, including on ontology development. This work presents the experimentation with a technique that uses LLMs in the role of domain experts to build conceptual hierarchies for a given initial concept. Twenty ontologies automatically constructed for the domain of the Brazilian maritime territory (a.k.a the Blue Amazon) using GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 were then evaluated by human experts. The models were able to construct overall coherent conceptualizations of the domain, but none of the outputs was completely satisfactory as a representation of the context without refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文实验利用LLM（GPT-3.5/GPT-4）作为领域专家自动构建本体概念层次，以巴西蓝色亚马逊海域为例构建20个本体，经人类专家评估：模型能生成整体连贯的概念化，但所有输出均需进一步精炼才能完全令人满意。
AI.motivation: 本体手工构建耗时费力，许多特定领域缺乏参考本体，因此探索利用LLM的自然语言理解能力来自动辅助本体开发。
AI.method: 让GPT-3.5和GPT-4扮演领域专家角色，针对给定初始概念自动构建概念层次结构，生成20个关于巴西海域（蓝色亚马逊）的本体。
AI.result: 模型能构建整体连贯的领域概念化，但没有一个输出能无需精炼就完全令人满意。
AI.conclusion: LLM有潜力辅助本体构建，但目前自动生成的输出仍需人工精炼，不能直接作为最终领域表示。

title: Text as Partial Constraint: Core-Residual Alignment for Robust Vision-Language Learning
summary: Vision-language alignment powers open-vocabulary recognition, retrieval, and LVLM grounding, yet natural captions are often underspecified, making similarity brittle and overly confident under paraphrase and omitted details. We aim to learn representations whose matching is stable across caption views and whose confidence reflects how strongly text constrains an image. We propose Text as Partial Constraint (TPC), a core-residual alignment framework that treats multi-view captions as incomplete supervision. It distills a consensus semantic core as the alignment target, learns a single-view core predictor for standard inference with one query, and explicitly discourages vision-language similarity from depending on the orthogonal unsaid residual. An uncertainty-aware contrastive objective further softens alignment when caption views disagree, reducing overconfident updates under weak language constraints. Across zero-shot recognition and adversarial robustness, TPC achieves 81.42/64.05 Top-1 clean/robust accuracy on ImageNet and 76.19/52.03 on an Avg-14 transfer suite, while improving LVLM transfer with 85.16 POPE F1 and 59.57 OKVQA accuracy under an LLaVA-1.5-7B stack. These results suggest that modeling text as a partial constraint is a practical and principled route to more reliable vision-language representations under underspecified language supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Text as Partial Constraint (TPC)框架，将多视角字幕视为不完全监督，通过提取共识语义核心作为对齐目标、学习单视角核心预测器、抑制视觉-语言相似度对未表述残差的依赖，并引入不确定性感知的对比目标来软化对齐，从而在图像识别、鲁棒性和LVLM迁移等多种任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 自然语言字幕往往表述不完整（underspecified），导致视觉-语言对齐模型在释义和省略细节时表现脆弱且过度自信。现有方法缺乏对文本作为部分约束这一特性的建模。
AI.method: 提出TPC框架：1）核心-残差对齐框架，将多视角字幕视为不完全监督；2）蒸馏共识语义核心作为对齐目标；3）学习单视角核心预测器用于单查询标准推理；4）明确抑制视觉-语言相似度对未表述残差部分的依赖；5）不确定性感知的对比目标，在字幕视角不一致时软化对齐，减少弱语言约束下的过度自信更新。
AI.result: 零样本识别和对抗鲁棒性：ImageNet上81.42/64.05 Top-1干净/鲁棒准确率；Avg-14迁移套件上76.19/52.03；LVLM迁移：LLaVA-1.5-7B下POPE F1 85.16，OKVQA准确率59.57。
AI.conclusion: 将文本建模为部分约束是一种实用且原则性的方法，能够在语言监督不完备的情况下获得更可靠的视觉-语言表征。

title: From Failing to Passing: Evolving Natural Language Prompt Optimization Rules for LLM Code Generation
summary: Large language models are known to be sensitive to prompt formulation. Even minor variations in wording can substantially degrade performance. This sensitivity reveals an opportunity: if prompt phrasing can harm performance, can it be used to improve it? To investigate this question, we introduce a search-based approach that identifies and evolves a set of natural language transformation rules with strong downstream effects on coding performance. We then propose DUALFIX, a staged repair pipeline that combines the evolved transformation rules with execution-feedback repair, addressing both specification-level and implementation-level failures. A key strength of our approach lies in its generality: the evolved rules are error-agnostic, reusable across problems, and transferable across models. We evaluate DUALFIX against execution-feedback repair baselines across three models on two challenging benchmarks, LiveCodeBench and APPS. Our results show that the evolved transformations fix from 10-30% of failing cases, including 12-17% of failures that execution-based repair alone cannot resolve. Overall, DualFix recovers up to 30% of baseline failures and fixes 3-5 times more failing cases than Self-Fix across all evaluated settings. Furthermore, we also show that rules evolved on one model transfer zero-shot to other models, outperforming execution-feedback repair without any re-optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出DUALFIX框架，通过搜索演进自然语言转换规则，结合执行反馈修复，解决LLM对提示措辞敏感导致的代码生成失败问题，在多个基准上修复10-30%的失败案例，且规则可跨模型迁移。
AI.motivation: LLM对提示措辞高度敏感，微小变化会导致性能大幅下降。作者试图利用这种敏感性——既然措辞变化可以损害性能，是否也能用来提升性能？
AI.method: 提出DUALFIX两阶段修复流水线：(1) 搜索演进一组自然语言转换规则，这些规则错误无关、可复用、可跨模型迁移；(2) 结合执行反馈修复，分别处理规约级别和实现级别的失败。
AI.result: 在LiveCodeBench和APPS上，DUALFIX修复了10-30%的失败案例，其中12-17%是纯执行反馈修复无法解决的；相比Self-Fix提升3-5倍；演进规则可零样本跨模型迁移并优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 提示措辞转换是一种有效且通用的代码生成修复策略，演进出的规则具有跨问题、跨模型的泛化能力，为提升LLM代码生成鲁棒性提供了新思路。

title: RABBiT: Rapidly adaptive BOLD foundation model via brain-tuning for accurate zero-shot and few-shot prediction of speech-elicited responses in the brain
summary: Language understanding in the brain is context-dependent, varying across experimental stimuli and individuals, which makes it difficult to build computational models that generalize across both. This calls for a foundation model of language-evoked brain activity that can capture shared structure while adapting efficiently to new participants and inputs. We introduce RABBiT (Rapidly Adaptive BOLD foundation model via BraIn-Tuning), a compact audio-to-fMRI encoder designed for accurate zero- and few-shot prediction. A comprehensive evaluation on 324 participants across multiple unseen fMRI datasets shows that RABBiT enables accurate zero-shot prediction of fMRI responses to natural speech across auditory and language-selective regions, surpassing the SOTA foundation model for fMRI and predictions based on group averages. With as little as 10 minutes of participant-specific data, RABBiT further improves performance via parameter-efficient tuning, substantially outperforming per-participant linear models. RABBiT's performance is driven by two key innovations: (1) learned region-specific attention, and (2) a decomposition of brain responses into shared and subject-specific components, combined with a brain-tuned speech backbone. In addition to supporting strong predictive accuracy, the structured, region-specific representations that RABBiT learns enable interpretability. By eliminating the need for extensive per-participant data and model fitting, RABBiT enables scalable population-level analyses of language in the human brain. We make the code available at https://github.com/bridge-ai-neuro/rabbit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RABBiT，一种用于fMRI语音预测的快速自适应基础模型，通过脑调优、区域注意力机制和共享-个体分解，在324名参与者上实现零样本和少样本精准预测，仅需10分钟个体数据即可微调，性能超越现有SOTA。
AI.motivation: 大脑语言理解具有上下文依赖性，在不同实验刺激和个体间差异显著，现有模型难以同时实现跨参与者与跨刺激的泛化，亟需一个既能捕获共享结构又能高效适应新参与者与输入的基础模型。
AI.method: (1) 学习区域特异性注意力机制；(2) 将大脑响应分解为共享成分与个体特异性成分；(3) 结合脑调优的语音骨干网络，构建紧凑的音频到fMRI编码器；支持参数高效微调以适配新个体。
AI.result: 在324名参与者、多个未见fMRI数据集上，RABBiT实现了准确的零样本自然语言fMRI响应预测，超越SOTA基础模型和群体平均预测；仅10分钟个体数据即可通过高效微调大幅优于线性模型。
AI.conclusion: RABBiT通过区域注意力和共享-个体分解两大创新，实现了强预测性能与可解释性，消除了对大量个体数据的依赖，为可扩展的群体层面大脑语言分析奠定了基础。

title: DistillH-Mamba: A Hypergraph-Mamba-Based Knowledge Distillation Model for Efficient Impact Fall Detection
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures. Published in IEEE Sensors Journal, 2025
summary: Falls among the elderly represent a significant public health concern due to their prevalence, consequences, and societal burden. While deep learning has improved fall detection, accurately identifying impact moments (when an individual hits the ground) remains challenging. Additionally, current algorithms often rely on complex models with high computational demands, limiting real-time deployment feasibility. In this work, we propose DistillH-Mamba, a novel architecture for impact fall detection that addresses these challenges through three key innovations: First, we introduce a hypergraph-based approach that captures higher-order relationships between multiple joints simultaneously, enabling more accurate modeling of complex interactions during impact falls. Second, we integrate the Mamba architecture with hypergraphs for impact detection, significantly accelerating processing speed while efficiently capturing both long-term dependencies and sudden skeletal motion changes. Third, we employ relational knowledge distillation that preserves crucial spatial-temporal relationships while reducing computational demands for real-time impact fall detection. Evaluated on the 3D Skeletons UP-Fall and UMAFall datasets, our DistillH-Mamba model achieves 97.38% accuracy in detecting impact within fall events and 73.8% reduction in inference time compared to its teacher model, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in both precision and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出DistillH-Mamba架构，结合超图、Mamba和知识蒸馏技术，在3D骨骼数据上实现高精度(97.38%)、低延迟(推理时间减少73.8%)的跌倒撞击检测。
AI.motivation: 老年人跌倒是重大公共卫生问题，现有深度学习方法虽能检测跌倒，但难以准确识别撞击时刻（身体接触地面的瞬间），且模型复杂、计算需求高，限制了实时部署。
AI.method: 提出DistillH-Mamba架构，包含三项创新：(1) 基于超图的方法捕获多关节间高阶关系；(2) 将Mamba架构与超图集成，加速处理速度并捕捉长期依赖与突发骨骼运动变化；(3) 采用关系知识蒸馏在降低计算需求的同时保留关键时空关系。
AI.result: 在3D Skeletons UP-Fall和UMAFall数据集上，DistillH-Mamba达到97.38%的撞击检测准确率，推理时间比教师模型减少73.8%，在精度和效率上均超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DistillH-Mamba通过超图+Mamba+知识蒸馏的创新组合，在保持高精度的同时大幅降低计算开销，为实时跌倒撞击检测提供了可行方案。

title: Three-Phase Evaluation of AI-Assisted Software Development Life Cycle
summary: This paper presents an exploratory evaluation of how increasing levels of AI autonomy affect software development productivity, requirement adherence, and developer cognitive workload. A team of four developers reimplemented the same full-stack web application across three sequential phases: partial AI-assisted development using GitHub Copilot, an AI-exclusive workflow using GitHub Copilot, and an AI-exclusive workflow using AWS Kiro. Evaluation metrics included development effort (hours), requirement adherence (RITM score), AI-interaction efficiency, and NASA-TLX workload measures. Across phases, higher levels of AI autonomy were associated with reduced development effort, improved requirement adherence, and lower self-reported mental workload, while developer frustration increased modestly. The AWS Kiro phase achieved the strongest overall performance on most measured dimensions, suggesting that tooling architecture may influence outcomes independently of AI autonomy level.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过四名开发者分三个阶段重实现同一全栈应用，评估AI自主性提升对软件开发效率、需求符合度和认知负荷的影响。结果显示，更高AI自主性减少了开发工时，提升了需求符合度，降低了心理负荷，但开发者挫败感略有上升。AWS Kiro阶段表现最优，表明工具架构本身也可能影响结果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对AI不同自主性水平（从辅助到全自主）如何系统影响软件开发效率、需求符合度及开发者认知负荷的实证评估。
AI.method: 四名开发者分三阶段重实现同一全栈应用：阶段一为部分AI辅助（GitHub Copilot），阶段二为AI独占（GitHub Copilot），阶段三为AI独占（AWS Kiro）。测量开发工时、需求符合度（RITM评分）、AI交互效率及NASA-TLX认知负荷。
AI.result: 更高AI自主性降低了开发工时，提升了需求符合度，降低了自评心理负荷，但开发者挫败感略有增加。AWS Kiro阶段在多数指标上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: AI自主性提升对开发效率和质量有正向作用，但挫败感增加值得关注；工具架构（如AWS Kiro）对结果有独立于自主性水平的显著影响。

title: Unified Audio Intelligence Without Regressing on Text Intelligence
summary: Audio intelligence involves understanding, reasoning about, and generating both audio and speech. In this work, we introduce Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B (Audex), a unified audio-text LLM built on Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B, a strong text-only MoE LLM. Audex adopts a simple unified design with a single Transformer decoder: audio inputs are encoded and projected into the text embedding space, while text tokens and quantized audio output tokens are treated uniformly during generation. This architecture enables strong audio-text fusion, seamless multimodal generation, and compatibility with standard LLM training and inference infrastructure. For training, we meticulously curate audio-text datasets comprising 157.4B audio tokens and 320.5B text tokens. We apply multi-stage supervised training on these datasets, followed by text-only Cascade RL and multi-domain on-policy distillation. Audex delivers state-of-the-art audio understanding, speech recognition and translation, text-to-speech, audio generation, and speech-to-speech generation, while preserving very compelling reasoning, alignment, knowledge, long-context, and agentic capabilities of its text-only LLM backbone with marginal or no regression. We release the model checkpoints to facilitate open research.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍 Audex，一个基于 Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B 的统一音频-文本大语言模型，采用单 Transformer 解码器架构实现音频与文本的深度融合与多模态生成，通过多阶段监督训练及强化学习，在音频理解、语音识别翻译、TTS、音频生成、语音到语音生成等任务上达到最先进水平，同时保持文本骨干的推理、对齐、知识等能力。
AI.motivation: 构建一个统一的音频-文本大语言模型，实现音频理解与生成的无缝融合，同时保留强大的纯文本能力，避免传统多模型拼凑方案带来的架构复杂性和能力退化。
AI.method: 基于 Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B 文本 MoE 大模型，采用单 Transformer 解码器架构：音频输入经编码和投影映射到文本嵌入空间，生成时统一处理文本 token 和量化音频输出 token。使用精心整理的 1574 亿音频 token 和 3205 亿文本 token 数据集进行多阶段监督训练，随后进行纯文本 Cascade RL 和多领域 on-policy 蒸馏。
AI.result: 在音频理解、语音识别/翻译、TTS、音频生成、语音到语音生成等任务上达到最先进水平，同时保持文本骨干模型的推理、对齐、知识、长上下文和智能体能力基本无退化。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了统一的单 Transformer 架构能够有效融合音频与文本模态，在多种音频相关任务上实现 SOTA，且不牺牲文本能力，为多模态大语言模型提供了一种简洁有效的设计范式。

title: Rethinking Brain Decoding with CLIP: The Role of Adversarial Robustness
summary: Brain decoding aims to uncover neural mechanisms by inferring stimulus-related representations from brain signals. In fMRI studies, this is typically achieved by mapping fMRI responses to the latent representations of computational models. Recently, CLIP has become a popular choice for brain decoding due to its rich vision--language embedding space. However, aligning fMRI signals with CLIP representations remains challenging. As CLIP is not explicitly optimized for neural alignment, its representations may capture statistically predictive cues that are only partially reflected in brain activity, limiting decoding performance. In this paper, we investigate whether adversarially robust representations improve neural decoding with CLIP. Adversarial training suppresses non-robust features and promotes more stable, perceptually structured representations, which may better align with brain activity. We evaluate this by fixing the fMRI decoder and varying only the target representation (standard CLIP vs. robust variants) on fMRI-image retrieval and zero-shot classification tasks across NSD and GOD datasets. Empirical results show that this simple change consistently improves task performance and yields stronger alignment across multiple metrics. Attribution analysis further reveals consistently low agreement between standard CLIP and its robust variants, suggesting that adversarial robustness reorganizes feature importance in the visual representation. These findings suggest that the choice of target representation influences neural decoding performance and that adversarial robustness may serve as a useful criterion for brain decoding.

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用对抗鲁棒的CLIP表示进行fMRI脑解码，发现相比标准CLIP，对抗训练后的鲁棒表示能更好地与脑活动对齐，显著提升检索和分类任务性能。
AI.motivation: 标准CLIP并非针对神经对齐优化，其表示中的统计预测线索可能部分偏离脑活动，从而限制解码性能。作者希望探索对抗鲁棒表示是否能改善这一问题。
AI.method: 固定fMRI解码器，仅替换目标表示（标准CLIP vs 对抗鲁棒变体），在NSD和GOD数据集上执行fMRI-图像检索和零样本分类任务。
AI.result: 对抗鲁棒CLIP表示在两项任务上均一致优于标准CLIP，多项对齐指标更强；归因分析显示标准CLIP与鲁棒变体之间特征重要性差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 目标表示的选择影响神经解码性能，对抗鲁棒性可作为脑解码中有用的选择标准。

title: On the risk of coding before testing: An empirical study on LLM-based test generation workflow
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in software engineering workflows to generate both source code and test suites. This dual capability has enabled emerging development paradigms, including test-first and agentic workflows, where a single model is producing and validating implementations. However, these approaches assume that generated tests act as independent and reliable oracles - a fundamental requirement for effective software testing. In this paper, we challenge this assumption and investigate whether LLM-generated code biases the generation of subsequent tests. We introduce and empirically study the phenomenon of error propagation, where faults in generated code are systematically replicated in associated test artifacts. This leads to cases where incorrect implementations and tests are mutually consistent, masking defects rather than revealing them. We evaluate this effect across a range of programming tasks and agentic workflows, analyzing the consistency between generated code and test assertions, with particular focus on scenarios of aligned failures. Our study examines (i) whether erroneous code artifacts bias test generation, (ii) whether such bias persists under different prompting strategies, including chain-of-thought reasoning, and (iii) how errors propagate across multi-step workflows in which intermediate outputs are reused as context. The results show that error propagation is prevalent and impactful: generating tests after faulty code significantly reduces fault detection effectiveness compared to generating tests independently (14% vs. 25%). These findings highlight a fundamental limitation of current workflows, where lack of independence between generated artifacts undermines the reliability of automated testing. Furthermore, our results expose a previously underexplored threat to validity in empirical studies relying on coupled generation pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM生成代码时，错误会传播到后续生成的测试中，导致测试与错误代码相互一致，掩盖缺陷而非发现缺陷。实验显示，这种错误传播显著降低了故障检测效果（14% vs 25%独立生成）。
AI.motivation: 挑战"LLM生成的测试可以作为独立可靠oracle"这一假设，探究生成代码是否偏见性地影响后续测试生成，即错误传播现象。
AI.method: 通过编程任务和agentic工作流，对比在生成错误代码后生成测试与独立生成测试的故障检测效果，分析不同提示策略（包括思维链）下的偏差持续性，以及多步工作流中错误的传播路径。
AI.result: 错误传播普遍且影响显著：生成错误代码后再生成测试的故障检测率仅14%，而独立生成测试可达25%。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM驱动的工作流中，生成产物之间缺乏独立性，破坏了自动化测试的可靠性，且对依赖耦合生成管线的实证研究构成未充分探索的有效性威胁。

title: Progressive Refinement: An Iterative Pseudo-Labeling Approach for Mandarin-English Code-Switching ASR
summary: Code-switching (CS), alternating languages within the same utterance, poses significant challenges for automatic speech recognition (ASR) due to limited CS training data. This paper applies an iterative pseudo-labeling training approach to CS-ASR for the first time, demonstrating its effectiveness in leveraging unlabeled data to improve CS-ASR performance. The approach comprises three phases: pseudo-label generation, two-stage bilingual model training, and iterative improvements. It begins by generating pseudo-labels from a large unlabeled corpus, creating a semi-supervised dataset. This dataset supports a two-stage training framework where the model is pre-trained and then fine-tuned on supervised CS data. Iterative refinements further enhance the model's accuracy in handling complex CS scenarios. Our approach significantly advances CS-ASR systems, achieving notable Mix Error Rate (MER) reductions on SEAME's devman (6.35%) and devsge (8.29%) subsets.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将迭代伪标签训练方法应用于语码转换语音识别（CS-ASR），通过三阶段流程（伪标签生成、双语两阶段训练、迭代优化）利用无标签数据显著提升性能，在SEAME数据集上实现了6.35%-8.29%的混合错误率降低。
AI.motivation: 语码转换（CS）数据稀缺使得自动语音识别（ASR）面临挑战，现有方法受限于标注数据不足，难以有效处理语言交替的复杂场景。
AI.method: 提出迭代伪标签训练方法，包含三个阶段：(1) 从大规模无标签语料生成伪标签构建半监督数据集；(2) 两阶段双语模型训练：先预训练，再用有监督CS数据微调；(3) 通过迭代优化不断提升模型对复杂CS场景的处理能力。
AI.result: 在SEAME数据集上，devman子集MER降低6.35%，devsge子集MER降低8.29%。
AI.conclusion: 迭代伪标签训练是提升CS-ASR性能的有效方案，能充分利用无标签数据缓解数据稀缺问题，显著推进了语码转换语音识别技术的发展。

title: FairFlow: Demystifying and Mitigating Stereotype Bias in Text-to-Image Diffusion Transformers
summary: Multimodal diffusion transformers (MM-DiTs) have emerged as the prevalent backbone for modern text-to-image generation systems. However, they exhibit critical alignment vulnerabilities, systematically manifesting severe stereotype biases even under benign prompts. This poses a significant risk of algorithmic discrimination in deployed systems. Since most existing mitigation strategies were tailored for legacy U-Net architectures, the precise remediation of these vulnerabilities in MM-DiTs remains a critical open challenge. In this work, we first investigate the root cause of this vulnerability via mechanistic analysis. We reveal that bias representations in MM-DiTs are not uniformly distributed across depth, but are mediated by a sparse set of layers functioning as internal semantic binding hubs. These hubs exhibit a stage-wise propagation driving bias manifestation: early hubs establish the structural templates susceptible to bias, middle hubs actively extract core stereotypical concepts from textual conditioning, and late hubs globally solidify these biases through visual self-attention. Leveraging these architectural insights, we propose FairFlow, an intrinsic, mechanism-guided mitigation framework. FairFlow acts as an internal regulator by employing sparse steering: it learns attribute-specific fair directions and injects them exclusively at the identified semantic hubs within a constrained inference window. Evaluations on FLUX.1-dev and Stable Diffusion~3 demonstrate that FairFlow effectively neutralizes these stereotypical vulnerabilities across gender, race, and intersectional settings, achieving an optimal fairness-fidelity balance. With near-zero inference overhead and robustness to complex prompts, FairFlow provides a lightweight and practical bias mitigation for large-scale deployed MM-DiT systems. Code and datasets will be publicly released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态扩散Transformer（MM-DiT）存在系统性偏见，通过机制分析揭示偏见由稀疏层（语义绑定枢纽）以阶段性方式传播，并提出FairFlow——一种基于机制引导的轻量级偏见缓解框架，通过在关键枢纽层注入特定方向的公平向量实现高效的偏见中和。
AI.motivation: 现有的偏见缓解方法主要针对传统U-Net架构设计，无法直接应用于新兴的MM-DiT，且MM-DiT在生成图像时系统性表现出严重的刻板偏见，存在算法歧视风险。
AI.method: 首先通过机制分析发现偏见表征并非均匀分布，而是由稀疏的语义绑定枢纽层以阶段方式传播（早期建立易偏结构模板、中期提取刻板概念、后期全局固化偏见）；提出FairFlow，学习特定属性的公平方向向量，仅在推理窗口内的关键枢纽层注入这些向量进行稀疏干预。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和Stable Diffusion 3上的实验表明，FairFlow有效消除了性别、种族及交叉场景下的刻板偏见，实现了公平性与生成质量的平衡，且推理开销近乎为零，对复杂提示具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FairFlow是一种轻量级、实用且可大规模部署的MM-DiT偏见缓解方案，揭示了模型内部偏见传播机制并为后续公平性研究提供了新思路。

title: Intent-Based Mutation Testing: From Naturally Written Programming Intents to Mutants
summary: This paper presents intent-based mutation testing, a testing approach that generates mutations by changing the programming intents that are implemented in the programs under test. In contrast to traditional mutation testing, which changes (mutates) the way programs are written, intent mutation changes (mutates) the behavior of the programs by producing mutations that implement (slightly) different intents than those implemented in the original program. The mutations of the programming intents represent possible corner cases and misunderstandings of the program behavior, i.e., program specifications, and thus can capture different classes of faults than traditional (syntax-based) mutation. Moreover, since programming intents can be implemented in different ways, intent-based mutation testing can generate diverse and complex mutations that are close to the original programming intents (specifications) and thus direct testing towards the intent variants of the program behavior/specifications. We implement intent-based mutation testing using Large Language Models (LLMs) that mutate programming intents and transform them into mutants. We evaluate intent-based mutation on 29 programs and show that it generates mutations that are syntactically complex, semantically diverse, and quite different (semantically) from the traditional ones. We also show that 55% of the intent-based mutations are not subsumed by traditional mutations. Overall, our analysis shows that intent-based mutation testing can be a powerful complement to traditional (syntax-based) mutation testing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于意图的变异测试方法，通过LLM变异程序意图而非语法来生成突变体，能产生与传统语法变异不同的、语义多样的突变，55%的意图突变不被传统突变包含，可作为有力补充。
AI.motivation: 传统变异测试仅改变程序语法（代码写法），难以捕捉与规范理解错误相关的缺陷。作者希望从更高抽象的"编程意图"层面对程序进行变异，以覆盖传统方法遗漏的故障类别。
AI.method: 1) 利用LLM对编程意图（程序规范/规格说明）进行变异，产生意图变体；2) 将变异后的意图转化为对应的程序突变体；3) 在29个程序上评估，与传统语法变异进行对比。
AI.result: 1) 意图突变生成的突变体语法复杂、语义多样；2) 55%的意图突变不被传统语法突变所包含（非子集关系）；3) 意图突变与传统突变在语义上有显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 基于意图的变异测试可以成为传统语法变异测试的有力补充，通过覆盖不同类别的缺陷来提升测试充分性。

title: Streaming Neural Speech Codecs through Time-Invariant Representations
summary:
Neural speech codecs are increasingly used as intermediate representations in codec-based speech generation systems. TiCodec introduces a factorized representation that separates time-varying speech content from time-invariant information through a Time-Invariant Representation Extraction (TIRE) module, potentially reducing the amount of information that must be modeled at the frame-level.
  In this work, we investigate the nature of the information captured by TIRE representations and their suitability for low-latency speech processing. Using a series of probing tasks, we analyze the influence of the encoder layer and show that intermediate layers capture complementary speaker- and environment-related information while containing little linguistic content. We further study several segment selection strategies for TIRE training and demonstrate that cross-file sampling improves the robustness of invariant representations. Based on these findings, we propose Dual-TIRE, a multi-level architecture that exploits the complementarity of different encoder layers and improves speech reconstruction quality and speaker similarity.
  Finally, we evaluate TiCodec in a streaming inference setting using successive 660ms processing blocks. Results show that streaming operation can be achieved without significant degradation in reconstruction performance, highlighting the potential of factorized neural codec representations for future low-latency speech generation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究TiCodec中时间不变性表示（TIRE）的特性，提出Dual-TIRE多层级架构提升语音重建质量，并验证了在流式推理场景下的低延迟潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索TiCodec中TIRE表示捕获信息的本质，评估其在低延迟语音处理中的适用性，并进一步优化其性能。
AI.method: 使用探测任务分析编码器层的影响；研究多种TIRE训练的片段选择策略；提出Dual-TIRE多层级架构；在660ms处理块的流式推理设置下评估。
AI.result: 中间编码器层捕获说话人和环境信息但几乎不含语言内容；跨文件采样提升不变性表示的鲁棒性；Dual-TIRE提升重建质量和说话人相似度；流式操作无明显性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 因式分解神经编解码器表示在低延迟语音生成系统中具有潜力，Dual-TIRE架构有效利用了不同编码器层的互补性。

title: BVS: Bayesian Visual Search with Multimodal Large Language Model for Fine-grained Perception
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. Project page with code: https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/BVS_ICML2026
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate impressive general capabilities, they struggle with fine-grained perception in ultra-high-resolution (UHR) images, particularly for tiny objects in cluttered scenes. Existing methods face a dilemma: they either rely on inefficient prior-free scanning, or depend on static prior-driven heuristics that lack posterior correction to rectify initial model biases. To address this, we propose BVS (Bayesian Visual Search), a framework that formulates perception as a global optimization problem over a continuous spatial-scale manifold. Specifically, BVS bridges prior guidance with posterior correction: it utilizes an early-stop attention rollout of MLLM to construct reasoning-aware priors, while employing a scale-aware non-stationary kernel and GP-UCB to dynamically rectify noise and recover missing information in the prior through iterative local observations. We provide theoretical guarantees via sub-linear regret bounds, and extensive experiments demonstrate that BVS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with a superior trade-off between accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: BVS（贝叶斯视觉搜索）将超高分辨率图像中的精细感知建模为连续空间-尺度流形上的全局优化问题，通过早期停止注意力产出推理感知先验，并结合尺度感知非平稳核与GP-UCB进行后验校正，在精度与效率之间取得更优权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在处理超高分辨率图像中的微小目标时表现不佳，现有方法要么依赖低效的无先验扫描，要么依赖静态先验驱动启发式方法，缺乏后验校正来修正初始模型偏差。
AI.method: 提出BVS框架，将感知建模为连续空间-尺度流形上的全局优化问题。利用MLLM的早期停止注意力产出推理感知先验，采用尺度感知非平稳核和GP-UCB动态校正噪声并恢复先验中缺失的信息。
AI.result: 提供了亚线性遗憾界的理论保证，实验结果表明BVS在精度与效率的权衡上显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: BVS通过将先验引导与后验校正相结合，有效解决了UHR图像中微小目标的精细感知难题，在理论上具有保证，实践中达到更优的精度-效率平衡。

title: Is Three the Magic Number? An Empirical Evaluation of LLM-Based Repair Loops
summary: Iterative repair loops have become a core design pattern in LLM-based software engineering systems. These workflows repeatedly generate, validate, and repair artifacts using feedback such as compiler errors or test failures. Despite their widespread use, the impact of repair-loop iteration limits remains poorly understood, as most prior work adopts fixed, often arbitrary, repair budgets. We study repair-loop effectiveness across multiple software engineering tasks, including code generation, test generation, and code translation. Across several representative workflows, datasets, and contemporary low-cost LLMs, we observe a consistent pattern of diminishing returns: the first three to four repair iterations account for most achievable gains, while later iterations contribute only marginal improvements. We further find that repair behavior is influenced more strongly by workflow orchestration and feedback design than by the underlying model itself. These results suggest that repair budgets should be treated as an explicit experimental variable, as they directly affect evaluation outcomes, computational cost, runtime, and reproducibility in LLM-based software engineering research.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM软件工程系统中修复循环的迭代限制，发现在代码生成、测试生成和代码翻译等任务中，前3-4次修复迭代能带来绝大部分收益，后续迭代收益递减。修复行为受工作流编排和反馈设计影响更大，而非底层模型本身，建议将修复预算作为显式实验变量。
AI.motivation: 尽管修复循环已成为LLM软件工程系统的核心设计模式，但循环迭代次数限制的影响尚未被充分理解，以往研究采用固定且往往任意的修复预算。
AI.method: 在代码生成、测试生成和代码翻译等多个任务上，使用多种代表性工作流、数据集和低成本LLM，系统性地研究修复循环的有效性。
AI.result: 观察到一致的收益递减模式：前3-4次修复迭代贡献了绝大部分收益，后续迭代改进甚微；修复行为受工作流编排和反馈设计的影响强于底层模型本身。
AI.conclusion: 修复预算应被视为显式实验变量，因为它直接影响评估结果、计算成本、运行时间和可重复性。

title: SalAngaBhava: A Sinhala Market Dataset for Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis
summary: Sentiment analysis has been a primary domain under Natural Language Processing (NLP) from its inception as it plays a vital role in both real-world and research applications. In high-resource languages, this has been extended a step further, and instead of predicting sentiment at the sentence level, models have been developed to detect more fine-grained sentiments at aspect level. However, in order to conduct this fine-grained Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA), datasets annotated with aspects and sentiments toward the said aspects is required. Such datasets are lacking for low-resources languages among which, we can count Sinhala, an Indo-Aryan languages used primarily in Sri Lanka. In this work, we introduce, SalAngaBhava, a new Sinhala Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis dataset which contains Sinhala product reviews that are manually labeled with aspect terms and the associated sentiments (positive, negative, neutral). The data was collected from domain-relevant sources such as user-generated reviews and comments, and was annotated following carefully defined guidelines to ensure consistency and quality. The dataset consists of sentences and aspect-sentiment pairs, encompassing a considerable range of aspects from several domains. The analysis confirms that the dataset is well-structured and sufficiently balanced for ABSA research. This dataset can be used as a benchmark and facilitates further studies related to Sinhala natural language processing, and low-resource sentiment analysis tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SalAngaBhava，一个面向僧伽罗语（低资源语言）的方面级情感分析（ABSA）数据集，包含来自多个领域的产品评论，手动标注了方面词及其情感极性（积极、消极、中立），为低资源语言ABSA研究提供了基准资源。
AI.motivation: 现有ABSA研究主要集中在高资源语言，低资源语言（如僧伽罗语）缺乏标注了方面词和情感的细粒度情感分析数据集，限制了相关研究的发展。
AI.method: 从领域相关的用户生成评论和留言中收集数据，制定详细的标注指南进行人工标注，标注内容包括方面词及其对应的情感极性（积极、消极、中立），最终形成包含句子和方面-情感对的数据集。
AI.result: 构建了一个覆盖多个领域、结构良好、类别足够均衡的僧伽罗语ABSA数据集，包含丰富的句子和方面-情感对。
AI.conclusion: SalAngaBhava可作为僧伽罗语NLP和低资源情感分析任务的基准数据集，为后续相关研究提供基础支持。

title: Seeing Through WiFi: Lightweight Human Pose Estimation with Dynamic Kernel Attention
